Example: Mi corazón late rápido cuando corro.

English: lung
Meaning: El pulmón permite respirar y oxigenar la sangre.
Example: Los pulmones se llenan de aire al respirar.

English: liver
Meaning: El hígado es un órgano que ayuda a digerir y limpiar la sangre.
Example: El médico revisó mi hígado.

English: stomach
Meaning: El estómago es el órgano que procesa los alimentos.
Example: Mi estómago ronca cuando tengo hambre.

English: kidney
Meaning: El riñón filtra la sangre y produce orina.
Example: El riñón izquierdo duele hoy.

English: neck
Meaning: El cuello une la cabeza con el cuerpo.
Example: Me duele el cuello por estudiar.

English: chest
Meaning: El pecho está en la parte frontal superior del torso.
Example: Me arde el pecho cuando resfrío.

English: hand
Meaning: La mano es el extremo del brazo con dedos.
Example: Lavo bien mis manos.

English: thigh
Meaning: El muslo es la parte superior de la pierna.
Example: El muslo me dolió al correr.

English: knee
Meaning: La rodilla es la articulación entre la pierna y la espinilla.
Example: Mi rodilla se hinchó.

English: shin
Meaning: La espinilla es la parte frontal de la pierna inferior.
Example: Me raspé la espinilla.

English: foot
Meaning: El pie sostiene el cuerpo y camina.
Example: Me dolió el pie.

English: toenail
Meaning: La uña del pie cubre y protege la punta del pie.
Example: Mi uña del pie duele.

column1: dedo gordo del pie
column2:
English: big toe
Meaning: El dedo gordo es el primer dedo más grande del pie.
Example: Presioné el dedo gordo del pie.

English: leg
Meaning: La pierna sostiene el cuerpo y permite caminar.
Example: Mi pierna está cansada.

English: palm
Meaning: La palma es la parte interna de la mano.
Example: La palma de la mano está húmeda.

English: thumb
Meaning: El pulgar es el dedo grueso de la mano.
Example: Le doblé el pulgar al agarrar la mochila.

English: wrist
Meaning: La muñeca une la mano con el brazo.
Example: Me torcí la muñeca.

English: arm
Meaning: El brazo es la parte superior de la extremidad superior.
Example: Mi brazo es fuerte.

English: body
Meaning: El cuerpo es el conjunto de todas las partes de una persona.
Example: Mi cuerpo está cansado.

English: armpit
Meaning: La axila está debajo de la unión del brazo y el torso.
Example: Me puse desodorante en la axila.

English: back
Meaning: La espalda es la parte posterior del cuerpo.
Example: Me duele la espalda.

English: hip
Meaning: La cadera une la pelvis con la pierna.
Example: Mi cadera cruje al caminar.

English: bottom
Meaning: La parte inferior es la zona más baja o trasera.
Example: Se sentó en el fondo de la silla.

English: heel
Meaning: El talón es la parte trasera del pie.
Example: Me golpeé el talón en la mesa.

English: ankle
Meaning: El tobillo une pie y pierna.
Example: Me torcí el tobillo.

English: calf
Meaning: La pantorrilla es la parte trasera de la pierna.
Example: Me dolió la pantorrilla.

English: fingernail
Meaning: La uña de la mano cubre y protege la punta de los dedos.
Example: Tengo la uña de la mano rota.

English: knuckle
Meaning: El nudillo es la articulación visible de los dedos.
Example: Me dolía el nudillo.

English: waist
Meaning: La cintura es la parte media entre pecho y caderas.
Example: La cintura se me ensanchó.

English: fore arm
Meaning: El antebrazo está entre muñeca y codo.
Example: Me apreté el antebrazo del perro.

English: elbow
Meaning: El codo es la articulación que une brazo y antebrazo.
Example: Me dolía el codo al moverlo.

English: upper arm
Meaning: El brazo superior es la parte alta del brazo.
Example: Entreno el brazo superior.

English: shoulder
Meaning: El hombro une el brazo con el tórax.
Example: Me pesa la mochila sobre el hombro.

English: brother
Meaning: Hermano significa varón de la familia o mismo padre/madre.
Example: Mi hermano estudia música.

English: sister
Meaning: Hermana es la persona femenina con la misma familia.
Example: Mi hermana cocina bien.

English: father, dad
Meaning: Padre es quien engendra o cría a un hijo.
Example: Mi padre llega tarde.

English: mother, mom
Meaning: Madre es la persona que da vida y cuida a su hijo.
Example: Mi madre prepara café.

English: my mother's husband
Meaning: El padrastro es el marido de tu madre sin parentesco biológico.
Example: Mi padrastro me llevó al cine.
Notes: Ambigüedad: depende de si tu madre se volvió a casar.

English: my father's wife
Meaning: Madrastra es la esposa de tu padre sin ser tu madre biológica.
Example: La madrastra me llevó al médico.

English: parents
Meaning: Padres son la mamá y el papá de una persona.
Example: Mis padres viven en Madrid.

English: grandfather, grandpa
Meaning: Abuelo es el padre del padre o de la madre.
Example: Mi abuelo cuenta buenas historias.

English: grandmother, grandma
Meaning: Abuela es la madre del padre o de la madre.
Example: La abuela vive cerca.

English: grandparents
Meaning: Abuelos son el abuelo y la abuela de alguien.
Example: Mis abuelos nos visitan los domingos.

English: uncle
Meaning: Tío es el hermano de tu padre o madre.
Example: Mi tío vive en otra ciudad.

English: aunt
Meaning: La tía es la hermana de tu padre o de tu madre.
Example: Mi tía vive lejos.

English: cousin
Meaning: Primo o prima es el hijo de los hermanos de tus padres.
Example: Mi primo vino ayer.

column1: sobrina de mis padres
column2:
English: my parents' niece
Meaning: La sobrina de los padres es un primo o prima para ti.
Example: La sobrina de mis padres vive conmigo.
Notes: La fórmula es más literal y ambigua.

English: cousin
Meaning: Primo o prima es el hijo de los hermanos de tus padres.
Example: Mi primo vino ayer.

column1: sobrino de mis padres
column2:
English: my parents' nephew
Meaning: El sobrino de los padres también se considera primo o prima.
Example: Su sobrino de mis padres estudia ingeniería.
Notes: La fórmula es más literal y ambigua.

English: red
Meaning: Rojo es un color de la rueda cromática.
Example: La manzana es roja.

English: pink
Meaning: Rosa es un color claro entre rojo y blanco.
Example: Me gusta el vestido rosa.

English: green
Meaning: Verde es el color de la naturaleza.
Example: La hierba es verde.

English: lime green
Meaning: Verde lima es un tono de verde brillante.
Example: Quiero una camisa verde lima.

English: teal
Meaning: Verde azulado es un color entre verde y azul.
Example: El sofá es verde azulado.

English: blue
Meaning: Azul es un color del cielo y del mar.
Example: El cielo está azul.

English: navy
Meaning: Azul marino es un azul muy oscuro.
Example: Llevaba un abrigo azul marino.

English: yellow
Meaning: Amarillo es el color del sol.
Example: El plátano está amarillo.

English: purple
Meaning: Morado es un color entre azul y rojo.
Example: La flor es morada.

English: brown
Meaning: Marrón es un color parecido al de la tierra.
Example: Sus botas son marrones.

English: beige
Meaning: Beige es un color crema-grisáceo neutro.
Example: El sofá es color beige.

English: orange
Meaning: Naranja es el color entre rojo y amarillo.
Example: La pelota es naranja.

English: white
Meaning: Blanco es el color de la luz sin tinte.
Example: La nieve es blanca.

English: black
Meaning: Negro es la ausencia de color visible.
Example: El auto es negro.

English: gray
Meaning: Gris es un color entre negro y blanco.
Example: El cielo está gris.

English: agree Meaning: Estar de acuerdo es compartir la misma opinión o creencia. Example: Estoy de acuerdo contigo. English source: To agree is to have the same opinion or belief as another person. The students agree they have too much homework.

English: alcohol Meaning: El alcohol es una bebida fermentada o destilada que puede embriagar. Example: No conduzcas si bebes alcohol. English source: Alcohol is a type of drink that can make people drunk. A person should not drive a car after he or she has been drinking alcohol.
English: arrive Meaning: Llegar significa alcanzar un lugar. Example: Ella llegó temprano a casa. English source: To arrive is to get somewhere. They arrived at school at 7 a.m.
English: August Meaning: Agosto es el octavo mes del año. Example: Mi cumpleaños es en agosto. English source: August is the eighth month of the year. Is your birthday in August?

English: boat Meaning: Un barco es un vehículo que navega sobre el agua. Example: El barco cruza el lago. English source: A boat is a vehicle that moves across water. There is a small boat on the lake.
English: breakfast Meaning: El desayuno es la comida de la mañana. Example: Tomé café en el desayuno. English source: Breakfast is the morning meal. I ate eggs for breakfast.

English: camera Meaning: La cámara es un equipo para tomar fotografías. Example: Traje mi cámara al viaje. English source: A camera is a piece of equipment that takes pictures. I brought my camera on my vacation.

English: capital Meaning: La capital es la ciudad principal de un país. Example: La capital de Francia es París. English source: A capital is a city where a country’s government is based. The capital of the United States is Washington, D.C.
English: catch Meaning: Atrapar es coger algo que se mueve. Example: ¿Atrapaste la pelota? English source: To catch is to grab or get something. Did you catch the ball during the baseball game?
English: duck Meaning: El pato es un ave acuática pequeña. Example: Alimenté al pato en el lago. English source: A duck is a small water bird. People feed ducks at the lake.
English: enjoy Meaning: Disfrutar es tener placer en algo. Example: Disfruto caminar por la tarde. English source: To enjoy is to like something. The woman enjoys riding her bicycle.

English: invite Meaning: Invitar es pedir a alguien que asista a algo. Example: Invitaré a mis amigos a cenar. English source: To invite is to ask someone to come to a place or event. I will invite my friends to my birthday party.
English: love Meaning: Amar es sentir afecto intenso. Example: Amo a mi familia. English source: To love is to like something or someone a lot. I love my family very much.

English: month Meaning: El mes es una división de tiempo de aproximadamente 30 días. Example: Enero es el primer mes del año. English source: A month is one of 12 periods of time in one year. January is the first month of the year.

English: travel Meaning: Viajar es ir a otro lugar por ocio o trabajo. Example: Viajamos al sur en verano. English source: To travel is to go to a faraway place on vacation or business. They will travel to Argentina this summer.

English: typical Meaning: Típico significa normal o frecuente. Example: Mi desayuno típico es café y pan. English source: If something is typical, it is normal, or something that usually happens. My typical breakfast is toast and eggs.

English: visit Meaning: Visitar es ir a ver a alguien o un lugar. Example: Voy a visitar a mi abuela. English source: To visit is to go and spend time in another place or see another person. She wants to visit her grandmother.

English: weather Meaning: El clima describe temperatura y condiciones del aire. Example: Hoy el clima está frío y nublado. English source: Weather is the temperature and the state of the outdoors. Today’s weather is rainy and cloudy.
English: week Meaning: La semana dura siete días. Example: ¿Qué vas a hacer la próxima semana? English source: A week is a period of time that is seven days long. What are you doing next week?

English: wine Meaning: El vino es una bebida alcohólica de uvas fermentadas. Example: Compré una botella de vino. English source: Wine is an alcoholic drink made from grapes. The store carried both red and white wine.

English: adventure Meaning: Aventura es una experiencia emocionante. Example: La excursión fue una gran aventura. English source: An adventure is a fun or exciting thing that you do. Riding in the rough water was an adventure.

English: approach Meaning: Acercarse es moverse hacia algo o alguien. Example: Ella se acercó al escenario. English source: To approach something means to move close to it. The boy approached his school.

English: carefully Meaning: Cuidadosamente significa con mucha atención. Example: La niña subió las escaleras cuidadosamente. English source: Carefully means with great attention, especially to detail or safety. The baby carefully climbed down the stairs.

English: chemical Meaning: Un químico es una sustancia usada en procesos químicos. Example: El laboratorio usó varios químicos. English source: A chemical is something that scientists use in chemistry. The scientist mixed the chemicals.

English: create Meaning: Crear es producir algo que no existía antes. Example: Ella creó un juego nuevo. English source: To create means to make something new. She created an igloo from blocks of snow.

English: evil Meaning: Malvado describe algo cruel o dañino. Example: Sus actos fueron malvados. English source: Evil describes something or someone bad or cruel, not good. They felt a strange, evil presence as they got closer to the house.

English: experiment Meaning: Un experimento prueba una idea o hipótesis. Example: Hicimos un experimento en clase. English source: An experiment is a test that you do to see what will happen. The student did an experiment in science class.
English: kill Meaning: Matar es causar la muerte a un ser vivo. Example: Matar insectos no siempre es lo mejor. English source: To kill someone or something is to make them die. I killed the fly.

English: laboratory Meaning: El laboratorio es un lugar para hacer pruebas científicas. Example: La química se hace en el laboratorio. English source: A laboratory is a room where a scientist works. My mother works in a laboratory.

English: laugh Meaning: Reír es expresar alegría con sonidos de voz. Example: Ella ríe cuando ve una broma. English source: Laugh is the sound made when someone is happy or a funny thing occurs. The sound of her laugh filled the room.

English: loud Meaning: Fuerte es lo que se oye con mucha intensidad. Example: El audio suena fuerte. English source: If a sound is loud, it is strong and very easy to hear. The man’s voice was so loud that we all could hear him.

English: nervous Meaning: Nervioso describe a alguien inquieto o con ansiedad. Example: Estoy nervioso antes del examen. English source: When a person is nervous, they think something bad will happen. The boy became nervous when he heard the news.
English: noise Meaning: Ruido es un sonido, a veces molesto. Example: El ruido del motor despierta al bebé. English source: A noise is an unpleasant sound. The crying baby made a loud noise.

English: project Meaning: Un proyecto es una tarea con objetivo y tiempo. Example: Presenté mi proyecto hoy. English source: A project is a type of work that you do for school or a job. His afternoon work project was to paint the room green.

English: scare Meaning: Asustar es provocar miedo en alguien. Example: El ruido me asustó. English source: To scare someone is to make them feel afraid. My uncle was scared by what he saw in the room.

English: secret Meaning: Un secreto es algo que se guarda en silencio. Example: Guardamos el secreto entre dos. English source: A secret is something that you do not tell other people. The two boys were sharing a secret.
English: shout Meaning: Gritar es hablar muy fuerte. Example: Gritó por ayuda. English source: To shout is to say something loudly. My boss shouted at me because I was late for work.

English: smell Meaning: Oler es detectar un olor con la nariz. Example: La niña olió la flor. English source: To smell something means to use your nose to sense it. The two friends smelled the flower.

English: terrible Meaning: Terrible significa muy malo o grave. Example: La noticia fue terrible para todos. English source: If something is terrible, it is very bad. The way he treated his classmate was terrible.

English: worse Meaning: Peor es una calidad o situación más mala. Example: Este mes fue peor que el anterior. English source: If something is worse, it is of poorer quality than another thing. Business was worse this month than last month.
English: alien Meaning: Un extraterrestre viene de otro mundo. Example: El extraterrestre llegó en silencio. English source: An alien is a creature from a different world. The alien came in peace.

English: among Meaning: Entre significa dentro de un grupo o rodeado por. Example: Hay una manzana entre las frutas. English source: If you are among certain things, they are all around you. There was a red apple among the green ones.
English: chart Meaning: Un gráfico organiza información visualmente. Example: Mira el gráfico de ventas. English source: A chart is a list of information. We used a chart to see how we had improved.

English: cloud Meaning: La nube es una masa de vapor en el cielo. Example: Las nubes cubrían el cielo. English source: A cloud is a group of water drops in the sky. The sky was filled with white clouds.

English: describe Meaning: Describir es decir cómo es algo. Example: La niña describió su casa. English source: To describe is to say or write what someone or something is like. They described their tree as colorful, with gold ribbon and a star.

English: ever Meaning: Alguna vez indica "en algún momento". Example: Ir a esquiar el invierno pasado fue lo más divertido que he hecho alguna vez. English source: Ever means at any time. Going skiing last winter was the most fun I’ve ever had.

English: fail Meaning: Fallar es no lograr lo que se intenta. Example: Fallé el examen. English source: To fail means you do not succeed in what you try to do. Since he failed to get the job, he was sad.

English: grade Meaning: La calificación es la nota de una evaluación. Example: Saqué buena calificación. English source: A grade is a score or mark given to someone’s work. I managed to get good grades on my report card.

English: instead Meaning: En lugar de significa sustituyendo algo por otra cosa. Example: Tomó té en lugar de café. English source: Instead means in place of. He ate the carrot instead of the ice cream.

English: library Meaning: La biblioteca es un lugar para leer y prestar libros. Example: La biblioteca abre a las nueve. English source: A library is a place where you go to read books. The library at school is full of books.

English: photograph Meaning: Una fotografía es una imagen fija tomada con una cámara. Example: Tomé una fotografía del atardecer. English source: I like taking photographs. I took this photograph with my cell phone.

English: planet Meaning: Un planeta es un cuerpo celeste que gira alrededor de una estrella. Example: Marte es un planeta. English source: A planet is a large round thing in space. Saturn is the planet with the ring around it.

English: report Meaning: Un informe describe información o resultados. Example: Entregué el informe de hoy. English source: A report is something someone writes for school or work. Karen had trouble writing her report.
English: several Meaning: Varios significa más de dos. Example: Leí varios libros. English source: Several is more than two but not many. He had to read several books for class.

English: shape Meaning: La forma es el contorno o aspecto de algo. Example: La forma del vaso es redonda. English source: An object’s shape is the arrangement of its sides and surfaces. Even with your eyes closed you can feel the shape of it.

English: solve Meaning: Resolver es encontrar la respuesta correcta. Example: Resolver el problema fue fácil. English source: To solve something is to find an answer to it. All the students could easily solve the math problem.

English: suddenly Meaning: De repente significa inesperadamente y sin aviso. Example: De pronto cambió el plan. English source: If something happens suddenly, it happens quickly and unexpectedly. I was surprised when my friends suddenly shouted, “Happy birthday!”
English: suppose Meaning: Suponer es adivinar o pensar probable. Example: Supongo que lloverá. English source: To suppose is to guess. I suppose I should go home now.

English: understand Meaning: Comprender es entender el sentido de algo. Example: Comprendo el mensaje. English source: To understand something you need to know what it means. Henry could not understand the message.
English: view Meaning: Ver es mirar con la vista. Example: Me gusta ver documentales. English source: To view is to look at something. Michael likes to view himself in the mirror.

English: appropriate Meaning: Apropiado es lo que conviene para una situación. Example: Ese gesto fue apropiado. English source: When a thing is appropriate, it is right or normal. It’s appropriate to wear a suit when you go to the office.
English: avoid Meaning: Evitar es mantenerse alejado de algo. Example: Evita la botella rota. English source: To avoid something is to stay away from it. Avoid the broken bottle on the floor.

English: behave Meaning: Comportarse es actuar de cierta forma. Example: Ella se comportó bien en clase. English source: To behave is to act in a particular way, especially to be good. She always behaves well when her father is around.

English: calm Meaning: Tranquilo significa sin nervios ni agitación. Example: Ahora estoy tranquilo. English source: When someone is calm, they do not get excited or upset. A nice warm bath makes me feel so calm.

English: concern Meaning: Preocupación es sentir inquietud por algo. Example: Tengo preocupación por mi perro. English source: Concern is a feeling of worry. I was filled with concern after reading the newspaper.

English: content Meaning: Satisfecho significa contento o tranquilo. Example: Estoy satisfecho con mi desayuno. English source: To be content is to be happy and not want more. The baby looked very content sitting on the floor.

English: expect Meaning: Esperar es prever que algo ocurrirá. Example: Espero que lleguen pronto. English source: If you expect something to happen, you believe it will happen. I expect the bus to be here very soon.

English: frequently Meaning: Frecuentemente significa muchas veces. Example: Nos vemos frecuentemente. English source: When something happens frequently, it happens often. We meet frequently, either at the beginning or end of the week.
English: habit Meaning: Un hábito es una conducta repetida. Example: Fumar es un mal hábito. English source: A habit is a thing that you do often. Smoking is a bad habit that can kill you.
English: instruct Meaning: Instruir es enseñar de forma clara. Example: El profesor me instruyó hoy. English source: To instruct is to teach. My teacher instructs us in several subjects.

English: issue Meaning: Un problema es un tema importante que requiere solución. Example: Hablaron del problema del agua. English source: An issue is an important topic. The men spoke about issues that were important to the people.
English: none Meaning: Ninguno significa ausencia total de algo. Example: No queda ninguno. English source: None means not any of something. He spent all his money. There is none left.

English: patient Meaning: Paciente describe calma y tolerancia. Example: Ella fue paciente en la fila. English source: If people are patient, they don’t become angry or upset easily. I had to be patient and wait until 5 o’clock to leave.

English: positive Meaning: Positivo significa favorable o optimista. Example: Pensamos con visión positiva. English source: If something is positive, it is good. She has a positive future ahead of her after finishing college.

English: punish Meaning: Castigar es aplicar una sanción por una falta. Example: Me castigaron por llegar tarde. English source: To punish means to make someone suffer for breaking the rules or laws. To punish me, my teacher had me stand in the corner.

English: represent Meaning: Representar es hablar en nombre de alguien. Example: El abogado me representa en juicio. English source: To represent is to speak or act for a person or group. My lawyer will represent me in court.

English: shake Meaning: Agitar es mover algo o alguien con movimientos leves o rápidos. Example: Ella agitó la mano al despedirse. English source: To shake is to move back and forth or up and down quickly. When people shake hands, it usually means they agree.

English: spread Meaning: Extender es repartir algo sobre una superficie. Example: Extendí mantequilla en el pan. English source: To spread is to move out to cover a larger area. I like to spread butter on my toast.
English: stroll Meaning: Pasear es caminar sin prisa. Example: Paseamos por el parque. English source: To stroll means to walk slowly and calmly. My dog and I strolled through the park today.
English: village Meaning: Un pueblo es una localidad pequeña. Example: Vivimos en un pueblo. English source: A village is a very small town. There are only a few houses in my village.

English: active Meaning: Activo significa en movimiento o participando. Example: Haz ejercicio para estar activo. English source: When someone is active, they move a lot or have a lot of things to do. It is important to be active and not sit around all the time.
English: adult Meaning: Adulto es una persona mayor de edad. Example: Es adulto y puede conducir. English source: An adult is a person who is more than 18 years old. My mom and dad are adults.
English: age Meaning: La edad es el número de años vividos. Example: Mi edad es treinta. English source: Age is how many years someone has lived. She died at the age of 80.
English: bad Meaning: Malo significa de mala calidad o desagradable. Example: Hoy es un día malo. English source: When something is bad, it is not good. She is unhappy because she had a bad day.

English: balance Meaning: El equilibrio es la proporción o estabilidad entre partes. Example: Mantén equilibrio en tu vida. English source: Balance is when two or more things are equal. A good balance between work and fun helps keep you healthy.

English: bike Meaning: La bicicleta se mueve por pedaleo humano. Example: Voy en bicicleta al trabajo. English source: A bike is a vehicle with two wheels powered by a human. He rides his bike to school every day.

English: choose Meaning: Elegir es seleccionar una opción. Example: Elijo café o té. English source: To choose is to pick something or make a decision. I have to choose between taking art classes and sports lessons.

English: doctor Meaning: El médico atiende personas enfermas. Example: Voy al médico mañana. English source: A doctor is a person who studies medicine and helps sick people. You should go to the doctor when you are sick.

English: during Meaning: Durante indica que algo pasa en el tiempo de otra acción. Example: Dormimos durante la película. English source: During an event means while the event was happening. Did you sleep during the movie?

English: football Meaning: El fútbol es un deporte de equipo con balón. Example: Jugamos fútbol los domingos. English source: Football is a sport with eleven members and an oval-shaped ball. Football is a popular sport in the United States.
English: fun Meaning: Divertido significa que produce placer. Example: La fiesta fue divertida. English source: When something is fun, it is enjoyable. We had a fun time at the birthday party.

English: game Meaning: Un juego es una actividad con reglas y participación. Example: Jugamos un juego de mesa. English source: A game is an activity where people compete against each other. Let’s play a board game tonight.

English: heart Meaning: El corazón bombea la sangre por el cuerpo. Example: Mi corazón late rápido cuando estoy nervioso. English source: A heart is an organ that keeps the body alive. My heart beats fast when I am nervous.

English: golf Meaning: El golf es un deporte con palos y una pelota pequeña. Example: Jugamos golf los fines de semana. English source: Golf is a sport with clubs and a small white ball. People play golf in nice weather.

English: increase Meaning: Aumentar es hacer crecer una cantidad o intensidad. Example: Aumentaré la velocidad. English source: To increase is to make something larger. I will increase my score if I study for the test.

English: life Meaning: Vida es el tiempo de existir de los seres vivos. Example: La vida puede cambiar de un día a otro. English source: Life is the time when a person is alive. My grandfather had a long life.

English: kilometer Meaning: Un kilómetro es una medida de distancia igual a mil metros. Example: Un maratón mide 42,2 kilómetros. English source: A kilometer is a unit of measurement that is 1,000 meters. A marathon is 42.2 kilometers.

English: often Meaning: A menudo significa repetido o frecuente. Example: A menudo leo por la noche. English source: Often is when something happens many times. He often goes to bed early during the week.

English: plenty Meaning: Mucho indica una cantidad abundante. Example: Tengo mucha fruta en casa. English source: If you have plenty of something, there is a lot of it. We have plenty of fruit, so help yourself.

English: weight Meaning: Peso es la medida de la fuerza de gravedad sobre un cuerpo. Example: Subió mi peso está semana. English source: Weight is how heavy something or someone is. I gained weight because I ate a lot of pizza.

English: apart Meaning: Apart significa distantes o no juntos. Example: Se sentaron separados en la fila. English source: When people or things are apart, they are not next to each other. They moved apart and then came back together.

English: attribute Meaning: Atributo es una cualidad o característica. Example: Su mayor atributo es la paciencia. English source: An attribute is a characteristic of a person or thing. He isn’t very clever, but he does have some other positive attributes.

English: bilingual Meaning: Bilíngüe describe a alguien que habla dos idiomas. Example: Mi hermana es bilíngüe. English source: A bilingual person can speak two languages. Since you already know English, after learning French you’ll be bilingual.

English: completely Meaning: Totalmente significa de forma absoluta. Example: Estoy totalmente seguro. English source: Something completely different is very, very different from before. I was completely wrong.

English: dash Meaning: Correr es moverse con rapidez usando piernas. Example: Corrió hacia la salida. English source: To dash means to run or move quickly. Helen dashed up the stairs so she wouldn’t be late for her appointment.

English: disgust Meaning: Asco es una sensación de rechazo. Example: Sentí asco al ver eso. English source: Disgust is a feeling of distaste and anger caused by something rude or unpleasant. He felt disgust toward his date because she had such terrible eating habits.

English: fashionable Meaning: Moderno o de moda es lo que hoy se considera popular. Example: Ese estilo es muy moderno. English source: Something fashionable is what people like to wear and do now. It is very fashionable to wear a hat.

English: foreign Meaning: Extranjero significa de otro país o no habitual aquí. Example: Probé comida extranjera ayer. English source: Something foreign is something we are not used to. He has travelled widely in foreign countries.

English: gulf Meaning: Brecha es una separación grande en opinión o relación. Example: Hay una brecha entre ellos. English source: A gulf is a gap between people who do not understand each other. There has been a gulf between James and Tony since their parents died.

English: mirror Meaning: El espejo refleja la imagen de personas y objetos. Example: Usó el espejo para dirigir luz hacia sus ojos. English source: A mirror is usually made of glass, and you can see yourself in it. He used the mirror to shine light in their eyes.

English: natural Meaning: Natural significa que no está hecho por humanos. Example: El paisaje natural está protegido. English source: Things that are natural are not made by people. We need to take care of the natural world.
English: nowadays Meaning: Hoy en día significa en la época actual. Example: Hoy en día casi no fumo. English source: Nowadays means at the present time. Nowadays, not so many people smoke.

English: participant Meaning: Participante es quien toma parte en algo. Example: Hay muchos participantes hoy. English source: A participant is someone who joins in a social event or competition. There were thousands of participants in this year’s marathon.

English: ritual Meaning: Un ritual es una práctica repetida con significado simbólico. Example: Ken tenía mucho interés en aprender sobre los rituales religiosos de los nativos. English source: A ritual is a formal custom that people do regularly. Ken was very interested to learn about the religious rituals of the natives.

English: spoken Meaning: Hablado es el lenguaje que se expresa con voz. Example: Hablado y escrito son formas distintas. English source: Spoken language is what we say. We cannot take back what has been spoken.

English: sport Meaning: Deporte es una actividad física reglada. Example: Me gusta ver deporte en casa. English source: Sport involves games like running, jumping, football, and tennis. She loves watching sport on TV.

English: surprised Meaning: Sorprendido es mostrar asombro inesperado. Example: Me sorprendió su regalo. English source: You are surprised when something unexpected happens. He didn’t appear at all surprised when he read the article.

English: tense Meaning: Tenso significa preocupado y con mucha tensión. Example: Estoy tenso antes del examen. English source: When you are tense, you are not comfortable and feel unhappy. I felt very tense waiting to hear the result of the vote.

English: totally Meaning: Totalmente significa por completo. Example: Estoy totalmente de acuerdo. English source: If you totally agree, you agree with everything just said. I am totally against that.

English: vague Meaning: Vago significa impreciso o poco claro. Example: Habló de forma vaga. English source: If something is vague, it is not clear and gives very few details. I asked him about his mother’s health, but he was very vague about it.

English: allow Meaning: Permitir es dejar que algo ocurra. Example: El permiso permite entrar. English source: To allow something to happen means to let it happen. Having a ticket will allow you to enter the show.

English: announce Meaning: Anunciar es comunicar públicamente algo. Example: Anunció la reunión. English source: To announce something is to make it known. He announced to everyone his new idea for the company.

English: beside Meaning: Al lado de significa junto o próximo. Example: Estoy al lado de mi amigo. English source: Someone or something beside you is next to you. The two brothers stood beside each other.

English: challenge Meaning: Un desafío es una tarea difícil. Example: Escalar esa montaña fue un desafío. English source: A challenge is something difficult to complete. It was a challenge to climb to the top of the mountain.

English: claim Meaning: Afirmar es declarar algo como verdadero. Example: Afirmó que llegaría temprano. English source: To claim means to say that something is true. He claimed to know why the country’s laws were weak.

English: condition Meaning: La condición describe el estado de algo o alguien. Example: La condición del paciente mejoró. English source: The condition of someone or something is the state that they are in. The patient’s condition was very good.

English: contribute Meaning: Contribuir es ayudar para que algo salga bien. Example: Contribuí con mis horas de voluntariado. English source: To contribute to something means to do something to make it successful. We decided to contribute money to the new hospital.

English: difference Meaning: Diferencia es lo que distingue a una cosa de otra. Example: La diferencia es pequeña. English source: A difference is a way that something is not like other things. The biggest difference between the birds is the color of their feathers.
English: divide Meaning: Dividir es separar en partes. Example: Dividí la pizza en tres. English source: To divide something is to split it into smaller parts. We divided the pizza.

English: expert Meaning: Persona muy competente o especialista en algo. Example: El mago era un experto en magia. English source: An expert is someone who is very good at doing something. The wizard was an expert at magic.

English: famous Meaning: Muy conocido por muchas personas. Example: La Torre Eiffel en París es muy famosa. English source: A famous person or thing is well known. The Eiffel Tower in Paris is very famous.

English: force Meaning: Potencia o energía que una persona puede ejercer. Example: Usó toda su fuerza para intentar abrir la puerta. English source: Force is a person’s strength or power. He used all his force to try and open the door.

English: harm Meaning: Dañar es herir a alguien o perjudicar algo. Example: Una plancha caliente puede dañar mucho si no tienes cuidado. English source: To cause harm is to hurt someone or damage something. A hot iron can cause great harm if you are not careful.

English: lay Meaning: Poner o colocar algo en posición horizontal o plana. Example: No pongas tus calcetines en el suelo. English source: To lay means to put or place in a horizontal or flat position. Don’t lay your socks on the floor. Notes: En este contexto equivale a «colocar»; no al verbo «acostarse».
English: peace Meaning: Situación sin guerra ni violencia. Example: La paloma blanca es símbolo de la paz. English source: Peace is a time without war. A white dove is a symbol of peace.
English: prince Meaning: Hijo de un rey. Example: El príncipe y la princesa se casaron. English source: A prince is the son of a king. The prince and the princess were married.

English: protect Meaning: Evitar que alguien o algo salga lastimado. Example: Los bomberos nos protegen de los incendios. English source: To protect someone is to stop them from getting hurt. Firemen protect us from fires.

English: sense Meaning: Darse cuenta o notar algo sin que te lo hayan dicho. Example: Pude percibir que él me estaba observando. English source: To sense something is to know about it without being told. I could sense that he was watching me.

English: sudden Meaning: Que sucede de forma rápida e inesperada. Example: Sintió un dolor repentino en el pecho. English source: When something is sudden, it happens very quickly. He felt a sudden pain in his chest.

English: therefore Meaning: Por está razón; en consecuencia. Example: Es obeso; por lo tanto, debería hacer dieta. English source: Therefore means for this reason. He is fat. Therefore, he should go on a diet.

English: accept Meaning: Recibir o tomar algo que te ofrecen. Example: Acepté el bonito regalo de la chica. English source: To accept something that is offered is to take it. I accepted the girl’s very nice gift.

English: arrange Meaning: Colocar las cosas en el lugar correcto. Example: Por favor, organiza las palabras en orden de la A a la Z. English source: To arrange things is to put them in the right place. Please arrange the words in order from A to Z.
English: attend Meaning: Ir a un lugar o evento. Example: Mi hermana y yo asistimos al mismo instituto. English source: To attend something is to go to it. My sister and I attend the same school.

English: chase Meaning: Correr detrás de alguien o algo para alcanzarlo. Example: Un perro me persiguió. English source: You chase people when you run after them and try to catch them. I was chased by a dog.

English: contrast Meaning: Diferencia clara entre dos cosas. Example: El contraste entre mis padres es muy evidente. English source: A contrast is a sharp difference between two things. The contrast between my parents is very noticeable.

English: encourage Meaning: Hacer que alguien quiera o se sienta capaz de hacer algo. Example: Nuestro entrenador nos anima cuando vamos perdiendo. English source: To encourage people is to make them want to do something. My football coach will encourage us when we are losing.

English: familiar Meaning: Que una persona o cosa te resulta bien conocida. Example: Los dos amigos eran muy conocidos entre sí. English source: People or things familiar to you are those you know well. The two friends were very familiar with each other.

English: grab Meaning: Tomar algo de golpe o sujetarlo rápidamente. Example: Agarré una pera del árbol. English source: To grab is to take a hold of someone or something suddenly. I grabbed a pear from the tree.

English: hang Meaning: Poner algo suspendido o por encima del suelo. Example: Mi madre colgó el retrato en la pared. English source: To hang something is to keep it above the ground. I drew a picture of my family, and my mother hung it on the wall.
English: huge Meaning: Muy grande o de gran tamaño. Example: Mi padre conduce un camión enorme. English source: If something is huge, it is very big. At work, my father drives a huge truck.

English: necessary Meaning: Que es imprescindible y se debe hacer. Example: El pasaporte es necesario si viajas a otro país. English source: If something is necessary, you must do it. A passport is necessary if you travel to other countries.

English: pattern Meaning: Manera habitual de hacer o organizar algo. Example: Mi patrón para cepillarme los dientes es igual al de la mayoría. English source: A pattern is a way in which something is done or organized. My pattern of brushing my teeth is the same as most people’s.

English: propose Meaning: Sugerir que algo se haga. Example: Mi abuela propuso que nos tomáramos una foto con Santa. English source: To propose something is to say that it should be done. My grandmother proposed that we have our picture taken with Santa.

English: purpose Meaning: Motivo o razón para hacer algo. Example: El propósito de hacer ejercicio es ponerse en forma. English source: A purpose is the reason that you do something. The purpose of exercising is to get into shape.

English: release Meaning: Dejar de sujetar o retener algo. Example: Ella soltó al pajarito de su mano. English source: To release something is to stop holding it. She released the bird from her hands.

English: require Meaning: Decir que algo es necesario. Example: Requerimos que los profesores tengan un título universitario. English source: To require something is to say that it is necessary. We require teachers to have a university degree.

English: satisfied Meaning: Contento por haber conseguido lo que se quería. Example: Estoy muy satisfecho con tu trabajo. English source: You are satisfied when you have what you wanted. I am very satisfied with your work.

English: single Meaning: Que es uno solo o no está acompañado. Example: Tengo una sola llave en la mano. English source: If something is single, then there is only one. I have a single key in my hand.
English: tear Meaning: Separar algo tirando o rasgándolo. Example: Es fácil romper el papel. English source: To tear something means to pull it apart. It is easy to tear paper.

English: theory Meaning: Idea o explicación de cómo funciona algo. Example: En clase hablamos de la teoría de la relatividad de Einstein. English source: A theory is an idea about how something works. We talked about Einstein’s theory of relativity in class.
English: animal Meaning: Ser vivo que se mueve por sí mismo. Example: Mi animal favorito es el panda. English source: An animal is a living thing that can move. My favorite animal is the panda.

English: bus Meaning: Vehículo grande para transportar personas. Example: Mi padre toma el autobús para ir al trabajo. English source: A bus is a large vehicle that people travel on. My father takes the bus to work.

English: cat Meaning: Pequeño animal doméstico relacionado con leones y tigres. Example: Este gato está jugando con una pelota. English source: A cat is a small animal related to lions and tigers that is kept as a pet. This cat is playing with a ball.

English: command Meaning: Instrucción dada para que alguien haga algo. Example: Joe dio la orden de ponerse de pie a los alumnos. English source: A command is an order given to a person or animal to do something. Joe gave the students a command to stand up.

English: depend Meaning: Necesitar de algo para tener apoyo o ayuda. Example: Mi abuelo depende de un bastón para caminar. English source: To depend on something is to need it for support or help. My grandfather depends on a cane when he walks.

English: dog Meaning: Animal de cuatro patas con cola que suele ser mascota. Example: El mejor amigo de está mujer es su perro. English source: A dog is an animal with four legs and a tail that is kept as a pet or trained to work. This woman’s best friend is her dog.

English: door Meaning: Objeto que se abre y cierra para entrar o salir. Example: ¿Puedes cerrar la puerta, por favor? English source: A door is an object that swings or slides open and shut. Can you close the door, please?

English: friend Meaning: Persona que conoces y te gusta pasar tiempo. Example: El amigo de Brian está muy triste. English source: A friend is someone a person knows and likes spending time with. Brian’s friend is very sad.

English: hear Meaning: Percibir sonidos con los oídos. Example: Michelle no puede oír lo que estás diciendo. English source: To hear is to be aware of sound through your ears. Michelle cannot hear what you are saying.

English: help Meaning: Hacer algo que facilita a otra persona. Example: Jane puede ayudar a Nathan a subir la roca. English source: To help is to do something that makes something easier for someone else. Jane can help Nathan climb up the rock.

English: horse Meaning: Animal grande y fuerte que la gente monta o usa para tirar. Example: Fui a una granja y vi un caballo. English source: A horse is a big, strong animal that people ride and use for pulling heavy things. I went to a farm and saw a horse.

English: hospital Meaning: Lugar donde enfermos o heridos reciben atención médica. Example: El médico habla con un paciente en el hospital. English source: A hospital is where sick or hurt people receive care or treatment. The doctor talks to a patient at the hospital.
English: leg Meaning: Parte del cuerpo para apoyar y caminar. Example: Ella se lesionó la pierna. English source: A leg is a body part used for standing and walking. She hurt her leg.

English: medical Meaning: Relacionado con el tratamiento de enfermedades o lesiones. Example: Tyler es un estudiante de medicina. English source: Medical means related to the treatment of an injury or disease. Tyler is a medical student studying to become a doctor. Notes: Como adjetivo, también puede usarse «médica/médico». No confundir con «médico» como sustantivo «doctor».

English: open Meaning: Hacer que algo no esté cubierto. Example: A Amy le gusta abrir la ventana para que entre aire fresco. English source: To open is to move something so that an opening is not covered. Amy likes to open the window to let fresh air in.
English: pull Meaning: Sujetar algo para moverlo hacia ti. Example: Los niños tiran de la cuerda. English source: To pull is to hold onto something to move it toward you. The children pull the rope.

English: rabbit Meaning: Animal pequeño con orejas largas que vive en madrigueras. Example: Mira el conejo en el parque. English source: A rabbit is a small animal with long ears that lives in a hole in the ground. Look at the rabbit in the park.

English: school Meaning: Lugar donde los niños van a aprender. Example: Los estudiantes estudian en la escuela. English source: A school is a place where children go to learn. The students study at school.

English: see Meaning: Usar los ojos para mirar algo o a alguien. Example: A Steven no le gusta ver la foto de miedo. English source: To see is to use your eyes to look at something or someone. Steven does not want to see the scary picture.

English: service Meaning: Acción de ayudar o atender a alguien. Example: Esta cafetería tiene excelente servicio. English source: Service is the act of helping or serving someone. This coffee shop has excellent service.
English: benefit Meaning: Algo bueno o ventajoso. Example: Poder volar es un gran beneficio para las aves. English source: A benefit is a good thing. Being able to fly is a benefit to birds.

English: certain Meaning: Seguro de que una cosa es verdadera. Example: Estoy seguro de que las cebras tienen rayas. English source: If you are certain about something, you know it is true. I am certain that zebras have stripes.

English: chance Meaning: Posibilidad de hacer algo. Example: Tuve la oportunidad de ver el Coliseo de Roma el verano pasado. English source: A chance is an opportunity to do something. I had a chance to see the Coliseum in Rome last summer.

English: effect Meaning: Cambio producido por algo. Example: La medicina tuvo un buen efecto en el niño. English source: An effect is a change made by something else. The medicine had a good effect on the boy.

English: essential Meaning: Muy importante y necesario. Example: Es esencial tener oxígeno cuando haces buceo. English source: If something is essential, it is very important and necessary. It is essential to have oxygen when you scuba dive.

English: far Meaning: No cerca. Example: Es muy lejos desde la costa este a la costa oeste de América. English source: If something is far, it is not close. It’s far from the east coast to the west coast of America.

English: focus Meaning: Prestar atención o centrar la mente en algo. Example: Mi mamá siempre me ayuda a concentrarme en mis tareas. English source: To focus on something is to think about it and pay attention to it. My mom always helps me to focus on my school work.

English: function Meaning: Lo que algo hace o para qué sirve. Example: La función de una linterna es ayudar a ver en la oscuridad. English source: The function of something is what it does. The function of a flashlight is to help you see in the dark.

English: grass Meaning: Hojas verdes que cubren el suelo. Example: La hierba se veía muy suave y verde. English source: Grass is the green leaves that cover the ground. The grass looked so soft and green.

English: guard Meaning: Proteger y vigilar algo para que no se dañe. Example: El policía nos cuidará de cualquier daño. English source: To guard something is to take care of it. The police officer will guard us from any harm.

English: image Meaning: Representación o retrato de algo. Example: La imagen de su ojo estaba muy clara. English source: The image of something is a picture of it. The image of her eye was very clear.

English: immediate Meaning: Que ocurre rápido o enseguida. Example: Recibimos una respuesta inmediata de la pizzería. English source: If something is immediate, it happens quickly. An immediate response came from the pizza place.

English: primary Meaning: Lo más importante o prioritario. Example: Sus pensamientos principales son sobre el dinero. English source: If something is primary, it is the most important thing. His primary thoughts are about money.

English: proud Meaning: Sentir satisfacción por lo que se ha hecho. Example: Ella está orgullosa del dibujo que hizo de su casa. English source: People who feel proud are happy about what they have done. She is proud of the picture she drew of her house.

English: remain Meaning: Permanecer en un lugar. Example: Mi hermana tuvo que quedarse en casa porque estaba enferma. English source: To remain somewhere is to stay there. My sister had to remain home since she was sick.

English: rest Meaning: Detener la actividad para recuperar fuerza. Example: Descansé en el sofá después del trabajo. English source: To rest is to stop being active while the body gets back its strength. I rested on the couch after work.

English: separate Meaning: No unido o no junto. Example: Nueva York y Los Ángeles están en dos partes separadas de Estados Unidos. English source: If two things are separate, they are not together. New York and Los Angeles are in two separate parts of America.
English: site Meaning: Espacio o sitio donde está algo. Example: Encontramos el lugar perfecto para nuestro picnic. English source: A site is a place. We found the perfect site for our picnic.

English: tail Meaning: Parte trasera que sobresale de un animal. Example: Nuestro perro mueve su cola cuando está feliz. English source: A tail is a part of an animal’s body that sticks out from its rear or back. Our dog wags its tail when it’s happy.

English: trouble Meaning: Dificultad o situación problemática. Example: Tengo problemas para trabajar con mi jefe. English source: Trouble is a problem or a difficulty. I have trouble working with my boss.

English: advertise Meaning: Dar a conocer algo para llamar la atención pública. Example: La mujer creó una empresa y necesitaba anunciar sus productos. English source: To advertise is to describe or draw attention to a product or event by using a public medium. The woman started a new company and needed to advertise her products.

English: aware Meaning: Saber que algo existe o que pasa. Example: El estudiante se dio cuenta de que el profesor lo estaba mirando. English source: If someone is aware, they know that something or a situation exists. The student became aware that the teacher was watching him.

English: battery Meaning: Objeto que proporciona electricidad. Example: Mi hermano necesita una batería para su reloj. English source: A battery is an object placed inside something to supply it with electricity. My brother needs a battery for his clock.

English: black Meaning: Color más oscuro. Example: Nuestra calle está oscura de noche porque no hay farolas. English source: Black is the darkest color. Our street is black at night because there are no street lights.
English: city Meaning: Lugar con mucha población. Example: Tokio es una ciudad muy grande de Japón. English source: A city is a place where a lot of people live. Tokyo is a very big city in Japan.

English: clean Meaning: Quitar suciedad para dejar algo ordenado. Example: Limpio nuestra cocina todos los sábados. English source: To clean is to make something neat and tidy. I clean our kitchen every Saturday.

English: country Meaning: Zona de tierra con gobierno y leyes propias. Example: Francia es un país de Europa. English source: A country is an area of land with the same government and laws. France is a country in Europe.

English: develop Meaning: Hacer algo más grande o avanzado. Example: Esta práctica te ayudará a desarrollar tus habilidades matemáticas. English source: To develop is to make something larger or more advanced. This practice will help you develop your math skills.

English: electric Meaning: Relacionado con la electricidad. Example: Algunas marcas hacen autos eléctricos. English source: If something is electric, it uses electricity. Some car companies make electric cars.

English: eventually Meaning: Al final o en un momento posterior. Example: Finalmente, se mudará a Londres para buscar un nuevo trabajo. English source: When something happens at a later time or in the end, it happens eventually. He will eventually move to London to find a new job.

English: fact Meaning: Información o dato verdadero. Example: Un hecho sobre Sudamérica es que es un continente. English source: A fact is a piece of information that is true. A fact about South America is that it is a continent.
English: glass Meaning: Material transparente y frágil. Example: Las ventanas están hechas de vidrio. English source: Glass is a transparent, breakable material. Windows are made of glass.

English: history Meaning: Estudio o relato del pasado. Example: La historia fue mi asignatura favorita en la escuela. English source: History is the study of the past. History was my favorite subject in school.

English: nature Meaning: Todo lo físico del mundo no hecho por humanos. Example: Los fines de semana me encanta caminar por la naturaleza. English source: Nature is everything in the physical world that is not made by people. On the weekends, I love to walk in nature among the trees.

English: never Meaning: No ha ocurrido y no ocurre hasta ahora. Example: Nunca comen carne porque son vegetarianos. English source: Never is when something is impossible or will not happen. They never eat meat because they are vegetarians.
English: people Meaning: Seres humanos. Example: ¿Cuántas personas viven en China? English source: People are humans. How many people live in China?

English: plastic Meaning: Material sintético fabricado por personas. Example: Muchas bebidas se venden en botellas de plástico. English source: Plastic is a material made by people. Many drinks are sold in plastic bottles.

English: problem Meaning: Situación en la que algo sale mal. Example: Mi problema es que perdí a mi perro. English source: A problem is a situation when something goes wrong. My problem is that I lost my dog.

English: street Meaning: Camino dentro de una ciudad o pueblo. Example: ¿Cómo se llama la calle donde vives? English source: A street is a road in a city or village. What is the name of the street you live on?

English: think Meaning: Tener una opinión o idea sobre algo. Example: Pienso que el verano es la mejor estación. English source: To think is to have an opinion or thought about something. I think summer is the best season.
English: alone Meaning: Sin compañía. Example: El niño quería estar solo para pensar. English source: A person who is alone is not with another person. The boy wanted to be alone to think.

English: apartment Meaning: Conjunto de habitaciones en un edificio donde vive gente. Example: Ella tiene un buen apartamento en la ciudad. English source: An apartment is a set of rooms in a building where people live. She has a nice apartment in the city.

English: article Meaning: Texto informativo en un periódico o revista. Example: ¿Leíste el artículo del periódico sobre el partido de fútbol? English source: An article is a story in a newspaper or magazine. Did you read the article in the newspaper about the soccer game?

English: artist Meaning: Persona que pinta, dibuja o esculpe. Example: Se fue a París para convertirse en artista. English source: An artist is a person who paints, draws, or makes sculptures. He went to Paris to become an artist.

English: attitude Meaning: Forma de pensar o de sentirse de alguien. Example: John tiene una mala actitud. Siempre está enojado. English source: Someone’s attitude is the way they feel and think. John has a bad attitude. He’s always angry.

English: beauty Meaning: Cualidad de ser o parecer bello. Example: Escuché que mi madre era muy bella cuando era joven. English source: Beauty is the state or quality of being beautiful. I heard my mother was a great beauty when she was young.

English: compare Meaning: Decir en qué se parecen y se diferencian dos cosas. Example: Si comparas gatos y perros, verás que ambos son buenas mascotas. English source: To compare means to say how two things are the same and different. If you compare cats and dogs, you’ll see that they’re both good pets.

English: judge Meaning: Decidir si algo es bueno o malo. Example: El niño iba a juzgar cómo sabía el pavo de su madre. English source: To judge something is to say if it is good or bad. The boy was going to judge how his mother’s turkey tasted.

English: magazine Meaning: Publicación periódica con noticias y artículos. Example: Le gusta leer revistas de moda. English source: A magazine is a regular publication with news, stories, and articles. She likes to read fashion magazines.

English: material Meaning: Lo que se usa para fabricar algo. Example: El ladrillo es un buen material para construir casas. English source: A material is what is used to make something. Brick is a good material for building houses.

English: meal Meaning: Momento en que se come (desayuno, almuerzo o cena). Example: El desayuno es mi comida favorita porque me gusta el cereal. English source: A meal is a time when food is eaten, such as breakfast, lunch, or dinner. Breakfast is my favorite meal because I enjoy cereal.

English: method Meaning: Manera de hacer algo. Example: Un método para recordar cosas es atar un hilo en el dedo. English source: A method is the way to do something. One method to remember things is to tie a string around your finger.

English: neighbor Meaning: Persona que vive cerca de ti. Example: Me gusta mi vecino porque es muy amable. English source: A neighbor is a person who lives near you. I like my neighbor because he’s very friendly.

English: professional Meaning: Relacionado con un trabajo que requiere habilidades especiales. Example: Si quieres ser piloto, necesitas formación profesional. English source: If something is professional, it deals with work that uses special skills. If you want to be a pilot, you must have professional training.

English: profit Meaning: Dinero extra que se obtiene al vender algo. Example: Saqué una pequeña ganancia vendiendo mi ropa vieja. English source: A profit is the extra money you make when you sell something. I made a small profit from selling my old clothes.
English: quality Meaning: Qué tan bueno es algo. Example: La calidad de su coche es muy buena. English source: The quality of something is how good it is. The quality of his car is very good.

English: space Meaning: Área vacía o lugar libre. Example: No tengo mucho espacio para las cosas en mi casa pequeña. English source: A space is an empty area. I don’t have much space for things in my small house.

English: stair Meaning: Conjunto de peldaños para subir o bajar en un edificio. Example: Puedes tomar las escaleras hasta el segundo piso. English source: Stairs are the things that are used to walk up or down in a building. You can take the stairs to the second floor.

English: symbol Meaning: Objeto o signo que representa otra cosa. Example: Este símbolo nos indica que aquí no se puede fumar. English source: A symbol is a thing that stands for something else. This symbol tells us that we cannot smoke in this area.

English: thin Meaning: No grueso ni con mucha grasa. Example: El hombre era delgado porque comía poco. English source: If someone or something is thin, they are not fat. The man was thin because he didn’t eat much.

English: accounting Meaning: Estudio para llevar y controlar el dinero. Example: Estudia contabilidad en una empresa. English source: People study accounting so they can deal with money and finance properly. He works for an accounting firm.

English: appeal Meaning: Resultar interesante o atractivo para alguien. Example: Dormir todo el día me atrae, pero tengo que ir a la escuela. English source: To appeal to someone is to be interesting or attractive. Sleeping all day appeals to me, but I have to go to school.

English: assume Meaning: Creer que algo es cierto sin pruebas. Example: Supongo que ambos conocen bien este plan. English source: To assume something is to think that it is true, even with no proof. I assume you are both familiar with this plan.

English: borrow Meaning: Tomar algo de alguien para luego devolverlo. Example: ¿Puedo pedirte prestado un lápiz? Te lo devuelvo mañana. English source: To borrow something is to take it and then give it back later. Can I borrow a pencil to use today? I’ll give it back to you tomorrow.

English: client Meaning: Persona que paga por un servicio. Example: Ella tiene muchos clientes que vienen a su salón. English source: A client is a person or business that pays another to do a service. She has many clients who enjoy coming to her salon.

English: downtown Meaning: Zona principal y céntrica de una ciudad. Example: El centro de la ciudad está lleno de edificios altos. English source: The downtown area is the center of most cities. The downtown area is filled with many tall buildings.

English: dull Meaning: Que no resulta emocionante o interesante. Example: La película fue tan aburrida que me dormí viéndola. English source: If something is dull, it is not exciting. The movie was very dull. I fell asleep watching it.

English: embarrass Meaning: Hacer que alguien se sienta cohibido o tonto. Example: Se avergonzó cuando no pudo recordar su nombre. English source: To embarrass people is to make them feel ashamed or foolish. He was embarrassed when he couldn’t remember her name.

English: fare Meaning: Monto de dinero que se paga por usar transporte. Example: Como jubilado, mi abuelo paga una tarifa baja en el autobús. English source: A fare is an amount of money paid to use a bus, train, or taxi. Since he is a senior, my grandfather pays a low fare for the bus.

English: former Meaning: Que antes existía así y ya no. Example: El hotel, un castillo anterior, se construyó hace más de 200 años. English source: Former describes something that used to be but is not anymore. The hotel, a former castle, was built over 200 years ago.

English: found Meaning: Crear o establecer una empresa u organización. Example: Los peregrinos fundaron una de las primeras colonias de EE. UU. English source: To found a company or organization means to start it. The Pilgrims founded one of the first colonies in the United States.

English: invest Meaning: Usar dinero para que produzca beneficio más tarde. Example: Invertí dinero en un nuevo edificio para obtener ganancias. English source: To invest means to use money in a way that will bring a profit later. I invested money in a new building that should bring me a profit.

English: loan Meaning: Dinero que una persona presta a otra. Example: Pedí un préstamo al banco. English source: A loan is something, usually money, that one person lends to another. I got a loan from the bank.

English: practical Meaning: Útil y aplicable. Example: Aprender inglés es práctico; te sirve en muchos lugares. English source: If something is practical, it is useful. Learning English is practical; you can use it in many places.
English: quarter Meaning: 25%, un cuarto. Example: Pagó una cuarta parte por el caramelo. English source: A quarter is 1/4 or 25% of something. He paid a quarter for the candy.

English: salary Meaning: Dinero que gana una persona en su trabajo. Example: Conseguí un trabajo nuevo con mejor sueldo. English source: A salary is how much money a person makes at his or her job. He got a new job with a better salary.

English: scholarship Meaning: Ayuda económica para estudiar. Example: Obtuve una beca para pagar la universidad. English source: A scholarship is money given so someone can go to school. I got a scholarship to help me pay for university.

English: temporary Meaning: Que dura poco tiempo. Example: Este coche es temporal; pronto compraré uno nuevo. English source: If something is temporary, it exists for a short time. This car is only temporary; I’ll get a new one soon.

English: treasure Meaning: Conjunto de objetos valiosos, como oro o joyas. Example: Se hicieron ricos al encontrar el tesoro enterrado. English source: A treasure is a collection of valuable things, especially jewels or gold. They became very rich when they found the buried treasure.

English: urge Meaning: Animar con fuerza para que alguien haga algo. Example: Él insistió para que creyeran su historia. English source: To urge someone is to try very hard to get them to do something. He urged them to believe his story.

English: coach Meaning: Persona que entrena equipos o atletas. Example: Mi entrenador se entusiasma mucho durante los partidos. English source: A coach is a person who teaches sports. My coach gets very excited during games.

English: control Meaning: Hacer que algo haga lo que quieres. Example: Para controlar la televisión, pulsa los botones. English source: To control something is to make it do what you want. To control the TV, just push the buttons.

English: description Meaning: Texto que dice cómo es alguien o algo. Example: Di una descripción del hombre con el sombrero y el arma a la policía. English source: A description of someone or something says what they are like. I gave a description of the man with the gun and hat to the police.

English: direct Meaning: Que va sin rodeos. Example: El camino verde es una ruta directa a mi casa. English source: If something is direct, it goes straight between two places. The green path is a direct route to my house.

English: exam Meaning: Prueba para evaluar conocimientos. Example: Hice preguntas de práctica para el examen de matemáticas. English source: An exam is a test. I did some practice questions for the math exam on the board.

English: example Meaning: Algo típico o modelo de algo. Example: La Coca-Cola es un ejemplo de refresco. English source: An example of something is a thing that is typical of it. Cola is an example of a soft drink.

English: limit Meaning: Cantidad máxima o mínima permitida. Example: Mi madre puso un límite al tiempo de móvil. English source: A limit is the largest or smallest amount of something that you allow. My mother put a limit on how much I could use the phone.

English: local Meaning: Propio de una zona cercana; del barrio. Example: El mercado local de mi barrio vende toda la comida que necesitamos. English source: If something is local, it is nearby. The local market in my neighborhood sells all the food we need.

English: magical Meaning: Que parece especial o extraordinario. Example: Los fuegos artificiales hicieron que el cielo se viera mágico. English source: Magical describes a quality that makes someone or something special. The fireworks made the night sky look so magical.

English: mail Meaning: Cartas y paquetes enviados a personas. Example: Recibo mucho correo porque tengo amigos en todo el mundo. English source: Mail is letters and other things sent to people. I get a lot of mail because I have friends all over the world.

English: novel Meaning: Libro que cuenta una historia. Example: Escribió una novela magnífica sobre la China antigua. English source: A novel is a book that tells a story. He wrote a great novel about ancient China.

English: outline Meaning: Borrador o plan de un texto. Example: Antes de escribir mi ensayo, hice un esquema. English source: An outline is the plan for a story or essay. Before I wrote my essay, I made an outline.

English: poet Meaning: Persona que escribe poemas. Example: William Shakespeare fue uno de los mejores poetas. English source: A poet is a person who writes poems. William Shakespeare was one of the greatest poets.

English: print Meaning: Poner algo sobre papel. Example: Asegúrate de imprimir tu nombre claramente. English source: To print something is to put it onto paper. Make sure that you print your name clearly.

English: scene Meaning: Parte de una película o de un libro. Example: Una película se compone de muchas escenas. English source: A scene is one part of a book or movie. A movie is made up of many short pieces or scenes.

English: sheet Meaning: Papel delgado y plano. Example: Solo necesité una hoja para hacer mi tarea. English source: A sheet is a thin flat piece of paper. I only needed a single sheet of paper to do my homework.

English: silly Meaning: Que carece de seriedad. Example: Cometí un error tonto al dejar caer el jarrón de mamá. English source: People who are silly show a lack of serious thought. I made a silly mistake of dropping mom’s vase.

English: store Meaning: Lugar donde se compran cosas. Example: Compré algunas cosas en la tienda de comestibles. English source: A store is a place where you can buy things. I picked up a few things at the grocery store.

English: suffer Meaning: Sentir dolor o pasar por dificultades. Example: El dolor de cabeza le hizo sufrir todo el día. English source: To suffer is to feel pain. Her headache made her suffer all day.

English: technology Meaning: Nuevos avances creados con ciencia. Example: Le encanta la tecnología, como los ordenadores portátiles. English source: Technology is new things made by using science. He loves technology such as laptop computers.

English: across Meaning: Ir desde un lado al otro de algo. Example: Caminó a través del tablero hasta el otro lado. English source: To go across something is to go to the other side of it. He walked across the board to the other side.

English: breathe Meaning: Hacer que el aire entre y salga del cuerpo. Example: Necesitamos pulmones sanos para respirar bien. English source: To breathe means to let air go in and out of your body. We need strong healthy lungs to help us breathe well.

English: characteristic Meaning: Cualidad que muestra cómo es algo o alguien. Example: Una característica de los tigres es tener rayas negras. English source: A characteristic is something that shows what a person or a thing is like. One characteristic of tigers is their black stripes.

English: consume Meaning: Comer o beber algo. Example: Jack consumió un plato entero de espagueti. English source: To consume something means to eat or drink it. Jack consumed a whole plate of spaghetti.

English: excite Meaning: Hacer que alguien se sienta feliz e interesado. Example: Cuando supe del baile de la escuela, me emocioné. English source: To excite someone means to make them happy and interested. I heard about the school dance on Friday. This excited me.

English: extremely Meaning: De forma muy intensa o exagerada. Example: Estaba extremadamente preocupado por él. English source: If something is extremely good, it is very, very good. I was extremely worried about him.
English: fear Meaning: Sentimiento de temor. Example: Tengo mucho miedo al monopatín. English source: Fear is the feeling of being afraid. I have a great fear of skateboarding.
English: fortunate Meaning: Que tiene suerte. Example: Tuve la suerte de conseguir un asiento. English source: If you are fortunate, you are lucky. I was fortunate to get a seat.

English: happen Meaning: Ocurrir, a veces por casualidad. Example: Me pasé encontrando hoy a nuevos amigos en la escuela. English source: If someone happens to do something, he or she does it by chance. I happened to meet some new friends at school today.

English: length Meaning: Qué tan largo es algo de un extremo al otro. Example: La longitud del suelo es de tres metros. English source: The length of something is how long it is from one end to the other. The length of the floor is three meters.

English: mistake Meaning: Cosa que se hace mal. Example: Mi jefe siempre me regaña cuando cometo un error. English source: A mistake is something you do wrong. My boss always yells at me when I make a mistake.

English: observe Meaning: Mirar algo con atención. Example: Brian observó la salida del sol sobre las montañas. English source: To observe something is to watch it. Brian observed the sun rising over the mountains.

English: opportunity Meaning: Posibilidad de hacer algo. Example: Tuve la oportunidad de tomar fotos en la selva. English source: An opportunity is a chance to do something. I had an opportunity to take pictures in the jungle.

English: prize Meaning: Objeto o dinero que se da al ganador. Example: Gané un premio por sacar la mejor nota en ciencias. English source: A prize is something of value that is given to the winner. I won a prize for getting the best grade on my science test.

English: race Meaning: Competencia para ver quién es más rápido. Example: Paul es un corredor rápido y ganó la carrera. English source: A race is a contest to see who is the fastest. Paul is a fast runner, so he easily won the race.

English: realize Meaning: Entender de repente la verdad de algo. Example: Cuando salí de casa, me di cuenta de que había dejado la luz encendida. English source: To realize is to suddenly understand. After I left my house, I realized that I left the light on.

English: respond Meaning: Dar una respuesta a lo que alguien dijo. Example: Cuando el profesor hizo la pregunta, respondimos todos. English source: To respond is to give an answer to what someone else said. When the teacher asked the question, we all responded.

English: risk Meaning: Posibilidad de que ocurra algo malo. Example: Asumí un riesgo y subí la montaña nevada. English source: A risk is a chance of something bad happening. I took a risk and climbed the snowy mountain.

English: wonder Meaning: Sentir curiosidad o querer saber algo. Example: La madre se preguntaba si tendría un niño o una niña. English source: To wonder is to ask yourself questions or have a need to know. The young mother wondered if she’d have a boy or a girl.

English: yet Meaning: Todavía no ha ocurrido hasta el momento presente. Example: No podemos salir todavía; todavía estamos comiendo. English source: Yet is used to say something has not happened up to now. We can’t go out yet; we’re still eating.

English: art Meaning: Actividad creativa que expresa ideas y emociones. Example: A mi hermana le gusta ver el arte del museo. English source: Art is something creative that expresses ideas and feelings. My sister likes to look at the art in the museum.

English: book Meaning: Conjunto de hojas impresas encuadernadas. Example: El hombre sonríe mientras lee su libro favorito. English source: A book is a set of printed sheets of paper that are held together inside a cover. The man smiles as he reads his favorite book.

English: clothes Meaning: Lo que las personas usan para vestirse. Example: Compré ropa abrigada para el invierno. English source: Clothes are what people wear to cover their bodies. I bought warm clothes for the cold winter.

English: community Meaning: Grupo de personas con un entorno o intereses comunes. Example: La comunidad se reunió para plantar árboles. English source: A community is a group of people who share the same area or interests. The community got together to plant trees.

English: December Meaning: Duodécimo mes del año. Example: El último día del año es el 31 de diciembre. English source: December is the twelfth month of the year. The last day of the year is December 31st.
English: dinner Meaning: Comida principal que se hace por la noche. Example: Cené una hamburguesa. English source: Dinner is the main meal eaten in the evening. I had a hamburger for dinner.

English: end Meaning: Detener o finalizar algo. Example: Están contentos porque el profesor quiso terminar la clase temprano. English source: To end is to stop or finish. They are happy because the teacher wanted to end the class early.

English: exchange Meaning: Dar una cosa a cambio de otra. Example: Los hombres intercambiaron tarjetas de visita. English source: To exchange is to give one thing in return for another. The men exchange business cards.

English: family Meaning: Grupo de personas unidas por parentesco. Example: Hay cuatro personas en mi familia. English source: A family is a group of people who are related to each other. There are four people in my family.

English: from Meaning: Indica un punto de origen o inicio. Example: Chris estudia de las 10 a las 12 cada mañana. English source: From shows a starting place or position. Chris studies from 10 o’clock to noon every morning.
English: green Meaning: Color de la hierba o las hojas. Example: No me gustan las manzanas verdes. English source: Green is the color of growing grass or leaves. I don’t like green apples.

English: home Meaning: Lugar donde vive una persona. Example: La familia gusta de estar en casa los fines de semana. English source: A person’s home is the place where that person lives. The family likes to stay at home on the weekends.
English: January Meaning: Primer mes del año. Example: Mi cumpleaños es en enero. English source: January is the first month of the year. My birthday is in January.
English: red Meaning: Color de la sangre. Example: Jack lleva una camisa roja. English source: Red is the color of blood. Jack is wearing a red shirt.
English: seven Meaning: Número 7. Example: Tengo siete lápices de color en mi mesa. English source: Seven is the word for the number 7. I have seven colored pencils on my desk.

English: start Meaning: Iniciar algo. Example: Catherine tiene que empezar a trabajar a las 8 en punto. English source: To start is to begin doing something. Catherine has to start work at 8 o’clock in the morning.
