English: together Meaning: Realizar una acción con otra persona. Example: Trabajemos juntos para terminar el proyecto. English source: Together shows an action is done with another person or thing. Let’s work together to finish the project.

English: university Meaning: Centro donde se estudia para obtener un título. Example: Mi sueño es ir a una buena universidad. English source: A university is a school where people study for a degree. My dream is to go to a good university.

English: wear Meaning: Llevar puesta una prenda de vestir. Example: El hombre tiene que usar traje para ir a trabajar. English source: To wear is to have clothing on your body. The man has to wear a suit to work.

English: year Meaning: período de doce meses o 365 días. Example: Cada cumpleaños te hace un año mayor. English source: A year is a period of 365 days or twelve months. You become one year older every birthday.

English: appreciate Meaning: Reconocer el valor o mérito de algo. Example: Puedo apreciar el paisaje precioso. English source: To appreciate something is to understand its good qualities. I can appreciate the lovely scenery.

English: available Meaning: Que se puede obtener o está libre. Example: Había muchos asientos disponibles en la sala. English source: If something is available, it means you can get it. There were many seats available in the room.
English: beat Meaning: Salir vencedor de alguien. Example: Logré ganar a todos en la carrera. English source: To beat someone means to do better than they do. I managed to beat everyone in the race.

English: bright Meaning: Que da mucha luz. Example: La luz brillante de la explosión me dolió los ojos. English source: If something is bright, it gives off a lot of light. The bright light from the explosion hurt my eyes.

English: celebrate Meaning: Hacer algo para mostrar que algo es especial. Example: Todos celebramos cuando supimos la buena noticia. English source: To celebrate is to do something to show that an event is special. We all celebrated when we heard the great news.
English: decide Meaning: Tomar una decisión firme. Example: Intentó decidir cuál comer primero. English source: To decide is to make a definite choice. He tried to decide which one to eat first.

English: disappear Meaning: Irse o dejar de verse. Example: La cima del edificio está desapareciendo entre las nubes. English source: To disappear means to go away or not be seen. The top of the building is disappearing in the clouds.

English: else Meaning: Diferente o adicional. Example: Quería una bici para mi cumpleaños, pero recibí otra cosa. English source: If you talk about something else, you talk about something different. I wanted a bike for my birthday, but I got something else.
English: fair Meaning: Razonable o equitativo. Example: Él me vendió su coche a un precio justo. English source: Fair means reasonable or right. He sold me his car for a fair price.

English: flow Meaning: Moverse de manera continua en una dirección. Example: El agua fluyó entre las rocas y entró en el lago. English source: To flow is to move easily and continuously in one direction. The water flowed over the rocks and into the lake.

English: forward Meaning: Hacia la parte delantera o del frente. Example: Al verlo, el bebé se arrastró hacia adelante hacia ella. English source: If you move forward, you move in the direction in front of you. When he saw his mother, the baby crawled forward to her.

English: hill Meaning: Una elevación de terreno más alta que su alrededor. Example: El sol se elevaba sobre las colinas verdes. English source: A hill is a raised area of land. It is higher than the land around it. The sun was rising above the green hills.

English: level Meaning: Un punto de una escala de medición. Example: Por favor, comprueba el nivel de la temperatura. English source: A level is a point on a scale that measures something. Please check the level of the temperature.

English: lone Meaning: Que está solo y sin compañía. Example: Un hombre solo caminó por la calle. English source: A lone person or thing is the only one in a given place. A lone man walked along the street.

English: puddle Meaning: Pequeña acumulación de líquido en el suelo. Example: Cuando se derritió el hielo, se formó un charco. English source: A puddle is a pool of liquid on the ground. When the ice melted, it formed a puddle.

English: response Meaning: Contestación o réplica a una pregunta. Example: Le preguntó si estaba triste. Mi respuesta fue “No”. English source: A response is the answer to a question. He asked if I was sad. My response was “No.”

English: season Meaning: período del año como primavera, verano, otoño o invierno. Example: El otoño es una estación cálida, mientras que el invierno es muy frío. English source: A season is a time of the year: spring, summer, fall, or winter. Fall is a warm season, while winter is very cold.

English: solution Meaning: Una forma de resolver un problema. Example: Hay muchos problemas; necesitamos soluciones. English source: A solution is a way to solve a problem. There are many problems. We need solutions!

English: waste Meaning: Usar algo en exceso o innecesariamente. Example: Cierra el agua para no desperdiciarla. English source: To waste means to use something carelessly and unnecessarily. Turn off the water so you don’t waste it.

English: whether Meaning: Conjunción para indicar dos alternativas. Example: No podía decidir si ir a la izquierda o a la derecha. English source: You use whether when you must choose between two things. I could not decide whether to go left or right. Notes: note: uso condicional

English: always Meaning: En todo momento, siempre. Example: Siempre se cepillan los dientes por la mañana. English source: Always means that something happens all the time. They always brush their teeth in the morning.

English: ask Meaning: Pedir información o solicitar algo por una pregunta. Example: Por favor, pregunta si no entiendes. English source: To ask is to say or write something to get an answer. Please ask questions if you do not understand.

English: banana Meaning: Fruta alargada y amarilla de pulpa blanda. Example: ¿Comiste un plátano en el desayuno? English source: A banana is a long yellow fruit with soft white flesh inside. Did you eat a banana for breakfast?

English: bread Meaning: Alimento hecho con harina y agua, y a menudo se cuece para comer. Example: Necesitas dos rebanadas de pan para hacer un sándwich. English source: Bread is a food made from flour and water. You need two pieces of bread to make a sandwich.

English: cake Meaning: Postre dulce y esponjoso hecho con harina y azúcar. Example: ¡Qué linda tarta de cumpleaños! English source: Cake is a sweet dessert made from flour, water, sugar, and eggs. What a beautiful birthday cake!
English: carrot Meaning: Verdura naranja de raíz. Example: Puse una zanahoria en mi ensalada. English source: A carrot is an orange vegetable. I put a carrot in my salad.

English: chicken Meaning: Ave domesticada usada como alimento. Example: El pollo es su tipo favorito de carne. English source: Chicken is a bird that is often used for food. Chicken is his favorite kind of meat.

English: chocolate Meaning: Alimento dulce hecho de cacao y azúcar. Example: Hice un pastel de chocolate para la fiesta de mamá. English source: Chocolate is a sweet food made from cacao beans. I made a chocolate cake for my mom’s party.

English: contain Meaning: Guardar o incluir algo dentro. Example: Necesito encontrar algo para contener estas manzanas. English source: To contain is to hold or have something. I have to find something to contain these apples.

English: delicious Meaning: Que sabe muy bien; sabroso. Example: Me encantó el pollo frito delicioso que comí anoche. English source: If a food is delicious, it is tasty. I loved the delicious fried chicken I ate for dinner!

English: diet Meaning: Conjunto habitual de alimentos que una persona consume. Example: Su dieta consiste sobre todo en frutas y verduras. English source: A diet is the food regularly eaten by a person. His diet mostly consists of fruits and vegetables.

English: eat Meaning: Ingerir alimentos masticando y tragándolos. Example: Deberías comer desayuno todos los días. English source: To eat is to chew and swallow food. You should eat breakfast every day.
English: food Meaning: Alimentos que se comen. Example: La pasta es una comida famosa en Italia. English source: Food is things people and animals eat. Pasta is a famous food in Italy.

English: fruit Meaning: Parte comestible dulce o ácida de plantas y árboles. Example: Las manzanas, peras y naranjas son frutas. English source: Fruit is a type of healthy food that grows on trees and plants. Apples, pears, and oranges are types of fruit.
English: great Meaning: Muy bueno o excelente. Example: Fue un juego excelente y emocionante. English source: When something is great, it is very good. It was a great, exciting game!

English: health Meaning: Estado de bienestar físico y funcional del cuerpo. Example: Las personas que quieren buena salud no deberían fumar. English source: Health is the state of a person’s body. People who want good health should not smoke.

English: recipe Meaning: Instrucciones para preparar un alimento. Example: ¿Usas una receta cuando haces esa salsa? English source: A recipe is a set of instructions for cooking a certain type of food. Do you use a recipe when you make that sauce?

English: restaurant Meaning: Lugar donde se sirve comida para comer. Example: Vamos a comer al restaurante indio. English source: A restaurant is a business where people sit and eat food. Let’s eat at the Indian restaurant.

English: special Meaning: Diferente, único o destacado. Example: El cupcake era especial porque tenía glaseado azul. English source: If something is special, it is unique and different. The cupcake was special because it had blue frosting.

English: water Meaning: Líquido transparente esencial para vivir. Example: bebé ocho vasos de agua cada día. English source: Water is a clear liquid that people need to survive. Drink eight cups of water every day.

English: alive Meaning: Que tiene vida. Example: Mis abuelos siguen vivos aunque tienen más de 90 años. English source: Someone or something that is alive is not dead. My grandparents are still alive even though they are over 90.
English: bone Meaning: Parte dura del cuerpo animal o humano. Example: Le llevé un hueso bonito a mi perro. English source: A bone is a hard part of the body. I brought home a nice bone for my dog.

English: bother Meaning: Causar fastidio o incomodidad, o dar trabajo extra. Example: Nadie se molestó en lavar los platos hoy. English source: To bother is to make the effort to do something. No one bothered to wash the dishes today.

English: captain Meaning: Persona que dirige un barco o avión. Example: El capitán llevó su barco hacia Australia. English source: A captain is the person who controls a ship or airplane. The captain sailed his ship to Australia.

English: conclusion Meaning: Parte final de un proceso o evento. Example: Al final de la carrera, los espectadores aplaudieron al ganador. English source: The conclusion of something is the final part of it. At the conclusion of the race, the spectators cheered for the winner.

English: doubt Meaning: Sentimiento de inseguridad sobre algo. Example: Tengo dudas de que la historia sea verdadera. English source: Doubt is a feeling of not being sure. I have doubt that the story is true.

English: explore Meaning: Buscar y conocer lugares nuevos. Example: Quiere explorar el mundo y ver cosas nuevas. English source: To explore is to look for new places. He wants to explore the world and see new things.
English: glad Meaning: Sentirse contento o satisfecho. Example: Me alegra que hayas venido a mi fiesta. English source: If you are glad, you are happy. I am glad you came to my party.

English: however Meaning: No obstante, a pesar de lo anterior. Example: Ella es una gran cocinera; sin embargo, nunca tuvo clases profesionales. English source: However means despite or not being influenced by something. She is a great cook. However, she never had professional lessons.

English: injustice Meaning: Falta de justicia o trato justo. Example: Poner a una persona inocente en prisión es un acto de injusticia. English source: Injustice is a lack of fairness or justice. Putting an innocent person in jail is an act of injustice.

English: international Meaning: Que involucra a varios países. Example: La ONU es una organización internacional poderosa. English source: If something is international, it involves more than one country. The United Nations is a powerful international organization.

English: lawyer Meaning: Profesional que ejerce de representación legal. Example: El abogado salió del tribunal tras la decisión del juez. English source: A lawyer works with the law and represents people in court. The lawyer left the courthouse after the judge made her decision.

English: mention Meaning: Hablar o citar algo. Example: Los médicos mencionaron los problemas que tenía la paciente. English source: To mention something is to talk about it. The doctors mentioned the problems that the patient was having.

English: old Meaning: Que tiene muchos años de vida. Example: Mi madre tiene ahora setenta años de edad. English source: Someone who is old has lived for many years. My mother is seventy years old now.

English: policy Meaning: Norma o principio para actuar. Example: Dijo que su política era poner primero al cliente. English source: A policy is a rule. He told us that his policy was to put customers first.

English: social Meaning: Relacionado con la sociedad y las personas. Example: La gente debería unirse para resolver problemas sociales. English source: If something is social, it is about many people in a community. People should come together and fix the world’s social problems.
English: speech Meaning: Texto hablado ante un grupo. Example: Ella dio un discurso a la clase. English source: A speech is something said to a group of people. She gave a speech to the class.

English: staff Meaning: Conjunto de trabajadores de una organización. Example: Mi padre tiene una plantilla de cuatro personas para ayudarle en la oficina. English source: A staff is a group of people working together in a company. My dad has a staff of four people to help him at the office.

English: toward Meaning: En la dirección de un punto. Example: Santa caminó hacia mi casa con una bolsa de regalos. English source: If you go toward something, you go closer to it. Santa walked toward my house with a bag of gifts.
English: wood Meaning: Material duro de los árboles. Example: Puse los trozos de madera en una pila. English source: Wood is the thing that trees are made of. I put the pieces of wood in a pile.

English: achieve Meaning: Conseguir algo con esfuerzo. Example: Me alegré de poder lograr mi objetivo. English source: To achieve something is to successfully do it after trying hard. I was happy that I could achieve my goal.

English: advise Meaning: Dar recomendaciones sobre qué hacer. Example: Mi madre suele aconsejar a la gente sobre su dinero. English source: To advise someone is to tell them what to do. My mother often advises people about their money.

English: already Meaning: Antes o en ese momento, no después. Example: Ya es hora de que empiece la película. Entremos. English source: If something happens already, it happens before a certain time. It is already time for the movie to start. Let’s go in.

English: basic Meaning: Lo más simple o fundamental. Example: Hoy aprendí algunas habilidades básicas de inglés en la escuela. English source: If something is basic, it is very simple or easy. I learned some basic English skills in school today.
English: bit Meaning: Una pequeña cantidad. Example: Comí un poco de chocolate antes de dormir. English source: A bit is a small amount of something. I ate a bit of chocolate before I went to bed.

English: consider Meaning: Pensar seriamente sobre algo. Example: Pete no le gustó su trabajo y consideró buscar uno nuevo. English source: To consider something means to think about it. Pete didn’t like his job. He considered getting a new one.

English: destroy Meaning: Dañar algo hasta dejarlo inutilizable. Example: El vaso fue destruido. English source: To destroy means to damage something so badly that it cannot be used. The glass was destroyed.

English: entertain Meaning: Divertir o hacer pasar un buen rato. Example: El payaso entretuvo a los niños en la fiesta. English source: To entertain someone is to do something that they enjoy. The clown entertained the kids at the party.

English: extra Meaning: Cantidad superior a lo necesario. Example: La ardilla tenía nueces extra para el invierno. English source: If something is extra, it is more than what is needed. The squirrel had extra nuts for the winter.
English: goal Meaning: Meta o propósito al que se apunta. Example: Su objetivo era convertirse en médico. English source: A goal is something you work toward. Her goal was to become a doctor.

English: lie Meaning: Decir una mentira. Example: Cada vez que Pinocchio mentía, su nariz crecía. English source: To lie is to say or write something untrue to deceive someone. Whenever Pinocchio lied to his father, his nose grew.
English: meat Meaning: Alimento de origen animal. Example: Este trozo de carne que como sabe muy bien. English source: Meat is food made of animals. This piece of meat I’m eating tastes very good.

English: opinion Meaning: Juicio personal sobre algo. Example: Meg me dijo su opinión de mi historia y dijo que no era graciosa. English source: An opinion is a thought about a person or a thing. Meg told me her opinion of my story. She said it was not funny.

English: real Meaning: Que existe de verdad. Example: Algunas personas no creen en extraterrestres, pero yo creo que son reales. English source: If something is real, it actually exists. Some people don’t believe in aliens from space, but I think they’re real.

English: reflect Meaning: Devolver luz, sonido o imagen. Example: Su cara se reflejó en el vidrio liso. English source: To reflect is when a surface sends back light, heat, sound or an image. Her face was reflected in the smooth glass.

English: regard Meaning: Pensar de alguien de cierta manera. Example: El niño consideraba a la niña como una buena amiga. English source: To regard people is to think of them in a certain way. The boy regarded the girl as a good friend.

English: serve Meaning: Entregar comida o bebida a alguien. Example: Nos sirvió las bebidas rápidamente. English source: To serve someone is to give them food or drinks. He served us our drinks quickly.

English: vegetable Meaning: Planta comestible no dulce usada para comer. Example: Las zanahorias son mi verdura favorita. English source: A vegetable is a plant used as food. Carrots are my favorite vegetable.

English: war Meaning: Conflicto armado entre grupos grandes. Example: Muchos jóvenes murieron en la guerra. English source: A war is a big fight between two groups of people. Many young men died in the war.

English: worth Meaning: Tener un precio o valor. Example: Nuestra casa vale mucho dinero. English source: If something is worth an amount of money, it costs that amount. Our house is worth a lot of money.
English: appear Meaning: Darse la impresión de ser algo. Example: Parecía estar triste; estaba llorando. English source: To appear is to seem. She appeared to be sad. She was crying.
English: base Meaning: Parte inferior o fundamento. Example: La base de la mesa tiene tres patas. English source: The base is the bottom of something. The base of the table has three legs.

English: brain Meaning: Órgano cerebral donde se piensa. Example: Debes usar el cerebro para resolver el problema. English source: The brain is the organ in your head that lets you think. You must use your brain to solve the problem.

English: career Meaning: Trayectoria profesional prolongada. Example: Estuvo en el sector hotelero durante la mayor parte de su carrera. English source: A career is a job that you do for a large part of your life. He was in the hospitality business for most of his career.

English: clerk Meaning: Empleado que atiende al público en una tienda/oficina. Example: El cajero sumó su cuenta para las compras de comestibles. English source: A clerk is a type of worker. Clerks in a store help customers. The clerk added up her bill for the groceries.

English: effort Meaning: Energía física o mental puesta para lograr algo. Example: Él siempre pone mucho esfuerzo en sus estudios. English source: Effort is hard work or an attempt to do something. He always puts a lot of effort into his studies.

English: enter Meaning: Pasar al interior de un lugar. Example: Dos guardias me saludaron cuando entré por la puerta principal. English source: To enter a place is to go into it. Two guards greeted me as I entered the front door.

English: excellent Meaning: De muy buena calidad. Example: Saqué una puntuación excelente en mi examen escolar. English source: When something is excellent, it is very good. I got an excellent score on my school test.

English: hero Meaning: Persona valiente que ayuda a otros. Example: Para los niños, el hombre con traje azul y rojo era un héroe de verdad. English source: A hero is a brave person who does things to help others. To children, the man in the blue and red costume was a real hero.
English: hurry Meaning: Hacer algo con prisa. Example: Me apresuré a casa en bicicleta. English source: To hurry is to do something quickly. I hurried home on my bike.

English: inform Meaning: Comunicar información a alguien. Example: Llamé e informé a ella sobre mi idea. English source: To inform someone is to tell them about something. I called and informed her about my idea.

English: later Meaning: En un momento posterior. Example: Perdió el tren, así que llegará un poco más tarde de lo esperado. English source: Later means after the present, expected, or usual time. She missed the train, so she’ll arrive a little later than expected.

English: leave Meaning: Salir o partir de un lugar. Example: Empacó su bolsa y estuvo listo para irse a casa. English source: To leave means to go away from someone or something. He packed his bag and was ready to leave for home.
English: locate Meaning: Encontrar o situar algo. Example: No pude localizar mis llaves en la casa. English source: To locate something is to find it. I could not locate my keys in the house.

English: nurse Meaning: Profesional de salud que cuida pacientes. Example: Una enfermera me ayudó a recuperarme. English source: A nurse is a person who helps sick people in the hospital. A nurse helped me get better.

English: operation Meaning: Intervención médica quirúrgica. Example: La operación de mi brazo fue un éxito. English source: An operation is when a doctor replaces or removes something in the body. The operation on my arm was a success.
English: pain Meaning: Sensación de molestia o sufrimiento físico. Example: Tenía dolor de cabeza. English source: Pain is the feeling that you have when you are hurt. His head was full of pain.
English: refuse Meaning: Decir que no; no aceptar. Example: El perro rechazó jugar con el gato. English source: To refuse something is to say “no” to it. The dog refused to play with the cat.

English: though Meaning: Conectores: aunque, a pesar de. Example: Aunque estaba con sobrepeso, le gustaba estar activo. English source: Though is used when one idea makes another seem surprising. Though he was overweight, he liked to be active.
English: various Meaning: Diversos o de varios tipos. Example: Tenía zapatos de varios estilos. English source: If something is various, there are many types of it. She owned shoes of various styles.

English: actual Meaning: Que existe y no es falso. Example: Esta es la espada real que tuvo el rey, no una falsa. English source: Actual means real or true. This is the actual sword that the king owned, not a fake one.

English: amaze Meaning: Sorprender profundamente. Example: Las noticias del periódico sorprendieron a Jack. English source: To amaze people is to surprise them very much. The news in the paper amazed Jack.

English: charge Meaning: Precio que se paga por un producto o servicio. Example: La tarifa de las camisas fue de 15 dólares. English source: A charge is the price to pay for something. The charge for the shirts was $15. Notes: note: aquí significa precio

English: comfort Meaning: Dar alivio o ánimo a alguien. Example: Quería consolar a mi amiga tras la mala noticia. English source: To comfort someone means to make them feel better. I wanted to comfort my friend after I heard the bad news.

English: contact Meaning: Ponerse en contacto con alguien. Example: Contacté a Sue para invitarla a mi fiesta. English source: To contact people is to speak or write to them. I contacted Sue about my party.

English: customer Meaning: Persona que compra productos o servicios. Example: El cliente guardó unos artículos en una bolsa. English source: A customer is a person who buys something at a store. The customer put a few items in a bag.

English: deliver Meaning: Llevar o hacer llegar algo a destino. Example: El hombre entregó comida china en mi casa. English source: To deliver something is to take it from one place to another. The man delivered Chinese food to my house.

English: earn Meaning: Obtener dinero a cambio de trabajo. Example: Gana su sustento como chef en un gran restaurante. English source: To earn means to get money for the work you do. He earns his living as a chef in a great restaurant.

English: gate Meaning: Acceso o cerco con estructura de apertura. Example: Queremos poner una puerta de madera alrededor de nuestra casa. English source: A gate is a type of door. Gates are usually made of metal or wood. We want to put up a wooden gate around our house.

English: include Meaning: Formar parte de un conjunto. Example: ¿Esta comida incluye una bebida refrescante? English source: To include something means to have it as part of a group. Does this meal include a soft drink?

English: manage Meaning: Dirigir o administrar algo. Example: Tuve que gestionar la reunión yo solo. English source: To manage something means to control or be in charge of it. I had to manage the meeting myself.

English: mystery Meaning: Algo enigmático o difícil de comprender. Example: El camino en el mapa fue un misterio para mí. English source: A mystery is something that is difficult to understand or explain. The path on the map was a complete mystery to me.
English: occur Meaning: Suceder o pasar. Example: ¿Cuándo ocurrió la tormenta? English source: To occur means to happen. When did the thunderstorm occur?
English: opposite Meaning: Lo contrario. Example: Lo opuesto al negro es el blanco. English source: If A is the opposite of B, A is completely different from B. The opposite of black is white.

English: plate Meaning: Recipiente plano para servir comida. Example: Puse mi plato para ponerle comida. English source: A plate is a flat round thing that you put food on. I put my plate down so I could put some food on it.
English: receive Meaning: Obtener algo. Example: Recibí un regalo en mi cumpleaños. English source: To receive something is to get it. I received a present on my birthday.

English: reward Meaning: Premio por un buen desempeño o conducta. Example: Le dieron una recompensa por su excelente trabajo. English source: A reward is something given in exchange for good behavior or work. He was given a reward for his excellent performance.
English: set Meaning: Colocar o situar algo. Example: Por favor, pon los dados sobre la mesa. English source: To set something is to put it somewhere. Please set the dice down on the table.

English: steal Meaning: Tomar lo ajeno de forma ilegal. Example: Los hombres intentaron robar dinero del banco. English source: To steal is to take something that is not yours. The men tried to steal money from the bank.

English: thief Meaning: Persona que roba. Example: Un ladrón entró en nuestra casa y se llevó las joyas de mi madre. English source: A thief is someone who quietly takes things that do not belong to them. A thief broke into our home and took my mother’s jewelry.
English: advance Meaning: Progresar o pasar hacia delante. Example: Avanzó lentamente por el puente. English source: To advance is to go forward. He advanced across the bridge slowly.

English: athlete Meaning: Persona que practica deportes de forma competitiva. Example: Algunos atletas pueden jugar muchos deportes muy bien. English source: An athlete is a person who plays sports. Some athletes can play many sports very well.
English: average Meaning: Normal o típico. Example: No soy rico ni pobre; soy promedio. English source: If something is average, it is at a normal level. I’m not rich or poor; I’m average.

English: behavior Meaning: Manera de actuar o comportarse. Example: Su comportamiento fue bueno este semestre; no causaron problemas. English source: Your behavior is the way you act. Their behavior was good this semester. They didn’t cause trouble.

English: behind Meaning: En la parte posterior de algo. Example: La niña se escondía detrás de un árbol. English source: Behind means to be at the back of something. The little girl was hiding behind a tree.
English: course Meaning: Asignatura o materia. Example: Este año tomé un curso de educación física. English source: A course is a class in school. I took a P.E. course in school this year.

English: lower Meaning: Hacer que algo disminuya o descienda. Example: El gráfico muestra cómo bajó su producción durante el año. English source: To lower something is to make it go down. The chart shows how his production has lowered over the year.
English: match Meaning: Ser parecido o corresponder. Example: Los dos zapatos coincidían. English source: To match is to be the same or similar. The two shoes matched. They looked the same.

English: member Meaning: Persona que pertenece a un grupo. Example: Julie es la nueva miembro de nuestro equipo. English source: A member is a person who is part of a group. Julie is the newest member of our team.

English: mental Meaning: Relacionado con la mente o la inteligencia. Example: Me hice una imagen mental de la habitación. English source: If something is mental, it has to do with your mind. I made a mental picture of the room.

English: passenger Meaning: Persona que viaja en transporte. Example: Un pasajero estaba de pie cerca del tren del metro. English source: A passenger is a person who rides in a car, train, or airplane. One passenger was standing near the subway train.

English: personality Meaning: Conjunto de rasgos de carácter y conducta. Example: John tiene una mala personalidad. English source: Your personality is what you are like and how you behave. John has a bad personality.

English: poem Meaning: Texto literario breve con ritmo y emociones. Example: William Shakespeare escribió muchos poemas. English source: A poem is a short kind of writing. William Shakespeare wrote many poems.

English: pole Meaning: Varilla larga que sirve de soporte. Example: La bandera colgaba del poste. English source: A pole is a long thin stick made of wood or metal that supports things. The flag was hanging from the flag pole.
English: remove Meaning: Eliminar o sacar algo de su lugar. Example: Quité el clavo del tablero. English source: To remove something is to take it away. I removed the nail from the board.

English: safety Meaning: Estado de protección ante riesgos. Example: Por su seguridad, lo pusieron en una silla del coche. English source: Safety means the condition of being safe and free from danger. For his own safety, he was placed in a car seat.

English: shoot Meaning: Lanzar un disparo con arma o lanzar algo. Example: El cazador levantó su arma para disparar al blanco. English source: To shoot is to fire something like a bullet at someone or something. The hunter raised his gun to shoot at the target.
English: sound Meaning: Producir ruido. Example: El despertador sonó y nos despertó a todos. English source: To sound means to make a noise. The alarm clock sounded and woke us all up.
English: swim Meaning: Moverse por el agua con el cuerpo. Example: Me encanta nadar en el océano. English source: To swim is to move through water. I love to swim in the ocean.
English: web Meaning: Red tejida por una araña. Example: Mi mamá limpió las telarañas de la cochera. English source: A web is a home made by a spider. Mom cleaned the spider webs out of the garage.
English: block Meaning: Bloque sólido de material. Example: Vi un bloque de hielo en el suelo. English source: A block is a solid piece of wood, stone, or ice. I saw a block of ice on the floor.

English: bury Meaning: Cubrir con tierra u ocultar debajo. Example: Mi padre fue enterrado en su ciudad natal cuando murió. English source: When you bury something, you put it under the ground or under a lot of other things. My father was buried in his hometown when he died.

English: cheer Meaning: Aplaudir o alentar en voz alta. Example: La multitud animó cuando el equipo local ganó. English source: To cheer is to give a loud shout of approval or encouragement. The crowd all cheered when the home team won.

English: complex Meaning: Compuesto y difícil de entender. Example: Un rompecabezas puede ser complejo porque tiene muchas piezas. English source: If something is complex, it has many small parts. It is hard to understand. A jigsaw puzzle can be complex because it has so many pieces.

English: critic Meaning: Persona que evalúa y opina sobre obras o productos. Example: El crítico de vinos degustó el vino para dar su opinión. English source: A critic is someone who gives opinions about movies, books, plays, etc. The wine critic tasted the wine so he could give his opinion.

English: direction Meaning: Camino o rumbo a seguir. Example: Ve en está dirección durante 10 minutos y llegarás al río. English source: A direction is the way to go. Go in this direction for 10 minutes, and you will get to the river.

English: event Meaning: Suceso importante. Example: Terminar la secundaria fue un gran evento en su vida. English source: An event is something that happens, especially something important. Finishing high school was a major event in his life.

English: exercise Meaning: Hacer actividad física para mantener la salud. Example: Debes hacer ejercicio todos los días. English source: To exercise is to run or play sports so that you can be healthy. You should exercise every day.

English: friendship Meaning: Relación de compañerismo entre amigos. Example: Michael y Lisa tienen una amistad muy fuerte entre ellos. English source: Friendship is the relationship between people who are friends. Michael and Lisa have a very strong friendship with each other.

English: guide Meaning: Persona o recurso que orienta el camino. Example: Seguimos a una guía en el parque. English source: A guide is someone who shows you where to go. We followed a guide at the park.

English: lack Meaning: Ausencia o insuficiencia de algo. Example: Su único problema es la falta de dinero. English source: If there is a lack of something, there is not enough of it. His only problem is a lack of money.

English: perform Meaning: Hacer algo ante una audiencia. Example: Él interpretará una canción para la clase. English source: To perform is to do something in front of people who watch. He will perform a song for the class.

English: pressure Meaning: Fuerza o influencia para que alguien actúe. Example: Pusieron presión para que cambiara de opinión. English source: Pressure is what you apply to make someone do something. They put pressure on him to change his mind.

English: probably Meaning: Con alta probabilidad de ocurrir. Example: Probablemente sacarás buena nota si estudias para el examen. English source: If something will probably happen, it is likely to happen. You will probably get a good grade if you study for the test.

English: public Meaning: Que es de uso o acceso común. Example: Fui al parque público a jugar con mis amigos. English source: If something is public, it is meant for everyone to use. I went to the public park to play with my friends.
English: smart Meaning: Que posee capacidad de aprender bien. Example: María es una estudiante inteligente. English source: Smart means intelligent. Mary is a smart student.

English: strike Meaning: Dar un golpe a alguien o algo. Example: Ella golpeó a la otra niña en la cara. English source: To strike people or things is to hit them. She struck the other girl in the face.

English: support Meaning: Respaldar o favorecer una idea o persona. Example: Todos en el trabajo apoyan el nuevo plan. English source: To support something is to like it and help it be successful. Everyone at work supports the new plan.

English: term Meaning: Palabra o expresión de una lengua. Example: A menudo uso el término “uy” cuando cometo un error. English source: A term is a word for something. I often use the term “oops” when I make a mistake.

English: unite Meaning: Unirse o juntar fuerzas. Example: Si nos unimos, terminaremos el proyecto más rápido. English source: To unite is to get together to do something. If we unite, we can finish our project faster.

English: associate Meaning: Vincular una idea con otra. Example: La mayoría asocia las fiestas de cumpleaños con la diversión. English source: To associate means to connect something with a person or thing. Most people associate birthday parties with having fun.

English: environment Meaning: Ambiente o medio donde vive la gente. Example: Mantener limpio nuestro entorno es importante para la salud. English source: The environment is the place where people work or live. Keeping our environment clean is important to our health.

English: factory Meaning: Lugar industrial donde se producen bienes. Example: Tenemos solo una fábrica en nuestra ciudad. English source: A factory is a building where things are made or put together. We have only one factory in our town.

English: feature Meaning: Atributo o cualidad destacada. Example: El teléfono móvil tiene muchas características. English source: A feature is an important part of something. The cell phone has many features.

English: instance Meaning: Un ejemplo o caso particular. Example: Nunca he vivido una instancia de odio. ¿La has vivido? English source: An instance is an example of something. I have never experienced an instance of hate. Have you?

English: involve Meaning: Incluir o hacer participar activamente. Example: Toda la familia estaba involucrada en el juego. English source: To involve means to include as an active participant. The whole family was involved in playing the game.

English: medicine Meaning: Medicamento para tratar una dolencia. Example: El médico me dio medicina para el resfriado. English source: Medicine is something you take to feel better or treat an illness. The doctor gave me medicine for my cold.

English: mix Meaning: Combinación de elementos distintos. Example: La mezcla verde que hicimos en clase se derramó en la mesa. English source: A mix is different things put together. The green mix we made in science class spilled onto the table.

English: organize Meaning: Planificar o poner orden en algo. Example: Haz una lista para organizar lo que necesitas. English source: To organize is to plan or get ready for an event. Make a list to help you organize the things you need.

English: period Meaning: Lapso o fase de tiempo. Example: En una época de Europa había muchos caballeros. English source: A period is an amount of time when something happens. In one period in Europe, there were many knights.

English: populate Meaning: Habitar o llenar un lugar con población. Example: Miles de millones de personas habitan la Tierra. English source: If people populate an area, they live there. Billions of people populate the Earth.

English: produce Meaning: Crear o cosechar bienes o productos. Example: Este árbol produce manzanas cada año. English source: To produce something is to make or grow it. This tree produces apples every year.

English: range Meaning: Conjunto de valores o variedad de opciones. Example: Vi una gama de coches para elegir. English source: A range is a number or a set of similar things. I saw a range of cars to choose from.

English: recognize Meaning: Identificar algo o a alguien por experiencia previa. Example: Reconocí a un viejo amigo de hace muchos años. English source: To recognize something is to know it because you have seen it before. I recognized an old friend from many years ago.

English: regular Meaning: Habitual o constante. Example: Nuestra hora de almuerzo regular es alrededor del mediodía. English source: If something is regular, it happens often and in equal amounts of time. Our regular lunch time is around noon.

English: sign Meaning: Indicación visual o aviso. Example: La señal indicó que hoy sería un mal día. English source: A sign is an indication giving information, directions, a warning, etc. The sign indicated that today would be a bad day.
English: tip Meaning: Extremo puntiagudo. Example: La punta de su bolígrafo era muy afilada. English source: A tip is a pointed end of something. The tip of his pen was very sharp.

English: tradition Meaning: Práctica repetida históricamente en una cultura. Example: El matrimonio es una tradición en todo el mundo. English source: A tradition is something people have been doing for a long time. Marriage is a tradition all over the world.

English: trash Meaning: Desechos o residuos sin uso. Example: Por favor saca la basura; huele mal. English source: Trash is waste material or unwanted or worthless things. Please take out the trash; it smells bad.

English: wide Meaning: Con gran medida de lado a lado. Example: La puerta era tan ancha como mis brazos. English source: If something is wide, it is large from side to side. The door was as wide as my arms.

English: advice Meaning: Sugerencia para actuar bien. Example: No sé cómo estudiar para mis exámenes. ¿Me das un consejo? English source: Advice is an opinion about what to do. I don’t know how to study for my exams. Can you give me some advice?

English: along Meaning: Recorrer la extensión de un lugar. Example: Camina a lo largo de este túnel durante diez minutos y verás una puerta a la izquierda. English source: Along means down the length of a road, river, etc. Walk along this tunnel for ten minutes, and you’ll see a door on the left.

English: attention Meaning: Concentración o interés en algo. Example: Su trabajo llamó la atención de dos compañeros. English source: Attention is the notice, thought, or consideration of someone. His work got the attention of two of his co-workers.

English: attract Meaning: Llevar algo o alguien hacia uno por interés o fuerza. Example: El imán atrajo al metal. English source: To attract means to make a person or thing come closer or be interested. The magnet attracted the metal.

English: climb Meaning: Subir usando manos y pies. Example: Las niñas subieron a la cima de la montaña. English source: To climb means to use your hands and feet to go up something. The girls climbed to the top of the mountain.

English: drop Meaning: Descender o dejar caer algo. Example: Cayó un poco de agua de la botella. English source: To drop is to fall or allow something to fall. A small amount of water dropped from the bottle.

English: final Meaning: Último o definitivo. Example: En la parte final de la película, el hombre y la mujer se casaron. English source: If something is final, it is the last part. In the final part of the film, the man and the woman got married.

English: further Meaning: Más lejos o además, en mayor grado. Example: La escalera mecánica está más lejos de lo que pensé. English source: Further means at or from a greater distance or time. The escalator is further than I thought.

English: imply Meaning: Dar a entender algo sin decirlo claramente. Example: El hombre insinuó que quería el trabajo, pero no lo dijo abiertamente. English source: To imply something is to suggest it without saying it. The man implied that he wanted the job, but he didn’t say so.

English: maintain Meaning: Conservar sin cambiar. Example: Las bolas mantienen un movimiento constante. English source: To maintain means to make something stay the same. The balls maintain constant movement.

English: neither Meaning: Negación de ambas opciones. Example: Ni el camino de la izquierda ni el de la derecha nos llevarán a casa. English source: You use neither to connect two negative possibilities. Neither the path on the left nor the path on the right will lead us home.

English: otherwise Meaning: En caso contrario. Example: Es bueno mantenerse activo; de lo contrario, subirás de peso. English source: Otherwise means in another way if you don’t do this. It’s good to stay active; otherwise, you’ll gain weight.

English: physical Meaning: Relacionado con el cuerpo. Example: Andar en bicicleta es bueno para la salud física. English source: If something is physical, it is related to your body and not your mind. Biking is good for your physical health.

English: prove Meaning: Mostrar evidencia de la verdad de algo. Example: Mi profesora demostró la respuesta en la pizarra. English source: To prove something is to show that it is true. My teacher proved the answer on the board.

English: react Meaning: Responder con una acción o emoción. Example: James reaccionó mal a la noticia. English source: To react is to respond by acting in a certain way. James reacted badly to the news.

English: ride Meaning: Subirse y desplazarse sobre algo. Example: Hoy montaré en montaña rusa por primera vez. English source: To ride something is to travel on it. You can ride an animal, a bike, etc. I will ride a roller coaster for the first time today.

English: situated Meaning: Estar ubicado en un lugar. Example: La pizarra está situada entre los dos hombres. English source: If something is situated somewhere, it is in that place. The whiteboard is situated between the two men.

English: society Meaning: Comunidad organizada de personas. Example: La sociedad espera que la gente sea buena y honesta. English source: Society is a group of people who interact and share a culture. Society expects people to be good and honest.

English: standard Meaning: Lo que se considera normal o aceptable. Example: Este televisor antiguo está por debajo de nuestros estándares. English source: A standard is what people consider normal or good. This older model TV is below our store’s standards.

English: suggest Meaning: Proponer una idea o plan. Example: Sugirió que fuéramos a ver a su jefe. English source: To suggest something means to give an idea or plan about it. He suggested that we go to see his boss.

English: actually Meaning: En realidad, de verdad. Example: Mi papá parece un poco severo, pero en realidad es muy amable. English source: Actually means in fact or really. My dad looks a little mean, but actually he’s very kind.

English: bite Meaning: Cortar con los dientes. Example: El niño dio un gran mordisco a su hamburguesa. English source: Bite is the act of using your teeth to cut and tear into something. The boy took a big bite of his hamburger.
English: coast Meaning: Faja costera junto al mar. Example: Me quedé en la costa sur de Australia. English source: The coast is the land by an ocean. I stayed on the southern coast of Australia.

English: deal Meaning: Convenio entre dos o más partes. Example: Hice un acuerdo con la otra empresa para que nos dieran dinero. English source: A deal is an agreement that you have with another person. I made a deal with the other company to give us some money.

English: desert Meaning: Zona árida con poca agua y vegetación. Example: No crecen muchas plantas en el desierto. English source: The desert is an area of land without many plants or water. Not many plants grow in the desert.

English: effective Meaning: Que produce el efecto esperado. Example: Nadar es una forma efectiva de mantenerse saludable. English source: If something is effective, it works well. Swimming is an effective way to stay healthy.

English: examine Meaning: Observar con atención para evaluar. Example: El médico examinó mis ojos hoy. English source: To examine something is to look at it carefully. The doctor examined my eyes today.

English: false Meaning: Que no es cierto o auténtico. Example: Si crees que la respuesta es falsa, pulsa el botón rojo. English source: If something is false, it is not correct. If you think the answer is false, press the red button.

English: figure out Meaning: Comprender y hallar una solución o respuesta. Example: No pude resolver qué quería que hiciera. English source: When you figure something out, you come to understand it and find an answer. I couldn’t figure out what he wanted me to do.
English: gift Meaning: Una cosa que se da a alguien. Example: Dave recibió muchos regalos por Navidad. English source: A gift is something you give someone. Dave received many gifts for Christmas.

English: hunger Meaning: La necesidad de comer. Example: Después de jugar todo el día, él tenía mucha hambre. English source: Hunger is the feeling that you get when you need to eat. After playing all day long, he was filled with hunger.

English: imagine Meaning: Formar una imagen o idea en la mente. Example: Sally se imaginó ganando mucho dinero. English source: To imagine something is to think of it in your mind. Sally imagined herself winning lots of money.

English: journey Meaning: Un desplazamiento largo. Example: Hice un viaje por todo el país con mis padres. English source: A journey is a long trip. I went on a journey across the country with my parents.
English: puzzle Meaning: Algo difícil de comprender. Example: La pregunta fue un enigma para él. English source: A puzzle is something that is hard to understand. The question was a puzzle to him.

English: quite Meaning: Totalmente o en gran medida. Example: Creo que escribir en un teclado es bastante fácil. English source: Quite means that something is a certain way completely or very much. I think typing on a keyboard is quite easy.

English: rather Meaning: Elegir una cosa en lugar de otra. Example: Prefiero el rojo en lugar del azul. English source: Rather is used when you want to do one thing but not the other. I would rather have the red one than the blue one.

English: specific Meaning: Preciso o exacto. Example: Por favor elige un lugar específico en el mapa. English source: If something is specific, it is precise or exact. Please choose a specific place on the map.

English: spider Meaning: Un pequeño animal de ocho patas. Example: Algunos adultos tienen miedo de criaturas como las arañas. English source: A spider is a small creature with eight legs. Some adults have a fear of little creatures such as spiders.

English: tour Meaning: Viaje corto para ver muchos lugares. Example: Hice una excursión por Asia y Europa. English source: A tour is a short trip in which you see many sights. I took a tour of Asia and Europe.
English: trip Meaning: Un desplazamiento a un lugar. Example: Ken hizo un viaje a la ciudad ayer. English source: A trip is a journey to a certain place. Ken took a trip to the city yesterday.
English: band Meaning: Grupo de personas que tocan música. Example: Mi hermano está en una banda de rock. English source: A band is a group of people who play music. My brother is in a rock band.

English: barely Meaning: De manera mínima; casi no. Example: Apenas tenía dinero suficiente para pagar mi boleto de autobús. English source: Barely means by the smallest amount, almost not. I barely had enough money to pay for my bus ticket.
English: boring Meaning: No divertido. Example: Creo que Internet es aburrido. English source: If something is boring, it is not fun. I think the Internet is boring.

English: cancel Meaning: Decidir que algo no se hará. Example: Ella canceló el resto de sus planes por la lluvia. English source: To cancel means to decide that an event or a request will not happen. She canceled the rest of her plans because of the rain.

English: driveway Meaning: Un acceso privado corto hacia una casa. Example: El largo camino de entrada nos llevó hasta su casa. English source: A driveway is a short private road that leads to a person’s home. The long driveway led us to their new house.

English: garbage Meaning: Residuos o desechos. Example: El niño limpió la basura alrededor de su casa. English source: Garbage is waste material like unwanted or spoiled food, bottles, paper, etc. The boy cleaned up the garbage around his house.

English: instrument Meaning: Objeto diseñado para una tarea. Example: Mi instrumento musical favorito es el piano. English source: An instrument is something designed to do a certain task like play music. My favorite musical instrument is the piano.

English: list Meaning: Un registro de información. Example: Mi mamá hace una lista de provisiones para comprar. English source: A list is a record of information printed with an item on each line. My mom makes a list of groceries to buy.

English: magic Meaning: Capacidad de hacer cosas imposibles. Example: El mago usó magia para sacar un conejo de su sombrero. English source: Magic is the power to do impossible things. The magician used magic to pull a rabbit out of his hat.

English: message Meaning: Un texto corto que se envía a alguien. Example: Dejé un mensaje para ti en el sobre. English source: A message is a set of words that you send to someone. I left a message for you in the envelope.
English: notice Meaning: Ver o percibir algo por primera vez. Example: ¿Notaste el paisaje? English source: To notice something is to see it for the first time. Did you notice the view?
English: own Meaning: Tener algo o que te pertenezca. Example: Mi abuelo posee esa casa. English source: To own something means to have it. That thing belongs to you. My grandfather owns that house.

English: predict Meaning: Decir que algo va a suceder. Example: Ella predijo que me casaría el próximo año. English source: To predict something is to say that it will happen. She predicted that I would get married next year.

English: professor Meaning: Persona que enseña en la universidad. Example: El profesor de ciencias de Mike sabe mucho de física. English source: A professor is a person who teaches in college. Mike’s science professor knows a lot about physics.

English: rush Meaning: Ir o hacer algo muy rápido. Example: Nancy se apresuró para terminar su tarea. English source: To rush is to go somewhere or do something very quickly. Nancy rushed to finish her homework.

English: schedule Meaning: Plan que indica cuándo hacer cosas. Example: ¿Cuál es tu horario de clases para hoy? English source: A schedule is a plan that tells you when to do things. What is your class schedule for today?

English: share Meaning: Dar una parte de algo a otra persona. Example: Jimmy compartió su manzana conmigo. English source: To share something is to give some of it to another person. Jimmy shared his apple with me.

English: stage Meaning: Lugar donde actúan actores o músicos. Example: Había una gran pantalla en el escenario. English source: A stage is a place where actors or musicians act or sing. A large screen was on the stage.

English: storm Meaning: Clima muy malo con lluvia o nieve. Example: ¿La tormenta te despertó anoche? English source: A storm is very bad weather. There is a lot of rain or snow. Did that storm wake you up last night?

English: within Meaning: En el interior de algo. Example: Dentro de la caja había una pizza. English source: You use within to say that something is inside another thing. Within the box, there was a pizza.

English: burden Meaning: Responsabilidad seria o difícil. Example: Los niños que no se portan bien son una carga para sus padres. English source: A burden is a serious or difficult responsibility. Children who do not behave are a burden to their parents.

English: compromise Meaning: Aceptar algo que no es exactamente lo que quieres. Example: Ambos hicimos concesiones sobre el juego que decidimos. English source: To compromise is to agree to something that is not exactly what you want. We both compromised about the game we decided to play.

English: craft Meaning: Crear algo usando habilidad. Example: Ella fabricó una estantería de madera de pino y la pintó. English source: To craft something is to make it using skill. She crafted the bookcase out of solid pine wood and then painted it.

English: dive Meaning: Entrar en el agua de golpe y de cabeza. Example: Me gusta zambullirme al agua desde un avión. English source: When you dive into water, you go down head first into the water. I like sky-diving from an airplane.

English: fragile Meaning: Que se daña con facilidad. Example: La vajilla frágil se empaquetó con cuidado. English source: When people or things are fragile, they are not strong and can be damaged easily. The fragile glassware was carefully packed into boxes.

English: half Meaning: La parte que divide algo en dos. Example: La máquina puede dividir el libro en dos mitades. English source: If you cut something into two parts that are the same size, you cut it half. The machine can divide the book in half.

English: innocence Meaning: Falta de experiencia de cosas difíciles. Example: Todos encontraron su inocencia encantadora. English source: Innocence is a lack of experience of difficult or complex things in life. Everyone who met her found her innocence to be charming.

English: lead Meaning: Ir primero para que otros te sigan. Example: Te guiaré hacia el lugar correcto. English source: When you lead something, you go first and it follows you. I will lead you to the right place.

English: meeting Meaning: Encuentro con otras personas. Example: Tenemos muchas reuniones en la escuela para planear qué hacer. English source: When you have a meeting, you are with other people. We have lots of meetings at our school to plan what to do.

English: merge Meaning: Unir dos cosas en una sola. Example: Las nubes de tormenta se fusionaron en una nube grande. English source: To merge two things is to combine them into one whole thing. The storm clouds merged into one large menacing cloud that filled the sky.

English: moderate Meaning: No demasiado intenso ni extremo. Example: Se necesita paciencia moderada para estar con niños todo el día. English source: When something is moderate, it is not too big or too small in size or amount. It takes a moderate amount of patience to be around small children all day.

English: overwhelm Meaning: Afectar en exceso a alguien. Example: La cantidad de tarea le abrumó. English source: To overwhelm is to exist in such a large amount that someone cannot deal with it. The amount of homework her teacher assigned has overwhelmed her.

English: payment Meaning: Entregar dinero por algo. Example: Hice el último pago de mi coche ayer. English source: When you make a payment, you give someone some money for what you get. I made the last payment on my car yesterday. Now I am really the owner.

English: perception Meaning: Manera de entender una situación. Example: Como no podía ver, su percepción de la vida era distinta a la mía. English source: A perception of a situation is a way of thinking about it or understanding it. Since he couldn’t see, his perception of life was much different than mine.

English: settle Meaning: Llegar a un acuerdo. Example: Arreglamos la discusión mirando la respuesta en la web. English source: When you settle something, you reach an agreement. We settled the argument by looking up the answer on the web.

English: shiver Meaning: Temblor del cuerpo por frío o miedo. Example: Tuve escalofríos al regresar a casa porque hacía frío. English source: A shiver is a shaking movement the body makes when someone is cold or scared. I got shivers on my way home because it was so cold.

English: sociable Meaning: Amigable y de trato fácil. Example: Muchos de mis buenos amigos son sociables, pero yo soy tímido. English source: When someone is sociable, they are friendly. Many of my good friends are sociable, but I am shy.
English: speed Meaning: Ir muy rápido. Example: Conducir rápido es la causa de la mayoría de accidentes. English source: When you speed, you go very fast. Speeding is the cause of most car accidents.

English: talkative Meaning: Que habla mucho. Example: Mi tía es muy habladora cuando está al teléfono. English source: When someone is talkative, he or she talks a lot. My aunt is very talkative whenever she is on the phone.

English: usual Meaning: Lo que se espera o ocurre seguido. Example: Fue la gente habitual la que vino. English source: When something is usual, it is what we expect. It was just the usual people who came.

English: above Meaning: En un nivel más alto. Example: Arregló el cartel que estaba encima de la multitud. English source: If something is above, it is at a higher level than something else. He straightened the sign that was above the crowd.

English: ahead Meaning: Por delante o más adelantado. Example: El coche azul iba delante de nosotros. English source: If something is ahead of something else, it is in front of it. The blue car drove on ahead of us.

English: amount Meaning: La cantidad total de algo. Example: ¿Puedo pagar el importe total con mi tarjeta? English source: An amount is how much there is of something. Can I use my card to pay for the entire amount?

English: belief Meaning: Sentimiento de que algo es verdadero. Example: Un predicador debe tener una fuerte creencia en Dios. English source: A belief is a strong feeling that something is correct or true. A preacher or priest should have a strong belief in God.

English: center Meaning: La parte media. Example: El centro de un tablero de dardos es el punto más importante. English source: The center of something is the middle of it. The center of a dart board is the most important spot.

English: common Meaning: Que ocurre a menudo o hay mucho. Example: Es común que nieve en invierno. English source: If something is common, it happens often or there is much of it. It is common for snow to fall in the winter.

English: cost Meaning: Requerir dinero. Example: Estos zapatos de diseñador cuestan más que los normales. English source: To cost is to require payment. These designer shoes cost more than the regular ones.

English: demonstrate Meaning: Mostrar cómo se hace algo. Example: Ella mostró su plan a sus compañeras de trabajo. English source: To demonstrate something is to show how it is done. She demonstrated her plan to her co-workers.

English: different Meaning: No igual a otro. Example: Cada una de mis hermanas tiene un peinado diferente. English source: Different describes someone or something that is not the same as others. Each of my sisters has a different hair style.

English: evidence Meaning: Prueba o hecho que demuestra algo. Example: Usó las fotos como evidencia de que los OVNIs son reales. English source: Evidence is a fact or thing that you use to prove something. He used the pictures as evidence that UFOs are real.

English: honesty Meaning: Cualidad de ser sincero. Example: Una corte debe ser un lugar de honestidad. English source: Honesty means the quality of being truthful or honest. A courtroom should be a place of honesty.

English: idiom Meaning: Expresión con significado distinto a su literal. Example: El modismo “cuando vuelan los cerdos” significa que algo nunca pasará. English source: An idiom is a phrase with a meaning different from its words. The idiom “when pigs fly” means that something will never happen.

English: independent Meaning: Que no depende de otro. Example: Ella eligió vivir de forma independiente en el campo. English source: If something is independent, it is not controlled by something else. She chose to live an independent life in the country.

English: inside Meaning: Parte o espacio interno. Example: El interior de la caja estaba vacío. English source: Inside means the inner part, space or side of something. The inside of the box was empty.

English: jail Meaning: Lugar para encerrar personas castigadas. Example: Lo enviaron a la cárcel por robar coches. English source: A jail is a place to keep bad people. He was sent to jail for taking other people’s cars.

English: master Meaning: Persona muy experta en algo. Example: Mi hermano es maestro de taekwondo. English source: A master is a person who is very good at something. My brother is a master of taekwondo.

English: memory Meaning: Capacidad de recordar. Example: Mi memoria de la primera vez en la ciudad será la mejor siempre. English source: A memory is something you remember. The memory of my first time in the city will always be the best.

English: pocket Meaning: Parte de la ropa para guardar cosas. Example: Ella siempre tenía las manos en los bolsillos. English source: A pocket is a part of your clothing where you can keep things. She always had her hands in her pockets.

English: proper Meaning: Lo que es correcto o adecuado. Example: No es apropiado tirar la basura en la carretera. English source: If something is proper, it is right. It is not proper to throw your garbage on the road.

English: sale Meaning: Que puede comprarse. Example: Todo lo que está en venta aquí tiene el mismo precio. English source: If something is for sale, you can buy it. Everything for sale here is the same price.

English: because Meaning: Introduce una causa o motivo. Example: Tenemos que estudiar porque tenemos examen mañana. English source: Because introduces a reason for something. We need to study because we have a test tomorrow.

English: east Meaning: Dirección por donde sale el sol. Example: Mi ventana mira al este, así que veo el amanecer. English source: East is the direction the sun rises from. My window looks to the east, so I can watch the sunrise every morning.
English: expensive Meaning: Que cuesta mucho. Example: Mi amigo conduce un coche deportivo caro. English source: Expensive things cost a lot of money. My friend drives an expensive sports car.
English: flower Meaning: Parte coloreada de una planta. Example: Le dio flores rosas a su abuela. English source: A flower is the colored part of a plant. She gave pink flowers to her grandmother.

English: garden Meaning: Espacio donde se cultivan plantas. Example: El jardín es muy colorido en primavera. English source: A garden is an area where people grow plants. The garden is very bright and colorful in the spring.

English: holiday Meaning: Día de celebración. Example: El lunes fue día festivo, así que no había escuela. English source: A holiday is a special day of celebration. Monday was a holiday, so there was no school or work.

English: many Meaning: Un número grande de cosas o personas. Example: Hay mucha gente en la calle. English source: Many shows that there is a large number of something. There are many people on the street.

English: million Meaning: Número uno seguido de seis ceros. Example: Casi 19 millones de personas viven en Delhi. English source: A million is another way to write the number 1,000,000. Almost 19 million people live in Delhi, India.

English: mountain Meaning: Una colina muy alta. Example: El Everest es la montaña más alta del mundo. English source: A mountain is a very high hill. Mount Everest is the highest mountain in the world.
English: place Meaning: Espacio o sitio. Example: Una biblioteca es un lugar donde se leen libros. English source: A place is a space or area. A library is a place where people can read books.

English: popular Meaning: Que es querido por mucha gente. Example: Las personas escuchaban a un conferencista popular. English source: A popular thing is liked by many people. These people are listening to a popular man speak.

English: ski Meaning: Bajar sobre nieve con esquís. Example: Al hombre le gusta esquiar y va cada fin de semana. English source: To ski is to glide on long pieces of wood or metal over snow. The man likes to ski and goes every weekend.
English: such Meaning: De ese tipo o de está manera. Example: Nunca había visto un atardecer tan hermoso. English source: Such means “like this”. I have never seen such a beautiful sunset before.

English: total Meaning: Cantidad o suma completa. Example: El costo total de los artículos fue 52 dólares. English source: Total shows that everyone or everything has been counted. The total cost of the items she bought was $52.
English: tower Meaning: Edificio muy alto y estrecho. Example: Esta es una torre famosa en Italia. English source: A tower is a tall, narrow building. This is a very famous tower in Italy.

English: town Meaning: Lugar pequeño de población, más pequeño que una ciudad. Example: Vengo de un pueblo pequeño y todos se conocen. English source: A town is a place where people live and work, and is smaller than a city. I come from a small town, and everyone there knows each other.

English: train Meaning: Conjunto de vagones ferroviarios. Example: El tren es muy rápido, así que llegamos a casa en una hora. English source: A train is a group of railway cars connected together. The train is very fast, so we can get home in one hour.

English: walk Meaning: Moverse hacia adelante con las piernas. Example: Los niños caminan a la escuela por la mañana. English source: To walk is to move forward using legs, but it is slower than running. The children walk to school in the morning.

English: watch Meaning: Mirar algo durante un tiempo. Example: Mi amigo vino para ver una película conmigo. English source: To watch is to look at someone or something for a period of time. My friend came over to watch a movie with me.

English: world Meaning: La Tierra y lo que hay en ella. Example: ¿Cuáles son los cinco océanos del mundo? English source: The world is the Earth and all the people and things in it. What are the names of the five oceans of the world?

English: anxious Meaning: Preocupado o nervioso. Example: Ella estaba ansiosa por no llegar a tiempo. English source: Anxious means feeling worried or nervous. She was anxious about not making her appointment on time.
English: awful Meaning: Muy malo. Example: Su actuación anoche fue horrible. English source: An awful thing is very bad. Her performance last night was awful.

English: consist Meaning: Formar parte de algo. Example: Las opciones de almuerzo consistían en pizza, hamburguesas y hot dogs. English source: To consist of certain is to be made of parts or things them. Today’s choices for lunch consisted of pizza, hamburgers, and hot dogs.

English: desire Meaning: Querer algo con fuerza. Example: Mi hermana desea una casa grande y mucho dinero. English source: To desire is to want something. My sister desires a big house and lots of money.

English: eager Meaning: Entusiasmado por algo. Example: El hombre estaba ansioso por hablar de las buenas noticias. English source: Eager shows excitement about something. The man was eager to talk about the good news.

English: household Meaning: Todas las personas que viven en una casa. Example: Nuestro hogar está formado por mi padre, mi madre y yo. English source: A household is all the people who live in one house. Our household is made up of my father, my mother, and me.
English: intent Meaning: Plan de hacer algo. Example: Su intención es visitar Italia el próximo verano. English source: An intent is a plan to do something. Her intent is to visit Italy next summer.
English: landscape Meaning: Apariencia de una zona. Example: El paisaje del país es muy verde. English source: A landscape is how an area of land looks. The landscape of the country is very green.
English: lift Meaning: Subir algo hacia arriba. Example: El hombre intentó levantar la caja. English source: To lift something is to move it higher. The man tried to lift the box.
English: load Meaning: Poner objetos dentro de otro. Example: El hombre cargó las cajas en un camión. English source: To load is to put objects into something. The man loaded the boxes into a truck.

English: lung Meaning: Órgano que se llena de aire al respirar. Example: Tener pulmones fuertes es necesario para una vida sana. English source: A lung is a part of the body that fills with air when breathing. Having strong lungs is necessary for a healthy life.

English: motion Meaning: Un movimiento corporal. Example: El policía hizo un gesto con su mano. English source: A motion is a movement that someone makes. The police officer made a motion with his hand.

English: pace Meaning: La velocidad a la que avanza algo. Example: Corrí la carrera a un ritmo más lento que mi amigo. English source: The pace of something is the speed at which it happens. I ran the race at a slower pace than my friend.

English: polite Meaning: Amable y considerado. Example: El niño fue muy cortés y se comportó bien. English source: Polite shows a thoughtful and kind behavior. The boy was very polite; he behaved very thoughtfully.

English: possess Meaning: Tener o ser dueño de algo. Example: Mi tío posee tres ovejas, una gallina, una vaca y un perro. English source: To possess something is to have it or own it. My uncle possesses three sheep, a chicken, a cow, and a dog.
English: rapidly Meaning: De forma muy rápida. Example: El tren se movió rápidamente sobre los rieles. English source: Rapidly means happening very fast. The train moved rapidly on the tracks.

English: remark Meaning: Decir algo. Example: El profesor comentó lo rápido que aprendían los estudiantes. English source: To remark is to say something. The teacher remarked on how quickly the students were learning.

English: seek Meaning: Intentar encontrar algo. Example: Si tengo un problema, busco el consejo de mi hermana. English source: To seek is to look for something. If I have a problem, I seek my sister’s advice.
English: shine Meaning: Producir luz brillante. Example: Las velas brillaban en la habitación oscura. English source: To shine is to make a bright light. The candles are shining in the dark room.

English: spill Meaning: Hacer salir algo de un recipiente. Example: Derramé el café sobre la mesa. English source: To spill is to accidentally make something fall out of its container. I spilled the coffee on the table.

English: arrow Meaning: Estrella pequeña lanzada con un arco. Example: La flecha voló por el aire y alcanzó el blanco. English source: An arrow is a thin, straight stick shot from a bow. The arrow flew through the air and hit the target.
English: battle Meaning: Pelea entre ejércitos en guerra. Example: La batalla duró muchos días. English source: A battle is a fight between two armies during a war. The battle lasted for many days.

English: bow Meaning: Arma con cuerda para lanzar flechas. Example: Él fue a cazar con arco y flechas. English source: A bow is a weapon made of curved wood and string that shoots arrows. He went hunting with a bow and arrow.

English: brave Meaning: Que no tiene miedo. Example: El valiente bombero salvó a la niña del edificio en llamas. English source: A brave person is not afraid to face pain or danger. The brave firefighter saved the girl from the burning building.

English: chief Meaning: La persona que lidera un grupo. Example: El jefe guió al pueblo por las montañas. English source: A chief is the leader of a group of people. The chief led the people through the mountains.

English: disadvantage Meaning: Situación que dificulta algo. Example: Mike tenía desventaja en la carrera por lesionarse la rodilla. English source: A disadvantage is a situation that makes it hard to do something. Mike had a disadvantage in the race since he hurt his knee.

English: enemy Meaning: País o persona en guerra con otro. Example: El enemigo se preparó para atacar el reino. English source: An enemy is a country that is fighting another country during a war. The enemy prepared to attack the kingdom.

English: entrance Meaning: Lugar de acceso a un sitio. Example: La puerta estaba cerrada, así que Bill buscó otra entrada. English source: An entrance is a place where someone can enter an area. The gate was locked, so Bill had to find a different entrance.

English: hardly Meaning: Casi no, en muy poca medida. Example: Apenas vi el concierto, porque tuve que irme temprano. English source: Hardly shows that something happens in a very small way. I hardly saw the concert since I had to leave early.

English: intend Meaning: Planear hacer algo. Example: Pretendo terminar la universidad en tres años. English source: To intend to do something means to plan to do it. I intend to finish college in three years.

English: laughter Meaning: Sonido de reír. Example: El chiste de Susan hizo reír a la clase. English source: Laughter is the sound produced by laughing about something funny. Susan’s joke made her classmates burst into laughter.

English: log Meaning: Trozo grueso de madera de un árbol. Example: El fuego era pequeño, así que agregamos otra leña. English source: A log is a thick piece of wood that is cut from a tree. The fire was too small, so we added another log to it.

English: military Meaning: Fuerzas armadas de un país. Example: Me uní al ejército tras terminar la secundaria. English source: The military is the armed forces of a country. I joined the military after I finished high school.

English: obey Meaning: Hacer lo que dice una ley o una persona. Example: Mi hermana pequeña no obedeció a mi madre y se metió en problemas. English source: To obey means to follow what a law or a person says to do. My little sister did not obey my mother. Now, she is in trouble.

English: secure Meaning: Lograr algo con mucho esfuerzo. Example: Pude asegurar una buena nota en mi examen tras estudiar mucho. English source: To secure something means to get it after a lot of effort. I was able to secure a good grade on my test after weeks of studying.

English: steady Meaning: No cambia mucho; firme. Example: El problema era difícil, pero ella se mantuvo estable y lo resolvió. English source: Steady shows that someone or something does not change much. The problem was hard, but she remained steady and solved it.

English: trust Meaning: Creer en la sinceridad de alguien. Example: Confío en mis amigos; no cuentan mis secretos. English source: To trust is to believe that someone is honest and will do what is right. I trust my friends; they don’t tell my secrets to other people.

English: twist Meaning: Girar algo repetidamente. Example: Ella retorció los espaguetis con el tenedor. English source: When we twist something we turn it around and around. She twisted the spaghetti around her fork.

English: unless Meaning: Si no. Example: A menos que limpies tu cuarto, no puedes jugar con tus amigos. English source: Unless means if not or except when. Unless you clean your room, you cannot play with your friends.

English: weapon Meaning: Objeto usado para herir. Example: Las espadas han sido usadas como armas por miles de años. English source: A weapon is an object used to hurt people. Swords have been used as weapons for thousands of years.

English: chest Meaning: Parte del cuerpo entre cuello y estómago. Example: El agua del lago estaba a la altura de mi pecho. English source: The chest is the front part of a body between the neck and stomach. The water in the lake was as high as my chest.

English: confidence Meaning: Sentimiento de certeza o seguridad. Example: Tengo confianza en que hice bien el examen. English source: Confidence is a feeling of certainty or ability. I have confidence that I did well on the test.
