English: consequence Meaning: Resultado de una acción. Example: Como consecuencia de perder el autobús, tuve que buscar otra forma de ir al trabajo. English source: A consequence is a result of a choice or action. As a consequence of missing my bus, I had to find another way to work.
English: disaster Meaning: Un hecho muy malo. Example: Cuando el coche chocó, fue un desastre. English source: A disaster is a really bad thing that happens. When the car crashed, it was a disaster.

English: disturb Meaning: Interrumpir o inquietar. Example: El ruido fuerte me molestó mientras trabajaba. English source: To disturb someone means to upset that person. The loud noise disturbed me while I was working.

English: estimate Meaning: Hacer una suposición. Example: El chico estimó que medía un metro. English source: To estimate something means to make a guess about it. The boy estimated that he was one meter tall.

English: honor Meaning: Mostrar respeto por alguien o algo. Example: Cada año honramos a quienes murieron defendiendo su país. English source: To honor is to show respect for someone or something. Each year we honor those who died fighting for their country.

English: impress Meaning: Hacer que alguien se asombre o admire. Example: Logró impresionar a las chicas con su nuevo baile. English source: To impress someone means to make that person proud or amazed. He was able to impress the girls with his new dance.

English: narrow Meaning: Delgado, con poca anchura. Example: El puente es demasiado estrecho para pasar un coche. English source: A narrow object or space is thin, not wide. The bridge is too narrow for a car to drive across it.
English: pale Meaning: Sin mucho color. Example: La piel de la chica era muy pálida. English source: Pale means that a color or thing is not bright. The girl’s skin was very pale.
English: rough Meaning: No liso o no suave. Example: El suelo áspero me lastimó los pies. English source: A rough thing is not even or smooth. The rough ground hurt my feet.

English: satisfy Meaning: Hacer feliz o cumplir a alguien. Example: Eso me satisfará a mi maestra si terminó toda mi tarea. English source: To satisfy someone means to make that person happy. It will satisfy my teacher if I finish all my homework.

English: scream Meaning: Hacer un ruido fuerte con la voz. Example: La chica vio una araña y gritó. English source: To scream means to make a loud noise with your mouth. The girl saw a spider and screamed.
English: sensitive Meaning: Que se afecta con facilidad. Example: Mis dientes son sensibles al frío. English source: A sensitive person or thing is easily hurt. My teeth are sensitive to cold things.

English: shade Meaning: Área oscura que crea una sombra. Example: Hacía calor, así que el niño se sentó a la sombra de un árbol. English source: Shade is a dark area that something makes when it blocks the sun. It was hot outside, so the boy sat in the shade of a tree.

English: strength Meaning: Capacidad de hacer esfuerzo. Example: Comer bien aumenta tu fuerza. English source: Strength is the ability to do hard work or exercise. Eating good food builds up your strength.

English: supplement Meaning: Suplementar algo es añadirle otra cosa para completarlo o mejorarlo. Example: Él suplementa su dieta con frutas frescas. English source: To supplement something is to add something else to it in a good way. He supplements his diet with fresh fruits.

English: terror Meaning: Miedo muy intenso. Example: Sentí terror cuando el tigre me persiguió. English source: Terror is a feeling of very strong fear. I felt a sense of terror when the tiger chased me.

English: threat Meaning: Algo peligroso que puede pasar. Example: Debido a las nubes oscuras, había amenaza de tormenta. English source: A threat is something bad that might happen. Due to the dark clouds, there was a threat of a bad storm.
English: victim Meaning: Persona dañada por una acción mala. Example: Fui víctima de un robo. English source: A victim is a person who is hurt by a bad action. I was a victim of a robbery.

English: ancestor Meaning: Familiar de generaciones pasadas. Example: Nuestros antepasados vinieron de Alemania. English source: An ancestor is a family member from the past. My ancestors came from Germany.

English: angle Meaning: La dirección desde la que se mira. Example: La jirafa giró la cabeza para ver desde otro ángulo. English source: An angle is the direction from which something is looked at. The giraffe turned its head to see from another angle.

English: boot Meaning: Calzado pesado que sube al tobillo. Example: Llevaba botas para que sus pies no se mojaran. English source: A boot is a heavy shoe that goes up above a person’s ankle. He wore boots so that his feet wouldn’t get wet.

English: border Meaning: Borde o límite. Example: La postal tenía un borde verde de agujas de pino. English source: A border is the edge of an area. The postcard had a pretty green border of pine needles.

English: congratulate Meaning: Decir a alguien que te alegra su logro. Example: Bill y Angela se felicitaron por el buen trabajo. English source: To congratulate someone is to tell them that you are happy for them. Bill and Angela congratulated each other on a job well done.

English: frame Meaning: Borde para foto o espejo. Example: Tengo que comprar un marco para la foto de mi amigo. English source: A frame is a border for a picture or mirror. I have to get a frame for my friend’s picture.

English: heaven Meaning: Lugar donde algunos creen que se va tras morir. Example: Cuando muera, espero ir al cielo. English source: Heaven is the place that some believe people go to after they die. When I die, I hope that I go to heaven.

English: incredible Meaning: Muy asombroso, difícil de creer. Example: Tengo una historia increíble sobre mis vacaciones. English source: An incredible thing is so amazing that it is hard to believe. I have an incredible story to tell you about my vacation.

English: legend Meaning: Historia del pasado. Example: Hay una leyenda famosa sobre un rey y su reina. English source: A legend is a story from the past. There is a well-known legend about a king and his queen.

English: praise Meaning: Decir que te gusta o admiras algo. Example: El entrenador elogió a los atletas después del entrenamiento. English source: To praise is to show that you like someone or something. The coach praised the athletes after a good practice.

English: proceed Meaning: Seguir haciéndose o avanzar. Example: Mi hijo y yo continuamos hacia la playa para pescar. English source: To proceed is to go somewhere or to continue doing something. My son and I proceeded to the beach so we could go fishing.

English: pure Meaning: Muy limpio o sin mezcla. Example: La rosa era pura, sin suciedad ni manchas. English source: A pure thing is very clear and beautiful. The rose was pure. It had no dirt or imperfections.
English: relative Meaning: Miembro de una familia. Example: Mis parientes vinieron a ver al bebé. English source: A relative is a family member. My relatives came by to see the new baby.

English: senior Meaning: Persona más vieja o con más experiencia. Example: Como llegó primero, Bob es el jefe chef. English source: A senior person is older or more experienced. Because he got his job first, Bob is the senior chef.

English: silent Meaning: Que no hace ruido. Example: Como no había nadie en casa, la casa estaba silenciosa. English source: A silent person or thing makes no sound. Since no one was home, the house was silent.

English: sink Meaning: Caer o ir hacia abajo dentro de algo. Example: El barco tenía un agujero y se hundió en el océano. English source: To sink into something is to slowly fall into it. The boat had a hole in it, and it sank into the ocean.

English: superior Meaning: Mejor o más alto de calidad. Example: Cocinar al aire libre es superior a cocinar dentro de casa. English source: A superior person or thing is better than another. I think cooking outdoors is superior to cooking indoors.

English: surround Meaning: Cerrar alrededor desde todos lados. Example: Rodeamos al sospechoso por los cuatro lados. English source: To surround something is to close in on it from all sides. We surrounded the suspect on all four sides.
English: thick Meaning: Muy denso o ancho. Example: La niebla era tan espesa que no veía nada. English source: A thick thing is wide and solid. The fog was so thick that I couldn’t see through it.
English: wrap Meaning: Cubrir algo por completo. Example: Envolví su regalo y le puse un lazo. English source: To wrap is to cover something on all sides. I wrapped his gift and put a bow on it.
English: also Meaning: Además de algo. Example: Me gusta el azul y también el amarillo. English source: Also means in addition to or too. I like blue, and I also like yellow.

English: automatically Meaning: Sin pensar o planear. Example: El hombre sonrió automáticamente al pensar en su amigo. English source: If an action happens automatically, it happens without thinking or planning. The man automatically smiled when he thought about his friend.
English: busy Meaning: Tener muchas cosas por hacer. Example: Todos están ocupados en la oficina hoy. English source: A busy person has a lot of things to do. Everyone is busy at the office today.

English: can Meaning: Tener capacidad de hacer algo. Example: Una mala noticia puede hacerla llorar. English source: Can shows that a person or thing has the ability to do an action. Sad news can make her cry.

English: clear Meaning: Quitar cosas de un lugar. Example: Necesito despejar mi escritorio porque está desordenado. English source: To clear is to remove everything from a place. I need to clear my desk because it is too messy.

English: close Meaning: Hacer que algo quede cerrado. Example: El hombre quiso cerrar bien la puerta. English source: To close is to shut something or cover up an opening. The man wanted to close the door tightly.

English: discuss Meaning: Hablar con otra persona sobre algo. Example: James empezó a discutir su informe con su maestra. English source: To discuss is to talk about something with another person. James began to discuss his report with his teacher.

English: feel Meaning: Experimentar una emoción o sensación. Example: La niña debe sentir felicidad porque hoy es su cumpleaños. English source: To feel is to experience an emotion or feeling. The girl must feel happy because it is her birthday today.

English: listen Meaning: Prestar atención a un sonido. Example: Lisa quería escuchar con atención a su amiga. English source: To listen is to pay attention to a sound that you can hear. Lisa wanted to listen carefully to her friend.

English: meet Meaning: Venir juntos para hablar o hacer algo. Example: La madre de Ken quiso reunirse con su maestra hoy. English source: To meet is to come together so that you can talk or do something together. Ken’s mother wanted to meet his teacher today.

English: music Meaning: Sonido de canciones o instrumentos. Example: El chico hace música tocando la guitarra. English source: Music is the sound made by singing or playing musical instruments. The boy makes music by playing a guitar.

English: normal Meaning: Lo que es habitual. Example: Es normal llevar uniforme escolar en escuelas privadas. English source: A normal thing is usual and not strange. It is normal to wear school uniforms in private schools.

English: quiet Meaning: Que hace poco ruido. Example: El hombre pidió a los niños que estuvieran callados. English source: If something is quiet, it does not make much sound. The man told the children to be quiet.

English: relax Meaning: Descansar o hacer algo agradable. Example: A Nicole le gusta relajarse leyendo libros. English source: To relax is to rest or do something enjoyable. Nicole likes to relax by reading books.

English: sleep Meaning: Descansar cuerpo y mente durante la noche. Example: La niña se va a dormir a su habitación por la noche. English source: To sleep is to rest your mind and body, usually at night in bed. The child goes to sleep in her bedroom at night.

English: stress Meaning: Preocupación fuerte por problemas. Example: Dan tiene mucho estrés en el trabajo. English source: Stress is a strong feeling of worry caused by problems in life, work, etc. Dan has a lot of stress at work.

English: study Meaning: Aprender algo leyendo o practicando. Example: La mujer necesitaba un lugar tranquilo para estudiar. English source: To study is to learn something by reading, memorizing, or going to school. The woman needed a quiet place to study for a big test.

English: talk Meaning: Decir palabras para expresar ideas. Example: Fueron a un lugar para hablar entre ellos. English source: To talk is to say words to express your thoughts, opinions, etc. They went someplace to talk to each other.

English: work Meaning: Realizar un trabajo remunerado. Example: Necesitan trabajar juntos para terminar un proyecto importante. English source: To work is to do a job that you get paid for. They need to work together to finish an important project.

English: write Meaning: Usar pluma o teclado para poner palabras. Example: Necesito escribir una historia para mi tarea. English source: To write is to use a pen or keyboard to make letters and numbers on paper or a screen. I need to write a story for my homework.

English: basis Meaning: Fundamento o parte principal. Example: Mi abuelo se revisa la audición cada año. English source: The basis of something is the main part of amount of it. My grandfather gets his hearing checked on a yearly basis.

English: biology Meaning: Estudio de los seres vivos. Example: Aprendimos sobre el corazón humano en biología. English source: Biology is the study of living things. We learned about the human heart in biology class.

English: cage Meaning: Lugar que encierra un animal. Example: Pusimos a los loros en su jaula por la noche. English source: A cage is something that holds an animal so it cannot leave. We put the parrots in their cage at night.

English: colleague Meaning: Persona con quien trabajas. Example: Mi colega me ayudó a terminar el trabajo. English source: A colleague is somebody you work with. My colleague helped me finish the job.

English: colony Meaning: País controlado por otra nación. Example: EE. UU. fue alguna vez una colonia de Gran Bretaña. English source: A colony is a country controlled by another country. The USA was at one time a colony of Great Britain.

English: debate Meaning: Discutir algo seriamente. Example: El marido y la esposa debatieron qué tele comprar. English source: To debate is to seriously discuss something with someone. The husband and wife debated which TV to buy.

English: depart Meaning: Abandonar un lugar para ir a otro. Example: El avión partió a Italia a las 3:00 de la tarde. English source: To depart is to leave some place so you can go to another place. The plane departed for Italy at 3:00 this afternoon.

English: depress Meaning: Entristecer a alguien. Example: Las malas noticias de trabajo deprimieron al hombre. English source: To depress someone is to make that person sad. The bad news from work depressed the man.

English: factual Meaning: Basado en hechos reales. Example: John aprende historia con libros de hechos verdaderos. English source: A factual report or message includes true details. John learns about history from factual books.

English: fascinate Meaning: Fascinar significa despertar mucho interés o asombro. Example: El gatito se fascinó con la pelota de estambre. English source: To fascinate someone is to make that person very interested. The kitten was fascinated by the ball of yarn.

English: mission Meaning: Una misión es una tarea importante, a veces en otra parte. Example: La misión de la mujer era ayudar a los enfermos. English source: A mission is an important job that is sometimes far away. The woman’s mission was to help sick people.

English: nevertheless Meaning: Sin embargo se usa para introducir una idea contraria a la anterior. Example: Suele ser amistoso; sin embargo, está tarde no lo fue. English source: Nevertheless shows a difference to what is expected or known. He is usually friendly. Nevertheless, he wasn’t friendly this afternoon.

English: occupation Meaning: La ocupación es el trabajo o profesión de una persona. Example: La ocupación de mi padre es dentista. English source: An occupation is a person’s job. My father’s occupation is a dentist.

English: overseas Meaning: En el extranjero significa en otro país, separado por mar u océano. Example: John viaja al extranjero para vacacionar. English source: Overseas shows an action happens in another country, across an ocean. John often goes overseas for vacations.

English: persuade Meaning: Convencer es lograr que alguien acepte una idea o haga algo. Example: Los niños convencieron a sus padres de comprarles regalos. English source: To persuade someone is to make that person agree to do something. The children persuaded their parents to buy them gifts.

English: route Meaning: La ruta es el camino o recorrido entre dos lugares. Example: Vi muchas casas nuevas a lo largo de la ruta hacia la ciudad. English source: A route is the way you go from one place to another. I saw many new houses along the route to the city.

English: ruins Meaning: Las ruinas son restos antiguos de edificios en desuso. Example: Visitamos ruinas muy interesantes en Grecia. English source: Ruins are old buildings that are not used anymore. I visited some interesting ruins in Greece.

English: scholar Meaning: El erudito es una persona que estudia mucho y conoce profundamente un tema. Example: El erudito sabía mucho de historia del arte. English source: A scholar is a person who studies something and knows a lot about it. The scholar knew much about art history.

English: significant Meaning: Significativo significa importante o de gran relevancia. Example: Leí muchas novelas significativas en la universidad. English source: A significant person or thing is important. I read many significant novels as a literature major in university.

English: volcano Meaning: Un volcán es una montaña con cráter que puede expulsar lava y gases. Example: Cuando el volcán hizo erupción, se llenó de humo y calor el aire. English source: A volcano is a mountain with a hole on top where hot liquid comes out. When the volcano erupted, smoke and heat filled the air.
English: broad Meaning: Amplio significa ancho o extenso. Example: El río es muy largo y amplio. English source: Broad means that something is wide, not narrow. The river is very long and broad.

English: bush Meaning: Un arbusto es una planta leñosa más pequeña que un árbol. Example: Mi papá y yo plantamos algunos arbustos alrededor de la casa. English source: A bush is a woody plant that is smaller than a tree. My dad and I planted some small bushes around the house.

English: capable Meaning: Capaz significa con habilidad o aptitud para hacer algo. Example: El atleta olímpico es capaz de levantar mucho peso. English source: A capable person or thing can do an action. The Olympic athlete is capable of lifting a lot of weight.

English: cheat Meaning: Engañar es actuar de forma deshonesta para lograr ventaja. Example: Engañaron en el examen al compartir respuestas. English source: To cheat is to be dishonest in order to win or do well. They cheated on the test by sharing answers.

English: concentrate Meaning: Concentrarse es prestar atención plena a una tarea. Example: No pude concentrarme en la tarea porque la habitación estaba muy ruidosa. English source: To concentrate is to give one’s full attention to something. I could not concentrate on my homework because the room was so loud.

English: conclude Meaning: Concluir es llegar a una decisión final mediante razonamiento. Example: Vi migas en la cara de mi perro, así que concluí que se comió mi galleta. English source: To conclude is to arrive at a logical end by looking at evidence. I saw crumbs on my dog’s face, so I concluded that he ate my cookie.

English: confident Meaning: Seguro significa tener confianza para hacerlo. Example: Ella estaba segura de que podía subir la montaña. English source: Confident people believe that they can do something without failing. She was confident she could climb the mountain due to her training.

English: considerable Meaning: Considerable significa bastante grande en cantidad o grado. Example: Pagaron una suma considerable por ese coche. English source: Considerable means large in size, amount, or extent. They paid a considerable amount of money for that car.

English: convey Meaning: Transmitir es comunicar una idea, emoción o mensaje. Example: La foto de ese niño llorando transmite tristeza. English source: To convey is to communicate or make ideas known. That picture of a crying child conveys a feeling of sadness.

English: definite Meaning: en contexto formal: que es seguro o cierto. Example: Existe una conexión definitiva entre esfuerzo y éxito. English source: A definite thing is certain or sure to be true. There is a definite connection between hard work and success.

English: delight Meaning: Placer es la sensación de gran alegría o gusto. Example: Sintió un gran placer al recibir un ascenso. English source: Delight is a feeling of being very happy with something. He felt such delight after getting a promotion at work.

English: destination Meaning: El destino es el lugar de llegada de un viaje. Example: El destino de este avión es Múnich, Alemania. English source: A destination is the place where someone or something is going. The destination of this plane is Munich, Germany.

English: edge Meaning: El borde es el extremo de algo. Example: Corrió hasta el borde del acantilado. English source: The edge is the furthest part or side of something. He ran to the edge of the cliff.

English: instructions Meaning: Las instrucciones son pasos para hacer algo correctamente. Example: Solo sigue las instrucciones y estarás bien. English source: A set of instructions explains how to do something. Just follow the instructions and you will be OK.

English: path Meaning: Un sendero es un camino para caminar. Example: Seguimos un sendero por el bosque. English source: A path is a way from one place to another that people can walk along. We followed a path through the woods.

English: resort Meaning: Recurrir a algo es usarlo como medida o salida. Example: Espero que no recurran a la violencia para terminar la discusión. English source: To resort to something is to depend on it in order to solve a problem. I hope they don’t resort to violence to end the argument.

English: shadow Meaning: La sombra es la zona oscura que aparece al bloquearse la luz. Example: La sombra del hombre era más alta que él. English source: A shadow is the dark area that is made when something blocks light. The man’s shadow was taller than he was.

English: succeed Meaning: Triunfar es alcanzar el objetivo con éxito. Example: Él seguirá trabajando en el robot hasta que triunfe. English source: To succeed is to complete something as planned. He will continue to work on the robot until he succeeds.

English: suspect Meaning: Sospechar es pensar que algo es posible, aunque no probado. Example: Sospecho que esos niños robaron el dinero. English source: To suspect something is to believe that it might be true. I suspect that those kids stole the money.

English: valley Meaning: El valle es una zona baja entre montañas o colinas. Example: Desde lo alto vimos el valle de abajo. English source: A valley is a low area of land between two mountains or hills. We looked at the valley below from the top of the mountain.

English: against Meaning: en contra significa pegado a, o en oposición a. Example: Se apoyaron contra la pared. English source: To be against something is to be touching it or opposed to it. They both leaned against the wall.

English: beach Meaning: La playa es la franja de arena o roca junto al mar. Example: La niña construyó un castillo de arena en la playa. English source: The beach is a sandy or rocky place by the ocean. The little girl built a sandcastle on the beach.

English: damage Meaning: Dañar algo significa estropearlo o perjudicarlo. Example: El coche se dañó en el accidente. English source: To damage something is to break it. The car was damaged in the accident.

English: discover Meaning: Descubrir es encontrar o revelar algo por primera vez. Example: Descubrí información nueva en este libro. English source: To discover something is to find it for the first time. I discovered some new information in this book.
English: emotion Meaning: La emoción es un estado de sentimiento. Example: La rabia es una emoción muy común. English source: An emotion is how you feel. Anger is a common emotion that we all feel.

English: fix Meaning: Reparar significa arreglar algo averiado. Example: Mi papá tiene muchas herramientas para reparar cosas rotas. English source: To fix something is to make it work. My dad has many tools to help him fix broken things.

English: identify Meaning: Identificar es averiguar qué o quién es algo. Example: Usé el expediente para identificar su nombre. English source: To identify something is to find out what it is. I used the file to identify his name.
English: island Meaning: Una isla es un territorio rodeado de agua. Example: Japón es un grupo de islas. English source: An island is land in the middle of water. Japan is a group of islands.

English: ocean Meaning: El océano es la gran extensión de agua salada de la Tierra. Example: El océano puede producir olas muy fuertes. English source: The ocean is all of the salt water that surrounds land. The ocean can make powerful waves.

English: perhaps Meaning: Quizá se usa para señalar posibilidad. Example: Quizá comeré una manzana para almuerzo. English source: Perhaps is used when you say that something could happen. Perhaps I will eat an apple for lunch.

English: pleasant Meaning: Agradable significa agradable y grato. Example: El personaje tenía una expresión agradable. English source: If something is pleasant, you enjoy it. The character had a pleasant look on its face.

English: prevent Meaning: Prevenir es evitar que algo suceda. Example: Las esposas me impidieron mover las manos. English source: To prevent something is to stop it from happening. The handcuffs prevented me from moving my hands.
English: rock Meaning: La roca es una piedra dura. Example: Apilé rocas una encima de otra. English source: A rock is a hard thing in the dirt. I stacked rocks on top of one another.

English: save Meaning: Salvar es proteger o preservar de un daño. Example: Quiero ayudar a salvar el mundo. English source: To save something is to keep it from being hurt. I want to help save the world.
English: smile Meaning: Sonreír es mostrar felicidad con el rostro. Example: El bebé sonrió al verme. English source: To smile is to show happiness with your mouth. The baby smiled at me.

English: step Meaning: Dar un paso o avanzar significa mover el pie para ir a otra posición. Example: Ten cuidado de dónde pisas al avanzar. English source: To step is to walk. Be careful where you step.

English: still Meaning: Aún indica continuidad en el tiempo. Example: Todavía siguen esperando en la fila para comprar entradas. English source: Still is used when you say that a situation keeps going on. They are still waiting in line to get tickets.

English: taste Meaning: El sabor es la percepción de sabor de un alimento o bebida. Example: El sabor de la fruta era dulce. English source: A taste is the flavor something makes in your mouth. The taste of the fruit was sweet.

English: throw Meaning: Lanzar algo es usar la mano para hacerlo ir por el aire. Example: El lanzador puede lanzar la pelota de béisbol muy rápido. English source: To throw something is to use your hand to make it go through the air. The pitcher can throw the baseball very fast.

English: wave Meaning: La ola es un movimiento de agua en la superficie marina. Example: El agua estaba llena de grandes olas azules. English source: A wave is a line of water that moves higher than the rest of the water. The water was filled with large blue waves.

English: citizen Meaning: Un ciudadano es una persona con derechos y deberes en un país. Example: Carlos nació en España. Es ciudadano español. English source: A citizen is someone who lives in a certain place. Carlos was born in Spain. He is a Spanish citizen.

English: council Meaning: El consejo es un organismo que gobierna asuntos locales. Example: El consejo se reunió para discutir las nuevas normas de la ciudad. English source: A council is a group of people who run a city or town. The council met to discuss the new laws for the city.
English: declare Meaning: Declarar es expresar algo de forma formal. Example: Declaré mi amor por él. English source: To declare is to say something officially. I declared my love for him.
English: enormous Meaning: Enorme significa muy grande. Example: Mi perro parece enorme junto al tuyo. English source: Enormous people or things are very large. My dog looks enormous next to yours.

English: extraordinary Meaning: Extraordinario significa extraordinariamente bueno o notable. Example: El bombero que rescató a la niña fue extraordinario. English source: Extraordinary things are amazing. The fireman who rescued the girl was extraordinary.

English: fog Meaning: La niebla es una nube baja de humedad y poca visibilidad. Example: No quise conducir en la niebla espesa. English source: Fog is a thick cloud that is near the ground or water. I did not want to drive in the thick fog.

English: funeral Meaning: El funeral es el servicio en recuerdo de un fallecimiento. Example: Tuvieron un funeral por el soldado que murió en la guerra. English source: A funeral is a ceremony that takes place after a person dies. They had a funeral for the soldier who died during the war.
English: giant Meaning: Gigante significa muy grande. Example: El camión gigante se metió en mi camino. English source: Giant means very big. The giant truck got in my way.

English: impression Meaning: La impresión es la idea inicial sobre alguien o algo. Example: La primera impresión de la gente fue que era antipático. English source: An impression is the way of thinking about someone or something. Most people’s first impression of Dr. Giani is that he is mean.
English: intention Meaning: La intención es la voluntad de hacer algo. Example: ¿Tienes buenas intenciones? English source: An intention is what a person plans to do. Do you have good intentions?

English: mad Meaning: Enojado/a significa furioso o irritado. Example: Mi madre se enojó cuando no la escuché. English source: A mad person or animal is angry. Mother got mad when I didn’t listen to her.

English: ought Meaning: Deber es tener obligación moral o lógica de hacer algo. Example: Debo devolver mis libros de la biblioteca. English source: If you ought to do an action, it is the right thing to do. I ought to take my library books back.

English: resist Meaning: Resistir es oponerse o no ceder ante algo. Example: Él resistió el tratamiento en el hospital. English source: To resist something is to fight against it. He resisted the treatment at the hospital.

English: reveal Meaning: Revelar es mostrar u ocultar algo. Example: Revelaré dónde escondí la barra de chocolate. English source: To reveal is to show something. I will reveal where I hid the candy bar.

English: rid Meaning: significa quitar o eliminar algo de un lugar. Example: Nos libramos de los ratones usando trampas. English source: To rid is to make a place free from something or someone. We rid our home of mice by using traps.

English: sword Meaning: La espada es un arma larga y afilada. Example: Antes se usaban espadas en batallas antiguas. English source: A sword is a long sharp weapon. They used to use swords in battles in ancient times.

English: tale Meaning: Un cuento o relato que describe eventos. Example: Les contó un relato salvaje de su día. English source: A tale is a story. She told her two friends about the wild tale of her day.

English: trap Meaning: Atrapar es encerrar o capturar algo para que no pueda escapar. Example: Atrapamos mariposas con una red. English source: To trap people or animals is to capture them so they cannot get away. We trapped butterflies in a net.

English: trial Meaning: El juicio es el proceso legal para resolver si alguien es culpable o inocente. Example: Él fue juzgado por robar en el banco. English source: A trial is the way a court discovers if a person is guilty or innocent. He went on trial for robbing the bank.

English: violent Meaning: Violento significa que usa fuerza o daño contra otros. Example: El hombre fue encarcelado porque era violento. English source: A violent person or animal uses force to hurt others. The man was put into jail because he was violent.

English: admission Meaning: La admisión es el acto de permitir la entrada. Example: La entrada a la película costó 5 dólares. English source: Admission is the act of allowing to enter a place. The admission ticket to the movie was $5.

English: astronomy Meaning: La astronomía estudia las estrellas, planetas y el universo. Example: A Harold le encantaba mirar estrellas y estudió astronomía. English source: Astronomy is the study of the stars and planets. Harold loved looking at the stars, so he decided to study astronomy.

English: blame Meaning: Culpar es responsabilizar a alguien por un hecho. Example: Mi mamá me culpó por algo que no hice. English source: To blame someone for something bad is to say they did it. My mom blamed me for something I didn’t do.

English: chemistry Meaning: La química estudia las sustancias y sus reacciones. Example: En la clase de química aprendimos sobre reacciones químicas. English source: Chemistry is the study of substances and reactions between them. In chemistry class, the professor taught us about chemical reactions.

English: despite Meaning: a pesar de se usa para contrastar una dificultad o excepción. Example: Seguimos jugando a pesar del frío. English source: Despite shows a difference from what is expected. We still played the game despite the cold weather.

English: dinosaur Meaning: El dinosaurio es un gran animal prehistórico. Example: Me gusta ver los huesos de dinosaurios en el museo. English source: A dinosaur is a very big animal that lived millions of years ago. I like to see the dinosaur bones at the museum.

English: exhibit Meaning: Exhibir significa mostrar algo al público. Example: Mi pintura se exhibirá en la feria. English source: To exhibit is to show something so that people can go look at it. My painting will be exhibited at the fair.

English: fame Meaning: La fama es reconocimiento público de una persona. Example: Tenía fama y fortuna, pero no era feliz. English source: Fame is a reputation one has gained among the public. He had fame and fortune, but he was not happy.

English: forecast Meaning: El pronóstico predice cómo será el tiempo. Example: El pronóstico dice que lloverá toda la semana. English source: A forecast is an idea about what the weather will be like in the future. The forecast says that it will rain all week.

English: genius Meaning: Un genio es una persona con gran inteligencia. Example: Como era un genio, aprobó todos los exámenes con facilidad. English source: A genius is a very smart person. Since she was a genius, she easily passed all of her school exams.
English: gentle Meaning: Tierno significa amable y cuidadoso. Example: Es muy tierno con el bebé. English source: Someone who is gentle is kind and calm. He is very gentle with the baby.

English: geography Meaning: La geografía estudia la Tierra, su clima y territorio. Example: En geografía tuve que dibujar un mapa. English source: Geography is the study of the Earth, its land, weather, etc. I had to draw a map for geography class.

English: interfere Meaning: Interferir es meterse y obstaculizar algo. Example: Mi hermana siempre interfiere cuando intento estudiar. English source: To interfere is to cause problems and keep something from happening. My little sister always interferes when I’m trying to study.

English: lightly Meaning: Leve significa con poca fuerza. Example: Dibuja con cuidado, sin presión. English source: To do something lightly is to not push very hard. Draw lightly so you do not tear your paper.

English: principal Meaning: El director o directora dirige un colegio. Example: El director de mi escuela puede ser muy estricto con las reglas. English source: A principal is a person in charge of a school. My school’s principal can be very strict with the rules.

English: row Meaning: Una fila es una línea ordenada de objetos o personas. Example: James puso sus soldados de juguete en filas ordenadas. English source: A row is a line of things. James put all of his toy soldiers into neat rows.

English: shelf Meaning: Una estantería es el lugar para poner cosas encima. Example: Guardo mis ropa en una estantería del armario. English source: A shelf is a place on a wall where you put things. I keep my clothes on a shelf in my closet.

English: spite Meaning: Actuar por despecho es hacerlo con mala voluntad. Example: Entró y le robó el bolso a su hermana por despecho. English source: Spite is the desire to be mean. He snuck into his sister’s room and stole her bag out of spite.

English: super Meaning: “Súper” en España se usa como intensificador informal. Example: Mi papá dijo que hice un súper trabajo limpiando la casa. English source: Super means really good. My dad said I did a super job cleaning the house.

English: wet Meaning: Húmedo es estar con agua o humedad. Example: Como mi perro estaba húmedo, intentó sacudirse el agua. English source: A wet thing has water on it. Since my dog was wet, he tried to shake all the water off his body.

English: abuse Meaning: Abusar significa maltratar o hacer daño intencionadamente. Example: El hombre abusó de su perro cuando ladró demasiado. English source: To abuse means to hurt someone or something on purpose. The mean man abused his dog when it barked too loudly.

English: afford Meaning: Poder permitirse algo es tener dinero suficiente para pagarlo. Example: He estado ahorrando para poder comprarme una bici nueva. English source: To afford something means to have enough money to pay for it. I’ve been saving my money so I can afford to buy a new bike.

English: bake Meaning: Hornear es cocinar con calor en el horno. Example: Mi hermana hornea tartas deliciosas. English source: To bake means to cook food in an oven. My sister is a good cook. She bakes delicious cakes.

English: bean Meaning: El frijol es una semilla comestible de varias variedades. Example: Hay muchos tipos de frijoles para comer. English source: A bean is a plant seed that is good to eat. There are many different kinds of beans to eat.

English: candle Meaning: Una vela es un cilindro de cera con mecha que arde para dar luz. Example: Cuando se fue la luz, encendimos velas. English source: A candle is a stick of wax that is lit on fire for light or heat. When the lights went out, we lit some candles.

English: convert Meaning: Convertir es transformar algo en otra cosa. Example: El hombre convirtió su campo desordenado en un jardín de flores. English source: To convert something means to change it into something else. The man converted his messy field into a garden of flowers.

English: debt Meaning: La deuda es dinero que se debe pagar a otra persona. Example: Debo el pago del gas porque no he liquidado la factura. English source: A debt is an amount of money that a person owes. I have not paid my gas bill. I owe a debt to the gas company.

English: decrease Meaning: Disminuir es hacer que algo baje o sea menor. Example: La contratación de más policías ha disminuido el delito en la ciudad. English source: To decrease something is to make it less than it was before. Hiring more police officers has decreased crime in the city.

English: fault Meaning: La culpa es la responsabilidad por un error. Example: Es mi culpa que el gato se escapó: dejé la puerta abierta. English source: A fault is responsibility for a mistake. It is my fault that the cat ran away. I left the door open.

English: fund Meaning: Un fondo es una reserva de dinero. Example: Todos aportamos dinero al fondo del club. English source: A fund is an amount of money that people have. We all put money into our club’s fund.

English: generous Meaning: Generoso significa dispuesto a dar sin esperar nada a cambio. Example: El hombre generoso donó varias computadoras nuevas. English source: A generous person likes to give things to people. The generous man donated several new computers to our school.

English: ingredient Meaning: Un ingrediente es un componente de una receta. Example: Los ingredientes principales del pastel son huevos, azúcar y harina. English source: An ingredient is something that is part of a food dish. The main ingredients in cake are eggs, sugar, and flour.

English: insist Meaning: Insistir es mantener una petición de forma reiterada. Example: Insisto en que pruebes estas galletas. English source: To insist means to be firm in telling people what to do. I insist that you try some of these cookies.

English: mess Meaning: Un desorden es una situación sucia o desorganizada. Example: La habitación de Heather estaba hecha un desastre. English source: A mess is a condition that is not clean or neat. Heather’s room was a complete mess.

English: metal Meaning: El metal es un material resistente para construir. Example: El acero es un metal común para construir edificios. English source: Metal is a strong material people use to build things. Steel is a common metal that is used to build buildings.

English: monitor Meaning: Monitorear es vigilar o supervisar de cerca. Example: El profesor monitorea a los estudiantes en los exámenes. English source: To monitor people or things is to watch them closely. The teacher monitors the students when they take tests.

English: oppose Meaning: Oponerse es estar en contra de una idea o acción. Example: Quiero ser policía porque me opongo al crimen. English source: To oppose something means to dislike it or act against it. I want to be a police officer because I oppose crime.

English: passive Meaning: Pasivo significa poco activo o poco participante. Example: Marcie es tan pasiva que nunca resuelve sus problemas. English source: A passive person does not take action to solve problems. Marcie is so passive that she never solves her own problems.

English: quantity Meaning: La cantidad es una medida o número de algo. Example: Tengo una pequeña cantidad de leche en el vaso. English source: A quantity is a certain amount of something. I have a small quantity of milk in my glass.

English: sue Meaning: Demandar es llevar un caso a los tribunales. Example: Demandé a la empresa después de resbalar con la cáscara. English source: To sue is to take someone to court for some harmful action. I sued the company after I slipped on a banana peel in their hallway.

English: adequate Meaning: Adecuado significa suficiente para la necesidad. Example: Esto es adecuado para mis necesidades. English source: Something adequate is good enough. This is adequate for my needs.

English: anxiety Meaning: La ansiedad es una sensación de preocupación o miedo. Example: Cuando tengo que subir alto, me lleno de ansiedad. English source: Anxiety is a feeling of worry and fear. When I have to climb to high places, I’m filled with anxiety.

English: army Meaning: El ejército es una fuerza armada organizada para la defensa. Example: El ejército protege a la población del país. English source: An army is a large group of people who fight in wars. The army protects all the people in the country.

English: billion Meaning: Mil millones es la cifra 1,000,000,000. Example: Hay miles de millones de estrellas en el espacio. English source: A billion is a very large number: 1,000,000,000. There are billions of stars in outer space.

English: carve Meaning: Tallar es cortar o esculpir una forma. Example: Mi padre suele tallar el pavo en acción de gracias. English source: To carve means to cut into something. My father usually carves the turkey for Thanksgiving.

English: consult Meaning: Consultar es pedir consejo o ayuda profesional. Example: Consultaré a mi contador para pagar mis facturas. English source: To consult means to ask someone for help. I will consult my accountant to find a way to pay my bills.

English: emergency Meaning: Una emergencia es una situación urgente que requiere ayuda inmediata. Example: ¡Hay un fuego enorme en mi casa! Esto es una emergencia. English source: An emergency is a time when someone needs help right away. There is a huge fire in my house! This is an emergency!

English: fortune Meaning: La fortuna son las condiciones de suerte o destino. Example: Tengo buena fortuna cuando juego cartas. English source: Fortune means the things that happen but are not controlled by a person. I have good fortune when I play cards.

English: guarantee Meaning: Garantizar es asegurar que algo se cumplirá. Example: Garanto que el sol saldrá mañana. English source: I will guarantee that the loan will be repaid. I guarantee that the sun will come up in the morning.

English: initial Meaning: Inicial significa primeramente o al comienzo. Example: El primer paso inicial al escribir un trabajo es elegir un buen tema. English source: Initial shows that something is first. The initial step when writing a paper is to find a good topic.

English: intense Meaning: Intenso significa fuerte o de gran intensidad. Example: El zorrillo hizo un olor intenso que llenó el aire. English source: An intense thing is very strong. The skunk made an intense odor that filled the air.

English: lend Meaning: Prestar es dar algo temporalmente para que otra persona lo use. Example: Prestaré mi bolígrafo a mi hermana. English source: To lend something is to give it to someone for a short time. My sister lost her pen, so I will lend her mine.

English: peak Meaning: La cima es la parte más alta de una montaña. Example: En las cimas de esas montañas había nieve. English source: The peak is the very top of a mountain. There is snow on the peaks of those mountains.

English: potential Meaning: Potencial significa posible de realizarse en el futuro. Example: He pensado en algunos problemas potenciales de tu idea. English source: Potential means capable of being but not yet actual or real. I’ve thought of some potential problems with your idea.

English: pride Meaning: El orgullo es satisfacción positiva por logros propios o propios. Example: Me da orgullo sacar buenas notas. English source: Pride is a feeling of happiness about oneself or one’s things. I take pride in getting good grades.

English: proof Meaning: La prueba es una evidencia que demuestra un hecho. Example: Usaron su huella dactilar como prueba del delito. English source: Proof is a fact that shows something is real. They used his fingerprint for proof that he committed the crime.

English: quit Meaning: Dejar de algo significa detenerlo por completo. Example: Dejé de correr porque me cansé. English source: To quit something means to stop doing it. I quit running because I got tired.
English: spin Meaning: Girar es girar alrededor de un eje. Example: El niño siguió girando hasta caer. English source: To spin is to turn around in circles. The boy kept spinning until he fell down.
English: tiny Meaning: Muy pequeño significa de tamaño diminuto. Example: La mano de un bebé es muy pequeña. English source: A tiny thing is very small. A baby’s hand is tiny.

English: tutor Meaning: Un tutor es quien da clases particulares. Example: Mi madre contrató un tutor para ayudarla en matemáticas. English source: A tutor is someone who gives lessons to one student. My sister is bad at math. So my mother hired a tutor to help her.

English: apparent Meaning: Aparente significa visible u obvio. Example: Su felicidad era aparente por la sonrisa. English source: Apparent means clear or easy to see. Her happiness was apparent from the smile on her face.

English: blind Meaning: Ciego significa sin vista. Example: El hombre ciego no vio el agujero y casi cae. English source: A blind person or animal cannot see. The blind man didn’t see the hole and almost fell in.

English: calculate Meaning: Calcular es obtener un resultado con operaciones. Example: Calculé cuánto dinero necesitaría para comprar el coche. English source: To calculate is to find an answer using math. I calculated how much money I would need to buy the car.

English: chat Meaning: Charlar es conversar de manera informal. Example: Aunque estaban lejos, la pareja charlaba todos los días. English source: To chat is to talk with someone. Even though they were far apart, the couple chatted every day.

English: commit Meaning: Comprometerse es asumir una responsabilidad o promesa. Example: Seth quería irse, pero se había comprometido a terminar el trabajo. English source: To commit to something is to promise to do it. Seth wanted to go home, but he had committed to finishing the job.

English: compose Meaning: Componer es crear algo uniendo partes. Example: Tony compuso su informe con varias fuentes de información. English source: To compose something is to make it from smaller parts. Tony composed his report using many sources of information.

English: dormitory Meaning: El dormitorio es un edificio residencial estudiantil. Example: Me mudaré al dormitorio al comenzar el año escolar. English source: A dormitory is a school building where students live. I will move into the dormitory at the beginning of the school year.

English: exhaust Meaning: Agotar significa dejar sin energía. Example: John se agotó nadando todo el día. English source: To exhaust someone is to make that person tired. John exhausted himself by swimming all day.

English: greenhouse Meaning: Un invernadero es una estructura de vidrio para cultivar plantas. Example: Tenemos un pequeño invernadero en el patio trasero. English source: A greenhouse is a small glass building that is used to grow plants. We have a small greenhouse in our backyard where we grow plants.

English: ignore Meaning: Ignorar es fingir que no se ve o escucha algo. Example: Ignoré su mensaje y seguí estudiando. English source: To ignore something is to act like you do not see or hear it. I ignored the message he was making and kept studying.

English: obvious Meaning: Obvio significa evidente y fácil de percibir. Example: Era obvio que estaba cansado porque se quedaba dormido. English source: Obvious means clear or easy to see. It was obvious that he was tired. He kept falling asleep.

English: physics Meaning: La física estudia la energía y el movimiento. Example: En la clase de física usamos el péndulo de Newton para aprender sobre energía. English source: Physics is a science that deals with energy and how it affects things. In physics class, we used Newton’s Cradle to learn about energy.

English: portion Meaning: Una porción es una parte de un todo. Example: Solo comí una porción pequeña de pizza. English source: A portion of something is a part of it. I only ate a small portion of the pizza.

English: remind Meaning: Recordar aquí equivale a hacerle a alguien una indicación de memoria. Example: El padre de Nick le recordó que hiciera la tarea. English source: To remind is to tell someone to remember to do something. Nick’s dad reminded him to do his homework.

English: secretary Meaning: La secretaria trabaja en tareas administrativas de oficina. Example: Rebecca pidió a su secretaria que tipeara un informe. English source: A secretary is a person who works in an office. Rebecca asked her secretary to type a report.

English: severe Meaning: Muy grave o severo en intensidad. Example: Después de golpearse con el martillo, Sam tuvo un dolor severo. English source: Severe means very bad or serious. After hitting his hand with the hammer, Sam was in severe pain.

English: talent Meaning: El talento es capacidad innata para hacer algo bien. Example: María tiene talento para tocar el piano. English source: A talent is a natural ability to do something well. Maria has a talent for playing the piano.

English: thesis Meaning: La tesis es una idea o argumento que se intenta demostrar. Example: Ella no defendió bien su tesis. English source: A thesis is an idea that needs to be proved. She did not support her thesis very well.

English: uniform Meaning: El uniforme es la ropa similar de un grupo. Example: Todos en la banda usan uniforme igual. English source: A uniform is a piece of clothing worn by people of the same group. All the members of our marching band wear matching uniforms.
English: vision Meaning: La visión es la capacidad de ver. Example: El oftalmólogo comprobó mi visión. English source: Vision is the ability to see. The eye doctor tested my vision.

English: absorb Meaning: Absorber es tomar un líquido u otra cosa en su interior. Example: Usó una esponja para absorber el agua del piso. English source: To absorb a liquid means to take it inside. He used a sponge to absorb the water on the floor.

English: boss Meaning: El jefe dirige y coordina al equipo de trabajo. Example: Mi jefe es una persona amable. English source: A boss is a person in charge of other people at work. My boss is a nice person.

English: charitable Meaning: Benéfico significa orientado a ayudar a los demás. Example: Doy dinero cada año a una fundación benéfica. English source: A charitable organization aims to help people. I give money each year to a charitable foundation.

English: committee Meaning: Un comité es un grupo que toma decisiones. Example: El comité escolar aprobó un nuevo código de vestimenta. English source: A committee is a group of people who meet together to make decisions. The school’s committee agreed on a new dress code for students.

English: contract Meaning: Un contrato es un acuerdo escrito con obligaciones. Example: La mujer firmó un contrato al comprar la casa. English source: A contract is a written agreement between two people. The woman signed a contract when she bought the house.

English: crew Meaning: El equipo es un grupo de personas que trabajan juntas. Example: Mi padre tiene un equipo que lo ayuda a construir casas. English source: A crew is a group of workers. My father has a crew that helps him build houses.

English: devote Meaning: Dedicar es aplicar tiempo o esfuerzo con constancia. Example: Ella dedica dos horas diarias a tocar piano. English source: To devote time to something means to spend a lot of time doing it. She devotes two hours a day to playing the piano.

English: dig Meaning: Cavar es hacer hoyos excavando la tierra. Example: Mi perro cava en el patio para esconder sus huesos. English source: To dig is to make a hole in the ground. My dog digs in the yard so he can hide his bones.
English: dine Meaning: Cenar significa comer la cena. Example: La pareja joven cenó en su casa. English source: To dine means to eat dinner. The young couple dined at their home.

English: donate Meaning: Donar es aportar bienes para una causa. Example: Damos dinero a organizaciones benéficas cada año. English source: To donate is to give something to a charity or organization. We donate money to charities every year.

English: double Meaning: Doble significa por dos veces o duplicado. Example: Pagué casi el doble por esa camisa. English source: Double means twice as much or twice as many. I paid almost double the amount for that shirt.

English: flavor Meaning: El sabor es la percepción gustativa de un alimento. Example: El sabor del helado era muy bueno. English source: A flavor is the taste of food or drinks. The flavor of the ice cream was very good.

English: foundation Meaning: La fundación es una entidad que financia proyectos. Example: La fundación reunió fondos para becas. English source: A foundation is a group that provides money for research. The foundation raised money to give scholarships to students.

English: generation Meaning: Una generación es un grupo de personas de una misma época. Example: Mis abuelos pertenecen a otra generación que yo. English source: A generation is a group of people who live at the same time. My grandparents are from a different generation than me.

English: handle Meaning: El asa es la parte para tomar un objeto. Example: La olla está muy caliente, tómala por el asa. English source: A handle is the part of an object people hold while using it. The pot is very hot, so pick it up by the handle.

English: layer Meaning: Una capa es una franja o nivel superpuesto. Example: Esta mañana había una capa de nieve en los tejados. English source: A layer covers over something or is one of several pieces lying on top of each other. There was a layer of snow on the tops of the houses this morning.

English: mud Meaning: El lodo es tierra blanda y húmeda. Example: Mi hermano jugó rugby en el barro y luego estuvo sucio. English source: Mud is soft, wet dirt. My brother played rugby in the mud. Now, he’s dirty.
English: smooth Meaning: Liso significa sin asperezas. Example: La piel del bebé se sentía muy lisa. English source: A smooth thing has no bumps or rough parts. The baby’s skin felt very smooth.

English: soil Meaning: La tierra o suelo fértil donde se plantan las cosas. Example: El chico plantó flores en la tierra y las regó cada día. English source: Soil is the top layer of land on the Earth. The boy planted flowers in the soil and watered them every day.

English: unique Meaning: Único significa que no se parece a los demás. Example: Su perro es único; no he visto uno igual. English source: A unique person or thing is not like others. Her dog is unique. I’ve never seen one quite like it.

English: academy Meaning: Una academia es un centro educativo o de formación. Example: En la academia donde estudio hay muchos cursos. English source: An academy is a special type of school. There are many courses taught at the academy that I go to.

English: ancient Meaning: Antiguo significa muy viejo o histórico. Example: Quiero ver los edificios antiguos de Roma. English source: If something is ancient, it is very old. I want to see the ancient buildings in Rome.

English: board Meaning: Una tabla es una pieza de madera plana. Example: El letrero estaba hecho con unas tablas de madera. English source: A board is a flat piece of wood. The sign was made of a few wooden boards.

English: century Meaning: Un siglo equivale a cien años. Example: Nuestra empresa celebra un siglo de negocio en Londres. English source: A century is one hundred years. Our company is celebrating a century of business in London.

English: clue Meaning: Una pista es una evidencia o indicio útil para resolver un caso. Example: El detective encontró pistas en la acera. English source: A clue is a fact or object that helps solve a mystery or crime. The detective found some clues on the sidewalk.

English: concert Meaning: El concierto es un evento musical en vivo. Example: Disfruté el concierto de anoche; la banda fue muy buena. English source: A concert is an event where you listen to people play music. I enjoyed the concert last night. The band was very good.

English: county Meaning: Un condado es una división administrativa dentro de un estado. Example: Él quería representar a los ciudadanos de su condado. English source: A county is the largest division of a state in a country. He wanted to represent the citizens of his county.

English: dictionary Meaning: El diccionario es un libro que explica el significado de palabras. Example: Uso el diccionario para aprender vocabulario nuevo. English source: A dictionary is a book that tells you what words mean. I use the dictionary to learn new words.

English: exist Meaning: Existir significa estar o ser real. Example: ¿De verdad crees que los unicornios existieron alguna vez? English source: To exist is to be real. Do you really think that unicorns ever existed?

English: flat Meaning: Plano significa sin relieve, liso y nivelado. Example: Mis padres compraron un televisor de pantalla plana. English source: Flat describes something that is level and smooth with no curved parts. My parents bought a new flat-screen TV on the weekend.

English: gentleman Meaning: Un caballero es un hombre educado y de buenas maneras. Example: Mi abuelo es un caballero amable y servicial. English source: A gentleman is a nice man. My grandfather is a kind and helpful gentleman.

English: hidden Meaning: Oculto significa que no se ve fácilmente. Example: La cámara oculta grabó todo en el estacionamiento. English source: Hidden means not easily noticed or too hard to find. The hidden camera recorded everything in the parking lot.

English: maybe Meaning: Tal vez expresa posibilidad. Example: Si me concentro, tal vez encuentre la respuesta correcta. English source: Maybe is used to show that something is possible or may be true. If I focus hard enough, maybe I can come up with the right answer.

English: officer Meaning: Un oficial es un miembro con rango en la fuerza armada. Example: Los soldados siguieron las órdenes del oficial. English source: An officer is a leader in the army. The soldiers followed the orders of the officer.

English: original Meaning: Original significa primigenio o primer ejemplar. Example: Este es el cuadro original de la Mona Lisa. English source: If something is original, it is the first one of that thing. This is the original painting of the Mona Lisa.

English: pound Meaning: Pound significa golpear repetidamente con fuerza. Example: Martilleó el clavo con el martillo. English source: To pound something is to hit it many times with a lot of force. He pounded the nail with the hammer.

English: process Meaning: Un proceso es el conjunto de pasos ordenados para lograr algo. Example: Hacer un pastel es un proceso largo. English source: A process is the steps to take to do something. Making a cake is a long process.

English: publish Meaning: Publicar es imprimir y difundir una obra. Example: Esa compañía publica periódicos diarios. English source: To publish a book is to get it printed and ready to sell. That company publishes daily newspapers.

English: theater Meaning: El teatro es el lugar donde se presentan obras y proyecciones. Example: Fuimos al teatro para ver una obra. English source: A theater is a building where you watch plays, shows, and movies. We went to the theater to see a play.

English: wealth Meaning: La riqueza es el conjunto de bienes o dinero acumulado. Example: Para algunas personas, la riqueza es muy importante. English source: Wealth is the total of one’s possessions (money, land, etc.). One of the most important things for some people is wealth.

English: aim Meaning: La meta es el objetivo a alcanzar. Example: Mi meta es convertirme en piloto de helicóptero. English source: An aim is a goal someone wants to make happen. My aim is to become a helicopter pilot.

English: attach Meaning: Unir o fijar algo a otra cosa. Example: Colgué los calcetines en la cuerda para secarlos. English source: To attach is to put two things together. I attached the socks to the clothesline to dry.

English: bet Meaning: Apostar es arriesgar dinero por un resultado. Example: ¿Cuánto apostarás a que tu caballo gana? English source: To bet is to risk money on the result of a game or a business. How much will you bet that your horse will win?

English: carriage Meaning: La carroza o carruaje se mueve tirado por caballos. Example: Dimos un paseo en carroza por el parque. English source: A carriage is a vehicle pulled by a horse. We took a carriage ride in the park.

English: classic Meaning: Clásico significa muy típico o típico de otra época. Example: El atleta cometió un error clásico: empezó a correr demasiado pronto. English source: A classic thing is something that is common from the past. The athlete made a classic mistake-he started running too soon.

English: commute Meaning: Commutar es desplazarse habitualmente al trabajo. Example: Normalmente hago el trayecto al trabajo en tren. English source: To commute is to travel a long distance to get to work. I usually commute to work on the train.

English: confirm Meaning: Confirmar es asegurar que algo es correcto. Example: Ganar el juego confirmó que James era un buen jugador. English source: To confirm is to make sure something is correct. Winning the game confirmed that James was a good player.

English: criticize Meaning: Criticar es expresar desaprobación. Example: Criticó a su esposa por gastar demasiado. English source: To criticize is to say bad things about someone or something. He criticized his wife for spending too much money.

English: differ Meaning: Diferir es no coincidir o no ser igual. Example: Yo difiero de mi hermano: él es bajito y yo soy alto. English source: To differ is to not be the same as another person or thing. I differ from my brother: he is short, while I am tall.

English: expense Meaning: El gasto es el dinero que la gente paga en algo. Example: Escribió todos los gastos de su viaje. English source: An expense is the money that people spend on something. She wrote down all the expenses for her trip.

English: formal Meaning: Formal significa oficial o serio. Example: Fue una cena formal, así que llevamos ropa elegante. English source: A formal thing is official or serious. It was a formal dinner, so we wore our best clothes.

English: height Meaning: La altura es la medida de lo alto de una persona o cosa. Example: Mido 168 centímetros de altura. English source: Height is how tall someone or something is. My height is 168 centimeters.

English: invent Meaning: Inventar es crear algo que antes no existía. Example: Mi abuelo ha inventado cosas interesantes. English source: To invent is to create something that never existed before. My grandfather has invented some interesting things.

English: junior Meaning: Junior significa más joven o con menos experiencia. Example: Cuando empezó en la empresa, era una gerente junior. English source: A junior person is younger or less experienced. When she started at the company, she was only a junior manager.

English: labor Meaning: El trabajo es la acción de hacer o fabricar algo. Example: Construir la casa exigió mucho trabajo. English source: Labor is the act of doing or making something. Building the house took a lot of labor.

English: mechanic Meaning: Un mecánico es una persona que arregla vehículos o máquinas. Example: Llevamos el coche al mecánico para que lo repararan. English source: A mechanic is someone who fixes vehicles or machines. We took the car to the mechanic to be fixed.

English: prime Meaning: Principal indica lo más importante. Example: El aire contaminado es una causa principal de enfermedad. English source: Prime shows that something is the most important one. Dirty air is a prime cause of illness.

English: shift Meaning: Cambiar es mover algo a otro sitio o dirección. Example: Se cambió al otro lado de la mesa para desayunar. English source: To shift is to move into a different place or direction. He shifted to the other side of the table to eat his breakfast.

English: signal Meaning: Una señal es un sonido o gesto que indica hacer algo. Example: El entrenador tocó el silbato como señal para empezar. English source: A signal is a sound or action that tells someone to do something. The coach blew his whistle as a signal to begin the game.

English: sincere Meaning: Sincero describe a alguien honesto. Example: Sonó sincero cuando me pidió perdón. English source: A sincere person is honest, especially about emotions or opinions. He sounded sincere when he apologized to me.

English: ability Meaning: La habilidad es la capacidad para hacer algo bien. Example: Su habilidad para nadar le permitió cruzar todo el lago. English source: Ability is the quality of a person being able to do something well. His swimming abilities let him cross the entire lake.

English: agriculture Meaning: La agricultura es el cultivo de plantas y crianza de animales para alimento. Example: El agricultor estudió agricultura en la universidad. English source: Agriculture is the growing of plants and raising of animals for food. The farmer studied agriculture in college.

English: cartoon Meaning: Una caricatura es un dibujo gracioso. Example: A veces, las personas dibujan caricaturas para el periódico. English source: A cartoon is a funny drawing. Sometimes, people draw cartoons for the newspaper.

English: ceiling Meaning: El techo es la parte superior de una habitación. Example: Pintó el techo con un rodillo especial. English source: The ceiling is the top of a room. He painted the ceiling with a special roller.

English: convince Meaning: Convencer a alguien es lograr que esté seguro de algo. Example: Ella me convenció para comprar la casa. English source: To convince someone means to make that person sure of something. She convinced me to buy the house.

English: curious Meaning: Curioso significa querer saber cómo funciona algo. Example: Abrí el reloj porque estaba curioso sobre cómo funcionaba. English source: A curious person or animals wants to know about something. I opened up the clock because I was curious about how it worked.

English: delay Meaning: Retrasar es esperar para hacer algo. Example: Tuve un retraso de más de dos horas en el aeropuerto. English source: To delay means to wait to do something. I was delayed at the airport for over two hours.

English: diary Meaning: Un diario es un libro para escribir experiencias personales. Example: No dejo que nadie lea mi diario. English source: A diary is a book in which people write their personal experiences. I do not let anybody read my diary.

English: element Meaning: Un elemento es una parte concreta de algo. Example: Atacar a un rival es su elemento favorito del fútbol americano. English source: An element of something is a particular part of it. Tackling an opponent is Johnny’s favorite element of American football.

English: faith Meaning: La fe es confianza o creencia sin pruebas. Example: La niña enferma tenía fe en los médicos. English source: Faith is trust or belief without proof. The sick girl had faith in doctors. She knew they would make her better.

English: grain Meaning: Un grano es un cultivo como trigo, maíz o arroz. Example: El agricultor sembró dos campos de grano este año. English source: A grain is a food crop such as wheat, corn, rice, or oats. The farmer planted two fields of grain this year.

English: greet Meaning: Saludar a alguien es recibirlo y darle la bienvenida. Example: Cuando mi amigo llegó, lo saludé en la puerta. English source: To greet someone means to meet and welcome that person. When my friend came over, I greeted him at the door.

English: investigate Meaning: Investigar significa buscar información sobre algo. Example: El detective fue a investigar el crimen. English source: To investigate means to search for something or learn about it. The detective went to investigate the crime.

English: joy Meaning: La alegría es un sentimiento de gran felicidad. Example: Me encanta el béisbol. Siento alegría cuando juego. English source: Joy is a feeling of great happiness. I love baseball. I feel joy when I play.

English: label Meaning: Una etiqueta es un distintivo que informa sobre algo. Example: La etiqueta de atrás de tu camiseta dice tu talla. English source: A label is a tag that tells about something. The label on the back of your shirt will tell you what size it is.

English: monk Meaning: Un monje es una persona religiosa que vive de forma sencilla. Example: Los monjes sabían mucho sobre la religión. English source: A monk is a religious person who lives a simple life. The monks knew a lot about religion.
English: odd Meaning: Algo extraño es inusual. Example: Su gato es extraño. Camina sobre dos patas. English source: Something odd is unusual. Her cat is odd. It walks on two feet.

English: pause Meaning: Hacer una pausa significa parar algo un momento. Example: Como tenía mucha hambre, se hizo una pausa para preparar un tentempié. English source: To pause means to stop doing something for a while. Since she was so hungry, she paused to make a snack.

English: priest Meaning: Un sacerdote es alguien que realiza tareas religiosas. Example: El sacerdote nos enseñó sobre Dios. English source: A priest is a person trained to perform religious duties. The priest taught us about God.

English: profession Meaning: La profesión es el trabajo de una persona. Example: Le encantaba navegar, así que eligió esa profesión. English source: A profession is a person’s job. He loved sailing, so he chose to work on ships as a profession.

English: ball Meaning: Una pelota es un objeto redondo que se lanza, patea o golpea en juegos. Example: Seth compró una pelota de fútbol nueva. English source: A ball is a round object that is thrown, kicked, or hit in a game or sport. Seth bought a new soccer ball.

English: bottom Meaning: El fondo es la parte o nivel más bajo de algo. Example: Sarah es tan alta que puede tocar el fondo de la piscina. English source: The bottom is the lowest part, point, or level of something. Sarah is so tall that her feet can touch the bottom of the swimming pool.

English: company Meaning: Una empresa es un negocio u organización que fábrica o vende bienes o servicios. Example: Quiero trabajar en una empresa de software pequeña. English source: A company is a business or organization that makes or sells goods or services. I want to work for a small software company.

English: drink Meaning: Beber es tomar líquido por la boca. Example: La mujer bebé agua después de hacer ejercicio. English source: To drink is to take liquid into the body through the mouth. The woman likes to drink water after she exercises.
English: few Meaning: Pocos significa una cantidad pequeña. Example: Solo tengo unas pocas monedas. English source: A few things is a small number of them. I have only a few coins.

English: line Meaning: Una fila es una fila de personas o cosas. Example: Esta es la fila más larga que he visto. English source: A line is a row of people or things. This is the longest line I have ever seen.

English: pet Meaning: Una mascota es un animal que las personas cuidan. Example: Tyler pasa tiempo con su perro mascota. English source: A pet is an animal such as a cat or dog that people keep and care for. Tyler likes to spend time with his pet dog.

English: product Meaning: Un producto es algo producido o cultivado para venderlo. Example: No hay espacio para otro producto en la bolsa de Melissa. English source: A product is something grown or made in a factory in order to be sold. There’s no room for even one more product in Melissa’s bag.

English: responsible Meaning: Responsable significa estar a cargo de alguien o algo. Example: Peter es responsable de dirigir su departamento. English source: A responsible person is in charge of someone or something. Peter is responsible for leading his department.

English: sell Meaning: Vender es dar algo a cambio de dinero. Example: El trabajo de este hombre es vender casas. English source: To sell is to give something to someone in exchange for money. This man’s job is to sell houses.

English: snake Meaning: Una serpiente es un animal con cuerpo largo y delgado sin patas. Example: Cuidado con la serpiente en el árbol. English source: A snake is an animal with a long, thin body and no legs. Be careful of the snake in the tree.

English: stand Meaning: Estar de pie es sostener el cuerpo con las piernas y pies. Example: Allan prefiere estar de pie y trabajar en su escritorio. English source: To stand is to use the legs and feet to hold the body upright. Allan prefers to stand and work at his desk.
English: strange Meaning: Extraño significa inusual o sorprendente. Example: Llevan máscaras extrañas. English source: A strange thing is unusual or surprising. They are wearing strange masks.

English: tea Meaning: El té es una bebida hecha al verter agua hirviendo sobre hojas secas. Example: Muchas personas toman té verde por sus beneficios. English source: Tea is a drink made by pouring boiling water onto dried leaves. Many people drink green tea because it has many health benefits.

English: test Meaning: Probar significa comprobar algo para ver su calidad. Example: Su trabajo es probar la electricidad para asegurar que funcione. English source: To test is to examine something to see if its quality is good. His job is to test the electricity to make sure it works correctly.

English: tongue Meaning: La lengua es el músculo de la boca usado para hablar y comer. Example: El gato usa su lengua para beber agua. English source: A tongue is the movable muscle inside the mouth that is used to speak, eat, and drink. The cat uses its tongue to drink water.

English: they Meaning: Ellos/ellas se refieren a dos o más personas o cosas. Example: Ellos están jugando un juego divertido. English source: They refers to two or more people or things. They are playing a fun game.

English: type Meaning: Un tipo es una clase o especie de cosas o personas. Example: Los tulipanes son un tipo de flor. English source: A type is a particular kind or group of things or people. Tulips are a type of flower.

English: very Meaning: Muy se usa para enfatizar un adjetivo o adverbio. Example: Un elefante es un animal muy grande. English source: Very is used to emphasize an adjective or adverb. An elephant is a very big animal.

English: wait Meaning: Esperar es quedarse en un lugar hasta que ocurra algo. Example: Tiene que esperar la llegada del avión. English source: To wait is to stay in a place until an expected event happens. She has to wait for the airplane to arrive.

English: accomplish Meaning: Lograr algo significa terminarlo. Example: Logró su meta de correr diez millas. English source: To accomplish something means to finish it. He accomplished his goal of running ten miles.

English: approve Meaning: Aprobar algo significa estar de acuerdo o gustar. Example: Sus compañeros aprobaron su nuevo plan. English source: To approve of something means you like or agree with that thing. Her co-workers approved her new plan.

English: approximate Meaning: Aproximado significa cerca de una cantidad, número o tiempo exacto. Example: Mi altura aproximada es de dos metros. English source: Approximate means close to an exact amount, number, or time. My approximate height is two meters.

English: barrier Meaning: Una barrera es algo que bloquea un camino. Example: La Gran Muralla fue una barrera entre China y sus enemigos. English source: A barrier is something that blocks a path or way. The Great Wall was a barrier between China and its enemies.

English: detect Meaning: Detectar significa notar o encontrar algo. Example: El niño corrió a la cocina cuando detectó el olor de galletas. English source: To detect means to notice or find something. The boy ran to the kitchen when he detected the smell of cookies.

English: duty Meaning: Un deber es algo que alguien tiene que hacer. Example: Es deber de los padres cuidar de sus hijos. English source: A duty is something that a person has to do. It is parents’ duty to take care of their children.

English: elementary Meaning: Básico es lo más simple o inicial. Example: Los niños van a la escuela primaria antes de la secundaria. English source: An elementary thing is the first or most simple thing. Children go to elementary school before high school.

English: failure Meaning: Un fracaso ocurre cuando algo no sale bien. Example: Mi cocina terminó en fracaso porque quemé la comida. English source: A failure happens when something is not done right. My cooking ended in failure because I burned the food.
