English: gradual Meaning: Gradual significa que algo sucede despacio. Example: Los niños aprenden a leer a un ritmo gradual. English source: Something gradual happens slowly. Children learn to read at a gradual pace. They do not learn right away.

English: immigrant Meaning: Un inmigrante es una persona que se muda a otro país. Example: Mis padres eran inmigrantes; vinieron de Polonia. English source: An immigrant is a person who moves to a different country. My parents were immigrants. They came from Poland.

English: insert Meaning: Insertar algo significa ponerlo dentro de otra cosa. Example: Insertó una frase extra en la historia. English source: To insert something means to put it in something else. He inserted an extra sentence into the story.

English: instant Meaning: Un instante es una cantidad de tiempo muy corta. Example: El microondas cocina la comida en un instante. English source: An instant is a very short amount of time. A microwave oven cooks food in an instant.

English: poverty Meaning: La pobreza es la situación de ser pobre. Example: La pobreza es un problema en muchos países del mundo. English source: Poverty is the state of being poor. Poverty is a problem in many countries around the world.

English: pretend Meaning: Fingir significa hacer creer algo que no es real. Example: Al chico le gustaba fingir que era un rey. English source: To pretend means to make believe something is real. The boy liked to pretend he was a king.

English: rank Meaning: El rango es el puesto que ocupa alguien en una jerarquía. Example: El hombre alcanzó el rango de capitán en la marina. English source: A rank is a person’s place in an order of people. The man got to the rank of captain in the navy.

English: recognition Meaning: El reconocimiento es recibir aprobación o elogios de otros. Example: El héroe recibió reconocimiento por su acto valiente. English source: Recognition is the act of getting praise from other people. The hero got recognition for his brave deed.

English: refrigerate Meaning: Refrigerar algo significa hacerlo frío. Example: Los supermercados refrigeran frutas para que duren más. English source: To refrigerate something means to make it cold. Supermarkets refrigerate fruit to make it last long.

English: rent Meaning: El alquiler es el dinero que se paga para vivir en un lugar. Example: Para vivir en está casa, tengo que pagar el alquiler al comienzo de cada mes. English source: Rent is the money people pay to live in a certain place. To live in this house, I have to pay rent at the start of each month.

English: retire Meaning: Jubilarse es dejar el trabajo, normalmente por la edad. Example: Mi padre tiene 65 años y está por jubilarse. English source: To retire is to leave a job, usually because of old age. My father is sixty-five years old. He is about to retire from work.

English: statistic Meaning: Una estadística es un número que muestra un hecho. Example: Las estadísticas mostraron que estuvimos igual de bien este año. English source: A statistic is a number that tells a fact about something. The statistics showed that we did just as well this year as last year.

English: accident Meaning: Un accidente es un suceso inesperado que puede causar problemas. Example: Dañó el coche en un accidente. English source: An accident is unexpected, and may cause some trouble. He damaged the car in an accident.

English: astronaut Meaning: Un astronauta es una persona que viaja al espacio. Example: El astronauta caminaba sobre la luna. English source: An astronaut is a person who goes into outer space. The astronaut was walking on the moon.

English: awake Meaning: Despierto significa no estar dormido. Example: A veces me quedó despierto en la cama porque no tengo sueño. English source: A person who is awake is not asleep. Sometimes, I lay awake in bed because I am not tired.

English: courage Meaning: El coraje es sentir valentía y no tener miedo. Example: El hombre tuvo coraje para tocar al león. English source: Courage is the feeling of not being afraid. The man had the courage to touch the lion.

English: float Meaning: Flotar es moverse sobre el agua sin hundirse. Example: El barco de juguete del niño flotó en la piscina. English source: To float is to move on top of water without sinking. The boy’s toy boat floated in the pool.

English: grant Meaning: Conceder algo es permitir que alguien lo tenga. Example: El profesor nos concedió un descanso después de estudiar todo el día. English source: To grant something is to allow someone to have it. The teacher granted us a break after studying hard all day.

English: gravity Meaning: La gravedad es la fuerza que hace caer las cosas en la Tierra. Example: No hay gravedad en el espacio. English source: Gravity is the force that makes things fall to Earth. There is no gravity in space.

English: jewel Meaning: Una joya es una piedra preciosa valiosa. Example: Un diamante es una de las joyas más caras del mundo. English source: A jewel is a beautiful stone that is worth a lot of money. A diamond is one of the most expensive jewels in the world.
English: miner Meaning: Un minero es una persona que trabaja en una mina. Example: El minero buscaba oro. English source: A miner is a person who works in a mine. The miner was looking for gold.

English: mineral Meaning: Un mineral es un tipo de sustancia que se encuentra en la Tierra. Example: Las rocas están formadas por distintos minerales. English source: A mineral is a type of substance found in the Earth. Rocks are made up of different kinds of minerals.

English: participate Meaning: Participar es estar involucrado y actuar. Example: Los estudiantes participaron en la obra de la escuela. English source: To participate is to be active and do something. The students participated in the school play.

English: permission Meaning: Permiso significa permitir una acción. Example: Tengo permiso para conducir el coche de mi mamá. English source: Permission means the act of allowing some action. I have permission to drive my mom’s car.

English: pour Meaning: Verter un líquido es hacerlo salir de un recipiente. Example: Vertí un poco de leche en la taza de mi hermana. English source: To pour a liquid means to make it come out of a container. I poured some milk into my sister’s cup.

English: raw Meaning: Crudo significa natural y sin procesar. Example: La empresa vertía aguas residuales crudas al río. English source: A raw material is natural and has not been processed. The company dumped raw sewage into the river.

English: satellite Meaning: Un satélite es un aparato enviado al espacio para obtener información. Example: El satélite viajaba alrededor de la Tierra. English source: A satellite is a machine sent into space to get information. The satellite was traveling around the Earth.

English: scale Meaning: La escala de algo es su tamaño, sobre todo cuando es muy grande. Example: Me sorprendió la escala de los edificios del centro. English source: The scale of something is its size, especially when it is very large. I was surprised by the scale of the buildings in the downtown area.
English: skip Meaning: Saltar algo es no hacerlo. Example: Se saltó el trabajo para dormir más. English source: To skip something is to not do it. He skipped work to get more sleep.

English: stretch Meaning: Estirar es extender brazos o piernas. Example: Ella estiró su cuerpo antes de hacer ejercicio. English source: To stretch is to make your arms or legs reach out. She stretched her body before exercising.

English: telescope Meaning: Un telescopio es un instrumento para mirar las estrellas. Example: Con un telescopio se pueden ver bien la luna y las estrellas. English source: A telescope is a tool people use to look at the stars. With a telescope, you can see the moon and stars easily.

English: underground Meaning: Subterráneo significa debajo de la superficie. Example: Los trenes viajan por debajo de tierra. English source: An underground action happens below the surface of the Earth. Subway trains travel underground.

English: alarm Meaning: Una alarma es algo que advierte a la gente de peligro. Example: Cuando los alumnos oyeron la alarma de incendio, salieron del edificio. English source: An alarm is something that warns people of danger. When the students heard the fire alarm, they left the building.

English: arrest Meaning: Detener a alguien es capturarlo por haber hecho algo malo. Example: El hombre fue detenido por infringir la ley. English source: To arrest someone means to catch that person for doing something bad. The man was arrested for breaking the law.

English: award Meaning: Un premio es un reconocimiento por hacer algo bien. Example: Recibió un premio por tener las mejores notas. English source: An award is a prize for doing something well. He got an award for having the best grades in class.

English: breed Meaning: La raza es un grupo de animales de una misma especie. Example: Me gustan las razas pequeñas de perro, como los terriers. English source: A breed is a group of animals within a species. I like small dog breeds, such as terriers.

English: bucket Meaning: Un cubo es un recipiente redondo para guardar cosas. Example: Llené el cubo con agua. English source: A bucket is a round container to put things in. I filled the bucket with water.

English: contest Meaning: Un concurso es una carrera o juego. Example: Las niñas tuvieron un concurso para ver quién saltaba más alto. English source: A contest is a game or a race. The girls had a contest to see who could jump higher.

English: convict Meaning: Condenar significa probar que alguien hizo algo malo. Example: Fue condenado por el delito y enviado a prisión. English source: To convict means to prove that someone did a bad thing. He was convicted of the crime and sent to jail.

English: festival Meaning: Un festival es un evento para celebrar algo. Example: Escuché la canción en el festival de música de Londres. English source: A festival is an event that is held to celebrate a particular thing. I heard the song at the music festival in London.

English: garage Meaning: Un garaje es el lugar de la casa para guardar coches. Example: Mi coche no se ensucia porque lo guardo en el garaje. English source: A garage is the part of a house where people put their cars. My car does not get dirty because I keep it in the garage.

English: journalist Meaning: Un periodista es una persona que escribe noticias. Example: El periodista tomó notas para una historia. English source: A journalist is a person who writes news stories. The journalist took notes for a story he was writing.

English: pup Meaning: Un cachorro es un perro joven. Example: Todo lo que la niña quería de cumpleaños era un cachorro. English source: A pup is a young dog. All the girl wanted for her birthday was a pup.

English: qualify Meaning: Calificar es cumplir lo necesario para algo. Example: Se clasificó para la final al vencer a su rival. English source: To qualify is to have or do things that are needed for something. He qualified to go to the final match by beating the opponent.
English: repair Meaning: Reparar algo es arreglarlo. Example: Reparé la llanta desinflada de mi coche. English source: To repair something is to fix it. I repaired the flat tire on my car.

English: resume Meaning: Reanudar algo significa empezar otra vez tras una pausa. Example: Dejé el periódico para desayunar y luego lo reanudé. English source: To resume something means to start it again after taking a break. I put the newspaper down to eat breakfast. Then, I resumed reading.
English: rob Meaning: Robar es llevarse algo usando fuerza. Example: Un ladrón me robó el pasaporte. English source: To rob is to take property by using force. A thief has robbed me of my passport.
English: slip Meaning: Resbalar significa deslizarse y caer. Example: El hombre resbaló en el suelo mojado. English source: To slip means to slide and fall down. The man slipped on the wet floor.

English: somewhat Meaning: Algo significa en cierta medida. Example: James estaba algo molesto al tener que mover cajas pesadas. English source: Somewhat means to some degree, but not to a large degree. James was somewhat upset when he had to move heavy boxes.

English: stable Meaning: Algo estable no se mueve ni cambia con facilidad. Example: La silla es estable; sus patas son fuertes. English source: A stable thing will not move, change, or fall over. The chair is stable. Its legs are strong.

English: tissue Meaning: tissue es un papel suave para limpiarse la nariz. Example: Había una caja de pañuelos en la mesa. English source: A tissue is a soft piece of paper people use to wipe their noses. There was a box of tissue on the table.

English: yard Meaning: El patio es el terreno justo fuera de una casa. Example: Las niñas saltaban la cuerda en el patio. English source: A yard is the ground just outside of a house. The girls jumped rope in the yard.

English: best Meaning: El mejor es mejor que los demás. Example: Saqué la mejor nota en el examen de matemáticas. English source: The best person or thing is better than all the others. I got the best score on the math test.

English: card Meaning: Una tarjeta es una pequeña pieza de plástico o papel para comprar o usar cosas. Example: Adam usó su tarjeta de la biblioteca para pedir un libro. English source: A card is a small piece of plastic or paper used to buy or use things. Adam used his library card to borrow a book.

English: crowd Meaning: Un multitud es un grupo grande de personas en un mismo lugar. Example: La multitud agitó los brazos hacia la cámara. English source: A crowd is a large group of people who are together in one place. The crowd waved to the camera.

English: day Meaning: Un día es un período de veinticuatro horas. Example: Faltan dos días para el fin de semana. English source: A day is a period of twenty-four hours, beginning at midnight. There are two more days until the weekend.

English: dish Meaning: Un plato es un tipo de comida preparada de una manera concreta. Example: Mi plato favorito en el restaurante es el curry de pollo. English source: A dish is a type of food that is cooked in a particular way. My favorite dish at the restaurant is chicken curry.

English: easy Meaning: Algo fácil no es difícil de hacer. Example: Karen está feliz porque su tarea de inglés es fácil. English source: An easy action is not difficult to do. Karen is happy because her English homework is easy.

English: experience Meaning: Experimentar es vivir o hacer algo personalmente. Example: Ir al concierto fue la mejor experiencia que he tenido. English source: To experience is to do or see something or have something happen to you. Going to the concert was the best thing I’ve ever experienced.

English: hotel Meaning: Un hotel es un lugar donde la gente se queda al viajar. Example: Esta familia se hospeda en su hotel favorito. English source: A hotel is a place where people stay overnight when they are traveling. This family is staying at their favorite hotel.
English: hour Meaning: Una hora tiene sesenta minutos. Example: El hombre esperó más de una hora para el tren. English source: An hour is sixty minutes. The man waited for the train for over an hour.

English: light Meaning: La luz es la energía o brillo que permite ver. Example: Encenderé la luz para que puedas ver. English source: Light is a form of energy or brightness that makes it possible to see something. I will turn on the light so that you can see.

English: market Meaning: Un mercado es un lugar donde la gente compra y vende productos o comida. Example: Voy al mercado cada fin de semana para comprar verduras. English source: A market is a place where people buy and sell products or food. I go to the market every weekend to buy vegetables.

English: plan Meaning: Planificar es pensar y organizar detalles de algo que quieres hacer. Example: Es turno de Sam de planificar la fiesta de la empresa. English source: To plan is to think about and arrange the details of something you want to do. It’s Sam’s turn to plan the company party.

English: price Meaning: El precio es la cantidad de dinero necesaria para pagar algo. Example: Julie está buscando el precio de un suéter. English source: The price is the amount of money needed to pay for something. Julie is checking the price of a sweater.
English: short Meaning: Algo corto no es largo o no es alto. Example: Los días son cortos en invierno. English source: A short thing is not long or not tall. The days are short in the winter.

English: shop Meaning: Comprar es ir a lugares de venta para mirar o adquirir cosas. Example: Tom decidió comprar víveres de camino a casa. English source: To shop is to visit places where goods are sold in order to look at and buy things. Tom decided to shop for groceries on his way home.

English: station Meaning: Una estación es un lugar donde paran buses o trenes. Example: Este hombre espera en la estación de tren. English source: A station is a place where buses and trains stop for passengers. This man is waiting at the train station.

English: surprise Meaning: Sorprender es causar algo inesperado. Example: Sus padres decidieron sorprenderlo con un cachorro. English source: To surprise is to cause something that is unexpected. His parents decided to surprise him with a puppy.

English: system Meaning: Un sistema es un conjunto de partes que trabajan juntas. Example: Este dispositivo controla el sistema de calefacción del edificio. English source: A system is a group of related parts that move or work together. This device controls the building’s heating system.

English: taxi Meaning: Un taxi es un coche con conductor al que se paga por llevarte. Example: Gary conduce un taxi, así que conoce muy bien las carreteras. English source: A taxi is a car and driver that you pay to take you somewhere. Gary drives a taxi, so he knows the roads very well.
English: two Meaning: Dos es el número 2. Example: Dos amigas estudian juntas en la cafetería. English source: Two is the word for the number 2. Two friends study together at the coffee shop.

English: bath Meaning: Un baño es la acción de sentarse en un recipiente de agua para limpiarse. Example: Después de ensuciarse, el niño se dio un baño. English source: A bath is the act of sitting in a tub of water in order to get clean. After playing in the dirt, the boy took a bath.

English: bend Meaning: Doblar es mover algo para que no quede recto. Example: Lee se dobló y recogió el papel del suelo. English source: To bend is to move something so it is not straight. Lee bent over and picked up the paper on the ground.

English: chew Meaning: Masticar es descomponer la comida con la boca y los dientes. Example: Yo mastico mi comida bien antes de tragarla. English source: To chew is to break up food by using the mouth and teeth. I always chew my food carefully before swallowing it.

English: disabled Meaning: Discapacitado significa tener una dificultad física que complica algunas actividades. Example: El hombre discapacitado usó una silla de ruedas para moverse. English source: A disabled person has a physical problem that makes some activities difficult. The disabled man used a wheelchair to move around.

English: fantastic Meaning: Fantástico significa realmente muy bueno. Example: El estudiante hizo un trabajo fantástico y ganó un premio. English source: A fantastic thing is really good. The student did a fantastic job on his project and got an award.

English: fiction Meaning: La ficción es una historia que no es real. Example: Disfruto leer obras de ficción porque son entretenidas. English source: Fiction is a story that is not true. I enjoy reading works of fiction because they are very entertaining.

English: flag Meaning: Una bandera es una tela de colores que representa algo. Example: Nuestro país tiene una bandera hermosa. English source: A flag is a piece of colored cloth that represents something. Our country has a beautiful flag.

English: inspect Meaning: Inspeccionar significa mirar algo con atención. Example: El mecánico inspeccionó nuestro coche para ver si tenía fallas. English source: To inspect is to look at something carefully. The mechanic inspected our car to see if it had any problems.

English: journal Meaning: Una revista es una publicación especializada en un tema. Example: Mi-young trabajaba en un artículo para una revista de arte. English source: A journal is a type of magazine that deals with an academic subject. Mi-young was busy working on an article for an art journal.

English: liquid Meaning: Un líquido no es sólido ni gas. Example: El agua es el líquido más importante para la vida. English source: A liquid is a substance that is neither solid nor gas. Water is the most important liquid for life.

English: marvel Meaning: Maravillarse es sentir sorpresa e interés. Example: Se maravillaron de su excelente ejecución del piano. English source: To marvel at something is to feel surprise and interest in it. We marveled at her excellent piano playing.

English: overcome Meaning: Superar un problema significa resolverlo con éxito. Example: Venció su timidez y habló delante de la clase. English source: To overcome a problem is to successfully fix it. She overcame her shyness and spoke in front of the class.

English: recall Meaning: Recordar algo es traerlo a la mente. Example: Intentaba recordar lo que le había dicho a su amiga. English source: To recall something is to remember it. She was trying to recall what she had told her friend.

English: regret Meaning: Arrepentirse es desear que algo no hubiera pasado. Example: Lamento haber sido grosero con mi hermana. English source: To regret something is to wish that it hadn’t happened. I regret that I was mean to my sister.

English: soul Meaning: El alma es el espíritu de una persona. Example: Algunas personas creen que el alma vive después de la muerte. English source: A soul is a person’s spirit. Some people believe that the soul lives after the body dies.

English: sufficient Meaning: Suficiente significa que algo es bastante en calidad o cantidad. Example: Cuando comí una cantidad suficiente de comida, me levanté de la mesa. English source: Sufficient shows that something is enough, in quality or quantity. After eating a sufficient amount of food, I left the table.

English: surgery Meaning: La cirugía es un tratamiento médico que implica incisión. Example: Necesité cirugía para reparar mi pierna tras el accidente. English source: Surgery is medical treatment involving a doctor cutting into a body. I needed surgery to repair my leg after the accident.

English: tough Meaning: Algo difícil es complicado o exigente. Example: El hombre aprobó su examen de conducir aunque fue muy difícil. English source: A tough thing is difficult. The man passed his driving test even though it was very tough.

English: tube Meaning: Un tubo es una caña o manguera por donde pasa agua o aire. Example: El montón de tubos iba a colocarse bajo tierra. English source: A tube is a pipe through which water or air passes. The pile of tubes was going to be put in the ground.

English: value Meaning: El valor de algo es lo que vale. Example: Tu amor por mí vale más que el oro. English source: The value of something is what it is worth. Your love for me has greater value than gold.

English: atom Meaning: Un átomo es la unidad mínima de una sustancia. Example: Una molécula consiste en dos o más átomos. English source: An atom is the smallest unit of a substance. A molecule consists of a combination of two or more atoms.
English: beautiful Meaning: Algo hermoso es agradable de ver. Example: Había una puesta de sol hermosa. English source: A beautiful thing is good to look at. There was a beautiful sunset.

English: breadth Meaning: La amplitud es la distancia de un lado a otro. Example: La amplitud del muro norte de la casa es de veinte metros. English source: Breadth is the distance from one side to the other side of something. The breadth of the northern wall of the house is twenty meters.

English: comet Meaning: Un cometa es un objeto de hielo y roca con una cola luminosa. Example: Los cometas tardan décadas en dar una vuelta alrededor de una estrella. English source: A comet is an object in space made of ice and rock with a tail of glowing dust. Comets take many decades to complete an orbit around a star.

English: cover Meaning: Cubrir algo es poner algo encima de ello. Example: La Tierra estaba cubierta de nubes. English source: To cover something is to put things over it. The Earth was covered with clouds.

English: despair Meaning: La desesperación es un sentimiento de no tener esperanza. Example: Después de perder la gran cuenta, los vendedores se llenaron de desesperación. English source: Despair is the feeling of having no hope. After we lost the big account, our salespeople were filled with despair.
English: form Meaning: Formar es crear o dar forma a algo. Example: Formaron un nuevo gobierno. English source: To form is to make or to shape something. They formed a new government.

English: fragment Meaning: Un fragmento es una parte pequeña de algo. Example: Después de romper la luz, hubo fragmentos de vidrio para recoger. English source: A fragment is a small part of something. After the light broke, there were fragments of glass to clean up.

English: galaxy Meaning: Una galaxia es una gran colección de sistemas estelares. Example: Nuestro sistema solar está en la parte externa de nuestra galaxia. English source: A galaxy is an extremely large collection of star systems. Our solar system is located in the outer area of our galaxy.

English: gloom Meaning: La penumbra es una oscuridad casi total o tristeza. Example: En la penumbra de la mañana era difícil ver la barca en el lago. English source: Gloom is a state of almost complete darkness or sadness. In the gloom of the morning, it was difficult to see the boat on the lake.
English: large Meaning: Algo grande es muy grande. Example: Me asustó un ave grande. English source: Something large is very big. I was frightened by a large bird.

English: moon Meaning: La luna es un cuerpo que gira alrededor de la Tierra. Example: La luna se ve hermosa está noche. English source: The moon is an object that travels around our Earth. The moon looks beautiful tonight.

English: radiate Meaning: Radiar significa emitir energía o calor. Example: El calor de la chimenea radiaba por toda la sala. English source: To radiate means to send out energy or heat. The heat from the fireplace radiated throughout the room.

English: roam Meaning: Vagar significa moverse sin rumbo fijo. Example: Todo el día, las vacas vagaron por el campo comiendo pasto. English source: To roam means to move around without a plan or purpose. All day, the cows roamed around the field eating grass.

English: solitary Meaning: Algo solitario es el único o algo aislado. Example: La única cosa en la habitación era una silla solitaria. English source: A solitary thing is lonely or the only one. The only thing in the room was a solitary chair.

English: spectrum Meaning: El espectro es el conjunto completo de colores. Example: Puedes ver todo el espectro en un arcoíris. English source: The spectrum is the full range of color ranging from red to violet. You can see the entire spectrum in a rainbow.

English: sphere Meaning: Una esfera es una forma redonda tridimensional, como una pelota. Example: Se inflaron balones en forma de esferas de muchos colores. English source: A sphere is a three-dimensional round shape, like a ball. The balloons were inflated into a variety of colorful spheres.

English: star Meaning: Una estrella es un objeto brillante en el cielo nocturno. Example: Las estrellas salen por la noche. English source: A star is a bright shining thing in the night sky. The stars come out at night.

English: status Meaning: El estatus es la posición o rango de alguien. Example: Había alcanzado el estatus de ser la niña más inteligente de la clase. English source: Status is the position of something or someone in relation to others. She had achieved the status of being the smartest girl in the class.
English: ugly Meaning: Algo feo no es agradable de mirar. Example: Era una visión fea. English source: Something ugly is not good to look at. It was an ugly sight.

English: accuse Meaning: Acusar a alguien de algo es culparlo por ello. Example: Ella acusó a su hermano de romper su computadora. English source: To accuse someone of something is to blame them for doing it. She accused her brother of breaking her computer.

English: adjust Meaning: Ajustar algo significa modificarlo para que esté mejor. Example: Ajustó la vieja guitarra para que sonara mejor. English source: To adjust something means to change it so it is better. He adjusted the old guitar to make it sound better.

English: amuse Meaning: Entretener a alguien es hacer algo divertido. Example: La cantante era muy buena; entretuvo a la multitud. English source: To amuse someone means to do something that is funny or entertaining. The singer was very good. She amused the crowd.

English: coral Meaning: El coral es la sustancia dura y colorida formada por conchas de animales. Example: El buzo admiró el hermoso coral bajo el agua. English source: Coral is the hard, colorful material formed by the shells of animals. The diver admired the beautiful coral under the water.

English: cotton Meaning: El algodón es una tela hecha de fibras de la planta del algodón. Example: Me gusta vestir en verano con ropa de algodón. English source: Cotton is a cloth made from the fibers of the cotton plant. I like to wear clothes made from cotton in the summer.

English: crash Meaning: Estrellar significa chocar y romper algo. Example: Hubo un ruido fuerte cuando el coche se estrelló contra el árbol. English source: To crash means to hit and break something. There was a loud noise when the car crashed into the tree.

English: deck Meaning: La cubierta es el piso exterior de una casa o de un barco. Example: Un barco guarda muchas provisiones debajo de la cubierta. English source: A deck is a wooden floor built outside of a house or the floor of a ship. A ship will store many supplies below its deck.

English: engage Meaning: Involucrarse en algo significa hacerlo. Example: Papá estaba involucrado en cortar un madero por la mitad. English source: To engage in something means to do it. Dad was engaged in sawing a piece of wood in half.
English: firm Meaning: Una cosa firme es sólida y resistente. Example: Duerme mejor en una cama firme. English source: A firm thing is solid but not too hard. He sleeps better on a firm bed.

English: fuel Meaning: El combustible es lo que produce calor o energía. Example: La leña es el combustible que arde para dar calor en este fuego. English source: Fuel is something that creates heat or energy. Wood is the fuel that burns to make heat in this fire.

English: grand Meaning: Algo grandioso es grande y admirado por la gente. Example: La montaña grandiosa se elevaba alto hacia el cielo. English source: Something grand is big and liked by people. The grand mountain rose high into the sky.

English: hurricane Meaning: Un huracán es una tormenta fuerte sobre el océano. Example: El viento del huracán dobló la palmera. English source: A hurricane is a bad storm that happens over the ocean. The wind from the hurricane bent the palm tree.

English: loss Meaning: La pérdida es el hecho de perder algo. Example: Tuve una gran pérdida mientras apostaba. English source: A loss is the act or instance of losing something. I suffered a big loss while I was gambling.

English: plain Meaning: Algo llano es simple y sin adornos. Example: Compró un par de zapatos blancos sencillos el fin de semana. English source: A plain thing is simple and not decorated. He bought a pair of plain white shoes over the weekend.

English: reef Meaning: Un arrecife es un grupo de rocas o coral en el mar. Example: Caminó por el arrecife y miró el agua abajo. English source: A reef is a group of rocks or coral in the ocean. He walked along the reef and looked at the water below.

English: shut Meaning: Cerrar algo significa dejarlo bien cerrado. Example: Por favor, cierra la puerta; el aire de afuera está frío. English source: To shut something means to close it tightly. Please shut the door; the air outside is cold.

English: strict Meaning: Una persona estricta se asegura de que se sigan las reglas. Example: La maestra es estricta y no deja que los alumnos hablen. English source: A strict person makes sure others follow rules. The teacher is strict. She does not let students talk in class.

English: surf Meaning: Hacer surf significa deslizarse en una tabla sobre las olas. Example: Los estudiantes fueron a la playa a surfear durante las vacaciones. English source: To surf means to use a special board to ride on waves in the ocean. The students went to the beach to surf during their vacation.

English: task Meaning: Una tarea es un trabajo que se debe hacer. Example: Mi tarea del fin de semana era limpiar todo el patio trasero. English source: A task is a piece of work to be done that is usually difficult. My task for the weekend was to clean the entire back yard.

English: zone Meaning: Una zona es un área con características distintas. Example: Los bomberos suelen trabajar en zonas de peligro. English source: A zone is an area that has different qualities from the ones around it. Firefighters often work in danger zones.

English: apology Meaning: Una disculpa es lo que se dice para mostrar que uno lamenta algo. Example: Después de discutir con su maestra, la niña escribió una disculpa. English source: An apology is what people say to show that they are sorry. After arguing with her teacher, the girl wrote the teacher an apology.

English: bold Meaning: Alguien valiente no tiene miedo de hacer algo. Example: El hombre valiente escaló la montaña alta. English source: A bold person is not afraid of doing something. The bold man climbed the high mountain.
English: bug Meaning: Un bicho es un insecto pequeño. Example: Las aves comen bichos. English source: A bug is a small insect. Birds like eating bugs.

English: capture Meaning: Capturar algo es atraparlo y retenerlo. Example: James intentó capturar las burbujas en sus manos. English source: To capture something is to catch and hold it. James tried to capture the bubbles in his hands.

English: duke Meaning: Un duque es un noble de alto rango debajo de un rey. Example: El duque gobernaba la tierra. English source: A duke is a man of high social rank but below a king or queen. The duke ruled over the land.

English: expose Meaning: Exponer es mostrar algo que estaba oculto. Example: Se quitó la camisa para exponer su disfraz. English source: To expose is to make known something that is hidden. He took off his shirt to expose his costume.

English: guilty Meaning: Una persona culpable siente remordimiento por algo que hizo. Example: Me sentí culpable por tomar las galletas de mi hermana. English source: Guilty people feel bad for something they did. I felt guilty for taking my sister’s cookies.

English: hire Meaning: Contratar a alguien es pagarle para que trabaje para ti. Example: Contratamos a un hombre para pintar nuestra casa. English source: To hire someone is to pay that person money to work for you. We hired a man to paint our house.

English: innocent Meaning: Una persona inocente no es culpable de un delito. Example: El juez dijo que la mujer era inocente del crimen. English source: An innocent person is not guilty of a crime. The judge said that the woman was innocent of the crime.

English: language Meaning: El idioma es un sistema de comunicación. Example: El reportero habló en un idioma que Sally nunca había oído antes. English source: A language is a system of communication. The reporter spoke a language Sally had never heard before.

English: minister Meaning: Un ministro es una persona importante del gobierno con muchas responsabilidades. Example: El ministro de Educación dirige las escuelas del país. English source: A minister is an important person in government with many duties. The minister of education controls the country’s schools.

English: ordinary Meaning: Ordinario significa normal o nada especial. Example: Hoy fue un día ordinario y no pasó nada extraño. English source: Ordinary means normal, or not special in any way. Today was just an ordinary day. Nothing unusual happened.

English: permanent Meaning: Algo permanente dura mucho tiempo o para siempre. Example: No sabemos si la visita de la tía Mildred será permanente. English source: Something permanent lasts for a long time or forever. We don’t know if Aunt Mildred’s visit will be a permanent one.

English: preserve Meaning: Preservar es proteger algo de dañarse. Example: Papá roció un químico en la casa para preservar las paredes. English source: To preserve is to protect something from harm. Dad sprayed a chemical on the house to help preserve the walls.

English: pronounce Meaning: Pronunciar es decir los sonidos de letras o palabras. Example: A los niños pequeños a menudo les cuesta pronunciar bien las palabras. English source: To pronounce is to say the sounds of letters or words. Young children often have trouble pronouncing words right.

English: resemble Meaning: Parecerse significa verse parecido a alguien. Example: El bebé se parece mucho a su padre. English source: To resemble someone is to look like that person. The baby really resembles his father.

English: symptom Meaning: Un síntoma es una señal de que algo está ocurriendo. Example: Estornudar y tener fiebre alta son síntomas del resfriado. English source: A symptom of a bad condition or illness is a sign that it is happening. Sneezing and a high fever are symptoms of the common cold.

English: tobacco Meaning: El tabaco es la planta cuyas hojas se fuman en los cigarrillos. Example: El tabaco de los cigarrillos es malo para la salud. English source: Tobacco is a plant whose leaves are smoked, such as in cigarettes. The tobacco in cigarettes is bad for you.

English: twin Meaning: Los gemelos son dos niños nacidos al mismo tiempo. Example: Mi hermana y yo somos gemelas. Nos parecemos mucho. English source: Twins are two children born at the same time. My sister and I are twins. We look exactly the same.

English: witch Meaning: Una bruja es una mujer con poderes mágicos. Example: La gente cree que las brujas vuelan en escobas. English source: A witch is a woman with magical powers. People think that witches fly around on broomsticks.

English: accompany Meaning: Acompañar a alguien es unirse o ir con otras personas. Example: Mis hermanos me acompañaron al cine. English source: To accompany other people means to join them or go with them. My brothers accompanied me to the movie.

English: bare Meaning: Algo descubierto es una cosa sin cubrir. Example: A él le gusta caminar con los pies descalzos. English source: A bare thing is plain and not covered. He likes to walk around in his bare feet. Notes: nota: también puede significar «desnudo», según el contexto.

English: branch Meaning: Una rama es la parte de un árbol con hojas. Example: El mono colgaba de una rama del árbol. English source: A branch is the part of a tree with leaves. The monkey was hanging from a branch on the tree.

English: breath Meaning: La respiración es el aire que entra y sale de los pulmones. Example: No puedes tomar aire bajo el agua. English source: A breath is the air that goes into and out of one’s lungs. You can’t take a breath under water.

English: bridge Meaning: Un puente se construye sobre un río para cruzarlo. Example: El viejo puente se cayó al río. English source: A bridge is something that is built over a river so people can cross it. The old bridge fell into the river.
English: cast Meaning: Lanzar algo es tirarlo. Example: El pescador lanzó su caña al agua. English source: To cast something means to throw it. The fisherman cast his line into the water.

English: dare Meaning: Atreverse significa tener valor para intentarlo. Example: Se atrevió a saltar del avión y hacer paracaidismo. English source: To dare means to be brave enough to try something. He dared to jump out of the airplane and skydive.

English: electronic Meaning: Lo electrónico usa electricidad para funcionar. Example: Me gustan los dispositivos electrónicos, como un reproductor de música. English source: An electronic thing uses electricity to work. I like having electronic devices such as an MP3 player.

English: inn Meaning: Una posada es un lugar donde los viajeros pueden descansar y comer. Example: El visitante se alojó en una habitación de la posada. English source: An inn is a place where travelers can rest and eat. The visitor got a room at the inn.

English: net Meaning: Una red es una malla para atrapar animales. Example: El chico atrapó mariposas con su red. English source: A net is a bag made of strong thread. It is used to catch animals. The boy caught butterflies in his net.

English: philosophy Meaning: La filosofía es una forma de pensar sobre la verdad y la vida. Example: Mi filosofía es “vive y deja vivir”. English source: A philosophy is a way to think about truth and life. My philosophy is “live and let live.”

English: pot Meaning: Una olla es un recipiente profundo y redondo usado para cocinar. Example: No toques la olla del fuego. Está caliente. English source: A pot is a deep, round metal container used for cooking. Don’t touch the pot on the stove. It’s hot.

English: seed Meaning: La semilla es la parte dura de una planta o fruto de donde nace. Example: Sembré la semilla en la tierra, esperando que creciera un árbol. English source: A seed is the hard part of a plant or fruit that trees grow from. I planted the seed in the dirt, hoping that it would grow into a tree.

English: sharp Meaning: Algo afilado tiene un filo delgado que corta con facilidad. Example: Ese cuchillo está muy afilado. Ten cuidado. English source: A sharp object has a thin edge that cuts things easily. That knife is very sharp. Be careful not to hurt yourself.

English: sort Meaning: Un tipo es una clase o especie de algo. Example: ¿Qué tipo de instrumento quieres aprender a tocar? English source: A sort of something is a type of it. What sort of instrument do you want to learn to play?

English: subtract Meaning: Restar es quitar una cantidad. Example: Aprendimos cómo restar números en clase. English source: To subtract means to take something away. We learned how to subtract numbers in class.

English: tight Meaning: Algo ajustado está duro de mover porque está firme. Example: Los nudos estaban demasiado ajustados para desatarlos. English source: A tight thing is hard to move because it is firmly in place. The knots were too tight to untie.

English: virtual Meaning: Virtual significa casi o prácticamente real. Example: Como es popular, Joe es el líder virtual del grupo. English source: A virtual thing is very close to being true or accurate. Because he’s popular, Joe is the virtual leader of the group.

English: weigh Meaning: Pesar algo es medir su peso. Example: El perrito pesaba exactamente 3 kilos. English source: To weigh something means to measure how heavy it is. The little dog weighed exactly 3 kilograms.

English: whisper Meaning: Susurrar es decir algo muy bajito. Example: Tenemos que susurrar en la biblioteca. English source: To whisper means to say very quietly. We have to whisper in the library so people can focus on reading.

English: abstract Meaning: Algo abstracto es una idea, no una cosa física. Example: La idea de belleza es abstracta y cambia con el tiempo. English source: An abstract thing is an idea or thought, not a physical thing. The idea of beauty is abstract and changes over time.

English: annual Meaning: Un evento anual ocurre una vez al año. Example: La única vez que veo a mis tías y tíos es en el picnic familiar anual. English source: An annual event happens once a year. The only time I see my aunts and uncles is at our annual family picnic.

English: clay Meaning: La arcilla es una tierra pesada y húmeda usada para hacer vasijas. Example: Ella hizo un cuenco con arcilla. English source: Clay is a type of heavy, wet soil used to make pots. She made a bowl out of the clay.

English: cloth Meaning: La tela es un material usado para hacer ropa. Example: Su camisa está hecha de una tela muy suave. English source: Cloth is material used to make clothes. His shirt is made of a very soft type of cloth.

English: curtain Meaning: Una cortina es una tela sobre una ventana o para separar un espacio. Example: Abrió las cortinas para dejar entrar la luz. English source: A curtain is a cloth hung over a window or used to divide a room. She opened the curtains to let light into the room.

English: deserve Meaning: Merecer es ser digno de algo por lo que se ha hecho. Example: El perro merecía un hueso por portarse tan bien. English source: To deserve is to be worthy of something as a result of one’s actions. The dog deserved a bone for behaving very well.

English: feather Meaning: Las plumas cubren el cuerpo de los pájaros. Example: Ese pájaro tiene plumas naranjas en el pecho. English source: Feathers are the things covering a bird’s bodies. That bird has orange feathers on its chest.

English: fertile Meaning: Una tierra fértil puede producir buenas cosechas. Example: El agricultor cultivó muchas verduras en el suelo fértil. English source: Fertile land is able to produce good crops and plants. The farmer grew many vegetables in the fertile soil.

English: flood Meaning: Una inundación es cuando el agua cubre un área que suele estar seca. Example: Después de tres días de lluvia, hubo una inundación en la ciudad. English source: A flood is an event in which water covers an area that is usually dry. After three days of rain, there was a flood in the city.

English: furniture Meaning: El mobiliario es el conjunto de muebles de una casa. Example: Su sala sólo tenía unas pocas piezas de mobiliario. English source: Furniture means the things used in a house such as tables and chairs. His living room only had a few simple pieces of furniture.

English: grave Meaning: La tumba es el lugar donde se entierra a una persona muerta. Example: Visito la tumba de mi abuelo cada año. English source: A grave is the place where a dead person is buried. We visit our grandfather’s grave each year.

English: ideal Meaning: Un ideal es lo mejor que algo puede ser. Example: Esta casa es un lugar ideal para mi familia. English source: An ideal thing is the best that it can possibly be. This house is an ideal place for my family. It has everything we need.

English: intelligence Meaning: La inteligencia es la capacidad de aprender y comprender. Example: Por su alta inteligencia, terminó la escuela temprano. English source: Intelligence is the ability to learn and understand things. Because of his high intelligence, he finished school early.

English: obtain Meaning: Obtener es conseguir algo que se quiere o necesita. Example: Después de aprobar el examen, obtuve mi licencia de conducir. English source: To obtain is to get something you want or need. After I passed the test, I obtained my driver’s license.

English: religious Meaning: Religioso significa relacionado con la religión. Example: El hombre santo habló sobre temas religiosos. English source: Religious means related to or about religion. The holy man spoke about religious topics.

English: romantic Meaning: Romántico significa relacionado con el amor. Example: La joven pareja fue a ver una película romántica. English source: Romantic means related to or about love. The young couple went to see a romantic movie.

English: shell Meaning: La concha es una cubierta dura que protege a ciertos animales marinos. Example: Había muchas conchas bonitas en la playa. English source: A shell is a hard covering that protects the body of some sea creatures. There were many pretty shells on the beach.

English: shore Meaning: La orilla es el borde de un gran cuerpo de agua. Example: Todos los botes flotaban cerca de la orilla. English source: A shore is the edge of a large body of water. All of the boats were floating near the shore.

English: wheel Meaning: Una rueda es una parte redonda de un vehículo que gira al moverse. Example: Un coche tiene cuatro ruedas. English source: A wheel is a round thing on a vehicle that turns when it moves. A car has four wheels.

English: wooden Meaning: Las cosas de madera están hechas con madera. Example: Mi madre me regaló una cuchara de madera. English source: Wooden objects are made of wood. My mother gave me a wooden spoon.

English: appliance Meaning: Un electrodoméstico es equipo para tareas del hogar. Example: Muchas casas tienen electrodomésticos como hornos y refrigeradores. English source: An appliance is a piece of equipment used for jobs in the home. Many homes have appliances like ovens, toasters, and refrigerators.

English: basin Meaning: Un cuenco grande se usa para lavar cosas; a veces también se llama lavabo. Example: Llenó el cuenco con agua y se lavó la cara. English source: A basin is large bowl for washing things. A sink is sometimes called a basin. She filled the basin with water and washed her face.

English: broom Meaning: La escoba es un cepillo con mango largo para limpiar pisos. Example: Mi padre usa una escoba para barrer el polvo del sótano. English source: A broom is a brush with a long handle used for cleaning floors. My father usually uses a broom to sweep away dust in the basement.

English: caterpillar Meaning: La oruga es un insecto pequeño que parece un gusano y come plantas. Example: Después de comer muchas hojas, las orugas se convierten en mariposas. English source: A caterpillar is a small insect that looks like a worm and eats plants. After eating a lot of leaves, caterpillars change into butterflies.

English: cupboard Meaning: Un armario guarda comida o utensilios del hogar. Example: Pusimos nuestros platos y comida en los armarios. English source: A cupboard is a piece of furniture that is used to store food or household items. We put all of our dishes and food in the cupboards.

English: delicate Meaning: Algo delicado se rompe o se daña con facilidad. Example: Debes sostener al bebé con cuidado porque es muy delicada. English source: Delicate things are easy to break or harm. You should hold the baby carefully because she’s very delicate.

English: emerge Meaning: Emerger es salir de algo. Example: Una marmota emergió de un agujero cubierto de nieve. English source: To emerge from something means to come out of it. A groundhog emerged from a snow covered hole.

English: handicap Meaning: La discapacidad limita capacidades mentales o físicas. Example: Joe tiene una ligera discapacidad, así que usa un andador. English source: A handicap is a condition that limits someone’s mental or physical abilities. Joe has a slight handicap, so he uses a walker to get around.

English: hole Meaning: Un agujero es un espacio hueco en algo sólido. Example: Hicieron un agujero grande en la pared. English source: A hole is a hollow space in something solid. They made a big hole in the wall.

English: hook Meaning: Un anzuelo es una pieza curva y metálica para pescar. Example: El pez picó el anzuelo. English source: A hook is a sharp curved piece of metal used for catching or holding things. The fish went after the sharp hook.

English: hop Meaning: Brincar significa dar saltos cortos. Example: El canguro se alejó de inmediato dando brincos. English source: To hop means to jump a short distance. The kangaroo quickly hopped away from danger.

English: laundry Meaning: La ropa es la ropa que se lava o está sucia. Example: Dobló la ropa limpia y puso la sucia en una canasta. English source: Laundry is clothes that have been or need to be washed. He folded the clean laundry and put the dirty laundry in a basket.

English: pursue Meaning: Perseguir es cazar o seguir a alguien o algo. Example: La madre persiguió a su hijo niño por la colina. English source: To pursue is to chase or follow someone or something. The mother pursued her young child down the hill.

English: reluctant Meaning: Una persona reacia no quiere hacer algo. Example: Ella fue reacia a decir que había visto el robo. English source: Reluctant means not wanting to do something. She was reluctant to say that she saw the robbery.

English: sleeve Meaning: Las mangas son la parte de la camisa por donde van los brazos. Example: Ryan compró una camisa nueva con mangas largas. English source: Sleeves are the part of a shirt in which arms go. Ryan bought a new shirt with long sleeves to keep his arms warm.

English: spine Meaning: La columna vertebral es el grupo de huesos que va por la espalda. Example: Nuestra columna nos ayuda a mantenernos derechos. English source: The spine is the group of bones that run up and down the middle of the back. Our spine helps us to stand up nice and straight.

English: stain Meaning: Una mancha es una marca sucia difícil de limpiar. Example: Él tenía una mancha roja en el cuello de la camisa. English source: A stain is a dirty mark that is difficult to clean. He had a red stain on the collar of his shirt.

English: strip Meaning: Una franja es una pieza larga y estrecha de material o terreno. Example: Tenía largas tiras de película de su viaje. English source: A strip is a long, narrow piece of material or land. He had long strips of film that held images of his trip abroad.

English: swear Meaning: Jurar es prometer hacer algo. Example: Pondré la mano sobre la Biblia y juraré hacer lo mejor por mi país. English source: To swear means to promise to do something. I will put my hand on the Bible and swear to do my best for the country.

English: swing Meaning: Mecer algo es moverlo de un lado a otro. Example: Puede mecer con fuerza un palo de golf. English source: To swing something means to move it back and forth or from side to side. He can swing a golf club very powerfully.
English: acre Meaning: Un acre es una unidad para medir superficie. Example: Vivían en una granja de 150 acres. English source: An acre is a unit for measuring area. They lived on a 150-acre farm.

column1: vida después de la muerte
column2: English: afterlife Meaning: La vida después de la muerte es lo que algunas personas creen que comienza al morir. Example: Creo que existe una vida después de la muerte. English source: The afterlife is a life that some people believe begins when a person dies. I believe that there is an afterlife.

English: archaeology Meaning: La arqueología estudia los restos de sociedades antiguas. Example: Disfrutaba visitar las pirámides de Egipto porque ama la arqueología. English source: Archaeology is the study of the remains left by ancient societies. He enjoyed visiting the Great Pyramids of Egypt because he loves archaeology.

English: chamber Meaning: Una sala es un espacio cerrado usado para un propósito especial. Example: La reunión se hizo en la sala de la facultad. English source: A chamber is a closed space or room used for a special purpose. The meeting was held in the faculty chamber.

English: channel Meaning: Un canal es un espacio alargado entre dos márgenes. Example: El río abrió un canal entre las rocas. English source: A channel is a long, deep space between two edges. The river cut a channel through the rocks.

English: core Meaning: El núcleo es la parte central y principal de algo. Example: La Tierra tiene un núcleo sólido interno. English source: A core is the main or central part of something. Earth has a solid inner core.

English: corridor Meaning: Un pasillo es un espacio estrecho que conduce a otras áreas. Example: Tomó el pasillo de la izquierda para ir a su oficina. English source: A corridor is a narrow passage that leads into other areas. He took the corridor on the left to go to his office.

English: distinct Meaning: Algo distinto es diferente o se nota claramente. Example: Tiene un acento muy distintivo. English source: A distinct thing is different or stands out. He has a distinct accent.

English: elite Meaning: La élite es un grupo de alto nivel. Example: Sólo un grupo élite podía entrar al club. English source: Elite means of or from a high-level group. Only an elite group was allowed membership into the club.

English: engineer Meaning: Ingeniar algo es planear hábilmente cómo construirlo. Example: Ingeniaron el robot y luego buscaron las piezas correctas. English source: To engineer something is to skillfully plan out how to make that thing. After engineering the robot, they needed to find the correct parts to build it.

English: found Meaning: Fundar algo es iniciar o establecerlo. Example: Mi abuelo fundó City Bank. English source: To found something means to start, organize, or establish that thing. My grandfather founded the City Bank.

English: gap Meaning: Una brecha es el espacio entre dos cosas. Example: Hay una pequeña brecha entre los bloques de madera. English source: A gap is a space between two things. There is a small gap between the blocks of wood.

English: glory Meaning: La gloria es grandeza o importancia especial. Example: Disfrutaron de la gloria del hermoso atardecer. English source: Glory is the importance, magnificence, or specialness of something. They enjoyed the glory of the beautiful sunset.

English: interior Meaning: El interior es la parte de adentro de algo. Example: Miraron el interior de la caja. English source: An interior is the inside of something. They looked at the interior of the box.

English: lion Meaning: El león es un gran animal de la familia de los felinos. Example: Fuimos a ver al león en el zoológico. English source: A lion is a large animal in the cat family. We went to see the lion at the zoo.

English: role Meaning: Un rol es un puesto o parte en algo. Example: Su rol en la oficina es vender productos a clientes. English source: A role is a job, position, or part in something. Her role in the office is to sell products to customers.

English: royal Meaning: Real significa relacionado con un rey o una reina. Example: La duquesa formaba parte de la familia real. English source: Royal means related to a king or queen. The Duchess was part of the royal family.
English: sole Meaning: Solo o único significa el único. Example: Ella fue la única mujer de la habitación. English source: A sole person or thing is the only one. She was the sole woman in the room.

English: stairs Meaning: Las escaleras son una serie de escalones para pasar de un nivel a otro. Example: Tomó las escaleras en lugar del ascensor. English source: Stairs are a set of steps built to go from one level of a building to another. He took the stairs instead of the elevator.

English: surface Meaning: La superficie es la capa superior de algo. Example: Limpié la superficie de la mesa. English source: The surface is the top layer of something. She wiped the surface of the table.

English: agreement Meaning: Un acuerdo es una decisión formal sobre una acción futura. Example: Creo que obtendrás el acuerdo de Tom para está propuesta. English source: An agreement is a formal decision about future action. I think you’ll get Tom’s agreement to this proposal.

English: arise Meaning: Surgir significa que algo sucede. Example: Surgieron dificultades con su computadora vieja. English source: To arise is to happen. Difficulties arose with his computer because it was old.

English: benefactor Meaning: Un benefactor es quien da dinero para ayudar a alguien. Example: El benefactor del estudiante le dio dinero para estudiar. English source: A benefactor is a person who gives money to help someone. The student’s benefactor gave him money to spend on his studies.

English: blacksmith Meaning: Un herrero es una persona que trabaja el metal. Example: El herrero martilleó el metal hasta dejarlo plano. English source: A blacksmith is a person who makes things out of metal. The blacksmith pounded the piece of metal until it was flat.

English: chimney Meaning: La chimenea es una pipa alta para sacar humo de un edificio. Example: El gato se sentó en el tejado junto a la chimenea. English source: A chimney is a tall pipe used to carry smoke out of a building. The cat was sitting on the roof next to the chimney.

English: compensate Meaning: Compensar es pagar a alguien por el tiempo dedicado. Example: Su jefa la compensó por el trabajo extra de la semana pasada. English source: To compensate is to pay someone for the time they spent doing something. Her boss compensated her for the extra work she did last week.

English: encounter Meaning: Encontrarse con alguien o algo es topar con ello. Example: Encontré una tortuga marina mientras nadaba. English source: To encounter is to find or meet a person or thing. I encountered a sea turtle while I was swimming.

English: exceed Meaning: Exceder es ser más que algo. Example: Como excedí mi límite, decidí deshacerme de mis tarjetas. English source: To exceed is to be more than something. Since I exceeded my limit, I decided to get rid of my credit cards.

English: forge Meaning: Forjar es fabricar o crear, a veces con dificultad. Example: Stacy y Heather forjaron su amistad cuando eran adolescentes. English source: To forge is to make or produce, especially with difficulty. Stacy and Heather forged their friendship when they were teenagers.

English: humble Meaning: Una persona humilde no se cree mejor que los demás. Example: Aunque Bob sea el más inteligente, es humilde. English source: People who are humble do not believe that they are better than other people. Even though Bob is the smartest boy in his class, he is humble.

English: iron Meaning: El hierro es un metal fuerte usado para muchos objetos. Example: El caballo tenía herraduras de hierro. English source: Iron is a strong metal that is used to make many objects. The horse had shoes made of iron.

English: ladder Meaning: Una escalera se usa para subir y bajar. Example: Usó una escalera para subir al fuerte de su casa en el árbol. English source: A ladder is an object that is used to climb up and down things. He used a ladder to climb to the top of his tree house.

English: modest Meaning: Una persona modesta no se cree muy importante. Example: Derek es muy modesto para alguien tan rico. English source: If people are modest, they do not think that they are too important. Derek is very modest for someone who is so rich.

English: occupy Meaning: Ocupar un lugar es vivir, trabajar o estar allí. Example: Kevin y Alice ocuparon las sillas y hablaron mucho. English source: To occupy a place is to live, work, or be there. Kevin and Alice occupied the chairs and had a long discussion.

English: penny Meaning: Un centavo es una moneda de un céntimo. Example: El rostro de Abraham Lincoln está en el centavo. English source: A penny is a coin worth one cent. US President Abraham Lincoln is on the penny.

English: preach Meaning: Predicar es hablar sobre una idea religiosa. Example: Aaron solía predicar sobre vivir honestamente. English source: To preach is to talk about and promote a religious idea. Aaron often preached about living an honest life.

English: prosper Meaning: Prosperar es tener éxito o prosperar económicamente. Example: El negocio nuevo de Frank prosperó tras muchos años. English source: To prosper is to be successful or make a lot of money. Frank’s new business finally prospered after many years of hard work.

English: province Meaning: Una provincia es un área controlada por un país. Example: Canadá se divide en varias provincias. English source: A province is an area that is controlled by a country. Canada is divided into several different provinces.

English: satisfaction Meaning: La satisfacción es el sentimiento de haber hecho o recibido algo bueno. Example: Brad se llenó de satisfacción al ver qué había para cenar. English source: Satisfaction is the feeling of having done or received something good. Brad was filled with satisfaction when he saw what was for dinner.

English: sustain Meaning: Mantener algo es mantenerlo en marcha. Example: La energía eólica permite sostener una ciudad con energía. English source: To sustain something is to keep it going. Wind power is a clean way to sustain a city with energy.

English: acquire Meaning: Adquirir algo es obtener la posesión de eso. Example: Tina adquirió un paquete raro ayer. English source: To acquire something is to get or gain possession of that thing. Tina acquired a strange package yesterday.

English: awkward Meaning: Algo incómodo es embarazoso y pone en una situación difícil. Example: Tras dejar caer su taza de café, Robbie se sintió incómodo. English source: An awkward thing is embarrassing and uncomfortable. After dropping his coffee cup, Robbie felt awkward.

English: caretaker Meaning: Un cuidador atiende a personas muy jóvenes, viejas o enfermas. Example: El cuidador de mi abuela la ayuda a moverse por la casa. English source: A caretaker is a person who takes care of very young, old, or sick people. My grandmother’s caretaker helps her get around the house.

English: deceive Meaning: Engañar es hacer que alguien crea algo falso. Example: Intentó engañar a sus amigos con un truco de cartas. English source: To deceive is to make someone believe something that is not true. He tried to deceive his friends with a card trick.

English: discourage Meaning: Desalentar es quitarle ganas a alguien. Example: El Sr. Perry desalentó a los estudiantes de dejar la escuela. English source: To discourage is to make someone feel less excited about something. Mr. Perry discouraged the students from quitting school.

English: fake Meaning: Algo falso está hecho para parecer real y engañar. Example: El modelo llevaba un pelo falso. English source: A fake thing is made to look real in order to trick people. The model was wearing fake hair.

English: hatred Meaning: El odio es un fuerte sentimiento de no gustar a alguien o algo. Example: Tengo odio al sabor de la medicina. English source: Hatred is a strong feeling of not liking someone or something. I have a hatred for the taste of medicine.

English: hut Meaning: Una choza es una casa pequeña de una o dos habitaciones. Example: Entramos a la choza para dormir. English source: A hut is a house made of wood, grass, or mud that has only one or two rooms. We all went into the hut to sleep.

English: inferior Meaning: Un objeto inferior no es tan bueno como otro. Example: Los coches de hace cien años son inferiores a los actuales. English source: An inferior thing is not as good as something else. Cars built a hundred years ago are inferior to ones built today.

English: lodge Meaning: Una cabaña es una casa de montaña para cazadores o pescadores. Example: Durante el viaje de esquí, nos quedamos en una cabaña. English source: A lodge is a house in the mountains used by people who hunt or fish. During our ski trip, we stayed at a lodge.

English: neglect Meaning: Descuidar a alguien o algo es no cuidarlo bien. Example: William descuidó su habitación, por eso está hecha un desastre. English source: To neglect someone or something is to not take care of it properly. William neglected his room, so it is a complete mess.

English: newcomer Meaning: Un recién llegado es alguien que llega recientemente. Example: Los estudiantes recibieron con alegría al recién llegado al colegio. English source: A newcomer is a person who has recently arrived at a place or a group. The students happily welcomed the newcomer to the school.

English: offense Meaning: Una ofensa es una conducta indebida o delictiva. Example: Robar un coche es una ofensa muy grave. English source: An offense is behavior that is wrong or breaks a law. Stealing a car is a very serious offense.

English: overlook Meaning: Pasar por alto algo es no darse cuenta de su importancia. Example: Brenda pasó por alto el último paso y tuvo una mala caída. English source: To overlook something is to not notice it or to not realize that it is important. Brenda overlooked the last step and had a bad fall.

English: repay Meaning: Reembolsar es pagar de vuelta o devolver algo. Example: Ella le reembolsó a su amigo todo su esfuerzo con un detalle. English source: To repay is to pay back or to reward someone or something. She repaid her friend for all of his hard work with a small gift.

English: ridiculous Meaning: Ridículo significa tonto o extraño. Example: Steve se veía ridículo con esas gafas azules enormes. English source: A ridiculous thing is silly or strange. Steve looked ridiculous with those huge blue sunglasses.

English: satisfactory Meaning: Algo satisfactorio es lo suficientemente bueno. Example: Mina sacaba calificaciones satisfactorias. English source: A satisfactory thing is good enough. Mina often received satisfactory grades since she studied so hard.

English: shepherd Meaning: Un pastor protege y cuida a las ovejas. Example: El pastor llevó las ovejas a otro campo. English source: A shepherd is a person who protects and cares for sheep. The shepherd moved the sheep to another field.

English: venture Meaning: Aventurarse es ir a un lugar que puede ser peligroso. Example: Aunque era peligroso, se aventuraron por la montaña. English source: To venture is to go to a place that may be dangerous. Even though it was dangerous, they ventured up the mountain.

English: wheat Meaning: El trigo es una planta de la que se obtiene grano para hacer pan. Example: El campo de trigo dorado estaba listo para cosechar. English source: Wheat is a plant from which we get the grain used to make bread. The field of golden wheat was ready to be harvested.

English: alley Meaning: Un callejón es un camino estrecho entre casas o edificios. Example: El callejón detrás de mi casa se ve sucio. English source: An alley is a narrow road between houses or buildings. The alley behind my house looks dirty.

English: ax Meaning: Un hacha es una herramienta para cortar madera. Example: Usó un hacha para cortar leña para la chimenea. English source: An ax is a tool used to cut wood. She used an ax to cut some wood for the fire.

English: bunch Meaning: Un racimo es un grupo de cosas iguales. Example: Tenía hambre y se comió un racimo de uvas. English source: A bunch is a group of the same things. She was hungry, so she ate the entire bunch of grapes.

English: chore Meaning: Una tarea doméstica es un trabajo desagradable que hay que hacer. Example: El trabajo de hacer los platos todos los martes y miércoles es una tarea de Nikki. English source: A chore is an unpleasant job that must be done. It’s Nikki’s chore to do the dishes every Tuesday and Wednesday night.

English: decent Meaning: Una persona o cosa decente es suficiente o adecuada. Example: Eric hizo un trabajo decente pintando la cerca. English source: A decent person or thing is OK or good enough. Eric did a decent job painting the fence.

English: disgraceful Meaning: Una conducta desgraciada o deshonrosa es muy mala. Example: Esto es un gasto vergonzoso de dinero. English source: Disgraceful behavior is behavior that is very bad. This is a disgraceful waste of money.

English: elbow Meaning: El codo es la parte media de un brazo. Example: Señaló su codo para mostrarme dónde se había lastimado. English source: The elbow is the middle part of an arm, where it bends. She pointed to her elbow to show me where she hurt herself.

English: grateful Meaning: Una persona agradecida se siente agradecida. Example: Las niñas estaban agradecidas por la oportunidad de ver a su abuelo. English source: A grateful person feels thankful about something. The girls were grateful for the chance to visit their grandfather.

English: irritate Meaning: Irritar es molestar o enfadar a alguien. Example: Se irritó cuando su hermano le dijo que había perdido su cámara. English source: To irritate means to annoy someone. She was irritated when her brother told her that he had lost her camera.

English: kid Meaning: Bromear es decir algo falso como broma. Example: No estaba enojado de verdad. Bromee al decir que estaba molesto. English source: To kid is to say something that is not true as a joke. I am not really mad. I was kidding when I said I was angry.

English: loose Meaning: Algo flojo no está firmemente sujeto. Example: El perno estaba flojo, así que lo apreté con la llave. English source: A loose thing is not held in place tightly. The bolt was loose, so I tightened it with the wrench.

English: offend Meaning: Ofender es hacer enojar o herir a alguien. Example: Ambos se ofendieron por lo que se dijeron. English source: To offend is to make someone angry or upset. They were both offended by what they had said to each other.

English: overnight Meaning: Una acción overnight ocurre durante la noche. Example: Los campistas se quedaron en la tienda durante la noche. English source: An overnight action happens during the night. The campers stayed in the tent overnight.

English: persist Meaning: Persistir significa seguir haciéndolo aunque sea difícil. Example: Aunque la lección era difícil, persistió hasta entenderla. English source: To persist means to keep doing something even when it is hard. Even though the lesson was difficult, he persisted until he understood.

English: pine Meaning: El pino es un árbol alto y delgado con agujas. Example: Había muchos pinos hermosos en el bosque. English source: A pine is a type of tall, thin tree with needles instead of leaves. There were many beautiful pine trees in the forest.

English: scar Meaning: Una cicatriz es una marca en la piel tras sanar una herida. Example: El hombre tenía cicatrices terribles en la mejilla y la frente. English source: A scar is a mark on the skin after a wound heals. The man had horrible scars on his cheek and forehead.

English: sensation Meaning: Una sensación es una percepción que surge de los sentidos. Example: Mamá sintió una sensación dolorosa en la cabeza por el ruido. English source: A sensation is a feeling that people get from their senses. Mom got a painful sensation in her head from the loud noise.

English: sled Meaning: Un trineo es un pequeño vehículo usado sobre nieve. Example: A Marvin le gusta bajar la colina en trineo en invierno. English source: A sled is a small vehicle used on snow. Marvin likes to ride his sled down the hill in winter.

English: tease Meaning: Burlarse es hacer bromas o reírse de alguien. Example: Jake se burló de Charlie porque era el nuevo alumno. English source: To tease means to laugh at or make fun of someone. Jake teased Charlie because he was the new student.

English: valentine Meaning: Un novio o novia es alguien amado con gran cariño. Example: Harry quería que Molly fuera su novio. English source: A valentine is someone loved or admired with great affection. Harry wanted Molly to be his valentine.

English: acquaint Meaning: Familiarizarse con algo o alguien es llegar a conocerlo. Example: Nancy se familiarizó con la nueva computadora. English source: To acquaint is to get to know something or someone. Nancy acquainted herself with the new computer.

English: cemetery Meaning: Un cementerio es un lugar donde se entierran personas. Example: Algunas personas tienen miedo de los cementerios. English source: A cemetery is a place where people are buried when they die. Some people are scared of cemeteries.
English: creature Meaning: Una criatura es un animal o persona. Example: Esas criaturas viven en África. English source: A creature is an animal or person. Those creatures live in Africa.

English: curse Meaning: Maldecir a alguien es desearle cosas malas. Example: La bruja maldijo el pueblo. English source: To curse someone is to hope that bad things happen to that person. The witch cursed the village.

English: disguise Meaning: Un disfraz es algo que se usa para que no reconozcan a alguien. Example: Todos sabían que era papá con el disfraz de Papá Noel. English source: A disguise is something you wear so people cannot tell who you are. Everyone knew that it was Dad in the Santa disguise.

English: fancy Meaning: Algo lujoso es más refinado o detallado que lo normal. Example: Pusieron la mesa para una cena lujosa. English source: A fancy thing is nicer or more detailed than normal. Their table was all set for a fancy dinner.

English: flashlight Meaning: Una linterna es una luz portátil eléctrica. Example: Llevamos una linterna cuando fuimos de campamento. English source: A flashlight is a small electric light that people carry in their hands. We took a flashlight when we went camping.

English: hood Meaning: La capucha es la parte de un abrigo que cubre la cabeza. Example: Ella se puso la capucha para mantener su cabeza caliente. English source: A hood is part of a coat that goes over a person’s head. She put on her hood to keep her head warm.

English: inhabitant Meaning: Un habitante es una persona que vive en un lugar. Example: El número de habitantes en el campo está aumentando. English source: An inhabitant is a person who lives in a certain place. The number of inhabitants in the countryside is increasing.

English: nourish Meaning: Nutrir es dar el alimento necesario para vivir. Example: Una buena madre nutre a su bebé todos los días. English source: To nourish is to give someone or something the food needed to live. A good mother will nourish her baby every day.

English: pirate Meaning: Un pirata es un marinero que roba de otros barcos. Example: Los piratas son personajes muy temibles. English source: A pirate is a sailor who steals things from other boats. Pirates are very scary characters.

English: publication Meaning: Una publicación es algo impreso como un periódico o un libro. Example: Ella es suscriptora de esa publicación desde hace más de diez años. English source: A publication is something printed, like a newspaper or book. She’s been a subscriber to that publication for over ten years.

English: riddle Meaning: Un acertijo es una pregunta difícil pero graciosa. Example: No pude responder el acertijo de Wendy, pero me hizo reír. English source: A riddle is a question that is difficult to answer but meant to be funny. I could not answer Wendy’s riddle, but it made me laugh.

English: rot Meaning: Pudrir significa descomponerse lentamente. Example: El tronco viejo comenzó a pudrirse en el bosque. English source: To rot is to slowly get softer and become destroyed. The old log began to rot in the forest.
English: shortly Meaning: En breve significa en poco tiempo. Example: Mi jornada terminará en breve. English source: An action that happens shortly happens very soon. My workday will end shortly.

English: skeleton Meaning: El esqueleto es el conjunto de huesos de un cuerpo. Example: Hay un esqueleto en el aula de ciencias. English source: A skeleton is all the bones of a body. There is a skeleton in the science classroom.

English: spoil Meaning: Estropear algo es hacerlo malo o dañado. Example: Dejamos la fruta fuera demasiado tiempo y se estropeó. English source: To spoil is to rot or to make bad. We left the fruit out too long, and it spoiled.

English: starve Meaning: Morir de hambre significa no tener comida durante mucho tiempo. Example: Durante la guerra, muchas personas murieron de hambre. English source: To starve is to not get enough food for a long period of time. During the war, many people starved.

English: thrill Meaning: La emoción es un fuerte sentimiento de excitación. Example: El surfista disfruta la emoción de surfear una gran ola. English source: A thrill is an exciting feeling. The surfer enjoys the thrill of surfing a big wave.
English: wicked Meaning: Malvado significa muy malo o cruel. Example: Mi jefe es un hombre muy malvado. English source: A wicked person is very bad or evil. My boss is a very wicked man.
