English: alert Meaning: Alerta/avisar a alguien sobre algo. Example: La alarma de incendio nos alertó de que había un problema. English source: To alert someone is to tell or warn that person about something. The fire alarm alerted us that there was a problem.

English: broadcast Meaning: La transmisión es un programa o emisión de radio/TV. Example: Vimos la transmisión de las noticias locales por televisión. English source: A broadcast is a television or radio show. We watched the broadcast of the local news on TV.

English: bulletin Meaning: Un boletín informa noticias recientes e importantes. Example: Hubo un boletín en vivo sobre la economía de la ciudad. English source: A bulletin is a news report about very recent and important events. There was a live bulletin reporting on the economy of the city.

English: bump Meaning: Un bulto es una protuberancia pequeña en una superficie. Example: El mono se hizo un bulto en la cabeza al ser golpeado por una roca. English source: A bump is a small raised area on a surface. The monkey got a bump on his head because he was hit by a rock.

English: chop Meaning: Picar algo es cortarlo en pedazos con una herramienta. Example: Mi mamá picó algunas verduras para el guiso. English source: To chop something means to cut it into pieces with a tool. Mom chopped some vegetables to put into the stew.

English: closet Meaning: Un armario es un mueble para guardar cosas. Example: Marie tiene mucha ropa dentro de su armario. English source: A closet is a small room used to store things. Marie has many clothes inside of her closet.

English: console Meaning: Consolar es dar consuelo a alguien triste. Example: Cuando mi perro se perdió, mi padre me consoló. English source: To console is to give comfort to a person who feels sad. When my dog ran away, my dad consoled me.

English: district Meaning: Un distrito es una parte de una ciudad, condado o estado. Example: Vivo en un distrito residencial de Seattle, Washington. English source: A district is a small part of a city, county, state, or country. I live in a residential district of Seattle, Washington.

English: drawer Meaning: Un cajón es una parte de un mueble para guardar cosas. Example: Puse mi ropa en los cajones vacíos. English source: A drawer is a small part in furniture that is used to store things. I put my clothes into the empty drawers.

English: endure Meaning: Resistir significa soportar y sobrevivir algo difícil. Example: Tuvo que resistir los gritos de su marido todo el día. English source: To endure means to experience and survive something difficult. She had to endure her husband shouting all day long.

English: execute Meaning: Ejecutar es matar legalmente a alguien. Example: A algunas personas las ejecutan por crímenes graves. English source: To execute means to kill someone as a legal punishment. Some people are executed for serious crimes.
English: grasp Meaning: Agarrar es tomar firmemente algo. Example: Apretó firmemente la bolsa de dinero. English source: To grasp something means to hold it. He grasped the bag of money tightly.

English: rear Meaning: La parte trasera es la parte de atrás. Example: El hombre cargó la parte trasera de su camión con cajas. English source: The rear of something is the back part of that thing. The man loaded the rear of his truck with boxes.

English: senator Meaning: Un senador hace leyes para un estado. Example: El joven senador prometió hacer leyes que ayudarían a la gente. English source: A senator is someone who makes laws for a state. The young senator promised to make laws that would help the people.

English: skull Meaning: El cráneo es el hueso duro que protege el cerebro. Example: El cráneo protege al cerebro. English source: A skull is the hard head bone that protects the brain. The brain is protected by the skull.

English: stir Meaning: Revolver es mezclar algo con algo pequeño, como una cuchara. Example: Mi mamá revolvió la mezcla hasta que quedó suave. English source: To stir something means to mix it using something small, like a spoon. Mom stirred the batter until it was smooth.

English: tap Meaning: Tocar algo es golpearlo suavemente. Example: Golpeó suavemente las teclas del teclado para escribir una palabra. English source: To tap something is to hit it lightly. He tapped the keys of the keyboard to write a short word.

English: tremendous Meaning: Tremendo significa muy grande o muy bueno. Example: Los océanos de la Tierra están llenos de una cantidad tremenda de agua. English source: A tremendous thing is very large or very good. The Earth’s oceans are filled with a tremendous amount of water.

English: underneath Meaning: Debajo significa por debajo. Example: Las raíces de un árbol están debajo de la tierra. English source: Underneath means below or under. The roots of a tree are located underneath the ground.

English: worm Meaning: Un gusano es un animal pequeño de cuerpo largo y delgado. Example: Se usan gusanos para ayudar a pescar. English source: A worm is a small animal with a long, thin body. Worms are often used to help catch fish.

English: abandon Meaning: Abandonar es dejar algo para siempre o por mucho tiempo. Example: La habitación vieja había sido abandonada años antes. English source: To abandon something is to leave it forever or for a long time. The old room had been abandoned years before.

English: ambitious Meaning: Una persona ambiciosa quiere ser rica o exitosa. Example: Kendra tuvo que ser ambiciosa para entrar en medicina. English source: An ambitious person wants to be rich or successful. Kendra had to be ambitious to get into medical school.

English: bark Meaning: Ladrar es emitir un ruido corto y fuerte, como un perro. Example: El perro ladró fuerte y de forma aterradora. English source: To bark is to make a short, loud noise, like a dog. The dog barked loudly and frighteningly.

English: bay Meaning: Una bahía es una zona costera en la que la tierra se adentra en el mar. Example: El puente Golden Gate cruza la bahía de San Francisco. English source: A bay is an area near the ocean where the land goes inward. The Golden Gate Bridge crosses San Francisco Bay.

English: brilliant Meaning: Brillante significa muy inteligente. Example: Mi hermana menor es brillante para su edad. English source: A brilliant person is very bright or smart. My younger sister is brilliant for someone her age.

English: chin Meaning: El mentón es la parte dura inferior de la cara. Example: Luke señaló el vello de su mentón. English source: A chin is the hard part at the bottom of a person’s face. Luke pointed to the hair on his chin.

English: complaint Meaning: Una queja es una expresión de descontento. Example: Mamá dijo que no quería oír las quejas de mi hermano. English source: A complaint is an expression of unhappiness about something. Mom said she didn’t want to hear my brother’s complaints.

English: deaf Meaning: Una persona sorda no puede oír. Example: Susan usa lengua de señas porque es sorda. English source: A deaf person or animal cannot hear. Susan uses sign language because she is deaf.

English: enthusiastic Meaning: Una persona entusiasta está interesada y con mucha energía. Example: El hombre estaba entusiasta por su trabajo. English source: An enthusiastic person is excited by or interested in something. The man was enthusiastic about his job.

English: expedition Meaning: Una expedición es un viaje largo, normalmente a un lugar muy lejano. Example: Subieron a su nave espacial para comenzar su expedición. English source: An expedition is a long trip, usually to a place very far away. They got into their spaceship to begin their expedition.

English: horizon Meaning: El horizonte es el lugar donde el cielo parece unirse al suelo o al mar. Example: El sol se ocultó bajo el horizonte. English source: The horizon is where the sky looks like it meets the ground. The sun dipped below the horizon.

English: loyal Meaning: Una persona leal siempre ayuda y apoya a alguien o algo. Example: Los tres amigos son muy leales entre sí. English source: Loyal people always help or support a certain person or thing. The three friends are very loyal to each other.

English: mayor Meaning: El alcalde es la persona que dirige y representa a una ciudad. Example: El alcalde de mi ciudad natal es un orador muy buen hablante. English source: The mayor is the person in charge of a city. The mayor of my hometown is quite a powerful speaker.

English: mutual Meaning: Mutuo significa que la misma cosa la sienten dos o más personas. Example: Robert ama a Sarah y ella le ama a él; ese sentimiento es mutuo. English source: A mutual thing is felt in the same way by two or more people. Robert likes Sarah, and she likes him. The feeling is mutual.

English: overweight Meaning: Se dice de una persona o animal que tiene más peso de lo saludable. Example: Lisa come demasiado, por eso ahora tiene sobrepeso. English source: Overweight people or animals are heavier than is healthy. Lisa eats too much, so now she’s overweight.

English: refuge Meaning: Un refugio es un lugar seguro. Example: Cuando empezó a llover, ella encontró refugio en la casa. English source: A refuge is a place of safety. When it started to rain, she found refuge in the house.

English: restore Meaning: Restaurar es devolver algo a su estado anterior. Example: Víctor restauró el coche viejo. English source: To restore something is to put it back the way it was. Victor restored the old car.

English: rub Meaning: Frotar es presionar y mover la mano sobre algo de forma repetida. Example: Como le dolían los pies, mamá se los frotó. English source: To rub something is to push on it and move your hand back and forth. Mom’s feet were sore, so she rubbed them.

English: senses Meaning: Los sentidos son los sentidos físico que usan los seres vivos para conocer el mundo: vista, gusto, olfato, oído y tacto. Example: Sería difícil vivir sin tus cinco sentidos. English source: The senses are how living things experience the world: sight, taste, smell, hearing and touch. It would be hard to live without your five senses.

English: veterinarian Meaning: Un veterinario es un médico que cuida la salud de los animales. Example: Wanda se volvió veterinaria porque ama a los perros. English source: A veterinarian is a doctor who takes care of animals. Wanda became a veterinarian because she loves dogs.

English: anniversary Meaning: Un aniversario es un día para celebrar algo ocurrido en el pasado. Example: Mis padres salieron a comer para su aniversario de bodas. English source: An anniversary is a day that celebrates something from the past. My parents went out to a restaurant for their wedding anniversary.

English: arithmetic Meaning: La aritmética es la matemática de los números y operaciones básicas. Example: Me gusta estudiar aritmética en la escuela. English source: Arithmetic is math. I like to study arithmetic at school.

English: ashamed Meaning: Avergonzado significa sentirse mal o pudoroso por una mala acción. Example: Él se sintió avergonzado cuando olvidó el nombre de su profesor. English source: Ashamed means feeling upset and embarrassed because of a bad action. He was ashamed when he forgot his teacher’s name.

English: burst Meaning: Estallar es romperse o abrirse de forma repentina y violenta. Example: La bomba estalló sobre la ciudad. English source: To burst is to suddenly break open or apart. The bomb burst over the city.

English: carpenter Meaning: Un carpintero es una persona que construye cosas con madera. Example: Contratamos a un carpintero para hacer un armario. English source: A carpenter is a person who builds things with wood. We hired a carpenter to make a cupboard.

English: coal Meaning: El carbón es una sustancia negra y dura que se quema para dar calor. Example: Muchas centrales eléctricas queman carbón para producir energía. English source: Coal is a hard black material that people burn for heat. Many power stations burn coal to produce energy.

English: couch Meaning: Un sofá es un asiento largo y blando donde pueden sentarse varias personas. Example: El nuevo sofá de Kim y Martin fue muy caro. English source: A couch is a long, soft seat that many people can sit on. Kim and Martin’s new couch was very expensive.

English: drip Meaning: Gotear significa caer en pequeñas gotas o poco a poco. Example: Escuché agua gotear del grifo. English source: To drip is to fall a little bit at a time. I heard water dripping from the faucet.

English: elegant Meaning: Algo elegante es muy bonito y refinado. Example: En Japón, las mujeres llevan kimonos elegantes en ocasiones especiales. English source: Something elegant is very fancy and pleasing. In Japan, women wear elegant kimonos on special occasions.

English: fabric Meaning: El tejido es el material con el que se hacen ropas, muebles y más. Example: Las toallas estaban hechas con un tejido suave. English source: Fabric is cloth used to make clothes, furniture, etc. The towels were made from a soft fabric.

English: highlands Meaning: Las tierras altas son zonas altas del terreno, normalmente con montañas. Example: El hombre tenía una casa pequeña en las tierras altas. English source: Highlands are high areas of land, usually with mountains. The man had a small home in the highlands.

English: ivory Meaning: El marfil es una sustancia dura y blanca que viene de los elefantes. Example: Los largos colmillos de marfil del elefante se veían impresionantes. English source: Ivory is a hard, white substance that comes from elephants. The elephant’s long ivory tusks looked very impressive.

English: mill Meaning: Un molino es un edificio donde se muele trigo para hacer harina. Example: El granjero llevó su trigo al molino para convertirlo en harina. English source: A mill is a building in which wheat is ground into flour. The farmer took his wheat to the mill to make it into flour.

English: needle Meaning: La aguja es una pequeña pieza metálica, puntiaguda, usada para coser o reparar ropa. Example: Usé una aguja para arreglar el agujero de mis pantalones. English source: A needle is a small, sharp piece of metal used to make or fix clothes. I used a needle to fix the hole in my pants.

English: polish Meaning: Pulir es frotar para dejar algo brillante. Example: Mark pasó toda la mañana puliendo sus zapatos para la boda. English source: To polish something is to rub it in order to make it shiny. Mark spent all morning polishing his shoes for the wedding.

English: sew Meaning: Coser significa unir telas con hilo mediante puntadas. Example: Aprendí a coser cuando era niña. English source: To sew means to put pieces of cloth together using string or thread. I learned to sew when I was a little girl.

English: shed Meaning: Un cobertizo es un edificio pequeño para guardar herramientas y objetos. Example: Tenemos un cobertizo pequeño en el patio para guardar cosas. English source: A shed is a small building in which people store things like tools. We have a small shed in the backyard for storage.

English: thread Meaning: Un hilo es una hebra delgada usada para coser. Example: Tengo muchos colores de hilo en casa. English source: A thread is a thin piece of string. I have many different colors of thread at home.

English: trim Meaning: Recortar es cortar un poco algo para darle forma o hacerlo más corto. Example: Me recortaron el cabello está tarde. English source: To trim something is to cut it a little bit. I had my hair trimmed this afternoon.

English: upwards Meaning: Hacia arriba describe un movimiento en dirección de lo alto o superior. Example: La cometa voló hacia arriba cada vez más. English source: An upwards action moves vertically towards the direction above. The kite went upwards further and further.

English: ally Meaning: Un aliado es una persona que ayuda o apoya a otra. Example: Me alegré de encontrar muchos aliados que compartían mi opinión. English source: An ally is someone who agrees to help or support another person or group. I was happy to find many allies who shared my opinion.

English: boast Meaning: Jactarse es hablar de uno mismo con orgullo exagerado. Example: Ya nos cansamos de escucharle jactarse de sí mismo todo el día. English source: To boast is to talk about how great one is. We all became tired of listening to him boast about himself all day.

English: bounce Meaning: Rebotar es botar un objeto sobre una superficie y que vuelve hacia arriba. Example: Owen rebota la pelota en el suelo. English source: To bounce is to move up and away from a surface after hitting it. Owen bounced the ball on the ground.

English: bully Meaning: Un matón es una persona que intimida o maltrata a otros. Example: Los dos matones siempre molestaban a los niños más pequeños y débiles. English source: A bully is a person who is mean to others. The two bullies always picked on the smaller, weaker kids.

English: carbohydrate Meaning: Los carbohidratos son sustancias de alimentos como el arroz o el pan que dan energía. Example: Los carbohidratos como el arroz son una buena fuente de energía para personas activas. English source: Carbohydrates are substances in foods like bread that give energy. Carbohydrates like rice are a good source of energy for active people.

English: crawl Meaning: Gatear es moverse despacio con las manos y las rodillas. Example: El bebé gateó por el piso. English source: To crawl is to move slowly on hands and knees. The baby crawled across the floor.

English: defeat Meaning: Derrotar significa vencer o ganar contra alguien en una competencia. Example: El campeón derrotó al retador en el combate. English source: To defeat someone is to beat that person in a game or battle. The champion defeated the challenger in the boxing match.

English: dial Meaning: La esfera es la parte circular de un reloj que muestra la hora. Example: Miró la esfera para ver qué hora era. English source: A dial is a circular tool, like the front of a clock. I looked at the dial to see what time it was.

English: dominant Meaning: Dominante significa más fuerte o con más poder que otros. Example: El gorila es uno de los animales dominantes de la selva. English source: A dominant person or thing is stronger than others. The gorilla is one of the dominant animals in the jungle.

English: entire Meaning: Entero significa completo, sin faltar ninguna parte. Example: La mesa entera estaba cubierta de comida. English source: Entire means the whole thing or group. The entire table was covered with food.

English: mercy Meaning: La misericordia es compasión y clemencia hacia alguien. Example: Pidió misericordia a su jefe para no ser despedido. English source: Mercy is a feeling or act of kindness. He asked his boss for mercy and to not fire him.

English: nod Meaning: Asentir es mover la cabeza hacia arriba y abajo para mostrar aprobación o atención. Example: Asentí mi cabeza mientras escuchaba la canción. English source: To nod is to move your head up and down. I nodded my head as I listened to the song.

English: opponent Meaning: Un oponente es la persona o grupo que intenta vencer a otro. Example: En la cancha, nuestros oponentes eran demasiado buenos para nosotros. English source: An opponent is a person or group trying to defeat another person or group. On the field, our opponents were too good for us.

English: quarrel Meaning: Discutir es pelearse con palabras o discutir un problema. Example: Billy discutió con su esposa por la compra de una casa nueva. English source: To quarrel is to argue or fight. Billy quarreled with his wife about buying a new house.

English: rival Meaning: Un rival es alguien que compite por lo mismo que otro. Example: Los tres rivales competían por el mismo trabajo. English source: A rival is someone trying to achieve the same thing as another. The three rivals were all competing for the same job.

English: sore Meaning: Dolorido significa doloroso o con dolor. Example: Después de levantar la caja pesada, la espalda de Mona estaba dolorida. English source: Sore means feeling or causing pain. After lifting the heavy box, Mona’s back was sore.

English: sting Meaning: Picar es causar dolor al introducir algo puntiagudo en la piel. Example: La aguja me picó en el brazo y dije “¡Ay!”. English source: To sting is to cause pain by pushing a sharp part into the skin. The needle stung my arm and made me say, “Ouch!”

English: strain Meaning: Esforzarse significa intentar con mucha fuerza o energía. Example: Casey se esforzó por levantar la caja pesada. English source: To strain is to try very hard. Casey strained to lift the heavy box.

English: torture Meaning: Tortura es causar dolor físico o mental intenso. Example: Greg pensó que escribir el ensayo era tortura. English source: Torture is action that causes physical or mental pain. Greg thought that writing the essay was torture.

English: wrestle Meaning: Luchar o forcejear significa intentar derribar a un rival. Example: A mi padre le encantaba luchar en la secundaria. English source: To wrestle is to try to push another competitor to the floor. My dad loved to wrestle when he was in high school.

English: absence Meaning: Ausencia es la condición de estar lejos o no estar presente. Example: Hay una ausencia de arena en el reloj de arena. English source: Absence is the state of something being away. There is an absence of sand in the hourglass.

English: aloud Meaning: En voz alta significa de manera audible para que otros puedan oír. Example: Mi padre suele leer cuentos en voz alta para mí y mi hermana. English source: An action done aloud is done so that people can hear it. My father often reads stories aloud to me and my sister.
English: bald Meaning: Calvo significa no tener pelo en la cabeza. Example: Mi hermano mayor es calvo. English source: A bald person or animal has no hair. My oldest brother is bald.

English: blanket Meaning: Una manta es una tela para cubrirse y entrar en calor o sentarse. Example: Puse una manta en el suelo para hacer picnic. English source: A blanket is a piece of cloth that people use to keep warm or to sit upon. I laid a blanket on the ground so that we could have a picnic.

English: creep Meaning: Arrastrarse es moverse con sigilo y despacio. Example: El gato bajó lentamente de la escalera arrastrándose. English source: To creep is to move quietly and slowly. The cat slowly crept down the tree.

English: divorce Meaning: El divorcio es el proceso legal de terminar un matrimonio. Example: En los últimos veinte años, las tasas de divorcio han aumentado. English source: Divorce is the process of ending a marriage. Divorce rates have increased in the past twenty years.

English: imitate Meaning: Imitar es hacer algo como otra persona o cosa. Example: Él imitó a su superhéroe favorito poniéndose un disfraz. English source: To imitate someone or something is to act in the exact same way. He imitated his favorite superhero by putting on a costume.
English: infant Meaning: Un bebé o infante es un niño muy pequeño. Example: El bebé lloró toda la noche. English source: An infant is a baby. The infant cried all night.

English: kidnap Meaning: Secuestrar es llevarse a alguien por la fuerza e ilegalmente. Example: Ella se aterrorizó al saber que su hijo había sido secuestrado. English source: To kidnap someone is to take that person illegally. She was terrified to find out her son had been kidnapped.

English: nap Meaning: Una siesta es una breve siesta durante el día. Example: Me tomé una siesta corta porque me acosté tarde anoche. English source: A nap is a short sleep, usually during the day. I took a short nap because I had stayed up late last night.

English: nowhere Meaning: En ninguna parte significa que no existe en ningún lugar. Example: Lamentablemente, no había agua en ninguna parte. English source: Nowhere means no place or not existing. Unfortunately, water was nowhere to be found.

English: pat Meaning: Palmear es tocar algo suavemente con la mano. Example: Me di una palmada con crema en la cara. English source: To pat something is to hit it softly with your hand. I patted some lotion onto my face.

English: relief Meaning: Alivio es la sensación de descanso tras algo difícil o doloroso. Example: Sentí un gran alivio cuando oí la buena noticia. English source: Relief is a good feeling after something bad or challenging ends. I felt a sense of relief when I heard the good news.

English: reproduce Meaning: Reproducir es crear de nuevo algo que hizo alguien. Example: Los niños intentaron reproducir su casa con bloques de juguete. English source: To reproduce is to make something exactly how someone else did it. The children tried to reproduce their house using toy blocks.

English: rhyme Meaning: La rima es un verso o expresión con sonidos finales parecidos. Example: “Humpty Dumpty” es una rima antigua que los niños aprenden en la escuela. English source: A rhyme is writing or speech that has words with the same ending sounds. “Humpty Dumpty” is an old rhyme that children learn in school.

English: suck Meaning: Chupar es tomar algo en la boca haciendo succión. Example: El bebé chupó leche de su botella. English source: To suck is to put something in your mouth and try to get something out of it. The baby sucked milk from her bottle.

English: urgent Meaning: Urgente es algo importante que necesita hacerse de inmediato. Example: Tuvo que irse en ese momento porque era urgente. English source: An urgent thing is important and needs to be done now. He had to leave at that moment; it was urgent.

English: vanish Meaning: Desaparecer significa irse de repente y sin dejar rastro. Example: Todos los pasajeros desaparecieron de la estación de tren. English source: To vanish is to go away suddenly. All the passengers vanished from the train station.

English: wagon Meaning: Un carro es un vehículo con ruedas usado para transportar cosas pesadas. Example: Usó su carro para llevar algunos regalos. English source: A wagon is a cart used to carry heavy things. He used his wagon to carry some of his gifts.

English: wrinkle Meaning: Una arruga es una marca o pliegue en la piel, especialmente en la cara. Example: Mi abuelo tiene algunas arrugas en la cara. English source: A wrinkle is a line on a person’s face that appears as they get old. My grandfather has some wrinkles on his face.

English: architecture Meaning: La arquitectura es el diseño y forma de un edificio. Example: El edificio de la Ópera de Sídney es un buen ejemplo de arquitectura moderna. English source: Architecture is the design and form of a building. The Sydney Opera House is a good example of modern architecture.

English: basket Meaning: Una canasta es un recipiente tejido para llevar objetos. Example: Puso las verduras en una canasta. English source: A basket is a container made of woven materials that is used to carry things. He put the vegetables in a basket.

English: bloom Meaning: Florecer significa abrirse y salir una flor. Example: Las margaritas blancas estaban a punto de florecer. English source: To bloom is to produce an open flower. The white daisies were about to bloom.

English: canoe Meaning: La canoa es una embarcación pequeña y alargada con extremos puntiagudos. Example: Remó su canoa hasta la orilla del lago. English source: A canoe is a long, light boat with pointed ends. He paddled his canoe to the edge of the lake.

English: carpet Meaning: Una alfombra es una tela gruesa para cubrir el suelo. Example: La alfombra blanca de su sala era suave. English source: A carpet is a thick, heavy, woven fabric used to cover the floor. His white living room carpet was soft.

English: cousin Meaning: Un primo o prima es el hijo de tu tío o tu tía. Example: Mi prima se parece mucho a mí. English source: A cousin is the child of one’s aunt and uncle. My cousin looks just like me.

English: desk Meaning: El escritorio es un mueble para escribir, estudiar o trabajar. Example: Puso los libros en su escritorio. English source: A desk is a piece of furniture that people sit at to do work. She put the books on her desk.

English: gallery Meaning: Una galería es un espacio amplio para mostrar obras de arte. Example: La galería de arte mostraba cuadros hermosos. English source: A gallery is a large space where people can see works of art. The art gallery displayed beautiful paintings.

English: guest Meaning: Un invitado es alguien al que se invita a un evento o a una casa. Example: Alicia invitó a un invitado especial para cenar. English source: A guest is someone who is invited to an event, occasion, or location. Alice invited a special guest for dinner.

English: host Meaning: Un anfitrión es quien recibe o invita a invitados a un lugar. Example: Él fue un anfitrión muy amable. English source: A host is someone who invites a guest someplace. He was a gracious host.
English: July Meaning: Julio es el séptimo mes del año. Example: Su cumpleaños es en julio. English source: The seventh month of the year is July. Her birthday is in July.

English: modern Meaning: Moderno significa propio de la época actual. Example: La cocina tenía un aspecto muy moderno. English source: A modern thing belongs to the current time. The kitchen had a modern look.

English: museum Meaning: Un museo es un edificio donde se muestran objetos culturales, sociales y científicos. Example: El Louvre es un museo muy famoso en Francia. English source: A museum is a building that displays cultural, social, and scientific objects. The Louvre is a famous museum in France.
English: pink Meaning: Rosa es un color claro, entre el rojo y el blanco. Example: Eligió un lápiz labial rosado. English source: Pink is a pale shade of red. She chose a pink lipstick.

English: plane Meaning: Un avión es una aeronave con alas y motor que vuela. Example: Tomaron un avión sobre el océano hacia la India. English source: A plane is a vehicle that has an engine and wings and flies in the air. They took a plane across the ocean to India.

English: refrigerator Meaning: El refrigerador es un electrodoméstico grande para mantener la comida fría. Example: Guardó leche, huevos y mantequilla en el refrigerador. English source: A refrigerator is a large electrical machine used to keep food cold. He kept milk, eggs, and butter in the refrigerator.

English: temperature Meaning: La temperatura es la medida de calor o frío de algo. Example: En invierno, la temperatura puede bajar de 0 grados. English source: A temperature is a measure of how hot or cold something is. In the winter, the temperature can drop below 0 degrees.

English: theater Meaning: Un teatro es un lugar para ver cine o espectáculos en vivo. Example: La llevó a ver un espectáculo de comedia en el teatro. English source: A theater is a place where people can watch movies or live shows. He took her to see a comedy show at the theater.

English: upper Meaning: Superior significa que está en una posición más alta. Example: Tomó el ascensor al piso superior. English source: An upper position is a higher position. He took the elevator to the upper floor.

English: welcome Meaning: Dar la bienvenida es recibir a alguien con afecto y agrado. Example: Recibió a sus amigos con una bienvenida cálida. English source: To welcome is to greet someone or something with pleasure. She greeted her friends with a warm welcome.

English: anticipate Meaning: Anticipar es pensar o esperar que algo sucederá. Example: Carrie anticipaba la llegada de su bebé. English source: To anticipate something is to think that it will happen. Carrie anticipated the arrival of her baby.

English: barrel Meaning: Un barril es un recipiente cilíndrico para guardar líquidos. Example: Había un barril vacío fuera de la casa. English source: A barrel is a round thing that you can keep liquids in. There was an empty barrel outside the house.

English: beam Meaning: Una viga es una barra resistente que sostiene una construcción. Example: Los rascacielos modernos se construyen con muchas vigas. English source: A beam is a heavy bar. Modern skyscrapers are made with many beams.

English: casual Meaning: Casual significa relajado y poco formal. Example: Puedes vestir ropa casual, como vaqueros, para la fiesta. English source: A casual thing is relaxed or simple. You can wear casual clothes, like jeans, to the party.

English: caution Meaning: Precaución es actuar con cuidado para evitar peligro. Example: Usa la sierra eléctrica con precaución; es muy peligrosa. English source: Caution is care and attention in order to avoid danger. Please use the power saw with caution. It is very dangerous.

English: contrary Meaning: Contrario significa opuesto o opuesta a algo. Example: No hace calor afuera. Por el contrario, hace bastante frío. English source: A contrary thing is the opposite to another thing. It isn’t warm outside at all. On the contrary, it is quite cold.

English: deliberate Meaning: Deliberado significa hecho a propósito y con intención. Example: Bernie hizo un intento deliberado de lastimar a Andy. English source: A deliberate action is one done on purpose, not by accident. Bernie made a deliberate attempt to injure Andy.

English: dissolve Meaning: Disolver es mezclar una sustancia en líquido hasta que desaparece. Example: Disolví la pastilla en un vaso de agua. English source: To dissolve something is to mix it into a liquid until it disappears. I dissolved the pill in a glass of water.

English: explode Meaning: Explotar es abrirse con fuerza y romperse en piezas o expandirse abruptamente. Example: El televisor viejo explotó cuando lo conecté. English source: To explode is to suddenly move apart in many smaller pieces. The old TV exploded when I plugged it in.

English: fasten Meaning: Abrochar significa cerrar o unir algo con un broche o hebilla. Example: Elizabeth se abrochó el cinturón de seguridad. English source: To fasten something is to close it or attach it to something. Elizabeth fastened her seat belt.

English: germ Meaning: Un germen es un organismo muy pequeño que puede causar enfermedad. Example: Hay gérmenes en todo lo que tocas. English source: A germ is a very small living thing that can make people sick. Germs are on everything that you touch.

English: kit Meaning: Un kit es un conjunto de objetos necesarios para hacer algo. Example: ¿Tienes un kit de primeros auxilios en la oficina? English source: A kit is a set of all the things needed to do something. Is there a first aid kit in your office?

English: puff Meaning: Una bocanada es una pequeña nube de humo o vapor. Example: Salió una bocanada de humo del fósforo quemado. English source: A puff is a little bit of smoke or steam. A puff of smoke came from the burnt match.

English: rag Meaning: Un trapo es una tela pequeña para limpiar o fregar. Example: Usa un trapo para quitar el polvo de la mesa. English source: A rag is a small towel. Please use a rag to clean the dust off the table.

English: scatter Meaning: Dispersar es repartir algo en muchos lugares. Example: Accidentalmente dispersé todas mis pastillas. English source: To scatter something is to make it go in many places. I accidentally scattered all of my pills.
English: scent Meaning: El aroma es un olor agradable. Example: A Julie le encantaba el aroma de las flores. English source: A scent is a smell. Julie enjoyed the scent of the flowers.

English: steel Meaning: El acero es un metal resistente de color gris. Example: El nuevo edificio de apartamentos se construyó con acero. English source: Steel is a strong gray metal. The new apartment building was made with steel.

English: swift Meaning: Ágil significa muy rápido y ligero en movimiento. Example: El caballo ágil saltó fácilmente la valla. English source: A swift person or animal is fast. The swift horse easily jumped over the hurdle.

English: toss Meaning: Lanzar es tirar algo suavemente por el aire o hacia un lugar. Example: Lanzó una moneda al aire. English source: To toss something is to throw it softly. He tossed a coin into the air.

English: triumph Meaning: Triunfo es ganar o la emoción de una victoria. Example: Al final de su discurso, levantó el premio en señal de triunfo. English source: Triumph is the act or feeling of winning. He raised the award in triumph at the end of his speech.

English: aboard Meaning: A bordo significa en un barco o avión. Example: Subieron a bordo de la canoa y remaron río abajo. English source: Someone aboard a ship or plane is in or on it. They climbed aboard the kayak and paddled through the river.

English: bitter Meaning: Amargo también describe una actitud resentida o enojada por algo. Example: Se puso muy amargo cuando se rompió su computadora. English source: A bitter person feels upset or angry about something. He was extremely bitter when his computer crashed.

English: bullet Meaning: Una bala es un proyectil pequeño de metal disparado de un arma. Example: Las balas tienen distintos tamaños según el arma. English source: A bullet is a small metal object that is shot out of a gun. Bullets come in different sizes for different guns.

English: devil Meaning: El diablo es un espíritu maligno muy poderoso en algunas religiones. Example: La iglesia prometió protección contra el diablo. English source: The devil is a powerful evil spirit in some religions. The church promised protection from the devil.

English: drift Meaning: Derivar es moverse lentamente impulsado por el viento o el agua. Example: El gran bloque de hielo derivó por el agua. English source: To drift means to be moved slowly by wind or water. The large chunk of ice drifted in the water.

English: enforce Meaning: Hacer cumplir significa obligar a respetar una norma. Example: La policía hace cumplir las leyes de tránsito para mantener la seguridad. English source: To enforce means to make a person follow a rule. Police enforce traffic laws to keep everyone safe.

English: fountain Meaning: Una fuente es una estructura creada por el ser humano que lanza agua. Example: Había una hermosa fuente en medio del parque. English source: A fountain is a source of water made by people. There was a beautiful fountain in the middle of the park.

English: harbor Meaning: Un puerto es una zona costera protegida donde atracan los barcos. Example: Había algunos barcos pequeños en el puerto. English source: A harbor is an area of water along a shore where boats land. There were a few small boats in the harbor.
English: inhabit Meaning: Habitar significa vivir en un lugar. Example: Nadie habita la ciudad antigua. English source: To inhabit means to live in a certain place. No one inhabits the ancient city.

English: march Meaning: Marchar significa caminar ordenadamente con un paso constante junto a otros. Example: Los soldados marcharon en filas rectas. English source: To march means to walk at a steady pace together with others. The soldiers marched in straight rows.

English: millionaire Meaning: Un millonario es una persona que posee al menos un millón de dólares. Example: Se volvió millonario porque manejó bien su dinero. English source: A millionaire is a person who has at least a million dollars. He became a millionaire because he was smart with his money.

English: port Meaning: Un puerto es un lugar donde los barcos atracan para cargar o descargar. Example: El barco se estaba cargando con materiales en el puerto. English source: A port is a place where ships stop to load and unload things. The ship was being loaded with materials at the port.

English: sheriff Meaning: Un alguacil o sheriff es un agente que supervisa la seguridad de una zona amplia. Example: Era tarea del alguacil mantener la ciudad segura. English source: A sheriff is a police officer who is in charge of a large area. It was the sheriff’s job to make the city safe.

English: startle Meaning: Sorprender de golpe es asustar bruscamente a alguien. Example: El fuerte ruido sorprendió a la mujer dormida. English source: To startle means to scare someone suddenly. The loud crash startled the sleeping woman.

English: sweat Meaning: Sudar es perder agua por la piel durante el esfuerzo o el calor. Example: Cuando voy al gimnasio, sudo bastante. English source: To sweat means to lose liquid from the body through the skin. Whenever I go to the gym, I sweat quite a bit.

English: trigger Meaning: El gatillo es la pieza de un arma que se aprieta para disparar. Example: El hombre tenía el dedo en el gatillo del arma. English source: A trigger is the part of a gun that a person pulls to make it fire. The man had his finger on the trigger of the gun.

English: unify Meaning: Unificar significa unir personas o cosas para hacerlas una sola parte. Example: Con sus buenas acciones, los niños intentaron unificar al mundo. English source: To unify means to bring people or things together. With their good deeds, the children tried to unify the world.

English: vessel Meaning: Un buque es una embarcación grande como un barco. Example: Recorrimos la zona a bordo de un buque de lujo. English source: A vessel is a large ship or boat. We toured the area aboard a luxury vessel.

English: voyage Meaning: Un viaje es un trayecto largo por barco o avión. Example: Los astronautas partieron en un largo viaje a la luna. English source: A voyage is a long journey made on a boat or an aircraft. The astronauts took off on a long voyage to the moon.

English: worship Meaning: Adorar es venerar o rendir honor a alguien o a Dios. Example: Muchas personas en el mundo adoran en una iglesia. English source: To worship means to like and honor a person, thing, or religious figure. Many people around the world worship in a church.

English: apprentice Meaning: Un aprendiz aprende un oficio bajo la guía de un experto. Example: Mark es aprendiz de chef en el restaurante. English source: An apprentice is a person who learns how to do a job from a skilled person. Mark is an apprentice chef at the restaurant.

English: assure Meaning: Asegurar significa decir algo con certeza para calmar preocupaciones. Example: Aseguró al jefe que el edificio estaría listo a tiempo. English source: To assure people is to tell them something is true to make them less worried. He assured the boss that the building would be done on time.

English: bandage Meaning: La venda es una tela que se usa para detener el sangrado. Example: Si te cortas, busca una venda en el botiquín. English source: A bandage is a piece of cloth used to stop bleeding. If you cut yourself, please get a bandage from the first-aid kit.

English: bleed Meaning: Sangrar es perder sangre por el cuerpo. Example: Si no tienes cuidado, te cortarás el dedo y sangrarás. English source: To bleed is to lose blood. If you are not careful, you will cut your finger and bleed.

English: bond Meaning: Un vínculo es una relación de cercanía o amistad entre personas. Example: Las mujeres hicieron vínculo tras varias horas de conversación. English source: To bond with someone is to become friends with that person. The women bonded after several hours of conversation.

English: chef Meaning: El chef es la persona que cocina en un restaurante. Example: Tom es chef en el restaurante de cerca de mi casa. English source: A chef is a person who cooks in a restaurant. Tom is a chef at the restaurant near my house.

English: crown Meaning: La corona es la tiara o adorno real de rey o reina. Example: La corona está hecha de oro. English source: A crown is the hat worn by a king or queen. The crown is made of gold.

English: departure Meaning: La partida es el acto de partir o irse de un lugar. Example: Estaban emocionados por su partida de regreso a casa. English source: A departure is the act of leaving a place. They were excited about their departure to go to go back home.

English: diligent Meaning: Diligente significa trabajador y cuidadoso. Example: Craig siempre ha sido una persona muy diligente en el trabajo. English source: A diligent person works hard and is careful. Craig has always been a very diligent person at work.

English: emperor Meaning: El emperador es el gobernante supremo de un imperio o varias tierras. Example: El emperador Julio César controlaba la antigua Roma. English source: An emperor is the leader of a group of countries. The emperor Julius Caesar was in control of ancient Rome.

English: fiber Meaning: La fibra es un hilo fino de un material usado para tejer o hacer cuerda. Example: La esterilla estaba hecha con fibras diminutas. English source: A fiber is a thread of a substance used to make clothes or rope. The mat was made from tiny fibers.

English: horrible Meaning: Horrible significa muy malo, desagradable o terrible. Example: La tarea fue horrible; la odié. English source: A horrible thing is very bad. The assignment was horrible. I hated it.

English: impolite Meaning: Descortés significa falto de educación o grosero. Example: Roger es descortés con todo el que conoce. English source: An impolite person is rude, or not polite. Roger is impolite to everyone he meets.

English: kneel Meaning: Arrodillarse es ponerse de rodillas, normalmente para suplicar o rezar. Example: Daryl se arrodilló en una rodilla y le pidió matrimonio a Nina. English source: To kneel is to put one or both knees on the ground. Daryl kneeled down on one knee and asked Nina to marry him.

English: luxury Meaning: Un lujo es algo caro, cómodo y no esencial. Example: Nuestro resort de luna de miel fue un verdadero lujo que disfrutamos mucho. English source: A luxury is an expensive thing that is nice but not needed. Our honeymoon resort was a luxury we really enjoyed.
English: massive Meaning: Masivo significa de gran tamaño o escala. Example: Las ruedas de su camión eran masivas. English source: A massive thing is very big. The wheels on his truck were massive.

English: panic Meaning: El pánico es un miedo intenso que impide pensar con claridad. Example: Todos entraron en pánico cuando la casa se incendió. English source: To panic is to feel so nervous or afraid that one cannot think clearly. Everyone panicked when the house caught on fire.

English: priority Meaning: Prioridad es aquello que se considera más importante que otras cosas. Example: Mi prioridad es sacar buenas notas en la escuela. English source: A priority is something that is more important than other things. My priority is to get good grades in school.

English: robe Meaning: Una túnica es una prenda larga y suelta. Example: Los monjes del templo todos llevan túnicas. English source: A robe is a long, loose piece of clothing. The monks at the temple all wear robes.

English: scold Meaning: Regañar es reprender con firmeza a alguien por una falta. Example: El profesor regañó a Jesse por no prestar atención. English source: To scold means to criticize someone angrily for doing something wrong. Jesse was scolded by the teacher for not paying attention.

English: affair Meaning: Un asunto o evento es una actividad o hecho importante ocurrido. Example: Mi esposa y yo asistimos a un evento formal el fin de semana. English source: An affair is an event or a thing that happened. My wife and I attended a formal affair over the weekend.

English: assembly Meaning: Una asamblea es un grupo reunido para tratar un tema. Example: Los estudiantes tuvieron una asamblea para hablar de sus intereses. English source: An assembly is a group gathered together for the same reason. The students had an assembly to talk about their interests.

English: bless Meaning: Bendecir es pedir protección o pedir por alguien en un sentido religioso. Example: El ángel bendijo al recién nacido para mantenerlo seguro. English source: To bless is to ask God for protection or help. The angel blessed the newborn baby to keep it safe.

English: cereal Meaning: El cereal es un alimento de desayuno hecho con granos y se come con leche. Example: El cereal es un desayuno rápido y común en EE UU. English source: Cereal is a breakfast food made from grains that is eaten with milk. Cereal is a fast and common breakfast food enjoyed in the US.

English: cheerful Meaning: Alegre es una persona feliz y de buen ánimo. Example: Los niños estaban alegres porque no tenían que ir a la escuela. English source: A cheerful person is happy and pleasant. The children were cheerful because they didn’t have to go to school.

English: diameter Meaning: El diámetro de un objeto redondo es la distancia entre dos lados opuestos pasando por el centro. Example: El diámetro del árbol era de unos 60 centímetros. English source: The diameter of a round thing is the length across its center. The diameter of the tree was about 60 centimeters.

English: exploit Meaning: Explotar significa usar algo o a alguien en beneficio propio de forma abusiva. Example: La empresa explota a sus trabajadores y les hace trabajar 12 horas diarias. English source: To exploit something is to use it for greedy reasons rather than good reasons. The company exploits their workers and makes them work 12 hours a day.

English: famine Meaning: Hambruna es un período prolongado de escasez de alimentos. Example: Los agricultores no pudieron cultivar nada en el suelo seco, así que hubo una hambruna. English source: A famine is a long time with little or no food. The farmers couldn’t grow any food in the dry soil, so there was a famine.

English: harvest Meaning: La cosecha es el acto de recolectar productos agrícolas. Example: Tuvieron mucho trigo tras la última cosecha. English source: A harvest is the act of collecting food from farming. They had a lot of wheat from the last harvest.

English: merry Meaning: Alegre significa contento y animado. Example: Se sintieron alegres porque el tiempo estaba muy bueno. English source: A merry person is happy and pleasant. They felt merry because the weather was great.

English: nut Meaning: Una nuez es la semilla dura de ciertos árboles o arbustos comestible. Example: Para comer una nuez, primero debes romper su cáscara. English source: A nut is a hard seed or fruit that comes from some trees and bushes. To eat a nut, you must first crack its shell.

English: pardon Meaning: El perdón es la acción de excusar o no guardar rencor por una falta o pregunta. Example: ¿Perdón, profesora, pero podría repetir lo que dijo? English source: To pardon is to not be angry at someone for asking a question or for making a mistake. Pardon me teacher, but could you repeat what you just said?

English: pharaoh Meaning: El faraón era el rey del antiguo Egipto. Example: Los faraones gobernaron Egipto durante miles de años. English source: A pharaoh was a king in ancient Egypt. The pharaohs ruled Egypt for thousands of years.

English: ripe Meaning: Maduro significa listo para comer por su grado de maduración. Example: Las cerezas estaban dulces y maduras. English source: A ripe fruit or vegetable is ready to be eaten. The cherries were nice and ripe.

English: roast Meaning: Asar es cocinar con calor seco, en horno o fuego. Example: Mamá asó un pavo para la cena de Navidad. English source: To roast something is to cook it in an oven or over a fire. Mom roasted a turkey for the holiday dinner.

English: routine Meaning: La rutina es una secuencia de acciones que se repite cada día. Example: La rutina diaria de mi padre incluye afeitarse antes del desayuno. English source: A routine is a way of doing things that is the same every time. My father’s daily routine includes shaving right before breakfast.

English: scheme Meaning: Un plan o esquema es una estrategia para lograr algo. Example: Jason y Mark idearon un plan para resolver el problema. English source: A scheme is a plan or design. Jason and Mark came up with a scheme to solve the problem.

English: slim Meaning: Delgado significa delgado y de poca grasa o volumen. Example: Mira mi celular nuevo. Es muy delgado. English source: A slim person or thing is thin, not thick. Look at my new cell phone. It’s very slim.

English: stove Meaning: Una estufa es un artefacto para cocinar alimentos. Example: Nuestra nueva estufa nos ayuda a cocinar mucho más rápido. English source: A stove is a device used to cook food. Our new stove helps us to cook food much faster than before.

English: theft Meaning: El robo es el acto ilegal de quitar algo de propiedad de otro. Example: El robo de su televisor ocurrió mientras estaba en el trabajo. English source: A theft is a criminal act that involves someone stealing something. The theft of his TV took place when he was at work.

English: adolescent Meaning: Un adolescente es un joven en la etapa de la adolescencia. Example: El adolescente estaba feliz por recibir un monopatín de cumpleaños. English source: An adolescent is a young person or a teenager. The adolescent was excited about getting a skateboard for his birthday.

English: aptitude Meaning: La aptitud es una habilidad natural para hacer algo con facilidad. Example: Tiene una aptitud natural para practicar esquí acuático. English source: Aptitude is a natural ability or skill. He has a natural aptitude for water skiing.

English: compliment Meaning: Un elogio es decir algo bueno sobre alguien o algo. Example: Su compañera de trabajo le dio un elogio por hacer un buen trabajo. English source: To compliment is to say a nice thing about someone or something. Her co-worker complimented her for doing a good job.

English: hinder Meaning: Obstaculizar es dificultar que alguien haga algo. Example: Todo el tráfico me obstaculizó para llegar al trabajo a tiempo. English source: To hinder is to stop someone or something from doing something. All the traffic hindered me from getting to work on time.

English: journalism Meaning: El periodismo es la actividad de recoger y difundir noticias en medios de comunicación. Example: Antes de ser maestra, ella trabajaba en el periodismo. English source: Journalism is the work of collecting the news to put in newspapers or on TV. Before becoming a teacher, she worked in journalism.

English: jury Meaning: El jurado es el grupo que evalúa un juicio y emite un veredicto. Example: El jurado escuchó atentamente al abogado antes de decidir. English source: A jury is a group of people that listen to a trial and say if someone is guilty. The jury listened closely to the attorney before they made their decision.

English: justice Meaning: La justicia es el trato justo y equitativo hacia las personas. Example: La gente acude a los tribunales para buscar justicia. English source: Justice is fairness in the way that people are treated. People turn to the court system when they are seeking justice.

English: liberty Meaning: La libertad es poder hacer lo que se desea dentro de la ley. Example: Para mucha gente, la Estatua de la Libertad es símbolo de libertad. English source: Liberty is freedom to do what one wants. To many people, the Statue of Liberty is a symbol of freedom.

English: literary Meaning: Literario se refiere a lo relacionado con la literatura. Example: Trabajó duro para crear una carrera literaria exitosa. English source: A literary person or thing is involved with literature in some way. He worked hard to create a successful literary career.

English: pharmacy Meaning: Una farmacia es un establecimiento donde se venden medicamentos. Example: Mi madre vende medicamentos en la farmacia. English source: A pharmacy is a place where medicine is sold. My mother sells medicine to people at the pharmacy.

English: pill Meaning: Una pastilla es un pequeño comprimido con medicamento. Example: Se tomó una pastilla para el dolor de cabeza. English source: A pill is a small object that has medicine inside. She took a pill for her headache.

English: presume Meaning: Presumir significa pensar que algo es cierto sin tener prueba suficiente. Example: Como la niña levantó la mano, el profesor presumió que conocía la respuesta. English source: To presume is to believe something is true without being certain. Since the girl raised her hand, the teacher presumed she knew the answer.

English: privacy Meaning: La privacidad es estar libre de la mirada de otros. Example: Pon el cartel en la puerta para que tengamos algo de privacidad. English source: Privacy is the state of being happily away from other people. Please hang the sign on the door so we can have some privacy.

English: punishment Meaning: El castigo es una sanción por una mala conducta o falta. Example: Le dieron un castigo por ser grosero con el profesor. English source: A punishment is something that one must endure for any wrongdoing. He was given a punishment for being rude to the teacher.

English: sensible Meaning: Sensato significa razonable y práctico. Example: Fue sensato de su parte ahorrar algo de dinero cada mes. English source: A sensible person or thing is good and smart. It was sensible for her to save some money each month.

English: slice Meaning: Una rebanada es un trozo delgado de un alimento. Example: La niña disfrutó de una rebanada de tarta en su cumpleaños. English source: A slice is a piece from something larger, such as a cake. The girl enjoyed a slice of cake at her birthday party.

English: sorrow Meaning: La tristeza es un sentimiento de dolor emocional intenso. Example: La niña sintió mucha tristeza cuando su mejor amiga se mudó. English source: Sorrow is a very sad feeling. The girl felt sorrow after her best friend moved away.

English: straw Meaning: Una pajita es un tubito para sorber líquido con la boca. Example: Tomé el jugo de naranja con una pajita. English source: A straw is a thin tube that is used to suck liquid into the mouth. I drank the orange juice through a straw.

English: swell Meaning: Hinchase significa aumentar de tamaño o volumen. Example: El estómago de mi hermana empezó a hincharse cuando quedó embarazada. English source: To swell is to become larger and rounder. My sister’s stomach began to swell after she got pregnant.

English: tidy Meaning: Ordenado significa limpio y con todo en su lugar. Example: León siempre ha sido un chico muy ordenado. English source: A tidy place or person is clean and in order. Leon has always been a very tidy boy.

English: affection Meaning: El afecto es el sentimiento de cariño hacia alguien o algo. Example: Amanda tiene mucho afecto por su hermanita Sarah. English source: Affection is a feeling of liking someone or something. Amanda has a lot of affection for her little sister, Sarah.

English: agency Meaning: Una agencia es una empresa que presta un servicio en nombre de otros. Example: Fui a una agencia de viajes para organizar mi vuelo de regreso. English source: An agency is a business or service set up to act for others. I went to a travel agency to help me arrange a flight home.

English: ash Meaning: La ceniza es un polvo gris o negro que queda al quemar algo. Example: La boquilla de su cigarro estaba llena de ceniza. English source: Ash is the grey or black powder created when something is burned. The end of his cigar was full of ashes.

English: confine Meaning: Confinar significa mantener o limitar algo en un lugar determinado. Example: El elefante está confinado a una jaula en el zoológico. English source: To confine something is to keep it in one place. The elephant is confined to a cage in the zoo.

English: dismiss Meaning: Rechazar una idea es no aceptarla o tomarla por insignificante. Example: Rechazó rápidamente mi idea sobre el nuevo proyecto. English source: To dismiss something is to say it is not important. He quickly dismissed my idea about the new project.

English: erupt Meaning: Erupcionar es expulsar material o energía de forma violenta, como un volcán. Example: El volcán erupcionó por primera vez en diez años. English source: To erupt is to explode or blow apart, especially a volcano. The volcano erupted for the first time in ten years.

English: fate Meaning: El destino es la fuerza o camino que determina lo que sucederá. Example: Algunas personas creen que las líneas de la mano revelan el destino. English source: Fate is a power that causes things to happen. Some people believe that the lines on a person’s hand can tell his or her fate.

English: lava Meaning: La lava es roca fundida muy caliente que sale de un volcán. Example: La lava ardiente salió del volcán. English source: Lava is the hot substance made of melted rock that comes out of volcanoes. The red-hot lava poured from the volcano.

English: miserable Meaning: Miserable significa muy triste y con poco ánimo. Example: Él estaba miserable después de que su perro murió. English source: A miserable person is very unhappy. He was miserable after his dog died.

English: navigate Meaning: Controlar la dirección o el rumbo de algo. Example: Ella navegó el barco por el océano. English source: To navigate something is to control the way it moves or goes. She navigated the ship across the ocean.

English: originate Meaning: Proceder o comenzar en un lugar u origen. Example: La idea de la democracia se originó en la Antigua Grecia. English source: To originate somewhere is to start there. The idea of democracy originated in Ancient Greece.

English: remainder Meaning: Lo que queda después de que se ha quitado algo. Example: Tomó un bocado de la manzana y me dio el resto. English source: The remainder of something is what is left. He took a bite of the apple and then gave me the remainder of it.

English: retrieve Meaning: Encontrar algo y traerlo de vuelta. Example: Ella recuperó su correo del buzón. English source: To retrieve something is to find it and get it back. She retrieved her mail from the mailbox.
English: shallow Meaning: Poco profundo, en poca profundidad. Example: Los niños jugaban en agua somera. English source: A shallow thing is not deep. The kids were playing in the shallow water.

English: slope Meaning: Terreno que no es plano, que sube o baja. Example: La pendiente hacia la cima de la montaña era muy empinada. English source: A slope is ground that is not flat. The slope to the top of the mountain was very steep.

English: span Meaning: Extenderse por un período de tiempo o espacio. Example: Su trabajo en la panadería abarcó veinte años. English source: To span is to spread across an amount of time or space. His work at the bakery has spanned twenty years.

English: superstition Meaning: Creencia irracional de que algo mágico es real. Example: Creen que el viernes 13 es un día de mala suerte. English source: A superstition is something magical that people believe is real. It is a superstition that Friday the 13th is an unlucky day.

English: sympathy Meaning: Sentimiento de pena o compasión por alguien. Example: Sentí simpatía por mi hermana y le compré un globo para animarla. English source: Sympathy is a feeling of sadness for another person who feels bad. I felt sympathy for my sister, so I got her a balloon to cheer her up.

English: vibrate Meaning: Sacudirse o moverse rápidamente. Example: La máquina hizo que todo su cuerpo vibrara. English source: To vibrate is to shake very hard. The machine made his whole body vibrate as he broke up the ground.

English: wander Meaning: Caminar sin rumbo o objetivo fijo. Example: A los niños les gusta deambular por el bosque. English source: To wander is to walk without going to a certain place. The boys like to wander in the woods and look at birds.

English: armor Meaning: Protección de metal que llevan algunos soldados. Example: El soldado llevaba armadura para protegerse. English source: Armor is metal worn by soldiers to protect the body. The soldier wore armor to protect his body.

English: blaze Meaning: Arder con gran intensidad y brillo. Example: El fuego pequeño se convirtió en una gran llama brillante. English source: To blaze means to burn brightly or powerfully. The small fire soon blazed into a large, dangerous one.

English: boom Meaning: Sonido fuerte y profundo. Example: Los petardos hicieron un gran estruendo al explotar. English source: To boom means to make a loud, deep sound. The firecrackers made a loud boom when they exploded.

English: cliff Meaning: Gran pared de roca alta y casi vertical. Example: El lobo se quedó junto al acantilado y aulló. English source: A cliff is a high and often flat wall of rock. The wolf stood at the cliff and howled.

English: flame Meaning: Parte de un fuego que brilla. Example: La antorcha tenía llamas amarillas y anaranjadas. English source: A flame is part of a fire. The torch was filled with yellow and orange flames.

English: independence Meaning: Estado de ser libre de control de otros. Example: Después de mudarse, Sophia sintió una gran independencia. English source: Independence is the state of being free from the control of others. After leaving home, Sophia had a great feeling of independence.

English: invasion Meaning: Ataque de un grupo desde otro país o lugar. Example: En Corea construían muros para protegerse de invasiones. English source: An invasion is an attack by a group from another country. In Korea, walls were built around cities to protect them from invasions.

English: knight Meaning: Soldado de alto rango que suele servir a un rey. Example: El rey lo convirtió en un caballero. English source: A knight is a soldier of high rank and skill who usually serves a king. He was the best soldier, so the king made him a knight.

English: lightning Meaning: Luz intensa que aparece durante una tormenta. Example: El relámpago brilló sobre el agua. English source: Lightning is the bright light seen during a storm. The lightning flashed above the water.

English: rebel Meaning: Persona que se opone al gobierno para cambiarlo. Example: El rebelde estaba enojado por las políticas injustas del gobierno. English source: A rebel is a person who fights the government in order to change it. The rebel was angry about the government’s unfair policies.

English: retreat Meaning: Alejarse o retroceder en una pelea. Example: El ejército se retiró porque perdía la batalla. English source: To retreat means to run away because of losing a fight. The army retreated because they were losing the battle.

English: revolution Meaning: Cambio político profundo realizado por un grupo de personas. Example: La revolución en Rusia llevó a la creación de la Unión Soviética. English source: A revolution is a change to the political system by a group of people. The revolution in Russia led to the creation of the Soviet Union.

English: spear Meaning: Arma larga con hoja en un extremo. Example: El soldado llevaba una lanza en la mano. English source: A spear is a long stick with a blade on one end that is used as a weapon. The soldier was holding a spear in his hand.

English: steep Meaning: Con fuerte inclinación o desnivel. Example: Él subió su bici por la colina empinada. English source: A steep surface or place has a slope or angle that rises or falls sharply. He rode his bike up the steep hill to reach the top.

English: summit Meaning: Parte más alta de una colina o montaña. Example: La nieve cubría la cumbre de la montaña. English source: A summit is the highest part of a hill or mountain. Snow covered the summit of the mountain even during the summer.

English: thunder Meaning: Ruido fuerte de una tormenta. Example: El sonido del trueno me sorprendió. English source: Thunder is the loud noise heard during a storm. The sound of the thunder startled me.

English: troops Meaning: Grupo de soldados que luchan juntos. Example: Las tropas estaban preparadas para ir a la batalla. English source: Troops are soldiers that fight in groups in a battle. The troops were all prepared to go into battle.

English: warrior Meaning: Soldado o luchador valiente. Example: Los samuráis eran guerreros muy hábiles. English source: A warrior is a brave soldier or fighter. The samurai were some of the most skilled warriors in the ancient world.

English: withdraw Meaning: Apartarse o regresar de un lugar, especialmente en guerra. Example: El enemigo se retiró a su propio país. English source: To withdraw means to leave a place, usually during war. After losing the battle, the enemy withdrew back to its own country.

English: yield Meaning: Dar el control o entregar algo. Example: Tuvo que ceder su turno. English source: To yield something means to give up control of it or to give it away. He had to yield his turn because he was in checkmate.

English: bench Meaning: Asiento largo para dos o más personas. Example: La mayoría de los parques tienen bancos para descansar. English source: A bench is a long seat for two or more people. Most parks have benches for people to relax upon.

English: daisy Meaning: Flor pequeña de pétalos blancos y centro amarillo. Example: Había algunas margaritas creciendo en el campo. English source: A daisy is a small flower with white petals and a yellow center. There were a few daisies growing in the field.

English: dispute Meaning: Desacuerdo o discusión entre personas. Example: Karen y Brian suelen tener disputas por cosas tontas. English source: A dispute is an argument or disagreement that people have. Karen and Brian often have disputes about silly things.

English: empty Meaning: Que no tiene nada en su interior. Example: La maestra mostró a los alumnos una botella vacía. English source: An empty container is one that has no things in it. The teacher showed the students an empty bottle.

English: horror Meaning: Sentimiento de miedo o terror intenso. Example: El público gritó de horror cuando apareció el fantasma. English source: Horror is a feeling of being very afraid or shocked. The audience screamed in horror when the ghost appeared in the movie.

English: incident Meaning: Suceso, generalmente desagradable, que ocurre de forma aislada. Example: El señor Wilson tuvo un incidente: se enfermó y tuvo que irse. English source: An incident is an event that is usually not pleasant. Mr. Wilson had an incident; he became sick and had to leave.

English: mist Meaning: Agua visible en el aire o sobre una superficie. Example: El bosque estaba cubierto de niebla. English source: Mist is water that can be seen in the air or on a surface. The forest was covered with mist.

English: object Meaning: Cosa no viva que se puede ver o tocar. Example: El carro estaba lleno de objetos. English source: An object is a non-living thing that you can see or touch. The shopping cart was filled with objects.

English: orphan Meaning: Niño o niña sin padres. Example: El huérfano lloraba mucho por la noche. English source: An orphan is a child who does not have parents. The orphan frequently cried during the night.

English: plot Meaning: Planear en secreto algo malo o dañino. Example: El grupo tramaba arruinar los informes financieros de la empresa. English source: To plot is to make a secret plan to do something that is wrong or mean. The group was plotting to ruin the company’s financial reports.

English: pregnant Meaning: Mujer o animal que espera un bebé. Example: La mujer embarazada compraba ropa para el bebé. English source: A pregnant woman or animal is going to have a baby. The pregnant woman was shopping for baby clothes.

English: rage Meaning: Sentimiento de enojo intenso. Example: El chef estaba lleno de furia cuando sus ayudantes arruinaron la comida. English source: Rage is a very angry feeling. The chef was filled with rage when his helpers ruined the meal.

English: revenge Meaning: Acción de hacer daño a quien te lastimó. Example: Le rompió la muñeca a su hermana por venganza. English source: Revenge is the act of hurting someone who has hurt you. He broke his sister’s doll as revenge after she lost his favorite book.

English: shame Meaning: Mal sentimiento por algo hecho mal. Example: El niño sintió vergüenza por perder su ropa. English source: Shame is a bad feeling about things one has done wrong. The boy felt shame about misplacing his clothes.

English: sigh Meaning: Expirar fuerte para mostrar cansancio, tedio o tristeza. Example: Molly suspiró al ver toda la información que debía investigar. English source: To sigh is to breathe out loudly to show tiredness, boredom, or sadness. Molly sighed when she looked at all the information she had to research.

English: sneak Meaning: Entrar o moverse en silencio para no ser visto o oído. Example: El ladrón se escabulló de la casa sin que nadie lo notara. English source: To sneak is to move quietly in order not to be seen or heard. The thief snuck out of the house without anyone noticing him.

English: spare Meaning: Ceder algo que no se necesita. Example: Quería ayudarlo, pero no pude regalarle una llanta. English source: To spare something is to give it away because it is not needed. I wanted to help him but I couldn’t spare a tire.

English: stem Meaning: Parte de una planta que sostiene hojas o flores. Example: La rosa tenía un tallo largo y delgado. English source: The stem of a plant is the stick that grows leaves or flowers. The rose had a long thin stem.

English: supper Meaning: Comida que se toma por la tarde-noche. Example: Solemos cenar alrededor de las seis. English source: Supper is a meal that is eaten in the evening. We usually have supper around 6 o’clock at my house.

English: tender Meaning: Suave y fácil de masticar. Example: La carne estaba tan tierna que no necesitaban cuchillos para cortarla. English source: A tender food is soft and easy to chew. The meat was so tender they didn’t need knives to cut it.

English: beneath Meaning: En posición inferior o bajo algo. Example: La parte más grande del iceberg está debajo de la línea del agua. English source: Beneath means under or lower than. The largest part of an iceberg lies beneath the waterline.

English: cub Meaning: Joven de un animal como un león o un oso. Example: El cachorro de león lloraba por su madre. English source: A cub is a baby animal, such as a bear or lion. The lion cub was crying for its mother.

English: dawn Meaning: Hora en que sale el sol. Example: Al amanecer, el sol apareció suavemente sobre la granja. English source: Dawn is the time of day when the sun rises. At dawn, the sun gently rose over the farm.

English: dissatisfied Meaning: No estar contento con algo. Example: Estoy insatisfecho con su decisión de trabajar el domingo. English source: Dissatisfied means not happy with something. I was dissatisfied with their decision to work on Sunday.

English: ease Meaning: Estado sin dificultad o esfuerzo. Example: El mono subió al árbol con facilidad. English source: Ease is a condition without difficulty or hard work. The monkey climbed the tree with ease.

English: evident Meaning: Fácil de ver o comprender. Example: Era evidente por su expresión que estaba descontento. English source: Evident means easy to see or understand. It was evident from the look on his face that he was unhappy.

English: hail Meaning: Hielo que cae del cielo cuando la lluvia se congela. Example: El granizo de la tormenta tenía tamaño de bolas de golf. English source: Hail is ice that falls from the sky when rain freezes. The hail from the storm was the size of golf balls.

English: howl Meaning: Lanzar un sonido largo y fuerte como un lobo. Example: El lobo aulló a la luna. English source: To howl means to make a long, loud sound like a wolf or a dog. The wolf howled at the moon.

English: leap Meaning: Dar un salto largo. Example: Tuvo que saltar el hueco para llegar al otro lado. English source: To leap means to jump a long distance. He had to leap over the gap to reach the other side of the hill.

English: magnificent Meaning: Muy bello o grandioso. Example: Le dio a su esposa unos aretes de diamantes magníficos. English source: Magnificent means beautiful and grand. The man gave his wife a pair of magnificent diamond earrings.

English: necessity Meaning: Cosa necesaria o imprescindible. Example: El agua dulce es una necesidad para la vida. English source: A necessity is something that is needed. Fresh water is a necessity for life.

English: outcome Meaning: Conclusión o fin de una acción o evento. Example: El resultado de su último plan de negocios fue un fracaso total. English source: An outcome is the end result of an action or event. The outcome of his latest business plan was a complete failure.

English: pile Meaning: Acopio grande de cosas una sobre otra. Example: La pila de tazas empezaba a inclinarse. English source: A pile is a large group of things on top of one another. The pile of cups was beginning to lean.

English: profound Meaning: Muy intenso o reflexivo. Example: Para un joven, Jeremy tiene pensamientos profundos. English source: Profound means deep or very intelligent. For a young man, Jeremy has some profound thoughts.

English: seize Meaning: Tomar algo con fuerza y rapidez. Example: El hombre agarró tanto dinero como pudo antes de que alguien lo viera. English source: To seize something means to grab it quickly or strongly. The man seized as much money as he could before anyone could see him.

English: squeeze Meaning: Presionar algo fuertemente hasta compactarlo. Example: Cuando Clara vio a su gato, lo apretó contra su cara. English source: To squeeze something means to press it together and hold it tightly. When Clara saw her cat, she squeezed it to her face.

English: supreme Meaning: De nivel o calidad más alta. Example: El oficial supremo estaba a cargo de calmar a los ciudadanos. English source: Supreme means of the highest level or best quality. The supreme officer was in charge of keeping the citizens calm.
English: terrific Meaning: Muy bueno o excelente. Example: Mi hija menor es una pintora estupenda. English source: Something terrific is very good. My youngest daughter is a terrific painter.

English: trait Meaning: Característica de la personalidad. Example: Un rasgo de la personalidad de Salvador es su alegría. English source: A trait is part of someone’s personality. One trait of Salvador’s personality is his cheerfulness.
English: vital Meaning: Esencial para la vida. Example: El corazón es un órgano vital. English source: Something vital is necessary for life. The heart is a vital organ.

English: attack Meaning: Hacer daño o dañar algo o alguien. Example: Ella vio al lagarto atacar a su presa. English source: To attack something is to hurt or damage it. She watched the lizard attack its prey.

English: breast Meaning: Parte blanda del torso de la mujer; también glándula mamaria. Example: Fue diagnosticada con cáncer de pecho. English source: A breast is one of the two soft parts on a woman’s chest. She was diagnosed with breast cancer.

English: cancer Meaning: Enfermedad grave por crecimiento celular anormal. Example: Era un científico líder buscando una cura para el cáncer. English source: Cancer is a serious disease that causes cells to grow abnormally. He was a leading scientist in finding a cure for cancer.

English: cancerous Meaning: Que está relacionado con el cáncer o lo contiene. Example: El examen halló células cancerígenas en la sangre del paciente. English source: Cancerous cells are the result of cancer. The exam found cancerous cells in the patient’s blood.

English: cell Meaning: Unidad mínima de los seres vivos. Example: Un glóbulo rojo es una célula que lleva oxígeno. English source: A cell is the smallest part of a living thing that can live by itself. A red blood cell carries oxygen.

English: cigarette Meaning: Tubo de papel fino lleno de tabaco que se fuma. Example: Fumar cigarrillos es terrible para la salud. English source: A cigarette is a thinly wrapped paper tube filled with tobacco that is smoked. Cigarette smoking is terrible for your health.

English: code Meaning: Conjunto de símbolos para ocultar o leer un mensaje. Example: Ella usó el código para resolver el rompecabezas. English source: A code is a set of symbols used to hide or read a message. She used the code to solve the puzzle.
