English: cure Meaning: Tratamiento médico para eliminar una enfermedad. Example: Los científicos buscan una cura para la diabetes. English source: A cure is a medical treatment to make a sickness go away. Scientists are still working on finding a cure for diabetes.

English: destruction Meaning: Estado de algo dañado o arruinado. Example: Los incendios dejaron el bosque en ruinas. English source: To damage something is to cause its destruction. The wildfires left the forest in a state of destruction.

English: DNA Meaning: Sigla de ácido desoxirribonucleico. Example: La policía a veces usa ADN para resolver crímenes. English source: DNA is the short form of deoxyribonucleic acid. The police sometimes use DNA to solve crime.

English: extensive Meaning: Grande o amplio en tamaño o cantidad. Example: El juego obtuvo una cobertura mediática extensa. English source: Extensive means large in size or amount. The game drew extensive media coverage.

English: female Meaning: Relacionado con mujeres o niñas. Example: Es la única mujer de su clase con el pelo corto. English source: Female refers to women or girls. She is the only female student in her class with short hair.

English: furthermore Meaning: Además, se añade más información. Example: Es inteligente y, además, no le teme al trabajo. English source: Furthermore means more information will be added. She’s clever, and furthermore, she is not afraid of work.

English: gene Meaning: Parte de la información genética que determina rasgos. Example: La terapia genética a veces se usa para tratar una enfermedad. English source: A gene controls what it looks like, how an organism grows, and how it develops. Gene therapy is sometimes used to treat an illness.

English: inherit Meaning: Recibir algo que se recibe de un familiar. Example: Todas las chicas de mi familia heredaron el pelo rojo de mi bisabuela. English source: To inherit is to receive something that is passed down from a relative. All the girls in my family inherit red hair from my great-grandmother.

English: link Meaning: Conexión con otra cosa. Example: Los dos versos del poema comparten un mismo enlace. English source: A link is a connection to something else. The two lines in the poem share a common link.
English: male Meaning: Relacionado con hombres o niños. Example: Era el único masculino en la tienda. English source: Male refers to men or boys. He was the only male in the store.

English: population Meaning: Conjunto de personas que viven en un lugar. Example: La población de nuestra ciudad crece de forma constante. English source: A population is all the people living in an area. The population of our city is steadily growing.

English: result Meaning: Algo que ocurre como consecuencia de otra cosa. Example: El resultado de su experimento fue sorprendente. English source: A result happens because of something else. The result of her experiment was surprising.

English: sugar Meaning: Sustancia dulce usada para dar sabor a los alimentos. Example: Añadió más azúcar a su té. English source: Sugar comes from plants and is used to make food taste sweet. She added extra sugar to her tea.

English: accommodate Meaning: Tener espacio suficiente para algo o alguien. Example: La sala de reuniones puede acomodar a nueve personas. English source: To accommodate is to have enough room. The meeting room can accommodate nine people.

English: circus Meaning: Espectáculo ambulante con animales y artistas. Example: Me gusta ir al circo a ver cómo hacen trucos los animales. English source: A circus is a traveling show with animals and people. I like to go to the circus to see the animals do tricks.
English: coincide Meaning: Suceder al mismo tiempo. Example: Mi cumpleaños coincide con Navidad. English source: To coincide means to happen at the same time. My birthday coincides with Christmas.

English: commission Meaning: Pagar a alguien para que haga un trabajo. Example: Al artista se le encomendó crear una pintura. English source: To commission someone is to pay that person to do some job. The artist was commissioned to create a picture.

English: dose Meaning: Cantidad de medicina tomada de una vez. Example: Mi madre me dio una dosis de medicina antes de acostarme. English source: A dose is a certain amount of medicine taken at one time. My mother gave me a dose of medicine before I went to bed.

English: dye Meaning: Dar color a algo mediante un químico. Example: Ayer Valery se tiñó el pelo en el salón. English source: To dye something is to make it a certain color by using a special chemical. Valery got her hair dyed at the salon yesterday.

English: extent Meaning: Qué tan grande, importante o serio es algo. Example: Comió hasta tal extensión que engordó. English source: The extent of something is how large, important, or serious it is. He ate to such an extent that he became overweight.

English: gender Meaning: Categoría que describe si alguien es niño o niña. Example: ¿Sabes el género de su nuevo bebé? English source: Gender is a category that describes being either a boy or a girl. Do you know the gender of her new baby?

English: headline Meaning: Título principal de una noticia. Example: El titular de portada era sobre la economía. English source: A headline is the title of a newspaper story. The headline on the front page was about the economy.

English: informal Meaning: Casual y relajado, no oficial. Example: Tuvieron una reunión informal para hablar de sus experiencias. English source: An informal thing is casual and relaxed, not official. They had an informal meeting to talk about their experiences.

English: inquire Meaning: Solicitar información sobre algo. Example: Papá llamó para preguntar el precio de las entradas del espectáculo. English source: To inquire about something is to ask about it. Dad called to inquire about the price of tickets for the show.

English: messenger Meaning: Persona que lleva información de un lugar a otro. Example: El mensajero llevó un documento importante a la oficina. English source: A messenger is one who carries information from one place to another. The messenger delivered an important document to the office.

English: peer Meaning: Observar algo con atención. Example: Ella miró atentamente a la gente por la ventana. English source: To peer at something is to watch it carefully. She peered at people through the window.

English: portrait Meaning: Pintura o foto de una persona. Example: Vi muchos retratos religiosos en el museo. English source: A portrait is a painting or photograph of someone. I saw many religious portraits when I went to the museum.

English: pose Meaning: Permanecer en una posición sin moverse. Example: Los niños y su perro posaron para una foto. English source: To pose is to stay in one place without moving. The kids and their dog posed for a picture.

English: ranch Meaning: Granja grande donde se crían animales. Example: Mi tío tiene muchos caballos en su rancho. English source: A ranch is a large farm where animals are kept. My uncle has many horses on his ranch.

English: steer Meaning: Controlar hacia dónde va algo. Example: Condujo el carrito alrededor de la pista. English source: To steer something is to control where it goes. He steered the go-cart around the track.

English: stripe Meaning: Línea ancha de color o tono. Example: La bandera de Estados Unidos tiene franjas rojas y blancas. English source: A stripe is a thick line. The flag of the United States has red and white stripes.

English: tame Meaning: Animal al que no le da miedo estar cerca de personas. Example: El ave mansa descansaba en su mano. English source: A tame animal is not afraid to be near people. The tame bird rested in his hand.

English: tempt Meaning: Ofrecer algo atractivo que alguien no debería tener. Example: No tenía hambre, pero me tentó con un trozo de mi pastel favorito. English source: To tempt people is to offer them something they want but shouldn’t have. I wasn’t hungry, but she tempted me with a piece of my favorite cake.
English: ban Meaning: Impedir que la gente haga algo. Example: Está prohibido fumar en este edificio. English source: To ban something is to not let people do it. Smoking is banned in this building.

English: cautious Meaning: Cuidado para evitar peligros. Example: Sé muy cauteloso al apilar esas cajas. English source: A cautious person is careful to avoid danger. Be very cautious as you stack those boxes.

English: confess Meaning: Reconocer una verdad mala o embarazosa. Example: La mujer confesó que había robado el dinero. English source: To confess is to admit a bad or embarrassing truth. The woman confessed that she had stolen the money.

English: cottage Meaning: Casa pequeña y vieja del campo. Example: Mi tía vive en una linda cabaña en las montañas. English source: A cottage is a small, old house in the countryside. My aunt lives in a pretty cottage in the mountains.

English: daytime Meaning: Horas del día con luz; tiempo de día. Example: Los niños solo pueden jugar afuera de día. English source: Daytime is the time of the day when the sky is light. The kids are only allowed to play outside in the daytime.

English: desperate Meaning: Persona que intenta cualquier cosa para cambiar algo. Example: Estoy desesperado por encontrar un nuevo trabajo. English source: A desperate person will try anything to do or change something. I’m desperate to find a new job.

English: exhausting Meaning: Muy cansador o fatigante. Example: Después de un viaje agotador, al fin llegamos. English source: An exhausting activity is very tiring. After an exhausting journey, we finally arrived.

English: fade Meaning: Volverse más débil o menos brillante. Example: La tela que encontré era vieja y estaba desvaída. English source: To fade is to become quieter or less bright. The piece of cloth I found was old and faded.

English: fierce Meaning: Muy agresivo o violento. Example: Los lobos son animales feroces. English source: A fierce person or animal is angry or violent. Wolves are fierce animals. Do not disturb them.

English: gamble Meaning: Jugar a juegos con dinero que se puede ganar o perder. Example: A mucha gente le gusta ir a casinos para apostar. English source: To gamble means to play a game that involves winning or losing money. Many people like to go to casinos to gamble.

English: lawn Meaning: Superficie cubierta de pasto. Example: Mi papá mantiene el césped de la casa muy prolijo. English source: A lawn is an area covered in grass. My dad keeps the lawn in front of our house very neat.

English: mow Meaning: Podar o segar el pasto para que quede corto. Example: Yo corto el césped cada fin de semana. English source: To mow grass is to cut it to make it short. I mow our lawn every weekend.

English: outlaw Meaning: Delincuente que se oculta de la policía. Example: La policía repartió carteles del forajido a todo el pueblo. English source: An outlaw is a criminal who hides from the police. The police passed out posters of the outlaw to all the people.

English: prospect Meaning: Posibilidad de que algo ocurra. Example: Despierta cada mañana con la posibilidad de tener un buen día. English source: A prospect is a possibility that something will happen. He wakes up every morning with the prospect of having a good day.

English: purse Meaning: Bolsa pequeña donde se guardan dinero y objetos personales. Example: A mi hermana le gusta comprar bolsos de diseñador. English source: A purse is a bag in which women keep money, makeup, keys, etc. My sister likes to buy designer purses.

English: rod Meaning: Palito delgado de madera o metal, por ejemplo para pescar. Example: Compré una caña nueva para pescar en vacaciones. English source: A rod is a thin stick made of wood or metal. I bought a new fishing rod to use while on vacation.

English: seldom Meaning: Que no ocurre a menudo. Example: Raramente llueve en el sur de Arizona. English source: Seldom shows that an action doesn’t happen very often. It seldom rains in southern Arizona.

English: shave Meaning: Cortar el vello de la cara con una herramienta. Example: Mi padre se afeita la barba todos los días para no tener barba. English source: To shave means to cut the hairs on one’s face with a sharp tool. My father shaves his face every day because he doesn’t want a beard.

English: terrified Meaning: Persona o animal con mucho miedo. Example: Cuando vi al fantasma, me aterrorizó por completo. English source: A terrified person or animal is extremely scared. When I saw the ghost, I was absolutely terrified!
English: wizard Meaning: Persona que puede hacer magia. Example: El mago hizo caer oro del cielo. English source: A wizard is a man who can do magic. The wizard made gold fall from the sky.

English: abroad Meaning: En otro país. Example: Mi amigo va de viaje al extranjero en verano. English source: An action done abroad is done in a different country. My friend is going on a summer trip abroad.

English: airline Meaning: Empresa que transporta personas por avión. Example: La aerolínea tiene excelente atención al cliente. English source: An airline is a company that takes people to different places by plane. The airline has excellent customer service.

English: audience Meaning: Grupo de personas que observa un espectáculo o acto. Example: Estaba feliz de formar parte de la audiencia. English source: An audience is a group of people who gather to watch someone do something. He was excited to be part of the audience.

English: bargain Meaning: Precio muy bueno o trato económico. Example: Ella esperaba encontrar una ganga buena en el supermercado. English source: A bargain is a very good price paid for a product. She was looking forward to getting a good bargain at the supermarket.
English: brief Meaning: Que dura poco tiempo. Example: Los abogados tomaron un breve descanso. English source: A brief action lasts a short time. The lawyers took a brief break.

English: currency Meaning: Dinero oficial que se usa en un país. Example: La moneda en China es distinta a la de Australia. English source: The currency of a country is the type of money used in that country. The currency in China is different from that in Australia.

English: data Meaning: Información y hechos recopilados. Example: Guardó todos los datos en su computadora. English source: Data is a collection of information and facts. He saved all the data on his computer.

English: domestic Meaning: Relacionado con lo que ocurre dentro de un país. Example: La aerolínea tiene cincuenta vuelos domésticos diarios. English source: Domestic refers to something that happens within a particular country. The airline has fifty domestic flights daily.

English: draft Meaning: Texto escrito que aún no está en versión final. Example: Él estaba escribiendo su primer borrador. English source: A draft is a piece of written work that is not in its final form. He was writing his first draft.

English: gather Meaning: Formar un grupo o juntar cosas/ personas. Example: Reuniremos a los niños antes de la reunión. English source: To gather is to form a group or bring together. We will gather the children before the meeting.

English: hobby Meaning: Actividad recreativa y creativa en el tiempo libre. Example: Le gustaba pintar como pasatiempo. English source: A hobby is a fun and creative activity people do in their free time. She liked to paint as a hobby.

English: income Meaning: Dinero ganado por el trabajo. Example: Ahorraba su ingreso para comprar una casa. English source: An income is the money you earned from work. She was saving her income to buy a house.
English: jet Meaning: Avión a reacción muy rápido. Example: Su empresa tiene un jet privado. English source: A jet is a fast plane with a big engine. Her company owns a private jet.

English: maximum Meaning: Cantidad más alta permitida. Example: La velocidad máxima de manejo aquí es de 80 km/h. English source: Maximum is the highest amount of anything allowed. The maximum driving speed here is 80 km/h.

English: official Meaning: Aprobado o validado por una autoridad. Example: Su título oficial se estaba tramitando. English source: An official thing is approved by someone in authority. Her official degree was being transferred.

English: recommend Meaning: Dar un consejo basado en experiencia. Example: Su médico recomendará el mejor medicamento para la tos. English source: To recommend means to give advice based on experience. His doctor will recommend the best medicine for her cough.

English: refer Meaning: Mencionar o llamar la atención sobre algo. Example: El señor Cid se refirió a la hora para mostrarle a Bill que llegaba tarde. English source: To refer to something means to mention or call attention to it. Mr. Cid referred to the time to show Bill that he was late for class.

English: remote Meaning: Lejos o distante de lugares cercanos. Example: Vivía en un pueblo remoto en el Himalaya. English source: A remote place is distant or far away. He lived in a remote village in the Himalayas.

English: sleepless Meaning: Período en el que alguien no duerme. Example: Jill pasó una noche en vela porque tenía muchas preocupaciones. English source: Sleepless describes a time period in which someone does not sleep. Jill had a sleepless night because she had so much on her mind.

English: volume Meaning: Cantidad total de algo. Example: El volumen de autos en el estacionamiento aumentaba constantemente. English source: The volume is the total amount of something. The volume of cars in the parking lot was steadily increasing.

English: circulate Meaning: Hacer que algo se distribuya, especialmente en torno a un espacio. Example: El ventilador ayudó a circular aire fresco en la sala. English source: To circulate is to spread something around, especially in a circular way. The fan helped to circulate cool air through the room.

English: consequent Meaning: Que ocurre a causa de otra situación. Example: El sarpullido resultante apareció después de tocar la planta venenosa. English source: Consequent means happening because of a different situation. Her consequent rash came after she touched the poisonous plant.

English: derive Meaning: Proceder o venir de algo o de un lugar. Example: El apodo de Red se derivó del color de su cabello. English source: To derive means to come, or originate, from a thing or place. Red’s nickname was derived from the color of her hair.

English: drown Meaning: Morir por no poder respirar bajo el agua. Example: Se habría ahogado si los marineros no lo hubieran rescatado. English source: To drown is to die from not being able to breathe underwater. He would have drowned if the sailors had not rescued him.

English: dynasty Meaning: Serie de gobernantes de una misma familia. Example: Los antiguos egipcios tuvieron una dinastía que duró muchos años. English source: A dynasty is a series of rulers who are all from the same family. The ancient Egyptians had a dynasty that lasted for many years.
English: fraction Meaning: Parte pequeña de un todo. Example: Sólo se había ido una fracción del pastel. English source: A fraction is a small part of something. Only a fraction of the cake was gone.

English: frost Meaning: Capa blanca de hielo en tiempo muy frío. Example: Por la mañana, los árboles estaban cubiertos de escarcha. English source: Frost is a white layer of ice that forms during very cold weather. In the morning, the trees were all covered with frost.

English: illusion Meaning: Algo que parece real pero no existe realmente. Example: Algunas imágenes crean una ilusión para los ojos. English source: An illusion is something that looks real, but doesn’t actually exist. Some pictures create an illusion for the eyes.

English: invade Meaning: Tomar una zona por la fuerza. Example: Las fuerzas enemigas intentaron invadir nuestro país desde el cielo. English source: To invade is to take over a place by force. The enemy forces tried to invade our country from the sky.

English: lieutenant Meaning: Rango militar o policial; persona con ese rango. Example: El teniente era un buen líder, y sus soldados lo respetaban. English source: A lieutenant is a rank in the military or police, or a person with that rank. The lieutenant was a good leader, and his soldiers respected him.

English: marine Meaning: Relacionado con el mar o la vida marina. Example: Un océano sano está lleno de animales marinos. English source: Marine describes something related to the sea. A healthy ocean is full of marine animals.

English: merit Meaning: Cualidad positiva o buena. Example: El actor recibió un premio por su mérito en la película. English source: A merit is a positive or good quality. The actor received an award for his merits in the movie.

English: navy Meaning: Fuerza militar que combate por mar. Example: Mi país es conocido por su armada fuerte. English source: A navy is the part of a country’s military that fights at sea. My country is known for our strong navy.

English: polar Meaning: Relacionado con las regiones frías del norte y sur de la Tierra. Example: Pocas personas viven en la región polar del norte. English source: Polar relates to the cold places on Earth’s north and south ends. Only a few people live in the Earth’s northern polar region.

English: ray Meaning: Haz de luz que sale de un objeto brillante. Example: Los cálidos rayos del sol cubrieron la playa. English source: A ray is a line of light that comes from a bright object. The sun’s warm rays covered the beach.

English: resign Meaning: Dejar voluntariamente un trabajo. Example: Después de renunciar oficialmente, me despedí de mi jefe. English source: To resign means to quit a job. After I officially resigned from work, I said goodbye to my boss.

English: suicide Meaning: Acto de quitarse la propia vida. Example: Algunas personas se sienten tan tristes que piensan que el suicidio es la única salida. English source: Suicide is the act of killing oneself. Some people feel so sad that they think suicide is the only answer.

English: tremble Meaning: Sacudirse por emoción o frío. Example: A Harry no le gustaba el frío, así que tembló casi todo el día. English source: To tremble is to shake as a result of excitement or cold weather. Harry was not used to the cold, so he trembled most of the day.

English: underlying Meaning: Causa o motivo oculto. Example: Su miedo subyacente a volar redujo sus opciones de viaje. English source: An underlying thing is a hidden cause or reason. Her underlying fear of flying reduced her traveling options.

English: via Meaning: Por medio de; a través de. Example: Llegamos a la ciudad desde el aeropuerto vía tren. English source: Via introduces a route or means of travel. We arrived in the city from the airport via the train.

English: alter Meaning: Cambiar algo. Example: Cambié el color de mis uñas para que coincidiera con mi pelo. English source: To alter something means to change it. I altered the color of my nails to match my hair.

English: aside Meaning: Hacia el costado o apartado. Example: El hombre se quedó a un lado y abrió la puerta para mí. English source: An action done aside is done toward the side of something or someplace. The man stood aside and opened the door for me.

English: autumn Meaning: Estación entre verano e invierno. Example: Me encanta que caigan hojas en otoño porque puedo jugar con ellas. English source: Autumn is the season of the year between summer and winter. I love when the leaves fall in autumn because I can play in them.

English: blend Meaning: Unir dos o más cosas para que sean una sola cosa. Example: Mi esposa mezcló todos los ingredientes para preparar un guiso delicioso. English source: To blend is to mix two or more things together so that they become one thing. My wife blended together all of the ingredients to make a delicious stew.

English: collapse Meaning: Caer de repente y derrumbarse. Example: El árbol se colapsó justo frente a nuestra casa. English source: To collapse is to fall down suddenly. The tree collapsed right in front of our house.

English: crush Meaning: Presionar algo hasta deformarlo o destruirlo. Example: El coche nuevo de Selena fue aplastado cuando el árbol cayó encima. English source: To crush something is to press it together so its shape is destroyed. Selena’s new car was crushed when the tree fell on top of it.

English: curve Meaning: Moverse en una línea que dobla y no es recta. Example: La carretera curvaba hacia la izquierda y la derecha. English source: To curve is to move in a line that bends and does not go straight. The road curves to the left and to the right.

English: disgusting Meaning: Muy desagradable. Example: Después de correr todo el día, Greg tenía un olor repugnante en los pies. English source: A disgusting thing is very unpleasant. After running all day, Greg’s feet had a disgusting odor.

English: drain Meaning: Tubería que evacua agua de un edificio. Example: El agua del fregadero baja por el desagüe al lavarse las manos. English source: A drain is a pipe that carries away water from a building, such as in a kitchen .The water in the sink goes down the drain as you wash your hands.

English: embrace Meaning: Dar un abrazo, tomar en brazos y abrazar. Example: Cuando se vieron de nuevo, la pareja feliz se abrazó. English source: To embrace is to hug. When they saw each other again, the happy couple embraced.

English: envy Meaning: Deseo por algo que tiene otra persona. Example: Sally envidiaba a la pareja feliz. English source: To envy someone is to wish that you had something that other person has. Sally envied the happy couple.

English: fireworks Meaning: Objetos que producen luces de colores al encenderse. Example: El espectáculo de fuegos artificiales fue precioso. English source: Fireworks are objects that create colored lights when they are lit. The display of fireworks was so beautiful.

English: flour Meaning: Polvo de plantas usado para hacer pan o repostería. Example: Quería hornear una tarta, pero necesitaba harina. English source: Flour is a powder made from plants that is used to make foods like bread. I wanted to bake a pie, but I needed flour.

English: fuse Meaning: Cuerda de fuego que arde para provocar la explosión. Example: El niño encendió la mecha del cohete y esperó a que explotara. English source: A fuse is a string on fireworks that burns to make them explode. The boy lit the fuse on the rocket and waited for it to burst in the sky.

English: ginger Meaning: Raíz usada para dar sabor dulce y picante a la comida. Example: El jengibre es un ingrediente común en muchos platos de la India. English source: Ginger is a root of a plant that is used to make food spicy and sweet. Ginger is a common ingredient in many dishes from India.

English: jealous Meaning: Persona que desea lo que otro posee. Example: Miriam estaba celosa porque Sue prestaba mucha atención a Jim. English source: A jealous person might take something from you. Miriam was jealous because Sue was paying too much attention to Jim.

English: paste Meaning: Sustancia espesa y suave. Example: Mi hijo necesitó pasta para un proyecto escolar. English source: A paste is a thick and smooth substance. My son needed some paste for a school project.

English: receipt Meaning: Documento que prueba una compra o recepción. Example: Al ver mi recibo, me di cuenta de que había gastado demasiado dinero. English source: A receipt is a paper that proves that something was received or bought. After looking at my receipt, I realized that I had spent too much money.

English: wipe Meaning: Frotar con un paño para quitar suciedad. Example: Ella limpió el polvo de las ventanas. English source: To wipe something is to slide a piece of cloth over it to clean it. She wiped the dust from the windows.

English: wire Meaning: Hilo delgado y flexible de metal. Example: Los cables estaban conectados a torres que traían electricidad a la ciudad. English source: A wire is a thin string made out of metal. The wires were connected to towers that brought electricity to the city.

English: acknowledge Meaning: Aceptar que algo es cierto o existe. Example: La maestra reconoció que la estudiante joven tenía hambre. English source: To acknowledge something is to accept that it is true or that it exists. The teacher acknowledged that the young student was hungry.

English: ambassador Meaning: Funcionario que representa a un gobierno en otro país. Example: El embajador de Corea dirigía la conferencia. English source: An ambassador is a government worker who works in another country. The ambassador from Korea was in charge of the conference.
English: blonde Meaning: Persona de cabello claro. Example: Mi prima es rubia y tiene ojos azules. English source: A blonde is a person with light-colored hair. My cousin is a blonde with blue eyes.

English: conquer Meaning: Atacar y tomar control de un lugar. Example: Los soldados intentaban conquistar el mundo. English source: To conquer a place means to attack and take control of it. The soldiers were trying to conquer the world.

English: drag Meaning: Tirar algo sobre el suelo. Example: El perro arrastraba a su dueño por la calle. English source: To drag something means to pull it across the ground. The dog was dragging his owner down the street.

English: exaggerate Meaning: Decir algo más grande o mejor de lo real. Example: Jimmy no exageraba sobre la gravedad de su lesión. English source: To exaggerate is to say that something is bigger or better than it really is. Jimmy wasn’t exaggerating about the seriousness of his injury.

English: heritage Meaning: Conjunto de rasgos culturales de una sociedad. Example: Las tipis forman parte del patrimonio de los nativos de las llanuras. English source: Heritage is the collection of features of a society, such as language and religion. Teepees are part of the heritage of the Native Americans of the plains.

English: insult Meaning: Decir cosas para herir sentimientos. Example: Las niñas se insultaban toda la tarde. English source: To insult someone is to say things that will hurt the person’s feelings. The girls insulted each other all afternoon.

English: meanwhile Meaning: Al mismo tiempo que otra acción ocurre. Example: Quiere ser médico en el futuro, pero mientras tanto trabaja en un empleo común. English source: An action that happens meanwhile happens at the same time as another action. He wants to be a doctor in the future, but meanwhile, he works a regular job.

English: necklace Meaning: Un collar es una pieza de joyería que se lleva alrededor del cuello. Example: Joyce recibió un hermoso collar de perlas por su aniversario de bodas. English source: A necklace is a piece of jewelry that people wear around their necks. Joyce received a lovely pearl necklace for her wedding anniversary.

English: noble Meaning: Un noble es una persona rica y poderosa. Example: La reina invitó a un noble de un país cercano a cenar. English source: A noble is a rich and powerful person. The Queen invited a noble from a nearby country to dinner.

English: precious Meaning: Algo precioso es valioso e importante. Example: En un desierto, el agua puede ser más preciosa que el dinero. English source: A precious thing is valuable and important. In a desert, water can be more precious than money.

English: prejudice Meaning: Un prejuicio es una opinión injusta sobre personas basada en el grupo al que pertenecen. Example: Las reglas contra el prejuicio de género de la empresa deben aplicarse. English source: A prejudice is an unfair opinion about people based on the group they belong to. The company’s rules against gender prejudice must be enforced.

English: rumor Meaning: Un rumor es una historia que puede no ser cierta. Example: Carla estaba difundiendo rumores en la oficina. English source: A rumor is a story that may not be true. Carla was spreading rumors around the office.

English: sin Meaning: Un pecado es algo que se considera incorrecto por razones religiosas. Example: Tomar algo que no te pertenece es un pecado. English source: A sin is something that is wrong for religious reasons. Taking something that doesn’t belong to you is a sin.

English: spectacle Meaning: Un espectáculo es algo increíble de contemplar. Example: Las cataratas del Niágara son un espectáculo impresionante. English source: A spectacle is an amazing sight. Niagara Falls is quite a spectacle.

English: stack Meaning: Una pila es una cantidad de cosas una encima de otra. Example: Había una pila de papeles en su escritorio por completar. English source: A stack is a pile of different things. There was a stack of paperwork on his desk to complete.

English: suspicious Meaning: Una persona sospechosa no confía en otros, o no se la considera confiable. Example: Papá desconfiaba de la persona que llamaba. English source: A suspicious person does not trust others, or is not trusted by others. Dad was suspicious of the caller on the line.
English: tin Meaning: El estaño es un metal económico. Example: La sopa suele venderse en latas de estaño. English source: Tin is an inexpensive metal. Soup is a food that is often sold in tin cans.

English: vase Meaning: Un jarrón es un recipiente bonito para poner flores. Example: El jarrón estaba lleno de flores hermosas. English source: A vase is an attractive container in which people keep flowers. The vase was filled with such lovely flowers.

English: ache Meaning: Doler significa sentir o causar dolor. Example: La cabeza de Mindy le dolía porque se golpeó contra la pared. English source: To ache is to hurt, or cause pain. Mindy’s head ached because she bumped it against the wall.

English: arctic Meaning: Lo ártico se refiere a algo del frío extremo del norte de la Tierra. Example: Hace frío cuando soplan los vientos árticos. English source: Arctic shows that something is of or from the cold, far-north part of the Earth. It is cold when the arctic winds blow.

English: canal Meaning: Un canal es un camino por el que viaja el agua. Example: Venecia tiene muchos canales. English source: A canal is a path for water to travel through. The city of Venice, Italy, has many canals.

English: chemist Meaning: Un químico es un científico que trabaja con químicos. Example: Mi madre es una química que ayuda a inventar nuevos productos. English source: A chemist is a scientist who works with chemicals. My mother is a successful chemist who helps invent new products.

English: chill Meaning: El frío intenso se siente como escalofríos. Example: El frío del viento helado hizo que Bill temblara. English source: A chill is a feeling of cold. The chill from the cold wind made Bill shiver.

English: congress Meaning: Un congreso es un grupo de líderes de un gobierno. Example: El congreso crea leyes que la gente debe seguir. English source: Congress is a group of leaders in a government. Congress makes laws for people to follow.

English: dairy Meaning: Lácteo significa que algo está hecho de leche. Example: Leche y queso son alimentos lácteos. English source: Dairy shows that something is made from milk. Things like milk and cheese are dairy foods.

English: descend Meaning: Descender es ir hacia abajo. Example: Bajé las escaleras para salir del edificio. English source: To descend is to go downward. I descended the stairs to get out of the building.

English: grocer Meaning: Un tendero es una persona que vende comida. Example: Nuestro tendero, el Sr. Smith, es muy amable. English source: A grocer is a person who sells food. Our grocer, Mr. Smith, is a very kind man.

English: hesitate Meaning: Dudar es esperar un momento antes de hacer algo. Example: Él dudó un momento antes de decidir qué elegir. English source: To hesitate is to wait for a short time before doing something. He hesitated for a moment before he decided which one to choose.

English: institution Meaning: Una institución es una organización que ayuda a una ciudad o a un grupo de personas. Example: Los bancos son instituciones que la gente y las empresas usan cada día. English source: An institution is an organization that works to help a city or group of people. Banks are vital institutions that businesses and people use every day.
English: jog Meaning: Trotar es correr despacio. Example: Él trota todos los días para estar más sano. English source: To jog is to run slowly. He jogs every day so he can be healthier.

English: merchant Meaning: Un comerciante es una persona que vende cosas. Example: El comerciante estaba vendiendo autos usados. English source: A merchant is a person who sells things. The merchant was selling used cars.

English: poke Meaning: Pinchar algo es empujarlo rápido con el dedo o un objeto puntiagudo. Example: Me pinché el dedo con una chincheta. English source: To poke something is to push something quickly with your finger or a pointed object. I poked my finger on a thumb tack.

English: postpone Meaning: Posponer algo es hacerlo más tarde de lo previsto. Example: Pospusieron la reunión hasta que llegó Elena. English source: To postpone something is to make it happen later than planned. They postponed the meeting until Elena arrived.

English: splash Meaning: Salpicar es chocar y hacer que el líquido se extienda. Example: La pintura verde se salpicó por el suelo. English source: To splash is to crash into something so that liquid spreads out. Some green paint splashed upon the floor.

English: stubborn Meaning: Una persona terco no cambia de opinión fácilmente. Example: Ambos de mis padres son tercos; nunca ceden. English source: Stubborn people don’t change their minds easily. Both of my parents are stubborn. They never give in to each other.

English: suburb Meaning: Un suburbio es una zona de una ciudad grande. Example: Crecí en los suburbios, a pocos minutos de la ciudad. English source: A suburb is a small part of a large city. I grew up in the suburbs, only a few minutes outside of the city.

English: tide Meaning: La marea es el nivel del agua en el mar. Example: La marea seguía subiendo en la playa poco a poco. English source: The tide is the level of the water in the sea. The tide continued to crawl upon the beach little by little.

English: tragedy Meaning: Una tragedia es un suceso muy triste. Example: Fue una tragedia cuando su casa fue alcanzada por un rayo y se quemó. English source: A tragedy is a very sad event. It was a tragedy when his house was struck by lightning and burned.

English: bomb Meaning: Una bomba es un objeto que explota y destruye áreas grandes. Example: La bomba destruirá cualquier cosa cercana. English source: A bomb is an object that explodes and destroys large areas. The bomb will destroy anything that is nearby.

English: certificate Meaning: Un certificado es un documento que dice que algo es verdad o ocurrió. Example: Recibí un certificado por completar el curso de informática. English source: A certificate is a document that says that something is true or happened. I was given a certificate for completing the computer course.

English: circumstance Meaning: Una circunstancia es un hecho o situación que influye en algo. Example: Hubo muchas circunstancias detrás de su éxito, como el trabajo duro. English source: A circumstance is an event that makes a situation what it is. There were many circumstances behind their success, like hard work.

English: coffin Meaning: Un ataúd es una caja en la que se entierran personas muertas. Example: Cuando alguien fallece, suele ser enterrado en un ataúd. English source: A coffin is a box used to bury dead people. When people pass away, they are usually buried inside of a coffin.

English: cope Meaning: Lidiar con algo difícil significa enfrentarlo y sobrellevarlo. Example: Él afronta el estrés del trabajo haciendo ejercicio varias veces por semana. English source: To cope with a difficult or stressful situation means to deal with it. He copes with work stress by exercising three or four times a week.

English: criticism Meaning: La crítica es decir que algo no está bien o no es correcto. Example: Ella recibió mucha crítica sobre su nuevo plan. English source: Criticism is the act of saying that something is not correct or good. She had a lot of criticism about their new plan.

English: devastate Meaning: Devastar algo significa causar gran daño. Example: El muro entero quedó devastado. English source: To devastate something is to cause great damage or pain to that thing. The entire wall was devastated.

English: frown Meaning: Fruncir el ceño significa poner una expresión de disgusto en el rostro. Example: Melissa frunció el ceño cuando supo que la fiesta se canceló. English source: To frown is to make an unhappy look with one’s face. Melissa frowned when she found out that the party had been cancelled.

English: gaze Meaning: Contemplar algo es mirarlo durante bastante tiempo. Example: Usamos un telescopio para contemplar las estrellas durante una hora. English source: To gaze at something means to look at it for a long time. We used a telescope to gaze at the stars for over an hour.

English: glance Meaning: Mirar de un vistazo es hacerlo rápido y de forma breve. Example: Ella miró detrás de sí para ver si él la miraba. English source: To glance at something means to look at it quickly. She glanced behind her to see if he was looking at her.

English: grief Meaning: La pena es una sensación profunda de tristeza. Example: La pena causada por la muerte de sus padres le resultó muy dura. English source: Grief is the feeling of deep sadness, usually when a person dies. The grief caused by losing her parents was very difficult for her.

English: groom Meaning: Un novio es el hombre que va a casarse. Example: El novio parecía feliz mientras caminaba con su nueva esposa. English source: A groom is a man who is going to be married. The groom looked happy as he walked with his new wife.

English: license Meaning: Una licencia es un documento oficial que da permiso para hacer algo. Example: En Estados Unidos necesitas una licencia de conducir para manejar legalmente. English source: A license is an official document that gives one permission to do something. In the United States, you need a driver’s license to drive legally.

English: microscope Meaning: Un microscopio es un aparato que agranda objetos pequeños. Example: Los gérmenes no se ven sin un microscopio. English source: A microscope is a device that makes small objects look bigger. Germs cannot be seen without a microscope.

English: nuclear Meaning: Nuclear se relaciona con la división o unión de átomos. Example: Las plantas nucleares proporcionan energía económica a las ciudades. English source: A nuclear thing relates to the division or joining of atoms. Nuclear power plants provide inexpensive energy to cities.

English: portray Meaning: Retratar algo significa describirlo o mostrarlo en una imagen. Example: Su retrato mostró la casa en la que creció de niña. English source: To portray something means to describe it or show it in a picture. Her picture portrayed the house she grew up in when she was little.

English: rotate Meaning: Rotar algo significa hacerlo girar en círculo. Example: Las hélices de un avión rotan rápido para que pueda volar. English source: To rotate something means to turn it around in a circle. An airplane’s propellers rotate quickly to help it fly.

English: souvenir Meaning: Un recuerdo es algo comprado para recordar un lugar o evento. Example: Compré una muñeca rusa como recuerdo en mi viaje a Moscú. English source: A souvenir is something bought to remember of a place or event. I bought a Russian doll as a souvenir on my trip to Moscow.

English: submarine Meaning: Un submarino es un barco que puede estar bajo el agua mucho tiempo. Example: El submarino se sumergió para que el enemigo no lo viera. English source: A submarine is a boat that can go underwater for long periods of time. The submarine dove under the sea so the enemy couldn’t see it.

English: trace Meaning: Trazar algo significa seguir su forma con la vista o el dedo. Example: Trazó el gráfico con su dedo. English source: To trace something means to follow over it with the eyes or a finger. He traced over the graph with his finger.

English: coastline Meaning: La línea de costa es el contorno de una costa. Example: Notó que la mayoría de las ciudades de Australia están en la costa. English source: A coastline is the outline of a country’s coast. He noticed that most of the cities in Australia are on the coastline.

English: deter Meaning: Disuadir significa prevenir o desalentar a alguien de hacer algo. Example: Las carreteras heladas disuaden a la gente de conducir. English source: To deter means to prevent or discourage someone from doing something. Icy roads deter people from driving their cars.

English: devise Meaning: Idear algo significa inventar una idea o plan. Example: Los ladrones idearon un plan para robar los diamantes. English source: To devise something means to come up with an idea or plan about it. The thieves devised a plan to steal the diamonds.

English: distance Meaning: La distancia es lo lejos que hay entre dos puntos. Example: La distancia entre América y Rusia es de unos 8.000 km. English source: A distance is how far it is between two points. The distance between America and Russia is about 8,000 km.

English: expertise Meaning: La experiencia es el conocimiento y las habilidades para hacer algo bien. Example: Juan tiene mucha experiencia en publicidad. Puede vender cualquier cosa. English source: Expertise is the knowledge and skills to do something well. John has a lot of advertising expertise. He can sell anything!

English: fracture Meaning: Una fractura es una grieta o rotura en algo. Example: No te apoyes en esa pierna: tiene una fractura. Puede empeorar. English source: A fracture is a crack or break in something. Don’t stand on that leg because there is a fracture. It might get worse.

English: headache Meaning: Un dolor de cabeza es dolor en la cabeza. Example: Mi hermana tiene dolor de cabeza cuando está muy estresada. English source: A headache is a pain in one’s head. My sister gets a headache every time she has a lot of stress.

English: implement Meaning: Implementar algo significa hacer realidad lo que se planeó. Example: La escuela decidió implementar una nueva estrategia de enseñanza. English source: To implement something means to ensure that what has been planned is done. The school decided to implement a new teaching strategy.

English: insight Meaning: La perspicacia es una comprensión profunda y precisa de algo. Example: El libro de física le dio al estudiante una nueva idea sobre la gravedad. English source: Insight is a deep and accurate understanding of something. The physics textbook gave the student a new insight about gravity.

English: limb Meaning: Un miembro grande de un árbol es una rama. Example: El mono se sentó en una rama y disfrutó de una fruta. English source: A limb is a large branch on a tree. The monkey sat on the tree limb and enjoyed a piece of fruit.

English: might Meaning: La fuerza es poder o energía para hacer algo. Example: Usa toda tu fuerza para levantar la llanta pesada. English source: Might means strength or power. Try with all your might to lift the heavy tire.

English: optimism Meaning: El optimismo es estar esperanzado sobre el futuro. Example: La madre tenía optimismo sobre el futuro de sus hijos. English source: Optimism is the state of being hopeful about the future. The mother had optimism about her children’s futures.

English: proficient Meaning: Proficiente significa capaz de hacer algo bien. Example: Las secretarias son muy competentes escribiendo rápido. English source: Proficient means able to do something well. Secretaries are proficient at typing quickly.

English: raft Meaning: Una balsa es un tipo de barco plano. Example: Él cruzó el océano Pacífico en una balsa. English source: A raft is a flat kind of boat. He sailed across the Pacific Ocean on a raft.

English: ridge Meaning: Una cresta es una franja alta y estrecha de tierra. Example: El oso marrón caminó por el borde de la cresta de la montaña. English source: A ridge is a long, narrow piece of raised land. The brown bear walked along the edge of the mountain ridge.

English: shoulder Meaning: El hombro es la parte del cuerpo entre el brazo y el cuello. Example: Llevó su bicicleta al hombro. English source: A shoulder is the body part between the top of the arm and the neck. He carried his bike on his shoulder.

English: shove Meaning: Empujar algo es moverlo con mucha fuerza. Example: Ella empujó a él para quitarle el paso. English source: To shove something is to push it with a lot of power. She shoved him out of the way.

English: spouse Meaning: Un cónyuge es la persona con la que alguien está casado. Example: Vivo con mi cónyuge y nuestros dos hijos. English source: A spouse is the person to whom someone is married. I live in a home with my spouse and our two children.

English: thrust Meaning: Impulsar significa empujar algo con mucha fuerza. Example: El boxeador impulsó su puño al saco de boxeo. English source: To thrust means to push or move something quickly with a lot of force. The boxer thrust his fist into the punching bag.

English: tolerate Meaning: Tolerar algo es poder aceptarlo aunque sea desagradable. Example: Cuando tienes prisa, es difícil tolerar los semáforos. English source: To tolerate something means to be able to accept it even when it is unpleasant. When you are in a hurry, it can be hard to tolerate traffic signals.

English: accountable Meaning: Cuando alguien es responsable, responde por los efectos de sus acciones. Example: Los líderes políticos son responsables ante la gente que representan. English source: When someone is accountable, he or she is responsible for the effects of his or her actions. Political leaders are accountable to the people they represent.

English: addictive Meaning: Algo adictivo es difícil de dejar. Example: Pienso que este juego es muy adictivo. English source: If something is addictive, it is hard to stop doing. I think this game is very addictive.

English: agenda Meaning: Una agenda es un plan o meta que guía la conducta. Example: El hombre insiste en empujar su agenda dudosa entre colegas. English source: An agenda is a plan or goal that guides someone’s behavior. The man is pushing his questionable agenda on his colleagues.

English: coin Meaning: Acuñar es crear una palabra o frase nueva que otros adoptan. Example: El entrenador acuñó la frase “No hay un yo en equipo”. English source: To coin is to create a new word or phrase that other people begin to use. The coach coined the phrase, “There is no ‘I’ in team.”

English: correlate Meaning: Correlacionar es tener una conexión cercana con algo. Example: Los científicos creen que el tamaño del cerebro podría correlacionar con la inteligencia. English source: To correlate is to have a close connection to something. Scientists believe that brain size might correlate with intelligence.

English: depression Meaning: La depresión es una condición médica que vuelve a una persona muy infeliz por mucho tiempo. Example: Ron decidió buscar ayuda por su depresión. English source: Depression is a medical condition that makes a person very unhappy for long periods of time. Ron decided to get help for his depression.

English: digital Meaning: Cuando algo es digital, está relacionado con la tecnología informática. Example: Los estudiantes prefieren tomar apuntes en laptops y otros dispositivos digitales. English source: When something is digital, it is characterized by computer technology. Students prefer to take notes on their laptops and other digital devices.

English: importance Meaning: Importancia es la calidad o estado de ser importante o valioso. Example: El profesor habló de la importancia de las estrategias de comunicación. English source: Importance is the quality or state of being important, valuable, or significant. The professor lectured the students on the importance of communication strategies.

English: keyboard Meaning: Un teclado tiene botones con letras y números para introducir datos. Example: Pablo se derramó el café sobre su teclado. English source: A keyboard has buttons marked with letters and numbers that are pressed to put information into a computer. Paul spilled coffee all over his keyboard.

English: loneliness Meaning: La soledad es la tristeza de no tener amigos. Example: Muchas personas se unen a clubes sociales para evitar la soledad. English source: Loneliness is the unhappiness that is felt by someone if they do not have any friends. Many people join social clubs to escape loneliness.

English: media Meaning: Los medios son formas de entretenimiento e información pública. Example: Muchas personas expresan opiniones en línea usando los medios sociales. English source: Media is the different ways of entertaining and giving information to the public. Many people like to express their opinions online using social media.

English: platform Meaning: Una plataforma permite hablar de ideas o productos a mucha gente. Example: La banda usa su música como plataforma para expresar sus ideas políticas. English source: A platform is something that allows someone to tell a large number of people about an idea, product, etc. The band uses their music as a platform to express their political beliefs.

English: poor Meaning: Cuando algo es pobre, no es tan bueno como debería ser. Example: El estado de la acera es muy pobre. English source: When something is poor, it is not as good as it could or should be. The condition of the sidewalk is very poor.

English: presence Meaning: La presencia es cuando alguien o algo está en un lugar. Example: La investigadora descubrió la presencia de bacterias en la muestra de agua. English source: Presence is when someone or something is present in a particular place. The researcher discovered the presence of bacteria in the water sample.

English: subject Meaning: Someter significa hacer que alguien o algo sufra algo. Example: La ubicación de los árboles los someterá a fuertes vientos del huracán. English source: To subject is to cause or force someone or something to experience something harmful or unpleasant. The location of the trees will subject them to strong winds from the hurricane.

English: surge Meaning: Una oleada es un aumento repentino y grande. Example: De repente hubo una oleada de corredores en la meta. English source: A surge is a sudden, large increase in something. All at once, there was a surge of runners at the finish line.

English: survey Meaning: Una encuesta es un conjunto de preguntas para muchas personas. Example: Completé una encuesta sobre mi experiencia de compra en la tienda. English source: A survey is a set of questions that are asked to a large number of people in order to find out about opinions. I filled out a survey about my shopping experience at the department store.

English: target Meaning: Apuntar es dirigir un ataque a alguien o algo. Example: Los científicos buscan nuevos fármacos para apuntar a las células cancerosas. English source: To target is to aim an attack at someone or something. Scientists are looking for new drugs to target cancer cells.

English: trend Meaning: Una tendencia es una tendencia general en cómo cambia una situación. Example: Lucy cree que ella inició está moda. English source: A trend is a general tendency in the way a situation is changing or developing. Lucy likes to think she started this fashion trend.

English: validate Meaning: Validar es hacer que alguien sienta que sus ideas y emociones son respetadas. Example: Ganar primer premio validará el esfuerzo de Tony. English source: To validate is to make someone feel that his or her ideas and feelings are respected. Winning first prize will validate all of Tony’s hard work.
English: carbon Meaning: El carbono es un elemento químico. Example: El carbono se encuentra en el carbón. English source: Carbon is a chemical element. Carbon is found in coal.

English: carbon dioxide Meaning: El dióxido de carbono es un gas formado por un átomo de carbono y dos de oxígeno. Example: Hay dióxido de carbono en el humo de las plantas de carbón. English source: Carbon dioxide is a gas made from one carbon atom and two oxygen atoms. There is carbon dioxide in the smoke from coal power plants.

English: dust Meaning: El polvo es polvo de tierra o arena muy pequeño y seco. Example: Algunas personas usan mascarillas médicas para no respirar polvo y gérmenes finos. English source: Dust is very small, dry particles of earth or sand. Some people wear medical face masks to avoid breathing in fine dust and germs.
English: emit Meaning: Emitir significa soltar gas, calor, luz o sonido. Example: Esta plancha emite vapor. English source: To emit is to send out gas, heat, light, sound, etc. This iron emits steam.

English: enable Meaning: Permitir es hacer posible que algo ocurra. Example: Estudiar mucho permitirá que ella consiga un buen trabajo. English source: To enable is to make it possible for something to happen. Studying hard will enable the girl to get a good job.

English: grind Meaning: Moler significa romper algo en piezas pequeñas o polvo. Example: Molimos trigo para hacer harina. English source: To grind is to break something into small pieces or powder. We grind wheat to make flour.

English: heal Meaning: Sanar significa volverse saludable de nuevo. Example: Esta pomada ayudará a sanar tus heridas. English source: To heal is to become healthy or well again. This ointment will help heal your wounds.

English: integrate Meaning: Integrar significa hacer que algo sea parte de algo más grande. Example: Cada vez más mujeres se integran en el ejército. English source: To integrate is to make something a part of another larger thing. More women are being integrated into the military.

English: leading Meaning: Algo líder es lo más avanzado o mejor. Example: Teresa es la experta líder en cirugía cerebral de perros. English source: When something is leading, it is the most advanced or best. Teresa is the leading expert on brain surgery for dogs.

English: moreover Meaning: Además se usa para añadir información que apoya lo dicho. Example: A Marianne le gusta caminar al trabajo para ahorrar dinero; además, es buen ejercicio. English source: Moreover is used to introduce information that adds to or supports what has previously been said. Marianne likes to walk to work to save money; moreover, it is good exercise.

English: object Meaning: Objetar es oponerse o desaprobar algo. Example: Los estudiantes objetan el aumento de la matrícula. English source: To object is to feel or say that you oppose or disapprove of something. The students object to raising the tuition.

English: pollutant Meaning: Un contaminante es una sustancia que vuelve el agua o el aire inseguros. Example: Un contaminante en el agua mató a estos peces. English source: A pollutant is a substance that makes the air or water not safe for use. A pollutant in the water killed this fish.

English: powder Meaning: El polvo es una sustancia seca en granos muy pequeños. Example: La cúrcuma es un polvo amarillo usado para cocinar. English source: Powder is a dry substance in the form of very small grains. Turmeric is a yellow powder used in cooking.

English: prompt Meaning: Provocar significa hacer que alguien haga algo. Example: La fecha límite estricta provocará que el trabajador trabaje muy duro. English source: To prompt is to cause someone to do something. The tight deadline will prompt the employee to work very hard.

English: reject Meaning: Rechazar es negarse a aceptar, creer o estar de acuerdo con algo. Example: Me temo que el profesor rechazará mi nueva idea. English source: To reject is to refuse to accept, believe in, or agree with something. I’m afraid the teacher will reject my new idea.

English: skeptic Meaning: Un escéptico es alguien que no cree una afirmación sin pruebas. Example: Kevin es escéptico porque nunca cree en nada o en nadie. English source: A skeptic is a person who disagrees with particular claims that are generally thought to be true. Kevin is a skeptic because he never believes anyone or anything.

English: substance Meaning: Una sustancia es un tipo de sólido, líquido o gas. Example: El arsénico es una sustancia venenosa. English source: A substance is a particular type of solid, liquid, or gas. Arsenic is a poisonous substance.

English: substantially Meaning: Si algo cambia mucho, cambia sustancialmente. Example: El precio del apartamento subió sustancialmente. English source: If something changes substantially, it changes a lot. The price of the apartment went up substantially.

English: ton Meaning: Una tonelada es una unidad de peso de 2000 libras o 907.2 kilos. Example: Ese camión puede cargar hasta 25 toneladas. English source: A ton is a unit for measuring weight equal to 2000 pounds or 907.2 kilograms. This dump truck can carry up to 25 tons.

English: transport Meaning: El transporte es el método para mover personas o mercancías de un lugar a otro. Example: Los barcos de carga se usan para el transporte de bienes. English source: Transport is the system or method of carrying passengers or goods from one place to another. Cargo ships are used for the transport of manufactured goods.

English: align Meaning: Alinear significa apoyar un grupo o país con quien estás de acuerdo. Example: La multitud parecía alinearse con los manifestantes. English source: To align is to support a political group, country, or person that you agree with. The crowd seemed to align themselves with the protestors.

English: authority Meaning: Una autoridad es alguien que puede tomar decisiones y hacer cumplir leyes. Example: La policía local es la autoridad cuando se reúne mucha gente. English source: An authority is someone who has the power to make decisions and enforce rules and laws. The local police department is the authority whenever large crowds gather.

English: barn Meaning: Un granero es un gran edificio de granja para guardar cultivos, equipos y animales. Example: Mis abuelos guardan heno en su granero rojo. English source: A barn is a large farm building that houses crops, equipment, and animals. My grandparents keep hay in their red barn.

English: betray Meaning: Traicionar es ser desleal con alguien que confía en ti. Example: Los cuatro amigos nunca traicionarían su confianza. English source: To betray is to be disloyal to someone who trusts you. The four friends would never betray each other’s trust.

English: Bible Meaning: La Biblia es el libro sagrado del cristianismo. Example: Leo la Biblia cada noche antes de dormir. English source: The Bible is the book of sacred writing in the Christian religion. I read the Bible every night before I go to sleep.

English: Catholic Meaning: Católico se relaciona con la Iglesia Católica Romana. Example: Rosanne es católica, así que va a misa cada domingo. English source: A Catholic thing or person is one that is connected with the Roman Catholic Church. Rosanne is Catholic, so she goes to church every Sunday.

English: cooperate Meaning: Cooperar es trabajar con alguien para lograr algo que ambos quieren. Example: Los miembros del equipo acordaron cooperar para terminar el proyecto. English source: To cooperate is to work with someone to achieve something that you both want. The members of the team agreed to cooperate in order to get the project done.

English: detain Meaning: Detener es impedir oficialmente que alguien se vaya de un lugar. Example: La policía tuvo que detener al ladrón por robar en la tienda. English source: To detain is to officially prevent someone from leaving a place. The police had to detain the thief for shoplifting.

English: exit Meaning: Una salida es una forma de salir de un lugar. Example: El letrero verde muestra dónde está la salida. English source: An exit is something that is used as a way to get out of a place. The green sign shows where the exit is located.

English: exceptional Meaning: Algo o alguien excepcional es sobresaliente. Example: Holly es una estudiante excepcional. English source: An exceptional thing or person is one that is outstanding. Holly is an exceptional student.

English: flee Meaning: Huir es salir rápido para escapar de peligro. Example: Cuando un depredador se acerca a un ciervo, este huye. English source: To flee is to leave somewhere very quickly in order to escape from danger. When a predator approaches a deer, the deer will flee.

English: network Meaning: Una red es un grupo de personas u organizaciones conectadas entre sí. Example: Lesley pertenece a una red de voluntarios que plantan árboles. English source: A network is a group of people or organizations that are in some way connected to each other. Lesley is part of a volunteer network that plants trees in the city.

English: outrage Meaning: Indignar significa hacer que alguien se enfade o choque mucho. Example: Se indignó cuando rechazaron su propuesta. English source: To outrage is to make someone feel very angry or shocked. He was outraged when his proposal was turned down.

English: parish Meaning: Una parroquia es el área de responsabilidad de un sacerdote. Example: La parroquia de Greg ha crecido el último año. English source: A parish is the area for which a priest in some Christian churches is responsible. Greg’s parish has grown over the past year.

English: passage Meaning: Un pasaje es un espacio estrecho por el que pasan personas. Example: Sigue el pasaje hasta las escaleras. English source: A passage is a narrow space that people can move through. Follow the passage down the stairs.

English: pastor Meaning: Un pastor es un ministro a cargo de una iglesia o parroquia. Example: El pastor habla con los miembros de la iglesia. English source: A pastor is a minister in charge of a parish or church. The pastor speaks to the members of the church.

English: patrol Meaning: Una patrulla es un grupo de personas o vehículos que revisa una zona para mantenerla segura. Example: La patrulla militar se encarga de la seguridad del área. English source: A patrol is a group of people or vehicles that go through an area to make sure that it is free of trouble or danger. The military patrol is responsible for keeping the area safe.

English: raid Meaning: Asaltar es atacar un lugar de golpe para causar daño. Example: Los soldados buscan a los que siguen asaltando las aldeas de la selva. English source: To raid is to attack a place in a short time in order to cause damage. The soldiers are looking for the people who continue to raid the jungle villages.

English: rail Meaning: Los rieles son las vías por donde viajan los trenes. Example: Prefiero viajar por rieles porque evita el tráfico. English source: A rail is a system of tracks on which trains travel. I prefer traveling by rail because it’s more convenient than driving through traffic.

English: tunnel Meaning: Un túnel es un paso subterráneo para autos, trenes, etc. Example: El túnel te llevará a la próxima ciudad. English source: A tunnel is an underground passage for cars, trains, etc. to go through. The tunnel will lead you to the next city.

English: comfortable Meaning: Cómodo significa que algo te hace sentir relajado y seguro. Example: Will le encanta su nuevo sofá cómodo. English source: When something is comfortable, it makes you feel relaxed, confident, and not worried. Will loves his comfortable new sofa.

English: education Meaning: La educación es el proceso de enseñar y aprender, normalmente en escuela, colegio o universidad. Example: Estos estudiantes reciben su educación en una escuela privada. English source: Education is the process of teaching and learning, usually at a school, college, or university. These students are receiving their education at a private school.

English: encouragement Meaning: El apoyo es algo que hace que alguien esté más decidido, esperanzado o seguro. Example: La madre da apoyo constante a su hijo. English source: Encouragement is something that makes someone more determined, hopeful, or confident. The mother gives constant encouragement to her son.

English: endorse Meaning: Respaldar es expresar apoyo o aprobación oficial. Example: El comité respaldará a su líder en las próximas elecciones. English source: To endorse is to express formal support or approval for someone or something. The committee will endorse their leader for the upcoming election.

English: equal Meaning: Igual significa el mismo tamaño, número, cantidad o valor. Example: La manzana y la naranja tienen igual peso. English source: When something is equal, it is the same in size, number, amount, or value as something else. The apple and orange are equal in weight.

English: face Meaning: Enfrentar algo es tratarlo de forma directa. Example: Justin enfrentará muchos retos en el trabajo. English source: To face is to deal with something in a direct way. Justin will face many challenges at work.

English: field Meaning: Un campo es una materia que la gente estudia o un área de trabajo. Example: Jane trabaja en el campo de salud. English source: A field is a subject that people study or an area of activity that they are involved in as part of their work. Jane works in the healthcare field.

English: foster Meaning: Fomentar es ayudar a que una habilidad, sentimiento o idea se desarrolle. Example: El programa extraescolar está diseñado para fomentar el sentido de comunidad en la escuela. English source: To foster is to help a skill, feeling, or idea develop over a period of time. The afterschool program is designed to foster a sense of community at school.

English: guidance Meaning: La orientación es ayuda y consejo sobre trabajo, estudios o vida personal. Example: La profesora Smith dio orientación valiosa a todos sus alumnos. English source: Guidance is help and advice that is given to someone about their work, education, or personal life. Ms. Smith provided valuable guidance to all her students.

English: hold Meaning: Tener o mantener un título, puesto o récord es mantener la posición. Example: Damian pronto obtendrá un título en administración de empresas. English source: To hold is to have a particular degree, title, record, job, or position. Damian will soon hold a degree in business administration.

English: inclusion Meaning: Incluir a alguien en un grupo más grande es inclusión. Example: La escuela promueve la inclusión de los padres en la educación. English source: Inclusion is the act of including someone or something in a larger group or set. The school promotes the inclusion of parents in their students’ education.

English: inspire Meaning: Inspirar es alentar a alguien haciéndole sentirse confiado. Example: Jim inspira a su hijo para que siga sus sueños. English source: To inspire is to encourage someone by making them feel confident and eager to do something. Jim’s father likes to inspire his son by encouraging him to follow his dream.

English: mere Meaning: Mero se usa para enfatizar algo pequeño o poco importante. Example: Scott perdió la carrera por meros dos segundos. English source: Mere is used to emphasize how small or unimportant something or someone is. Scott lost the race by a mere two seconds.

English: position Meaning: Un puesto es un rango o función en una organización o empresa. Example: Kyle hace entrevista para un puesto de marketing. English source: A position is a rank or role of someone in an organization or company. Kyle is interviewing for a marketing position.

English: power Meaning: Poder es la capacidad de influir en personas o provocar fuertes sentimientos. Example: El entrenador tiene el poder de impedir que jueguen si faltan al entrenamiento. English source: Power is the ability to influence people or give them strong feelings. The coach has the power to keep the players from playing if they don’t show up to practice.

English: responsibility Meaning: La responsabilidad es una tarea o deber que se espera que hagas. Example: Los padres tienen la responsabilidad de criar a sus hijos con amor. English source: Responsibility is a task or duty that you are expected or required to do. Parents have the responsibility to raise their children with love.

English: soar Meaning: Elevarse significa subir rápidamente hasta una altura alta. Example: La temperatura hoy subirá a un máximo de 38 grados. English source: To soar is to increase quickly to a high level. The temperature today will soar to a high of 100 degrees Fahrenheit.

English: tool Meaning: Una herramienta es un equipo o una habilidad útil para tu trabajo. Example: Las habilidades de presentación son una herramienta importante para comunicarse. English source: A tool is a piece of equipment or a skill that is useful for doing your job. Presentation skills are an important tool for communication.

English: vocal Meaning: Cuando alguien es vocal, expresa una opinión fuerte en público. Example: Shawn es vocal cuando alguien no está de acuerdo con sus ideas. English source: When someone is vocal, he or she expresses a strong opinion publicly. Shawn gets vocal when someone disagrees with his opinions.

English: workplace Meaning: El lugar de trabajo es la sala o edificio donde trabajas. Example: La diversidad es importante en el lugar de trabajo. English source: A workplace is the room or building where you work. Diversity is important in the workplace.

English: academic Meaning: Académico se refiere a escuelas y educación. Example: Su enfoque académico le ayudó a entrar en la universidad. English source: When something is academic, it relates to schools and education. ˌækəˈdemɪk Notes: La celda de ejemplo en inglés es solo un símbolo fonético.

English: acceptance Meaning: La aceptación es cuando la gente acuerda que una idea o explicación es correcta. Example: La persona mostró aceptación de la solución propuesta. English source: Acceptance is when people agree that an idea, statement, explanation, etc., is right or true. əkˈseptəns

English: array Meaning: Un arreglo es un gran grupo o número de cosas. Example: Los carros de juguete están disponibles en un arreglo de colores. English source: An array is a large group or number of things. The toy cars are available in an array of colors.

English: blur Meaning: Desenfocar significa hacer algo difícil de ver o recordar con claridad. Example: El fotógrafo puede desenfocar las luces brillantes en el fondo. English source: To blur is to make something unclear or difficult to see or remember. The photographer can blur the bright lights into the background.

English: café Meaning: Un café es un pequeño restaurante donde puedes comprar bebidas y comidas sencillas. Example: Monica trabaja medio tiempo en un café. English source: A café is a small restaurant where you can buy drinks and simple meals. Monica works part-time at a café.

English: canvas Meaning: Un lienzo es una tela gruesa que usan los artistas para pintar. Example: La artista pinta colores vivos en un lienzo. English source: A canvas is a thick piece of cloth that artists use to paint on. The artist paints bright colors on a canvas.

English: cinema Meaning: El cine es un edificio donde se proyectan películas. Example: Mi hermana disfruta ver películas en el cine. English source: A cinema is a building in which films are shown. My sister enjoys watching movies at the cinema.

English: class Meaning: Clase es la forma en que la sociedad divide a las personas en grupos sociales y económicos. Example: Esa familia de clase alta viaja en un jet privado. English source: Class is the way people in society are divided into different social and economic groups. This upper-class family travels on a private jet.

English: distinctive Meaning: Algo distintivo tiene una cualidad fácil de reconocer. Example: Las aceitunas tienen un sabor distintivo. English source: When something is distinctive, it has a special quality, character, or appearance that is different and easy to recognize. Olives have a distinctive flavor.

English: key Meaning: Algo clave es sumamente importante. Example: Marco es un jugador clave del equipo nacional. English source: When something is key, it is extremely important. Marco is a key player on the country’s national team.

English: movement Meaning: Un movimiento es una serie de actividades organizadas en la que la gente trabaja junta. Example: Booker T. Washington fue miembro del movimiento de derechos civiles. English source: A movement is a series of organized activities in which people work together to do or achieve something. Booker T. Washington was a member of the civil rights movement.

English: practice Meaning: Una práctica es algo que se hace a menudo o con regularidad. Example: Samuel hizo de la lectura del periódico una práctica diaria. English source: A practice is something that is done often or regularly. Samuel has made it a practice to read the newspaper every morning.

English: realistic Meaning: Realista significa mostrado como en la vida real. Example: Dorothy pinta imágenes realistas de peces. English source: When something is realistic, it is shown as it is in real life. Dorothy is painting realistic images of fish.

English: reflection Meaning: Un reflejo es una imagen vista en un espejo o superficie brillante. Example: El hombre se miró su reflejo en el espejo. English source: A reflection is an image that is seen in a mirror or other shiny surface. The man stared at his reflection in the mirror.

English: rule Meaning: Una regla es una instrucción oficial que indica cómo deben hacerse las cosas. Example: Usar casco al montar bicicleta es una regla en algunas ciudades. English source: A rule is an official instruction that says how things must be done or what is allowed. Wearing a helmet while riding a bicycle is a rule in some cities.

English: stroke Meaning: Un trazo es un movimiento de pluma o pincel al escribir o pintar. Example: El artista comenzó con un trazo amarillo en su pintura. English source: A stroke is a single movement of a pen or brush when you are writing or painting. The artist began with a yellow stroke on his painting.

English: sunlight Meaning: La luz solar es la luz natural que viene del sol. Example: La luz solar entra entre los árboles. English source: Sunlight is the natural light that comes from the sun. The sunlight shines through the trees.

English: traditional Meaning: Tradicional significa basado en ideas antiguas. Example: Prefiero muebles tradicionales. English source: When something is traditional, it is based on old-fashioned ideas. I prefer traditional furniture.

English: unlike Meaning: A diferencia de significa completamente distinto de alguien o algo. Example: A diferencia de su hermano mayor, Jim es bajo. English source: Unlike is used in place of “completely different from a particular person or thing.” Unlike his older brother, Jim is short.

English: width Meaning: El ancho es la distancia entre un lado y el otro de algo. Example: El hombre mide el ancho de la caja. English source: Width is the distance from one side of something to the other side. The man is measuring the width of the box.

English: anthem Meaning: Un himno es una canción formal o religiosa. Example: Todos cantan el himno nacional antes de que empiece el partido. English source: An anthem is a formal or religious song. Everyone sings the national anthem before the baseball game starts.

English: beyond Meaning: Más allá significa que algo sobrepasa otra cosa. Example: El trabajo está más allá de la capacidad de ese hombre. English source: Beyond is used to say that one thing is more than another. The job is beyond the man’s ability.

English: determination Meaning: La determinación es insistencia al intentar algo aunque sea difícil. Example: Chris es el competidor más joven, pero tiene más determinación.
