English source: Determination is what you have when you try to do something even when it is difficult. Chris is the youngest competitor, but he has the most determination.

English: fighting Meaning: El combate es el conflicto físico entre personas o grupos en guerra o en la calle. Example: El combate fue intenso durante días. English source: Fighting is physical conflict between people or groups in a war, in the street, etc. Heavy fighting continued for days.

English: joint Meaning: Conjunto significa hecho por dos o más personas o grupos. Example: Mike y Joanna son dueños conjuntos de una cafetería. English source: When something is joint, it is done by or involves two or more people or groups. Mike and Joanna are joint owners of a coffee shop.

English: landing Meaning: Aterrizaje es volver al suelo o a una superficie tras un vuelo o viaje en bote. Example: El hombre dirige el aterrizaje en la zona de guerra. English source: A landing is when you return to the ground or another surface after a flight or a boat ride. The man is in charge of leading the landing in the warzone.

English: mark Meaning: Marcar significa señalar o celebrar una fecha o momento importante. Example: Mis abuelos hicieron una fiesta para marcar su aniversario número 50. English source: To mark is to celebrate an important event or time by doing something. My grandparents are having a party to mark their 50th anniversary.

English: mobilize Meaning: Móvilizar significa preparar al ejército para la guerra. Example: Miles de soldados estaban listos para móvilizarse para la lucha. English source: To mobilize is to prepare an army to fight in a war. Thousands of soldiers were ready to mobilize for the fight.

English: nation Meaning: Una nación es una gran área de tierra con gobierno propio. Example: India es una nación que se desarrolla rápidamente. English source: A nation is a large area of land that is controlled by its own government. India is a nation that is developing rapidly.

English: originally Meaning: Originalmente significa en los inicios, cuando algo comenzó. Example: Este edificio fue originalmente un banco. English source: Originally is used in place of “in the beginning” or “when something first happened or began.” This building was originally a bank.

English: outbreak Meaning: Un brote es un inicio repentino de lucha o enfermedad. Example: Los científicos se prepararon para un brote de un virus peligroso. English source: An outbreak is a sudden start or increase of fighting or disease. The scientists prepared for an outbreak of a dangerous virus.

English: pray Meaning: Rezar es hablar con Dios para pedir ayuda o dar gracias. Example: La niña gusta de rezar por la paz del mundo. English source: To pray is to speak to God in order to ask for help or to give thanks. The girl likes to pray for world peace.

English: prisoner Meaning: Un prisionero es alguien retenido por la fuerza en un lugar. Example: Ha sido prisionero durante muchos años. English source: A prisoner is someone who is taken by force and kept somewhere. He has been a prisoner for many years.

English: sacrifice Meaning: Sacrificar es renunciar a algo para obtener algo o hacer algo por otro. Example: Karen ha tenido que sacrificar mucho por sus hijos. English source: To sacrifice is to give up something in order to get something you want or do something else for someone. Karen has had to sacrifice a lot for her children.

English: silence Meaning: Silencio es ausencia total de sonido. Example: Solo puedo dormir en silencio total. English source: Silence is the complete absence of sound or noise. I can only sleep in complete silence.

English: thus Meaning: Así se usa para decir “como resultado de lo mencionado”. Example: Victor quiere bajar de peso; así irá en dieta y empezará a ejercitarse. English source: Thus is used in place of “as a result of something that was just mentioned.” Victor wants to lose weight; thus, he’ll go on a diet and start exercising.

English: tribute Meaning: Un tributo es algo dicho, hecho o dado para mostrar respeto. Example: En algunos países, la gente lleva amapolas como tributo a los veteranos. English source: A tribute is something that you say, do, or give in order to express respect for someone. In some countries, people wear poppies as a tribute to veterans.

English: victory Meaning: La victoria es cuando ganas una batalla, juego, elección o disputa. Example: El hombre estaba feliz con su victoria. English source: A victory is a situation in which you win a battle, game, election, or dispute. The man was thrilled with his victory.

English: wild Meaning: Salvaje significa sin control. Example: Las diente de león crecen salvajes en las grietas de las calles. English source: To be wild is to be without control. Dandelions grow wild in the cracks of the streets.

English: wound Meaning: Herir es causar daño cortando o rompiendo la piel. Example: El niño sabía que podría herir sus rodillas si no llevaba rodilleras. English source: To wound is to injure someone or something by cutting or breaking the skin. The boy knew he might wound his knees if he didn’t wear pads on them.

English: assimilate Meaning: Asimilar es adoptar las costumbres de una nueva cultura e integrarse. Example: Cuando la familia se mudó a EE. UU., asimiló la cultura americana. English source: To assimilate is to adopt the ways of a new culture and fully become a part of it. When the family moves to the US they will assimilate into American culture.

English: attempt Meaning: Un intento es un acto de tratar de hacer algo, sobre todo algo difícil. Example: Este es el segundo intento de Ben por escalar el Everest. English source: An attempt is an act of trying to do something, especially something difficult. This is Ben’s second attempt to climb Mt. Everest.

English: case Meaning: Un caso es un ejemplo de una situación particular. Example: Se requiere un depósito de $1,000, pero en este caso aceptaremos la mitad. English source: A case is an example of a particular situation or of something happening. A deposit of $1,000 is required, but in this case, we will accept half.

English: cease Meaning: Cesar significa detenerse o hacer que algo deje de pasar. Example: La lluvia cesará por la tarde. English source: To cease is to stop doing something or to stop something happening. The rain will cease in the afternoon.

English: danger Meaning: Peligro es la posibilidad de daño, destrucción o muerte. Example: Fumar cigarrillos es un peligro para la salud. English source: Danger is the possibility that someone or something will be harmed, destroyed, or killed. Smoking cigarettes is a danger to health.

English: devastating Meaning: Devastador significa que causa mucho daño o destrucción. Example: El tsunami tuvo efectos devastadores en el pueblo costero. English source: If something is devastating, it causes great harm or damage to something or someone. The tsunami had devastating effects on the seaside village.

English: diversity Meaning: La diversidad es la variedad de formas, tipos o ideas. Example: Mi empresa enfatiza la importancia de la diversidad cultural. English source: Diversity is the quality or state of having many different forms, types, ideas, etc. My company puts an emphasis on the importance on having cultural diversity.

English: earthquake Meaning: Un terremoto es un fuerte temblor de la Tierra que causa daño. Example: El terremoto hizo que la carretera se rompiera en muchos lugares. English source: An earthquake is a sudden shaking of a part of the Earth’s surface that often causes a lot of damage. The earthquake caused the road to crack in multiple places.

English: endangered Meaning: Amenazado significa que se ha vuelto muy raro y puede desaparecer. Example: El grulla cornuda es una especie en peligro de extinción. English source: If something is endangered, it has become very rare and may eventually die out altogether. The whooping crane is an endangered species.

English: extinction Meaning: La extinción es cuando un animal, planta, tipo de persona, costumbre o habilidad deja de existir. Example: La extinción del dodo ocurrió en el siglo XVII. English source: Extinction is when a particular animal, plant, type of person, custom, skill, etc. stops existing. The extinction of the dodo bird occurred in the 1600s.

English: forever Meaning: Usamos “para siempre” para decir “para todo el tiempo que queda” o “por muchísimo tiempo”. Example: Michelle y Tanya quieren ser mejores amigas para siempre. English source: We use forever in place of “for all future time” or “for a very long time.” Michelle and Tanya want to be best friends forever.

English: generally Meaning: Generalmente significa “en la mayoría de los casos” o “para la mayoría de la gente”. Example: En general, los suburbios se ven como un buen lugar para criar hijos. English source: We use generally in place of “in most cases” or “to most people.” The suburbs are generally viewed as a good place to raise children.

English: genocide Meaning: El genocidio es el asesinato deliberado de todo un grupo o una etnia de personas. Example: A causa del genocidio, muchos niños quedaron huérfanos. English source: Genocide is the deliberate murder of a whole group or race of people. As a result of the genocide, many children have been orphaned.

English: hit Meaning: Golpear o afectar a alguien o algo de forma dañina o peligrosa. Example: El barco fue impactado por una tormenta violenta. English source: To hit is to affect someone or something in a harmful or dangerous way. The ship was hit by a violent storm.

English: lose Meaning: Perder significa que algo importante se te quita o se destruye. Example: La familia nunca pensó que perdería todo en el incendio. English source: To lose is to have something that is important or necessary taken from you or destroyed. The family never thought they’d lose everything to fire.

English: native Meaning: Nativo se refiere al lugar donde alguien nació y creció. Example: Carlos es un héroe en su país nativo, Brasil. English source: If something is native, it refers to the place someone was born and raised. Carlos is a hero in his native country of Brazil.

English: percent Meaning: El porcentaje es una cantidad igual a una parte de cada cien. Example: Liz necesita sacar un 80 por ciento para aprobar la prueba. English source: A percent is an amount that is equal to one one-hundredth of something. Liz needs to get 80 percent on her test to pass the course.

English: reason Meaning: Una razón es un hecho o explicación de por qué algo sucede o de por qué alguien actúa. Example: La razón por la que Eric llega tarde es que se olvidó de poner la alarma. English source: A reason is a statement or fact that explains why something is the way it is, or why someone does, thinks, or says something. The reason Eric is late for work is that he forgot to set his alarm.

English: reference Meaning: Una referencia es la acción de aludir a algo o alguien. Example: El supervisor hizo una referencia a los datos que había recopilado. English source: A reference is the act of referring to something or someone. My supervisor made a reference to the data I’d collected.

English: urban Meaning: Lo urbano se relaciona con las ciudades y los pueblos. Example: Es común ver edificios altos en zonas urbanas. English source: If something is urban, it is related to towns and cities. It is common to see tall buildings in urban areas.

English: burn Meaning: Quemar significa usar algo como fuente de energía. Example: Correr es un buen ejercicio para quemar grasa y bajar de peso. English source: To burn is to use something as a source of energy. Running is good exercise for people who want to burn fat and lose weight.

English: check Meaning: Comprobar significa preguntar o verificar si algo es correcto, verdadero o permitido. Example: Peter quiere comprobar con el profesor si hace bien la tarea. English source: To check is to ask someone whether something is correct, true, or allowed. Peter wants to check with the teacher to see if he is doing the assignment right.

English: coconut Meaning: El coco es una fruta grande y marrón con cáscara dura y pulpa blanca. Example: Un coco produce un aceite saludable. English source: A coconut is a large brown fruit that has a hard shell and white flesh. A coconut produces a healthy oil.

English: epilepsy Meaning: La epilepsia es una enfermedad del cerebro que puede causar desmayos o falta de control de movimiento por poco tiempo. Example: El médico diagnosticó al paciente con epilepsia. English source: Epilepsy is a medical condition that affects the brain and can make someone become unconscious or unable to control their movement for a short time. The doctor diagnosed the patient with epilepsy.

English: fat Meaning: La grasa es una sustancia aceitosa sólida o líquida de los alimentos. Example: La grasa del salmón, aguacate y nueces es saludable. English source: Fat is an oily solid or liquid substance in food. The fat contained in salmon, avocados, and nuts is healthy.

English: gain Meaning: Ganar significa obtener de forma gradual más cantidad de una cualidad, emoción o cosa. Example: Ganar ese premio le ayudará a Steven a ganar confianza. English source: To gain is to gradually get more and more of a quality, feeling, etc. Winning the award will help Steven gain confidence.

English: glucose Meaning: La glucosa es una forma natural de azúcar que hay en plantas y frutas. Example: Las personas con diabetes deben controlar sus niveles de glucosa. English source: Glucose is a natural form of sugar that exists in plants and fruit. People with diabetes need to check their glucose levels.

English: high Meaning: Alto significa mayor de lo normal en cantidad, número o intensidad. Example: El termómetro muestra una temperatura corporal alta. English source: When something is high, it is greater than usual in amount, number, or degree. The thermometer shows a high body temperature.

English: keep Meaning: Mantener significa permanecer en un estado, condición o posición específica. Example: Brian debe mantenerse trabajando para terminar su proyecto a tiempo. English source: To keep is to stay in a particular state, condition, or position. Brian needs to keep working in order to finish his project on time.

English: known Meaning: Conocido significa que algo o alguien es sabido por muchas personas. Example: Bob es conocido en todo el vecindario como el ladrón. English source: If something is known, it is something that people are aware of or have discovered. Bob is known throughout the neighborhood as a burglars.

English: liver Meaning: El hígado es un órgano grande que produce bilis y limpia la sangre. Example: El profesor nos mostró cómo se ve el hígado humano. English source: The liver is a large organ in the body that produces bile and cleans blood. The professor showed us what the human liver looks like.

English: low Meaning: Bajo significa menor que lo normal en cantidad, número o grado. Example: La temperatura baja mucho en invierno. English source: If something is low, it is smaller than usual in amount, number, or degree. The temperature gets very low in the winter.

English: management Meaning: La gestión es el acto de controlar y manejar algo. Example: Practicar yoga ayuda a la gestión del estrés. English source: Management is the act or process of controlling and dealing with something. Practicing yoga is good for stress management.

English: metabolic Meaning: Metabólico se refiere al proceso químico con el que plantas y animales usan alimentos y agua para obtener energía. Example: Los peces tienen una tasa metabólica muy alta. English source: When something is metabolic, it relates to the chemical process in which plants or animals use food and water to make energy. Fish have a very high metabolic rate.

English: oil Meaning: El aceite es un líquido espeso y viscoso de origen vegetal o animal, usado mucho en cocina. Example: El cocinero puso el aceite en la sartén y lo calentó. English source: Oil is a smooth, thick liquid made from plants or some animals, and is especially in cooking. The chef put the oil in the pan and heated it up.

English: olive Meaning: La aceituna es una fruta pequeña, negra o verde, con forma ovalada. Example: Preparé un tazón de aceitunas para mis invitados. English source: An olive is a small egg-shaped black or green fruit. I prepared a bowl of olives for my guests.

English: performance Meaning: El rendimiento es la manera en que alguien o algo funciona o trabaja. Example: El rendimiento de Liam en la carrera no fue su mejor. English source: Performance is how well someone or something functions, works, etc. Liam’s performance in the race was not his best.

English: powerful Meaning: Algo poderoso tiene un efecto fuerte. Example: Este perfume tiene un aroma muy poderoso. English source: If something is powerful, it has a strong effect. This perfume has a powerful scent.

English: starch Meaning: El almidón es una sustancia que aporta energía y se encuentra en alimentos como trigo, patata y arroz. Example: La pasta tiene mucho almidón. English source: Starch is a substance that provides your body with energy and is found in foods such as wheat, potatoes, and rice. Pasta is high in starch.

English: summary Meaning: Un resumen es una declaración breve con la información principal de algo. Example: Cindy concluyó la reunión con un resumen del proyecto. English source: A summary is a short statement that contains the main information about something. Cindy concluded the meeting with a summary of the project.

English: analytic Meaning: Analítico se refiere a la lógica y el razonamiento. Example: El artículo analítico criticó el nuevo plan y presentó otro. English source: If something is analytic, it is related to logic and reasoning. The analytic article criticized the new plan and presented one of its own.

English: area Meaning: Un área es un lugar de tamaño considerable. Example: Conocía muy bien el área local. English source: An area is a reasonably large place. He was very familiar with the local area.

English: bachelor Meaning: Un soltero es un hombre que no está casado. Example: Como era soltero, Jason hizo sus compras solo. English source: A bachelor is an unmarried man. Since he was a bachelor, Jason did his shopping by himself.

English: cognitive Meaning: Cognitivo está relacionado con aprender y comprender cosas. Example: Después del examen físico, probaron sus habilidades cognitivas. English source: If something is cognitive, it is related to learning and knowing things. After her physical examination, her cognitive skills were tested.

English: collision Meaning: La colisión es el choque entre dos cosas que se golpean. Example: La colisión entre los dos autos produjo un ruido fuerte. English source: A collision is the act of two things hitting into each another. The collision between the two cars created a loud noise.

English: competent Meaning: Competente significa capaz de actuar o pensar con eficacia. Example: Los empleados competentes son mucho mejores que los que no saben nada. English source: If someone is competent, they are able to think or act successfully. Competent employees are much better than unknowledgeable ones.

English: diploma Meaning: Un diploma es un certificado que demuestra que alguien terminó sus estudios. Example: Después de cuatro años de universidad, Mary por fin obtuvo un diploma. English source: A diploma is a certificate proving that someone has completed their studies. After four years of college, Mary finally had a diploma.

English: excel Meaning: Sobresalir significa ser muy bueno en una materia o actividad. Example: Jenny sobresale mucho al tocar el piano. English source: To excel at a subject or activity means to be very good at it. Jenny excels at playing the piano.

English: geology Meaning: La geología es el estudio de las estructuras naturales de la Tierra y su cambio. Example: Como estudió geología, sabía cómo se formaron las montañas. English source: Geology is the study of the Earth’s natural structures and how they change. Because he studied geology, he knew how the mountains were formed.

English: integral Meaning: Integral significa parte esencial de un conjunto. Example: Ella es un miembro integral de nuestro equipo. English source: Something that is integral is an important part of the whole. She is an integral member of our team.

English: intellect Meaning: El intelecto es la capacidad de entender con facilidad. Example: La conocían por su rápido e inteligente intelecto, además de su belleza. English source: An intellect is a person’s ability to understand things easily. She was known for her quick and strong intellect as well as her beauty.

English: job Meaning: Un trabajo es la actividad con la que se gana dinero. Example: Ahora tiene un trabajo bien pago. English source: Your job is the work you do to earn money. He now has a high-paying job.

English: keen Meaning: Alguien que es inteligente capta y comprende con facilidad. Example: Solo un estudiante inteligente pudo resolver ese problema de matemáticas. English source: If someone is keen, they are intelligent. Only a keen student could have solved that math problem.

English: minimum Meaning: El mínimo es la cantidad más pequeña posible. Example: ¿Cuál es la temperatura mínima en invierno en está zona? English source: The minimum is the smallest amount. What is the minimum temperature in winter in this area?

English: psychology Meaning: La psicología estudia cómo el cerebro afecta nuestros pensamientos y acciones. Example: La psicología de la percepción es un tema fascinante. English source: Psychology involves the study of how the brain affects our thought and actions. The psychology of seeing is a fascinating subject.

English: radioactive Meaning: Algo radiactivo emite radiación o está relacionado con ella. Example: Los estados radiactivos pueden ser muy peligrosos para la salud. English source: If something is radioactive, then it lets out, or is related to, radiation. Radioactive states can be very bad for anyone’s health.

English: relativity Meaning: La relatividad es un conjunto de ideas sobre el tiempo y el espacio creadas por Einstein. Example: La relatividad enseña que la luz viaja a la misma velocidad en todo el universo. English source: Relativity is a set of ideas about time and space developed by Albert Einstein. Relativity teaches that light travels at the same speed throughout the universe.

English: sociology Meaning: La sociología estudia la sociedad humana, sus organizaciones y problemas. Example: La sociología muestra que muchos problemas vienen de la sociedad. English source: Sociology is the study of human society, its organizations, and problems. Sociology teaches that people’s problems are a result of their society.

English: theoretical Meaning: Teórico significa basado en ideas o teorías, no en experiencia directa. Example: Su conclusión era solo teórica y no debía hacerse pública. English source: If something is theoretical, it is based on theory rather than experience. His conclusion was only theoretical and not meant to be publicized.

English: weak Meaning: Alguien débil no está fuerte ni sano. Example: Ella sigue débil después de la enfermedad. English source: If someone is weak, they are not strong and healthy. She is still weak after the illness.

English: administrator Meaning: Un administrador es la persona que dirige una empresa u organización. Example: Todos en la tienda hacían lo que les pedía el administrador. English source: An administrator is a person who controls a business, company, or organization. Everyone in the store did whatever the administrator asked them to do.

English: affluent Meaning: Adinerado significa una persona con mucha riqueza. Example: La gente de la ciudad suele ser más adinerada que la del campo. English source: If someone is affluent, they are wealthy. People in the city are usually more affluent than people in the country.

English: audit Meaning: Auditar significa revisar los registros financieros de una persona o empresa. Example: El gobierno suele auditar a empresas con ingresos menores de lo habitual. English source: To audit means to inspect financial records from a person or business. The government usually audits companies that report lower than usual incomes.

English: automate Meaning: Automatizar significa hacer que las máquinas o computadores realicen el trabajo. Example: Cuando el banco automatizó sus procesos, instaló cajeros automáticos. English source: To automate something means to have machines or computers do the work. When the bank automated, it started installing ATM machines.

English: bribe Meaning: Sobornar significa convencer a alguien ilegalmente con dinero para obtener un favor. Example: El juez fue sobornado para dejar libre al sospechoso. English source: To bribe someone means to illegally persuade them for a favor with money. The judge was bribed so that she would set the suspect free.

English: corrupt Meaning: Corrupto significa que alguien rompe la ley por dinero o fama. Example: Los policías corruptos no detuvieron al hombre porque le dieron dinero. English source: If someone is corrupt, they break the law for money or fame. The corrupt policemen didn’t arrest the man because he gave them money.

English: dispose Meaning: Deshacerse o eliminar algo de forma definitiva. Example: Él desechó la lata echándola al cubo de reciclaje. English source: To dispose of something means to get rid of it. He disposed of the can by throwing it into the recycle bin.

English: headquarters Meaning: La sede es el edificio desde donde dirige una empresa. Example: Él tomó la ruta larga hasta la sede porque hacía buen día. English source: A headquarters is a building where the bosses of a company work. He took the long route to the headquarters because it was a nice day.

English: incentive Meaning: Un incentivo es lo que motiva a alguien a actuar. Example: La posibilidad de ganar un premio fue un incentivo para jugar. English source: An incentive is what makes a person want to do something. The chance of winning a prize was an incentive to get people to play the game.

English: infrastructure Meaning: La infraestructura es el conjunto de servicios necesarios para que funcione una sociedad o negocio. Example: Las líneas eléctricas son parte importante de la infraestructura de la ciudad. English source: An infrastructure is a collection of services needed to run a society or business. Power lines are important parts of a city’s infrastructure.

English: legislate Meaning: Legislar significa crear leyes. Example: Los senadores deben legislar con justicia para que la mayoría disfrute de los beneficios. English source: To legislate means to make laws. Senators have to legislate fairly so most people will enjoy the benefits.

English: legitimate Meaning: Legítimo significa aceptable según la ley. Example: Ella encontró un plan legítimo para conseguir fondos extra para su viaje. English source: If something is legitimate, then it is acceptable according to the law. She found a legitimate plan to raise extra funds for her vacation.

English: manipulate Meaning: Manipular significa controlar o influir en algo de forma hábil o injusta. Example: El médico manipuló los datos para que el tratamiento pareciera funcionar. English source: To manipulate something means to skillfully or unfairly control or affect it. The doctor manipulated the data to make it look like the cure was working.

English: merchandise Meaning: La mercancía son bienes que se pueden comprar o vender. Example: La tienda añadió más mercancía porque llegaron más compradores. English source: Merchandise is goods ready to be purchased or sold. The store added more merchandise because there were more shoppers.

English: retail Meaning: El comercio minorista es la venta de bienes al público para uso personal. Example: Aunque se produce barato, cuando una camiseta llega al comercio minorista cuesta diez veces más. English source: Retail is the activity of selling goods to the public, often for personal use. Although cheap to make, once a t-shirt reaches retail, it costs ten times as much.

English: revenue Meaning: Los ingresos son el dinero que obtiene una empresa. Example: Los nuevos productos aumentaron mucho los ingresos mensuales del negocio. English source: Revenue is the income made by a company. The new products really increased the business’s monthly revenue.

English: rubbish Meaning: La basura es el desecho o residuo. Example: El suelo junto al basurero estaba cubierto de todo tipo de basura. English source: Rubbish is trash or waste. The floor around the garbage can was covered with all kinds of rubbish.

English: subsidy Meaning: Un subsidio es dinero del gobierno para ayudar a una empresa. Example: La autoridad dio un subsidio a la empresa para que abriera dos fábricas nuevas. English source: A subsidy is money given by the government to companies to assist them. The official gave the company a subsidy so it could open two new factories.

English: transaction Meaning: Una transacción es el acto de comprar o vender algo. Example: Como el dependiente era nuevo, la transacción simple tardó mucho. English source: A transaction is an act of buying or selling something. Because the clerk was new at the job, the simple transaction took a long time.

English: violate Meaning: Violar una ley, regla o acuerdo significa romperla. Example: Me dieron una multa porque el policía dijo que violé una norma de tránsito. English source: To violate a law, rule, or agreement means to break it. I was given a ticket because the policeman said I violated a traffic law.

English: assess Meaning: Evaluar significa juzgar la calidad, estructura o finalidad de algo. Example: Ella evaluó la condición del coche de juguete antes de comprarlo. English source: To assess something means to judge the structure, purpose, or quality of it. She assessed the condition of the toy car before buying it.

English: astonish Meaning: Asombrar significa sorprender mucho a alguien. Example: La cantidad de gente que asistió a su fiesta la asombró. English source: To astonish someone means to greatly surprise them. The number of people that came to her party astonished her.

English: commence Meaning: Comenzar significa iniciar algo. Example: El discurso comenzó con un “gracias” a todos los que lo ayudaron a tener éxito. English source: To commence something means to begin it. His speech commenced with a “thank you” to all who had helped him succeed.

English: essence Meaning: La esencia es la cualidad importante o rasgo básico de algo. Example: La esencia del argumento era que ambos equipos sentían que habían perdido dinero. English source: The essence of something is its important qualities or basic characteristics. The essence of the argument was that both sides felt they had lost money.

English: extract Meaning: Extraer significa quitar algo. Example: El dentista extrajo el diente dañado de la mujer y le colocó uno artificial. English source: To extract something means to remove it. The dentist extracted the woman’s damaged tooth and put in a fake one.

English: fabulous Meaning: Fabuloso significa extraordinariamente bueno. Example: Esta fresa es la mejor que he probado; es fabulosa. English source: If something is fabulous, it is extremely good. This strawberry is the best I’ve ever had. It’s fabulous.

English: haste Meaning: La prisa es rapidez en el movimiento o la acción. Example: Para llegar a tiempo a la reunión, salió con prisa. English source: Haste is speed in movement or action. In order to get to the meeting in time, he proceeded with haste.

English: impulse Meaning: Un impulso es un deseo repentino de actuar sin pensar. Example: A causa del ruido, tuvo el impulso de correr y esconderse. English source: An impulse is a sudden thoughtless urge to do something. Because of the scary noise, she had an impulse to run somewhere and hide.

English: inhibit Meaning: Inhibir significa frenar o impedir que algo se desarrolle. Example: Las pocas habilidades de lectura pueden inhibir el aprendizaje en muchas materias. English source: When you inhibit something, you stop it from developing. Poor reading skills will inhibit learning in a wide range of subject areas.

English: latter Meaning: Último se usa para lo que va al final de una serie o la segunda opción. Example: En los últimos minutos del juego, los visitantes marcaron el gol ganador. English source: Latter describes something last in a series or the second choice of two things. In the latter minutes of the game, the visitors scored the winning goal.

English: molecule Meaning: Una molécula es la unidad física más pequeña de una sustancia. Example: Una gota de agua tiene miles de millones de moléculas de agua. English source: A molecule is the smallest basic unit that makes up a physical substance. A tiny drop of water is made up of many billions of molecules of water.

English: ongoing Meaning: Sigue en curso cuando algo todavía está ocurriendo o progresando. Example: El desarrollo de las plantas está en curso porque tardan tiempo en crecer. English source: If something is ongoing, then it is still happening or still growing. The development of plants is ongoing because it takes time for them to mature.

English: precise Meaning: Preciso significa exacto y detallista en el trabajo. Example: El constructor fue muy preciso al poner los clavos. English source: If someone is precise, then they are exact and careful about their work. The builder was very precise about where he placed the nails.

English: proximity Meaning: La proximidad es la cercanía en tiempo, espacio o relaciones. Example: Todos los árboles en las proximidades de la playa habían sido talados. English source: Proximity is closeness in time, space, or relationships. All the trees in the proximity of the beach had been cut down.

English: publicity Meaning: La publicidad es la atención pública que alguien o algo recibe por los medios. Example: Recibió mucha publicidad tras su actuación en la película. English source: Publicity is public attention given to someone or something by the media. She received a lot of publicity after her performance in the film.

English: remedy Meaning: Un remedio es una cura para una enfermedad, discusión o problema. Example: Un buen remedio para el dolor de cabeza es una aspirina y un vaso de agua. English source: A remedy is a cure for a disease, argument, or problem. A good remedy for a headache is an aspirin and a glass of water.

English: significance Meaning: La importancia o significación es la cualidad que hace algo valioso. Example: Lo importante de que lloviera y nevara fue que no tuvimos que ir a la escuela. English source: The significance of something is the quality that makes it important. The significance of the snowy weather was that we didn’t have to go to school.

English: subsequent Meaning: Subsecuente/subsecuente significa que ocurre después de algo. Example: La inundación y el rescate posterior de los atrapados se vieron en la televisión. English source: If something is subsequent, then it comes after something else in time. The flood and the subsequent rescue of those caught in the flood were on TV.

English: synthetic Meaning: Sintético significa fabricado para parecerse a algo natural. Example: La ropa hecha con telas sintéticas conserva mejor el calor. English source: If something is synthetic, then it is made to be like something natural. Clothing made out of synthetic fabrics is very effective at keeping people warm.

English: terminal Meaning: Terminal significa que causa o resulta en muerte. Example: Como su condición no era terminal, se sintió mucho aliviado. English source: If something is terminal, then it causes or results in death. Since his condition was not terminal, he felt a great sense of relief.

English: acute Meaning: Agudo significa muy intenso o severo. Example: Cuando cayó del árbol, la niña sintió un dolor agudo en el brazo. English source: When a bad thing is acute, it is very severe and intense. When she fell out of the tree, the girl felt an acute pain in her arm.

English: aggression Meaning: La agresión es un comportamiento cruel o violento hacia otros. Example: El problema empeoró por la agresión de Mark. English source: Aggression is behavior that is mean or violent to others. The problem was only made worse by Mark’s aggression.

English: biography Meaning: Una biografía es la historia de la vida de una persona escrita por otra. Example: Leímos una biografía de Charles Darwin en clase de ciencias. English source: A biography is an account of someone’s life that is written by someone else. We read a biography about Charles Darwin in science class.

English: boost Meaning: Impulsar significa aumentar o mejorar algo. Example: Bajar los precios impulsa el interés de los clientes por comprar. English source: To boost something means to increase or improve it. Lowering prices boosts customers’ interest in shopping.

English: clap Meaning: Aplausar es juntar las manos para mostrar gusto o llamar la atención. Example: Después del discurso, todos aplaudieron al orador. English source: To clap means to hit one’s hands together to express pleasure or get attention. After the speech, everyone in the crowd clapped their hands for the speaker.

English: classical Meaning: Clásico describe música formal y seria, distinta de la popular. Example: Beethoven es un compositor de música clásica. English source: Classical music is more formal and serious than popular music. Beethoven is a composer of classical music.

English: compel Meaning: Obligar significa forzar a alguien a hacer algo. Example: Las señales de tránsito obligan a los conductores a conducir con seguridad. English source: To compel someone to do something means to force them to do it. Traffic signs compel drivers to drive safely.

English: creation Meaning: La creación es algo original que se produce. Example: Vimos la creación de un nuevo partido político. English source: A creation is something original that is made. We saw the creation of a new political party.

English: dominance Meaning: La dominancia es el estado de tener más poder que otros. Example: Los gorilas adultos golpean su pecho para mostrar su dominancia. English source: The dominance of a person is their state of being more powerful than others. Large gorillas hit their chests to express their dominance over others.

English: gorgeous Meaning: Algo hermoso o deslumbrante, muy bonito y atractivo. Example: La chica eligió un vestido precioso para ir al baile. English source: When something is gorgeous, it is very pleasing and attractive. The girl picked out a gorgeous dress to wear to the dance.

English: inevitable Meaning: Inevitable significa que algo seguro ocurre o no se puede evitar. Example: Es inevitable que en verano los días se alarguen. English source: When something is inevitable, it is certain to happen or cannot be avoided. It is inevitable that the days will get longer in the summer.

English: legacy Meaning: Un legado es el efecto o herencia que deja una persona o cosa del pasado. Example: El legado de los antiguos egipcios se ve en sus monumentos. English source: A legacy is an effect that exists because of a person or thing in the past. The legacy of the ancient Egyptians can be seen in their monuments.

English: masterpiece Meaning: Una obra maestra es una obra de arte de gran calidad. Example: El Arco del Triunfo se considera una obra maestra de la arquitectura. English source: A masterpiece is a very good painting, novel, movie, or other work of art. The Arc de Triomphe is considered a masterpiece in the world of architecture.

English: multiple Meaning: Múltiple significa que hay muchas cosas. Example: Al fallar la acrobacia, el hombre sufrió múltiples lesiones. English source: If there are multiple things, there are many of them. When the stunt went wrong, the man suffered multiple injuries.

English: narrate Meaning: Narrar es contar una historia por escrito o en voz alta. Example: John escribió está historia, pero Aaron la está narrando al público. English source: To narrate a story means to write about it or read it aloud. This story was written by John, but Aaron is narrating it to the crowd.

English: notorious Meaning: Notorio significa bien conocido por algo negativo. Example: Este barrio es notorio por la actividad de las pandillas. English source: When something is notorious, it is well known because of something bad. This area of town is notorious for gang activity.

English: overall Meaning: En general significa considerando el conjunto total. Example: En general, la fiesta fue un gran éxito. English source: When a thing is talked about overall, the whole thing is considered. Overall, the party was a huge success.

English: partiality Meaning: La parcialidad es la tendencia a preferir una cosa sobre otra. Example: Ella tiene parcialidad por caminar al colegio en vez de conducir. English source: A partiality is a tendency to prefer one thing to another. She has a partiality for walking to school instead of driving.

English: spontaneous Meaning: Algo espontáneo no está planificado y ocurre de golpe. Example: Mi esposa tomó una decisión espontánea de comprar un sofá nuevo mientras estaba en el trabajo. English source: When an act is spontaneous, it is not planned. It happens suddenly. My wife made a spontaneous decision to buy a new sofa while I was at work.

English: virtue Meaning: La virtud es una cualidad buena o una forma correcta de comportarse. Example: Mi mejor virtud es el perdón. English source: A virtue is a good quality or way of behaving. My best virtue is forgiveness.

English: aspect Meaning: Un aspecto es una parte o característica de algo. Example: Pensé en los distintos aspectos de tener dos perros. English source: An aspect is one part or feature of something. I thought about the different aspects of owning two dogs.

English: asset Meaning: Un recurso es una habilidad o cualidad útil y valiosa. Example: El entrenador se dio cuenta de que la velocidad del chico era un recurso para el equipo. English source: An asset is a skill or quality that is useful or valuable. The coach realized the boy’s speed was an asset to the team.

English: assignment Meaning: Una asignación es una tarea que se te da para hacer. Example: Le asignaron una tarea difícil, pero sintió que podía cumplirla. English source: An assignment is task that is given to you to do. He was given a difficult assignment but he felt he could succeed in doing it.

English: awareness Meaning: Conciencia significa conocimiento o percepción de una situación. Example: Ella tiene poca conciencia de lo que hay que hacer. English source: An awareness is knowledge or perception or a situation or fact. She has little awareness of what needs to be done.

English: bud Meaning: Una yema es la parte de la planta que luego se transforma en flor o hoja. Example: Dos semanas después de plantar la semilla, apareció una pequeña yema. English source: A bud is a part of a plant that turns into a flower or a leaf. Two weeks after planting the seed, a small bud appeared.

English: coordinate Meaning: Coordinar significa hacer que diferentes partes trabajen juntas. Example: Cada equipo de patinaje tuvo que coordinar sus movimientos para el show. English source: To coordinate things is to make different parts work together. Each skating team had to coordinate their movements for the show.

English: credit Meaning: Crédito es algo favorable a tu favor. Example: Su cuenta bancaria está en crédito, así que tiene dinero para gastar. English source: Credit is something good in your favour. His bank account is in credit, so he has money he can spend.

English: disprove Meaning: Refutar significa demostrar que algo no es cierto. Example: El científico refutó la teoría de que el sol giraba alrededor de la Tierra. English source: To disprove something means to show that it is not true. The scientist disproved the theory that the sun moved around the Earth.

English: humanitarian Meaning: Humanitario se refiere a ayudar y proteger la vida de las personas. Example: Después de la inundación, varias organizaciones humanitarias ofrecieron ayuda. English source: If something is humanitarian, it is connected to helping people’s lives. After the flood, several humanitarian organizations offered help.

English: hypothesis Meaning: Una hipótesis es una idea sobre algo que aún no se ha demostrado. Example: El profesor hizo un experimento para comprobar si su hipótesis era correcta. English source: A hypothesis is an idea about something that has not been proved yet. The teacher did an experiment to prove whether his hypothesis was right.

English: informative Meaning: Informativo significa que aporta mucha información. Example: La guía de viaje tenía muchos datos informativos sobre la región. English source: When something is informative, it provides a lot of information. The travel guide had a lot of informative facts about the region.

English: optic Meaning: Óptico se relaciona con los ojos o la luz. Example: Su ceguera fue causada por un problema en el nervio óptico. English source: When something is optic, it relates to the eyes or light. Her blindness was caused by a problem with her optic nerve.

English: premise Meaning: La premisa es la idea en la que se basa algo. Example: La premisa de la película que vimos era poco realista. English source: A premise is an idea on which something is based. The premise of the movie that Bobbi and I watched was unrealistic.

English: rack Meaning: Una estantería es un mueble con estantes para guardar cosas. Example: Guardó sus herramientas en una estantería. English source: A rack is an object with shelves that holds things. He stored his tools on a rack.

English: Renaissance Meaning: El Renacimiento fue un período entre los siglos XIV y XVII. Example: Leonardo da Vinci fue un artista destacado del Renacimiento. English source: The Renaissance was a period between the 14th and 17th centuries. Leonardo da Vinci was a popular artist of the Renaissance.

English: spatial Meaning: Lo espacial se refiere a la posición y tamaño de las cosas. Example: Le pidieron que ubicara los libros para evaluar su sentido espacial. English source: When something is spatial, it relates to the position and size of things. He was asked where the books were located to test his spatial awareness.

English: specify Meaning: Especificar es describir algo con claridad. Example: El cartel no especificaba dónde sería el concierto. English source: To specify is to describe something clearly. The poster didn’t specify where the concert was taking place.

English: tie Meaning: Atar significa unir dos cosas sujetándolas con cuerda u otro medio. Example: El perro está acostumbrado a ir atado. English source: If you tie two things together, you fasten them with rope, string, etc. The dog is used to being tied up.

English: undertake Meaning: Emprender significa asumir la responsabilidad de hacer algo. Example: Nosotros emprendimos la tarea de informar bien a todos del progreso actual. English source: To undertake a particular task is to take on the responsibility of doing it. We undertook to make sure everybody was well informed of current progress.

English: wax Meaning: La cera es una sustancia algo brillante que se derrite al calentarse. Example: Las velas están hechas de cera. English source: Wax is a substance that is slightly shiny and melts when heated. The candles are made of wax.

English: addict Meaning: Un adicto es una persona que no puede dejar de hacer algo. Example: Ella era adicta al café y tomaba más de tres tazas al día. English source: An addict is a person who cannot stop doing something. She was a coffee addict. She had more than three cups each day.

English: archeological Meaning: Arqueológico se relaciona con la arqueología. Example: Encontraron evidencia arqueológica de una especie humana antigua. English source: When something is archeological, it relates to archeology. They found archeological evidence of an ancient species of man.

English: archeology Meaning: La arqueología estudia a las personas antiguas a través de sus objetos. Example: Estudió arqueología para aprender más sobre la cultura del antiguo Egipto. English source: Archeology is the study of ancient people through their artifacts. He studied archeology to learn more about ancient Egyptian culture.

English: brainstorm Meaning: Hacer una lluvia de ideas es generar muchas ideas sobre un tema. Example: Los estudiantes se reunieron después de clase para hacer una lluvia de ideas para sus tareas. English source: To brainstorm is to have a lot of ideas about a certain topic. The students met after school to brainstorm ideas for their assignments.

English: budget Meaning: El presupuesto es la cantidad de dinero disponible para gastar en algo. Example: Su presupuesto para alimentos era muy ajustado. English source: A budget is the amount of money available to spend on something. His budget for food was very tight.

English: chaotic Meaning: Algo caótico es desordenado, confuso y agitado. Example: El primer día de clases puede ser caótico para un estudiante nuevo. English source: When something is chaotic, it is crazy, confused, and hectic. The first day of school can be chaotic for a new student.

English: cite Meaning: Citar significa mencionar algo como ejemplo o evidencia. Example: Ella citó seis razones por las que la escuela necesitaba construir más aulas. English source: To cite something is to mention it as an example or as proof of something. She cited six reasons that the school needed to build new classrooms.

English: correspond Meaning: Corresponder significa coincidir o ser similar a algo. Example: La versión del chico no coincidía con la versión de su madre. English source: To correspond is to match or to be similar to something. The boy’s story didn’t correspond with his mother’s version.

English: courtyard Meaning: Un patio es un área abierta rodeada por un edificio. Example: En verano, el patio es un buen lugar para almorzar. English source: A courtyard is an outdoor area that is surrounded by the walls of a building. During the summer, the courtyard is a nice place to have lunch.

English: estate Meaning: Una finca es una gran propiedad de tierra de una familia u organización. Example: Vivía en la finca de su padre en el campo. English source: An estate is a large area of land owned by a family or organization. He lived on his father’s estate in the country.

English: fraud Meaning: El fraude es el delito de obtener dinero engañando o mintiendo. Example: Los expertos dicen que el fraude con tarjetas de crédito aumenta en las fiestas. English source: Fraud is the crime of gaining money by lying or by tricking people. Experts say that credit card fraud increases around the holidays.

English: hydrogen Meaning: El hidrógeno es un gas sin sabor, color ni olor. Example: Antes se llenaban los dirigibles con hidrógeno, pero explotaba fácilmente. English source: Hydrogen is a gas that has no taste, color, or smell. Airships used to be filled with hydrogen, but it exploded easily.

English: integrity Meaning: La integridad es honestidad y buenas costumbres morales. Example: El director tenía mucha integridad. English source: Integrity is honesty and good morals. The principal had a lot of integrity.

English: outlook Meaning: El punto de vista es la opinión o forma de pensar sobre algo. Example: Cambió su punto de vista sobre las ratas tras leer un libro sobre ellas. English source: An outlook is a person’s opinion or way of thinking about something. He changed his outlook about rats after he read a book about them.

English: parachute Meaning: Un paracaídas es un dispositivo que permite caer con seguridad desde el aire. Example: Los civiles recibieron suministros que se lanzaron desde aviones con paracaídas. English source: A parachute is a device that helps people and things fall to the ground safely. They used parachutes dropped from airplanes to send supplies to the civilians.

English: prehistoric Meaning: Prehistórico significa anterior a la historia escrita. Example: Los científicos encontraron ollas prehistóricas usadas por la gente de la zona. English source: When something is prehistoric, it is from a time before written history. The scientists found prehistoric pots used by the people in the area.

English: proponent Meaning: Quien apoya una idea o un plan se llama proponente. Example: Fue un proponente del uso de productos ecológicos. English source: A proponent is a person who supports an idea or a plan. He was a proponent of using environmentally-friendly products.

English: refine Meaning: Refinar significa mejorar algo mediante cambios. Example: Con los años, el director fue refinando su forma de controlar a los estudiantes. English source: To refine something is to make it better by making changes. The principal refined his method of controlling students over the years.

English: restrict Meaning: Restringir significa limitar o impedir que algo crezca. Example: El club restringió el número de miembros. English source: To restrict something is to limit it and prevent it from getting bigger. The club restricted the amount of members.

English: team Meaning: Un equipo es un grupo de personas que trabajan juntas. Example: Los All Blacks son mi equipo deportivo favorito. English source: A team is a group of people who work closely together. The All Blacks are my favorite sports team.

English: aggregate Meaning: Agregado significa formado por partes menores sumadas. Example: La empresa totalizó sus ventas agregadas de todo el año. English source: When something is aggregate, it is made up of smaller amounts added together. The company totaled its aggregate sales for the entire year.

English: antibiotic Meaning: Un antibiótico es un medicamento médico para matar bacterias y tratar infecciones. Example: El médico me puso una inyección de antibiótico cuando tuve gripe. English source: An antibiotic is a medical drug used to kill bacteria and treat infections. The doctor gave me a shot of an antibiotic when I got the flu.

English: circuit Meaning: Un circuito es una parte de un dispositivo eléctrico que permite que pase la electricidad. Example: Al reparar un circuito eléctrico, ten cuidado para no electrocutarte. English source: A circuit is a piece of an electronic device that allows electricity to flow. Be very careful not to shock yourself when fixing an electrical circuit.

English: complement Meaning: Complementar significa mejorar algo o alguien. Example: El pañuelo de lana complementó sus hermosos ojos. English source: To complement something or someone is to make them better. The wool scarf complemented her lovely eyes.

English: compress Meaning: Comprimir significa presionar o apretar para que ocupe menos espacio. Example: Comprimí mi ropa para que cupiera en una sola maleta. English source: To compress something means to press or squeeze it so that it takes up less space. I compressed my clothes to fit into a single suitcase.

English: database Meaning: Una base de datos es un conjunto de datos guardados en un ordenador. Example: La empresa tiene una base de datos con todos los nombres y cuentas de sus clientes. English source: A database is a collection of data that is stored in a computer. The company has a database of all the names and accounts of their customers.

English: equivalent Meaning: Un equivalente es una cantidad o valor igual a otro. Example: Trabajé el equivalente a sesenta horas está semana. English source: An equivalent is an amount or value that is the same as another amount or value. I worked the equivalent of sixty hours this week.

English: immune Meaning: Inmune significa que no se puede contraer una enfermedad. Example: Los niños se vacunan para hacerse inmunes a ciertas enfermedades. English source: When someone is immune to a disease, they cannot be affected by it. Children usually get shots to make them immune to certain diseases.

English: input Meaning: La entrada es la información que se introduce en un ordenador. Example: Escribe la entrada en el programa informático. English source: Input is information that is put into a computer. Type the input into the computer program.

English: intimate Meaning: Íntimo significa muy cercano o estrechamente conectado. Example: Sólo comparto mis secretos con mis amigos más íntimos. English source: When a relationship is intimate, the two things are very closely connected. I only tell my secrets to my most intimate friends.

English: magnet Meaning: Un imán es un material que atrae hierro. Example: Usé un imán para recoger los clavos que estaban tirados en el suelo. English source: A magnet is a piece of iron or other material which attracts iron toward it. I used a magnet to pick up the nails that were scattered on the floor.

English: metabolism Meaning: El metabolismo es el proceso químico por el que el cuerpo usa energía. Example: Si haces ejercicio todos los días, tu metabolismo se acelera. English source: A person’s metabolism is the way chemical processes in their body use energy. If you exercise every day, your metabolism speeds up.

English: microchip Meaning: Un microchip es un dispositivo pequeño que guarda información en un dispositivo tecnológico. Example: Puedo guardar más datos en mi ordenador si compro un microchip más potente. English source: A microchip is a small device in a computer that holds information. I can put more data on my computer if I buy a more powerful microchip.

English: phase Meaning: Una fase es una etapa en el desarrollo de algo. Example: La primera fase del proyecto de reciclaje consiste en buscar voluntarios. English source: A phase is a stage in a process or the gradual development of something. The first phase in the recycling project involves finding volunteers to help out.

English: pinch Meaning: Pellizcar es tomar piel entre los dedos y apretar. Example: Me pellizqué la nariz para no oler el olor de la basura. English source: To pinch means to take a piece of skin between one’s fingers and squeeze. I pinched my nose so I couldn’t smell the odor from the garbage.

English: prevalent Meaning: Algo prevalente es algo común o frecuente. Example: En algunos países es más prevalente llevar barba que en otros. English source: When something is prevalent, it is common. Growing a beard is more prevalent in some countries than in others.

English: quantum Meaning: Cuántico se relaciona con el comportamiento de partículas atómicas. Example: El alumno de física estudió mecánica cuántica. English source: When something is quantum, it relates to the behavior of atomic particles. The physics student studied quantum mechanics.

English: ratio Meaning: La proporción es la relación entre dos cosas expresada en números. Example: La proporción de niños y niñas es de uno a tres. English source: A ratio is a relationship between two things expressed in numbers or amounts. The boy-to-girl ratio is one to three.

English: spiral Meaning: Una espiral es una forma en espiral alrededor de un eje. Example: Una hebra de ADN parece dos espirales entrelazadas. English source: A spiral is a shape which winds round and round as if around a cylinder. A strand of DNA looks like two interlocking spirals.

English: viral Meaning: Viral se refiere a una infección causada por un virus. Example: La chica estuvo en cama una semana por una infección viral. English source: When something is viral, it is a disease or infection that is caused by a virus. The girl was in bed for a week when she had a viral infection.

English: acid Meaning: Un ácido es una sustancia química que puede quemar o disolver otras sustancias. Example: En química mezclamos dos ácidos y observamos la reacción. English source: An acid is a chemical that can burn or dissolve other substances. In chemistry class, we mixed two acids together and watched the reaction.

English: administration Meaning: La administración es el grupo de personas que gestionan una empresa. Example: Ella esperaba ascender a un puesto en administración. English source: An administration is the group of people who manage a company or organization. She hoped she could be promoted to a job in administration.

English: administrative Meaning: Administrativo se relaciona con la gestión de una empresa o organización. Example: Trabajo como asistente administrativo del dueño de la empresa. English source: Administrative describes anything related to managing a company or organization. I work as an administrative assistant to the owner of the company.

English: biotechnology Meaning: La biotecnología usa componentes vivos, como células, en la industria y tecnología. Example: Los investigadores de la compañía de biotecnología usan bacterias para fabricar medicina. English source: Biotechnology is the use of living parts, such as cells, in industry and technology. Researchers at the biotechnology company use bacteria to make medicine.

English: cholesterol Meaning: El colesterol es una sustancia grasa presente en tejidos y sangre. Example: Al tener demasiado colesterol, aumenta el riesgo de problemas del corazón. English source: Cholesterol is a substance in fat, tissues, and blood of all animals. When people have too much cholesterol, they are at a high risk for heart problems.

English: coalition Meaning: Una coalición es un grupo que trabaja junto por un objetivo común. Example: Las empresas formaron una coalición para abaratar el comercio. English source: A coalition is a group of people or organizations working for a common purpose. The companies formed a coalition to make trade less expensive.

English: deceptive Meaning: Engañoso significa inducir a creer algo falso. Example: La apariencia de ese hombre era engañosa; en realidad era muy amable. English source: When something is deceptive, it encourages one to believe something that is false. The scary-looking man’s appearance is deceptive; he is actually very nice.

English: diabetes Meaning: La diabetes es una enfermedad en la que el cuerpo no controla bien el azúcar en la sangre. Example: Las personas con sobrepeso tienen más riesgo de sufrir diabetes. English source: Diabetes is a medical condition in which a person’s body cannot control the level of sugar in their blood. Overweight people are more likely to suffer from diabetes than slimmer ones.

English: eliminate Meaning: Eliminar significa quitar algo por completo. Example: Usar cinturón de seguridad elimina algunos riesgos al conducir. English source: To eliminate something that is unwanted means to completely remove it. Wearing a seatbelt eliminates some of the dangers of driving a car.

English: erosion Meaning: La erosión es la destrucción de rocas o suelo por agua o clima. Example: Los cañones se forman porque el agua rápida causa erosión. English source: Erosion is the destruction of rock or soil due to flowing water or weather. Canyons are formed because rivers of fast-moving water caused erosion.

English: ethics Meaning: La ética son las creencias o normas sobre lo correcto e incorrecto. Example: Para algunas personas, robar claramente va contra la ética. English source: Ethics are moral beliefs or rules about right or wrong. The act of stealing certainly doesn’t go against some people’s ethics.

English: explicit Meaning: Explícito significa claro, abierto y directo. Example: El hombre dio un relato muy explícito del accidente de coche. English source: If something is explicit, it is very clear, open, and truthful. The man gave a very explicit account of the car accident.

English: framework Meaning: Un marco es un conjunto de reglas o ideas para resolver problemas. Example: Sus ideas encajaban en el marco de un plan de negocios exitoso. English source: A framework is a set of rules or ideas that people use to solve problems. His ideas fit into the framework of a successful business plan.

English: manufacture Meaning: Fabricar significa hacer algo en una fábrica. Example: La empresa de mi padre fábrica materiales de construcción de acero. English source: To manufacture something means to make it in a factory. My father’s company manufactures steel building materials.

English: mechanism Meaning: Un mecanismo es una parte de una máquina que realiza una función. Example: No puedo abrir la puerta del coche porque el mecanismo de cierre está roto. English source: A mechanism is a part of a machine that performs a certain function. I can’t open my car door because the locking mechanism is broke.

English: minimize Meaning: Minimizar significa reducir algo al nivel más bajo posible. Example: Revisé la tarea dos veces para minimizar los errores. English source: To minimize means to reduce something to the lowest possible level. I checked my homework twice to minimize errors I might have made.

English: nectar Meaning: El néctar es un líquido dulce producido por flores. Example: Las abejas usan néctar para hacer miel. English source: Nectar is a sweet liquid produced by flowers that bees and other insects collect. Bees use nectar to make their honey.

English: notion Meaning: Una noción es una idea o creencia sobre algo. Example: Tenía la noción de que este camino nos llevaría a la playa. English source: A notion is an idea or belief about something. I had a notion that this route would get us to the beach.

English: regime Meaning: Un régimen es un sistema de gobierno o de manejo. Example: Fue miembro del antiguo régimen que fue derrocado en la elección. English source: A regime is a system of government or management. He was a member of the old regime that had been overthrown in the election.

English: straightforward Meaning: Sencillo o claro significa fácil de entender. Example: El sistema de calificación del profesor era sencillo y justo. English source: When something is straightforward, it is good because it is easy to understand. The teacher’s grading system was straightforward and fair.

English: bankrupt Meaning: Quedarse en quiebra significa no poder pagar las deudas. Example: La tienda tuvo pocos clientes y pronto se fue a la quiebra. English source: If someone is bankrupt, then they are unable to pay their debts. The store had few customers and soon went bankrupt.

English: conform Meaning: Conformarse significa obedecer normas o reglas. Example: El nuevo estudiante tuvo que cumplir el código de vestimenta de la escuela. English source: To conform to rules or laws is to obey them. The new student had to conform to the school’s dress code.

English: employ Meaning: Emplear significa dar trabajo a alguien. Example: La librería emplea a dos dependientes a tiempo completo. English source: To employ someone means to give work to them. The bookstore employed two full-time clerks.

English: expel Meaning: Expulsar significa obligar a alguien a salir de un lugar. Example: Como no seguía las reglas, el director tuvo que expulsar al estudiante. English source: To expel someone means to force them to leave a place. Since he would not follow the rules, the principal had to expel the student.

English: extension Meaning: Una extensión es una parte añadida para tener más espacio o tiempo. Example: Mis padres decidieron añadir una extensión a nuestra casa para el bebé nuevo. English source: An extension is a part added to something to give it more time or space. My parents decided to add an extension to our house for the new baby.

English: forthcoming Meaning: Próximo significa inminente o que ocurrirá pronto. Example: Algunos economistas predijeron que la próxima economía mundial sería grave. English source: If something is forthcoming, then it is about to happen in the future. Some economists predicted that the forthcoming world economy would be severe.

English: furnish Meaning: Amueblar significa poner muebles en una casa o habitación. Example: La mayoría de las casas están amuebladas con mesas, sillas y camas. English source: To furnish means to put furniture in a house or room. Most homes are furnished with tables, chairs, and beds.

English: hygiene Meaning: La higiene son los hábitos y condiciones para conservar la salud y la limpieza. Example: Quienes se cepillan los dientes al menos dos veces al día practican buena higiene. English source: Hygiene is the conditions or methods needed for health and cleanliness. People who brush their teeth at least twice a day are practicing good hygiene.

English: hygienic Meaning: Higiénico significa limpio y que no provoca enfermedad. Example: Mi hermana se esfuerza mucho para que toda su casa sea lo más higiénica posible. English source: If something is hygienic, then it is clean and unlikely to cause disease. My sister works very hard to keep her entire home as hygienic as possible.

English: landlord Meaning: Alquilar significa ser el propietario que renta una propiedad. Example: El arrendador cobró la renta de todos el primer día de cada mes. English source: A landlord is a man who rents property to a person. The landlord collected everyone’s rent money on the first day of every month.

English: lease Meaning: Alquilar significa rentar una propiedad, normalmente un departamento o terreno. Example: Cuando la familia alquiló el apartamento, la renta era muy baja. English source: To lease means to rent property, usually an apartment or land. When the family first leased the apartment, the rent was very low.

English: mandatory Meaning: Algo obligatorio es requerido por ley. Example: Es obligatorio que todos tengan al menos 16 años para conducir en EE. UU. English source: If something is mandatory, then it is required by law. It’s mandatory that everyone be at least 16 to drive a car in the US.

English: mend Meaning: Reparar significa arreglar algo roto o dañado. Example: Mi madre reparó la rotura de mis pantalones con un pedazo de tela. English source: To mend something means to fix it when it is broken or damaged. Mother mended the rip in my pants with a piece of cloth.

English: mortgage Meaning: La hipoteca es un préstamo para una propiedad, especialmente una casa o un negocio. Example: Cuando compraron su casa, la pareja firmó una hipoteca. English source: A mortgage is a loan for property, especially a home or a business. When they bought their new home, the married couple had to sign a mortgage.

English: personnel Meaning: El personal es el conjunto de empleados de un negocio. Example: Cuando el negocio creció, tuvimos que contratar más personal. English source: Personnel are employees in a business. When business increased, we had to hire more personnel.

English: plumbing Meaning: La fontanería es el sistema de tuberías de una casa para suministrar agua. Example: Cuando la fontanería dejó de funcionar, nadie podía usar los baños. English source: Plumbing is the system of pipes used in a home to supply water. When the plumbing stopped working, no one was allowed to use the toilets.

English: quote Meaning: Una cita es lo que alguien ha dicho o el costo de un trabajo. Example: Su texto estaba lleno de citas de Shakespeare. English source: A quote is what someone has said, including saying how much a piece of work will cost. His writing was full of quotes from Shakespeare.

English: tenant Meaning: Un inquilino es la persona que renta una propiedad de un arrendador. Example: Los nuevos inquilinos se mudaron a la casa de enfrente. English source: A tenant is a person who rents property from a landlord. The new tenants moved into the house across the street.

English: utility Meaning: Un servicio público es una empresa que suministra agua o electricidad. Example: Si no pagas los servicios, te pueden cortar la electricidad. English source: A utility is a business that supplies services such as water or electricity. If you don’t pay the utilities, you may have your electricity turned off.

English: whereby Meaning: Mediante significa por medio de o a través de algo. Example: El alcalde construyó un puente mediante el cual los ciudadanos cruzaban el río. English source: Whereby means by which or through which. The mayor had a new bridge built whereby the citizens could cross the river.

English: adapt Meaning: Adaptarse significa cambiar para enfrentarse a una nueva situación. Example: Al llegar a la nueva ciudad, tuvo que adaptarse a los cambios de clima. English source: To adapt means to change in order to deal with a new situation. When he went to the new town, he had to adapt to all the weather changes.

English: biological Meaning: Biológico describe los procesos de la vida y los seres vivos. Example: En clase de ciencias aprendimos el proceso biológico del crecimiento bacteriano. English source: Biological describes the process of life and living things. In science class, we learned about the biological process of bacterial growth.

English: cellular Meaning: Celular se refiere a las células de animales o plantas. Example: Vio con un microscopio la actividad a nivel celular. English source: When something is cellular, it relates to the cells of animals or plants. She used a microscope to see the activity at a cellular level.

English: dynamic Meaning: Dinámico describe a alguien enérgico y con ideas creativas. Example: El nuevo empleado, dinámico, inventó una buena forma de organizar su trabajo. English source: When people are dynamic, they are lively and have creative ideas. The new, dynamic employee came up with a good way to juggle his workload.

English: fantasy Meaning: Una fantasía es una situación agradable que parece poco probable. Example: Ser astronauta es una fantasía compartida por muchos niños. English source: A fantasy is a pleasant situation that people think about but is unlikely to happen. Becoming an astronaut is a fantasy shared by many children.

English: heredity Meaning: La herencia es el proceso de transmitir rasgos de padres a hijos. Example: La cara del niño es similar a la de su padre por la herencia. English source: Heredity is the process of passing on features from parents to children. The boy’s face is similar to his father’s because of heredity.

English: internal Meaning: Interno significa que existe o sucede dentro de una persona, objeto o lugar. Example: Quitamos la carcasa externa para mostrar los cables internos de la computadora. English source: When something is internal, it exists or happens inside a person, object, or place. We removed the outer case to reveal the computer’s internal wires.

English: minimal Meaning: Mínimo significa muy poco. Example: Mi esposo perezoso hace una cantidad mínima de trabajo en casa. English source: When something is minimal, it is very small. My lazy husband does a minimal amount of work around the house.

English: pioneer Meaning: Un pionero es la primera persona en descubrir o participar en algo. Example: Él fue un pionero de la programación informática. English source: A pioneer is a person who is the first to discover or be involved in something. He was a pioneer of computer programming.

English: prescribe Meaning: Prescribir medicina significa indicar a alguien que la tome. Example: Cuando estuve enfermo, el médico me prescribió un medicamento para la gripe. English source: To prescribe medicine means to tell someone to take it. When I was sick, the doctor prescribed me flu medicine for me to take.

English: respective Meaning: Respectivo significa que corresponde por separado a cada persona mencionada. Example: Los boxeadores fueron enviados a sus respectivas esquinas. English source: When things are respective, they relate separately to each person just mentioned. The boxers were told to return to their respective corners.

English: rigid Meaning: Rígido significa severo porque no puede cambiarse. Example: Muchas sociedades tienen reglas rígidas sobre cómo actuar. English source: When rules or systems are rigid, they are severe because they cannot be changed. Societies often have rigid rules about the way that people are supposed to act.

English: sequence Meaning: Una secuencia es una serie de eventos o cosas que vienen uno tras otro. Example: Las fichas de dominó cayeron en secuencia, una tras otra. English source: A sequence is a number of events or things that come one after another. The dominos fell in a sequence of one after another.

English: similar Meaning: Similar significa casi igual. Example: Tuve una experiencia similar a la que describiste. English source: Things which are similar are almost the same. I have had a similar experience to the one you described.

English: substitute Meaning: Sustituir algo o alguien significa ocupar el lugar de otro. Example: Cuando me quedé sin zumo, sustituí agua para beber por la mañana. English source: To substitute something or someone means to have them take the place of another. When I ran out of juice, I had to substitute water to drink in the morning.

English: surgeon Meaning: Un cirujano es un médico entrenado para hacer cirugía. Example: El cirujano operó el corazón del anciano. English source: A surgeon is a doctor who is trained to do surgery. The surgeon operated on the old man’s heart.

English: therapy Meaning: La terapia es tratamiento para una enfermedad física o mental. Example: Después de romperse las piernas, usó terapia física para aprender a caminar de nuevo. English source: Therapy is treatment for a particular physical or mental illness or condition. After she broke her legs, she used physical therapy to learn how to walk again.

English: transfer Meaning: Transferir algo significa moverlo de un lugar a otro. Example: La familia transfirió las compras del carrito al coche. English source: To transfer something means to move it from one place to another. The family transferred the groceries from the shopping cart to the car.

English: transition Meaning: Una transición es un proceso de cambio de una forma a otra. Example: El clima se enfría durante la transición del verano al otoño. English source: A transition is a process where there is a change from one form to another. The weather gets colder during the transition from summer to autumn.

English: transplant Meaning: Un trasplante es una operación para reemplazar una parte dañada del cuerpo. Example: El niño enfermo necesitó un trasplante de corazón para sobrevivir. English source: A transplant is an operation in which a damaged part of one’s body is replaced. The sick child needed a heart transplant to live.

English: astrology Meaning: La astrología es el estudio de las estrellas y la creencia de que influyen en la vida. Example: Jack, que estudia astrología, cree que las estrellas pueden predecir el futuro. English source: Astrology is the study of the stars in the belief that they influence people’s lives. Jack, who studies astrology, believes that the stars can predict the future.

English: couple Meaning: Una pareja o par son dos cosas que van juntas. Example: Había un par de problemas que tenía que resolver. English source: A couple is made of two things that go together. There were a couple of problems I had to solve.

English: deviate Meaning: Desviarse es alejarse de la ruta correcta. Example: Pocos se desvían mucho del promedio. English source: To deviate is to move away from your proper course. Very few deviate much from the average.

English: differentiate Meaning: Diferenciar cosas o personas es mostrar la diferencia entre ellas. Example: Fue difícil diferenciar a los gemelos idénticos. English source: To differentiate things or people is to show the difference between them. It was hard to differentiate between the identical twins.
