English: disrupt Meaning: Interrumpir algo o a alguien es evitar que funcione. Example: El fuerte estruendo interrumpió la clase. English source: To disrupt something or someone is to prevent them from working. The loud crash disrupted the class lecture.

English: equation Meaning: Una ecuación es una operación matemática para determinar un valor. Example: Usé el teorema de Pitágoras para resolver la ecuación. English source: An equation is a math operation to determine the value of something. I used the Pythagorean theorem to solve the equation.

English: err Meaning: Errar significa cometer un error. Example: El piloto erró al estimar cuánto tiempo tomaría el viaje. English source: To err means to make a mistake. The pilot erred in his estimate of the time it would take to make the trip.

English: erroneous Meaning: Erróneo significa incorrecto o solo parcialmente correcto. Example: El niño tenía la creencia errónea de que las máquinas del tiempo eran reales. English source: When something is erroneous, it is incorrect or only partly correct. The child held the erroneous belief that time machines were real.

English: frantic Meaning: Frenético es comportarse de forma descontrolada por miedo. Example: El gato se puso frenético cuando intenté bañarlo. English source: If people or things are frantic, they behave in a wild way because they are frightened. The cat became frantic when I tried to give it a bath.

English: inadvertent Meaning: Inadvertido es una acción hecha sin darse cuenta. Example: Ella cometió un error inadvertido al derribar el esmalte de uñas. English source: When an action is inadvertent, it is done without realizing what you are doing. She made an inadvertent error when she knocked over the nail polish.

English: improvise Meaning: Improvisar algo es hacerlo con lo disponible, sin planificar. Example: No había carne para la pizza, así que improvisamos con lo que había en la nevera. English source: To improvise something is to do it with whatever is available or without planning. There was no meat for the pizza, so we improvised with what was in the fridge.

English: latitude Meaning: La latitud de un lugar es su distancia al ecuador. Example: El dispositivo podía decir al viajero su latitud exacta. English source: The latitude of a place is its distance from the equator. The device was able to tell the traveler his exact latitude.

English: mariner Meaning: Un marinero es una persona que navega en el mar. Example: El viejo marinero usó su telescopio para encontrar la costa. English source: A mariner is a sailor. The old mariner used his telescope to find the shore.

English: multitude Meaning: Una multitud es un número muy grande de cosas o personas. Example: Una multitud de gente esperaba en el aeropuerto. English source: A multitude of things or people is a very large number of them. A multitude of people were waiting at the airport.

English: nuisance Meaning: Una molestia es una persona o cosa que resulta irritante o problemática. Example: La hermana adolescente veía a sus hermanos ruidosos como una gran molestia. English source: A nuisance is a person or thing that is annoying or causes a lot of problems. The teenager considered her noisy little brothers to be quite a nuisance.

English: permanence Meaning: La permanencia de algo es su capacidad de durar para siempre. Example: Malos resultados amenazan la permanencia del nuevo sistema. English source: The permanence of something is its ability to last forever. Poor results threaten the permanence of the new system.

English: revolve Meaning: Revolverse en torno a algo es tomarlo como tema central. Example: Mi vida gira en torno al deporte. English source: To revolve around something is to keep it as the main feature or focus. My life revolves around sports.

English: soothe Meaning: Calmar significa tranquilizar a alguien enojado o alterado. Example: La madre calmó a su bebé llorando al mecerlo en sus brazos. English source: To soothe means to calm someone who is angry or upset. The mother soothed her crying baby by rocking him in her arms.

English: stranded Meaning: Estar varado es no poder salir de un lugar. Example: Cuando el avión despegó, mi hermana y yo quedamos varados en China. English source: If someone is stranded, they are prevented from leaving a place. When the plane left, my sister and I were stranded in China.

English: technique Meaning: Una técnica es una forma de hacer algo. Example: Hay muchas técnicas de enseñanza bien respaldadas por la investigación. English source: A technique is a way of doing something. There are a lot of teaching techniques that are well supported by research.

English: absurd Meaning: Absuro significa ridículo. Example: Ese grupo haciendo ruidos de animales suena completamente absurdo. English source: If something or someone is absurd, they are ridiculous. That group of people making animal noises sounds completely absurd.

English: aristocracy Meaning: La aristocracia es la clase más alta de personas en ciertas sociedades. Example: La mayoría de la aristocracia estaba bien alimentada. English source: The aristocracy is the highest class of people in certain societies. Most members of the aristocracy were very well fed.

English: aristocrat Meaning: Un aristócrata es una persona de la clase más alta en ciertas sociedades. Example: El aristócrata no necesitaba un trabajo porque su familia era rica. English source: An aristocrat is a person who is of the highest class in certain societies. The aristocrat did not need a job because his family was wealthy.

English: attire Meaning: El atuendo es ropa bonita o especial. Example: Todos vestían su mejor atuendo para la boda de la hija del presidente. English source: Attire is nice or special clothing. Everyone wore their best attire to the president’s daughter’s wedding.

English: craze Meaning: Una moda es una actividad u objeto de gran popularidad pero breve. Example: Llevar calcetines rojos era una moda cuando estaba en la secundaria. English source: A craze is a brief and popular activity or object. Wearing bright red socks was a craze when I was in high school.

English: denote Meaning: Denotar significa servir como signo o sustituto de otra cosa. Example: Las comillas se usan para denotar el habla. English source: When one thing denotes another, it stands as a sign or substitute for that thing. Quotation marks are used to denote speech.

English: enlarge Meaning: Agrandar algo significa hacerlo más grande. Example: Las aulas se agrandaron en verano para caber más estudiantes. English source: To enlarge something means to make it bigger. The classrooms were enlarged over the summer to make room for more students.

English: excess Meaning: Un exceso es una cantidad mayor de la necesaria o deseada. Example: Ese invierno muchas tiendas tuvieron un exceso de abrigos. English source: An excess is an amount of something that is more than needed or wanted. Because it never got cold that winter, many stores had an excess of coats.

English: feminine Meaning: Femenino significa tener cualidades que se asocian comúnmente con mujeres. Example: Muchos pensaban que su cabello largo lo hacía parecer demasiado femenino. English source: If something is feminine, then it has qualities that are commonly related to women. Many of the older people thought his long hair made him look too feminine.

English: hierarchy Meaning: Una jerarquía es un sistema de personas u objetos ordenados de mayor a menor. Example: Todos saben en qué lugar están dentro de la jerarquía. English source: A hierarchy is a system of things or people ranked one above the other. Everyone knows where they fit in the hierarchy.

English: pad Meaning: Una almohadilla es una pieza blanda y gruesa para proteger o limpiar. Example: Los jugadores de fútbol usan hombreras para protegerse. English source: A pad is a thick piece of soft material used to protect or clean things. Football players wear shoulder pads to keep them safe.

English: partner Meaning: Tu pareja es alguien que vive o trabaja contigo como igual. Example: Buenas noches, tomen a sus parejas para el próximo baile. English source: Your partner is someone who lives or works with you as an equal. Ladies and gentlemen, take your partners for the next dance.

English: predominant Meaning: Predominante significa lo más importante, común o fuerte. Example: Antes de que inventaran los autos, los caballos eran el método predominante de viaje. English source: If something is predominant, then it is the most important, common, or strongest. Before cars were invented, horses were the predominant method of travel.

English: protocol Meaning: El protocolo es un sistema de reglas y costumbres que guía cómo se hacen las cosas. Example: La llegada de los huéspedes siguió el protocolo normal. English source: Protocol is a system of rules and customs that guides how things are done. The introduction of the guests followed the normal protocol.

English: reputable Meaning: Alguien o algo de buena reputación es respetado y confiable. Example: El servicio de la empresa de mala reputación la enfadó. English source: If someone or something is reputable, then they have a good reputation. The service from the less-than-reputable company made her angry.

English: signify Meaning: Significar significa ser símbolo o representación de algo. Example: Un octágono rojo se usa para significar una zona de alto. English source: To signify means to be a symbol of something. A red octagon is used to signify a place to stop.

English: strap Meaning: Una correa es una tira fina de tela o material para sujetar o sostener algo. Example: Ella puso la correa de su bolso sobre el hombro y salió. English source: A strap is a thin long piece of fabric used to fasten, carry, or hold something. She put the strap of her purse over her shoulder and walked out the door.

English: style Meaning: El estilo es la manera en que haces las cosas. Example: Su ropa estaba en el estilo más moderno. English source: Your style is the way you do things. Her clothes were all in the latest style.

English: tangle Meaning: Un enredo es algo o muchas cosas enredadas juntas. Example: Los cordones de sus zapatos estaban en un gran enredo. English source: A tangle is something or many things twisted together. The laces of his shoes were in such a tangle that he could not untie them.

English: vanity Meaning: La vanidad es orgullo excesivo por la propia apariencia o logros. Example: Su vanidad no la deja pasar ante un espejo sin mirarse. English source: Vanity is excessive pride or love of one’s own appearance or things one has done. Her vanity won’t allow her to pass a mirror without looking at herself.

English: ashore Meaning: A la orilla significa pasar del agua a tierra firme. Example: Tras un día de pesca, Glen llevó su bote a la orilla para que no se fuera. English source: If something goes ashore, it goes from the water to the land. After a long day of fishing, Glen pulled his boat ashore, so it wouldn’t float away.

English: contradict Meaning: Contradecir significa decir lo contrario de lo que otra persona dijo. Example: Ken siempre peleaba con su hermana porque ella lo contradijo. English source: To contradict means to state the opposite of what someone else has said. Ken was always fighting with his little sister because she kept contradicting him.

English: counterpart Meaning: Un homólogo es algo muy similar a algo más en función. Example: Más tarde hoy se reunirá con el homólogo de la empresa rival. English source: A counterpart is something that is very similar to something else in what it does. Our manager will meet our rival company’s counterpart later today.

English: devoid Meaning: Cuando alguien o algo está carente de algo, le falta ese algo. Example: La película estaba carente de violencia, así que era ideal para la familia. English source: When something or someone is devoid of a thing, they are missing it. The movie was devoid of any violence, so it was a perfect movie for the family.

English: diverge Meaning: Divergir es alejarse de una dirección apropiada. Example: El camino se dividió en dos rutas que conducían a nuestras casas. English source: To diverge is to become different or to follow a different direction. The road diverged into two paths that led to our houses.

English: embryo Meaning: Un embrión es un ser humano o animal que todavía crece en la madre. Example: Algunos médicos dicen que lo que come la madre afecta mucho a su embrión. English source: An embryo is a human or animal that is still growing inside its mother. Some doctors say that what a mother eats has a big effect on her embryo.

English: finally Meaning: Finalmente significa que algo ocurre al final de una serie de eventos. Example: Finalmente llegamos a nuestro destino. English source: When something finally happens, it happens at the end of a series of events. We finally reached our destination.

English: gazette Meaning: Una gaceta es un periódico. Example: Alice quiere escribir para una gaceta cuando sea mayor. English source: A gazette is a newspaper. Alice wants to write for a gazette when she’s older.

English: homogeneous Meaning: Homogéneo significa que está hecho de cosas todas iguales. Example: Todas las casas de la calle de Victor eran aburridas y homogéneas. English source: If something is homogeneous, it is made up of things which are all the same. All of the houses on Victor’s block were boring and homogenous.

English: individual Meaning: Un individuo es un miembro de un grupo. Example: Cada individuo es responsable de sí mismo. English source: An individual is a single member of a group. Each individual is responsible for themselves.

English: major Meaning: Algo mayor es muy importante o grande. Example: Hubo un cambio mayor en la política gubernamental. English source: A major event is a very important event. There had been a major shift in government policy.

English: obstruct Meaning: Obstruir algo significa estorbar su camino. Example: El coche se descompuso y obstruyó el tráfico durante horas. English source: To obstruct something means to get in its way. The car broke down on the road and obstructed traffic for hours.

English: plunge Meaning: Sumergirse es moverse rápidamente hacia abajo o dentro de algo. Example: El agua de la piscina estaba muy fría, pero el niño se sumergió de todas formas. English source: To plunge means to move down into something very quickly. The water in the pool was very cold, but the boy plunged in anyway.

English: prolong Meaning: Prolongar significa hacer que algo dure más tiempo. Example: Sandy caminó lento por la playa para prolongar su receso. English source: To prolong means to make something last for a longer time. Sandy walked slowly across the beach, trying to prolong her lunch break.

English: publicize Meaning: Publicitar es hacer que algo reciba mucha atención. Example: La empresa publicitó las vacantes de trabajo en el periódico. English source: To publicize is to make something get a lot of attention. The company publicized the job positions in the newspaper.

English: surplus Meaning: Un excedente es una cantidad extra de algo. Example: La tienda vendió sus productos excedentes con descuento. English source: A surplus is an extra amount of something. The store sold their surplus items on sale.

English: survive Meaning: Sobrevivir significa continuar viviendo pese a dificultades. Example: Ella sobrevivió a un infarto. English source: When something survives, it manages to continue to live in spite of difficult circumstances. She survived a heart attack.

English: theorize Meaning: Teorizar significa desarrollar ideas sobre algo. Example: Disfrutaron teorizar sobre cómo funcionaban las cosas. English source: To theorize means to develop ideas about something. They enjoyed theorizing about how things worked.

English: verify Meaning: Verificar significa averiguar si algo es cierto. Example: Julio llamó al cine para verificar que la función empezaba a las nueve. English source: To verify means to find out if something is true. Julian called the movie theater to verify that the movie started at nine.

English: vigorous Meaning: Vigoroso significa usar mucha energía. Example: Henry hace ejercicio vigoroso para mantenerse en forma. English source: If something or someone is vigorous, they use a lot of energy. Henry uses vigorous exercise to keep himself in shape.

English: altar Meaning: Un altar es una mesa usada en iglesias. Example: El altar tenía muchas velas encendidas. English source: An altar is a table used in churches. The altar had many lit candles on it.

English: arthritis Meaning: La artritis es una enfermedad que causa dolor y hinchazón en las articulaciones. Example: Agatha no pudo tocar el piano por su artritis. English source: Arthritis is an illness causing pain and swelling in a person’s joints. Agatha couldn’t play the piano anymore because of her arthritis.

English: botany Meaning: La botánica es el estudio de las plantas. Example: Los jardines son los mejores lugares para la botánica. English source: Botany is the study of plants. Gardens are the best places for botany.

English: credible Meaning: Creíble significa que puede creerse o confiarse. Example: Dick dio un motivo creíble por llegar tarde y no recibió problemas. English source: If something or someone is credible, they can be believed or trusted. Dick gave a credible reason for being late and didn’t get in any trouble.

English: deceased Meaning: Fallecido significa que alguien está muerto. Example: Visitamos las tumbas de nuestros abuelos fallecidos. English source: If someone is deceased, they are dead. We visited the graves of our deceased grandparents.

English: deception Meaning: El engaño es el acto de mentir o engañar a alguien. Example: La magia parecía real, pero era solo un engaño. English source: Deception is the act of lying or tricking someone. The magic looked very real, but it was only deception.

English: document Meaning: Un documento es un texto escrito, que generalmente no es un libro. Example: Escanea ese documento para que tengamos copia electrónica. English source: A document is a written text, usually not in the form of a book. Please scan this document so we have an electronic copy.

English: dung Meaning: El estiércol es material sólido de desecho producido por animales. Example: Había estiércol de vaca en todo el campo. English source: Dung is solid waste material produced by animals. There was cow dung all over the field.

English: dusk Meaning: El anochecer es la hora de la tarde en que empieza a oscurecer. Example: Después del anochecer, Hannah salió a cazar luciérnagas al parque. English source: Dusk is the time in the evening when it begins to get dark. After dusk, Hannah went to catch fireflies in the park.

English: gratify Meaning: Gratificar a alguien significa darle satisfacción. Example: Bonnie quedó gratificada al recibir su regalo de los padres. English source: To gratify someone means to please them. Bonnie was gratified after receiving her gift from her parents.

English: hone Meaning: Pulir algo significa mejorarlo y hacerlo excelente. Example: Lisa pulió sus habilidades de ajedrez durante muchas horas de práctica. English source: To hone something is to improve it and make it very good. Lisa honed her chess skills through hours and hours of practice.

English: interpret Meaning: Interpretar algo significa encontrar su significado, a menudo cambiándolo de idioma. Example: Es difícil interpretar mientras alguien esté hablando. English source: When you interpret something, you find its meaning, often by changing it into a different language. It is difficult to interpret while someone is speaking.

English: motive Meaning: El motivo es la razón para hacer algo. Example: Podemos mostrar que tenía un motivo para cometer el crimen, pero no probar que lo hizo. English source: Your motive is your reason for doing something. We can show he had a motive to commit the crime, but we cannot show he did it.

English: pneumonia Meaning: La neumonía es una enfermedad grave que llena los pulmones de líquido. Example: Elaine contrajo neumonía tras jugar bajo la lluvia sin abrigo. English source: Pneumonia is a dangerous illness causing the lungs to fill with liquid. Elaine got pneumonia after playing outside in the rain without a coat.

English: psychic Meaning: Psíquico es alguien que sabe lo que ocurrirá o piensa la gente. Example: Creo que mi abuela tiene capacidades psíquicas porque predice mucho. English source: When someone is psychic, they know what will happen or what people think. I think my grandmother has psychic abilities because she can predict anything.

English: psychotic Meaning: Psicótico se refiere a una enfermedad mental muy grave. Example: El paciente psicótico creía ver cosas que no eran reales. English source: If someone is psychotic, they have a very serious mental illness. The psychotic patient believed he saw things that weren’t real.

English: scope Meaning: El alcance de algo es a cuántas personas o cosas afecta. Example: La historia moderna tiene un alcance amplio. English source: The scope of something is how many people or things it relates to. Modern history has a wide scope.

English: sinister Meaning: Siniestro significa malvado o amenazador. Example: Los villanos suelen tener risas siniestras en las películas. English source: If something or someone is sinister, they are evil. Bad guys in most movies have sinister laughs.

English: strife Meaning: El conflicto es el desacuerdo o pelea entre personas o grupos. Example: Había mucha riña entre Jim y Lisa por qué programa ver. English source: Strife is disagreement or fighting between people or groups. There was a lot of strife between Jim and Lisa about what TV show to watch.

English: text Meaning: El texto es el lenguaje usado para comunicarse en mensajes. Example: El texto hablado tiene características distintas al texto escrito. English source: Text is language used in communicating messages. Spoken text has many features which are different from written text.

English: artery Meaning: Una arteria es un conducto que lleva sangre del corazón al resto del cuerpo. Example: Comer sano mantiene las arterias limpias para que la sangre fluya con facilidad. English source: An artery is a tube that takes blood from the heart to the rest of the body. Eating healthily keeps your arteries clean so blood can flow with ease.

English: deterioration Meaning: Deterioro es el proceso de empeorar algo. Example: La falta de cuidado llevó al deterioro de la casa. English source: Deterioration is the act of becoming worse. The lack of care led to the deterioration of the house.

English: elusive Meaning: Esquivo significa difícil de encontrar. Example: El pez esquivo solo salía de noche. English source: If things or people are elusive, they are hard to find. The elusive fish only came out at night.

English: ensure Meaning: Asegurar algo significa hacer que suceda. Example: Ahorrar ahora asegurará tener suficiente dinero para la jubilación. English source: When you ensure something, you make sure it happens. Saving now will ensure we have enough money for our retirement.

English: induce Meaning: Inducir algo significa hacer que ocurra. Example: Correr sin buenos zapatos puede inducir dolor de piernas. English source: To induce something means to make it happen. Running without good shoes may induce leg pain.

English: inseparable Meaning: Inseparable significa que no se puede separar. Example: Denise y Diana han sido inseparables desde que se conocieron. English source: If two things are inseparable, they can’t be separated. Denise and Diana have been inseparable since they first met.

English: invalid Meaning: Inválido significa no correcto. Example: Usar argumentos inválidos hace que pierdas una discusión. English source: If something is invalid, it is not correct. The way to winning debates is to avoid invalid arguments.

English: magnify Meaning: Magnificar algo significa hacerlo ver más grande de lo que es. Example: Los astrónomos usan telescopios para magnificar estrellas lejanas. English source: To magnify something means to make it look bigger than it really is. Astronomers use telescopes to magnify faraway stars.

English: mainstream Meaning: La corriente principal es lo que se considera normal y aceptado por la mayoría. Example: Antes de que el punk rock fuera mainstream, pocos lo escuchaban. English source: The mainstream is what is considered normal and accepted by most people. Before punk rock music became part of the mainstream, only a few people liked it.

English: microbe Meaning: Un microbio es un ser vivo muy pequeño que suele enfermar a las personas. Example: El primer paso para curar una enfermedad es encontrar el microbio causante. English source: A microbe is a very small living thing that often makes people sick. The first step in curing a disease is finding the microbe that causes it.

English: minor Meaning: Un problema menor es pequeño e importante poco. Example: Este es un problema menor. English source: A minor problem is a very small and unimportant problem. This is a minor problem.

English: negligible Meaning: Insignificante significa extremadamente pequeño y sin importancia. Example: Lo que debía no era significativo: era menos de diez centavos. English source: If something is negligible, it is extremely small and not important. The amount she owed was negligible. It was less than ten cents.

English: paralysis Meaning: La parálisis es la pérdida de la capacidad de mover todo o parte del cuerpo. Example: Su parálisis hizo que tuviera que usar silla de ruedas. English source: Paralysis is the loss of the ability to move all or part of your body. His paralysis meant that he had to use a wheelchair to get around.

English: pest Meaning: Una plaga es un animal o insecto que daña plantas o alimentos. Example: Muchos granjeros ponen espantapájaros para alejar plagas de maíz. English source: A pest is an animal or insect that hurts plants or food. Many farmers put up scarecrows to keep pests of their corn.

English: prevail Meaning: Prevalecer significa ser aceptado o muy común. Example: Por desgracia, la injusticia todavía prevalece en el sistema judicial del país. English source: To prevail means to be accepted or very common. Unfortunately, injustice still prevails in the country’s court system.

English: pursuit Meaning: La persecución es perseguir algo o alguien. Example: La búsqueda de la felicidad es un derecho humano básico. English source: When you are in pursuit of something, you are chasing it. The pursuit of happiness is a basic human right.

English: rupture Meaning: Ruptura significa desgarrar o romper de forma brusca. Example: Sara metió demasiada agua en el globo y éste se rompió. English source: To rupture means to tear or burst open. Sarah put too much water into the balloon, and it ruptured.

English: savage Meaning: Algo salvaje es muy violento o cruel. Example: Los animales son muy salvajes al defender a sus crías. English source: If things or people are savage, they are very violent or cruel. Wild animals are very savage when defending their babies.

English: stun Meaning: Aturdir a alguien significa dejarlo sin hablar por sorpresa o impacto. Example: Tim se cayó del columpio y quedó tan aturdido que no pudo llorar. English source: To stun someone means to make them unable to speak due to surprise or shock. Tim fell of the swing and was too stunned to cry.

English: susceptible Meaning: Susceptible a algo como una enfermedad significa ser afectado fácilmente. Example: No comer suficientes verduras te hace más susceptible a enfermarte. English source: If one is susceptible to something like a disease, they are easily harmed by it. Not eating enough vegetables makes you more susceptible to getting sick.

English: advocate Meaning: Abogar por un plan o idea es apoyarlo públicamente. Example: El grupo abogó por más presupuesto para educación y escuelas. English source: To advocate a plan or idea is to support or suggest it in public. The group advocated increased spending on education and schools.

English: albeit Meaning: Aunque significa pese a ello. Example: Ella estaba feliz, aunque de forma breve. English source: Albeit means although. (It is made of three parts – al(though), be, it. She was happy, albeit briefly.

English: authorize Meaning: Autorizar significa dar permiso. Example: El alcalde autorizó la construcción de una nueva estatua en el parque. English source: To authorize something means to give permission for it. The mayor authorized the construction of a new statue in the park.

English: civilian Meaning: Civil es alguien que no pertenece al ejército. Example: El trabajo de Todd fue mantener a los civiles fuera de la base militar. English source: A civilian is someone who is not in the military. It was Todd’s job to keep civilians from entering the army facility.

English: commodity Meaning: Una mercancía es algo que se puede comprar o vender. Example: El tío de Fran ganó mucho dinero comerciando mercancías. English source: A commodity is something that can be bought or sold. Fran’s uncle made most of his money trading commodities.

English: communicate Meaning: Comunicar con otros significa hablarles o escribirles. Example: No pudo comunicar claramente sus sentimientos. English source: When we communicate with others, we talk or write to them. He was unable to communicate his feelings clearly.

English: conquest Meaning: Una conquista es cuando un país toma control de otro. Example: Tras la conquista, la gente de la pequeña ciudad perdió la libertad. English source: A conquest is an event by which one country takes over another country. After the conquest, the people of the small city had no freedom.

English: disclose Meaning: Revelar algo significa contarlo a alguien más. Example: Al llegar tarde, John tuvo que revelar sus actividades a su esposa. English source: To disclose something means to tell it to someone else. John came home late, so he had to disclose his activities to his wife.

English: dynamics Meaning: La dinámica de una situación es la forma en que sus partes se afectan entre sí. Example: Un buen psicólogo debe conocer la dinámica de trastornos mentales. English source: The dynamics of a situation are the way that parts of it affect each other. A good psychologist needs to know a lot about the dynamics of brain disorders.

English: enroll Meaning: Inscribirse en algo es poner el nombre en una lista como miembro. Example: Los estudiantes tenían que inscribirse en la clase un semestre antes. English source: To enroll in something is to put one’s name on a list as a member of a group. The students had to enroll in the class one semester in advance.

English: envious Meaning: Envidioso significa querer lo que otra persona tiene. Example: Estaban envidiosos del jardín delantero de su vecino. English source: When someone is envious, they want something that another person has. They were envious of their neighbor’s front yard.

English: festive Meaning: Festivo es alegre y relacionado con una fiesta o celebración. Example: Lo mejor de la Navidad para Dean es la ropa festiva que la gente usa. English source: When something is festive, it is happy and related to a party or celebration. Dean’s favorite part of Christmas is the festive clothing that people wear.

English: indicate Meaning: Indicar algo significa mostrar o señalar pensamientos o planes. Example: Indicaron que las cosas probablemente mejorarían pronto. English source: When we indicate something, we show or point out our thoughts or plans. They indicated that things would be likely to improve soon.

English: lentil Meaning: La lenteja es un grano muy pequeño que la gente cocina y come. Example: Danni hizo su sopa especial con lentejas cuando su esposo estaba enfermo. English source: Lentils are very small beans that people cook and eat. Danni made her special soup with lentils when her husband was sick.

English: marshal Meaning: Organizar un grupo significa reunirlo de forma ordenada. Example: Los estudiantes fueron organizados afuera y separados en grupos. English source: To marshal a group means to assemble them in order. The students were marshaled outside and put into groups.

English: morale Meaning: La moral es la cantidad de esperanza que la gente tiene en una situación difícil. Example: Para mejorar la moral de la familia, mamá sugirió ir de picnic. English source: Morale is the amount of hope that people have during a difficult situation. To improve our family’s morale, mom suggested going on a picnic.

English: mood Meaning: El estado de ánimo es la manera en que te sientes. Example: Mi jefe está hoy de muy mal humor. English source: Your mood is the way you are feeling. My boss is in a really bad mood today.

English: prophecy Meaning: Una profecía es una predicción de lo que ocurrirá en el futuro. Example: Algunas personas creen que las profecías son ciertas. English source: A prophecy is a prediction about what will happen in the future. Some people believe that prophecies are actually true.

English: senate Meaning: El senado es parte del gobierno en algunos países. Example: Todo el mundo quería que Caroline hablara por ellos en el senado. English source: A senate is a part of the government in some countries. Everybody liked Caroline and chose her to speak for them in the senate.

English: unrest Meaning: La agitación es un estado de enojo entre la gente de un lugar. Example: Los altos impuestos causaron mucha agitación y la guerra revolucionaria. English source: Unrest is a state of anger about something among the people in a place. High taxes caused much of the unrest that led to the Revolutionary War.

English: certify Meaning: Certificar algo significa confirmar que sus resultados son verdaderos. Example: La foto de su pasaporte certificaba que ella era Jolene Sawyer. English source: To certify something means to confirm that its results are true. The photograph on her passport certified that she was indeed Jolene Sawyer.

English: coherent Meaning: Las partes de un programa coherente encajan bien entre sí. Example: Era un programa coherente para resolver el problema de inundaciones. English source: The parts of a coherent plan fit well together. This was a coherent program for solving the flooding problem.

English: collaborate Meaning: Colaborar significa trabajar juntos en algo. Example: Cuando colaboraron, lograron terminar sus tareas pronto. English source: To collaborate means to work together on something. When they collaborated, they managed to finish their chores early.

English: compile Meaning: Compilar cosas significa reunir una variedad de elementos en un conjunto. Example: Ella compiló una lista de personas que quería en su cumpleaños. English source: To compile things means to collect a variety of them into a group. She compiled a list of people who she wanted to attend her birthday party.

English: curb Meaning: Frenar algo significa prevenir que ocurra o aumente. Example: Ella frenó su enojo al escuchar una canción relajante. English source: To curb something means to prevent it from happening or increasing. She curbed her anger by listening to a relaxing song.

English: diagnose Meaning: Diagnosticar a alguien significa identificar su condición médica. Example: Varios niños fueron diagnosticados con gripe. English source: To diagnose someone means to identify the medical condition they have. Several of the children were diagnosed with the flu.

English: enact Meaning: Promulgar algo significa convertirlo en ley. Example: El consejo promulgó una ley que solo permitía buses en el centro. English source: To enact something means to make it into a law. The council enacted a law that would only allow buses to drive downtown.

English: federation Meaning: Una federación es un grupo de estados o negocios que trabaja por un fin común. Example: Las Naciones Unidas es una federación creada para prevenir guerras y hambrunas. English source: A federation is a group of states or businesses working for a common cause. The United Nations is a federation designed to prevent war, disease, and famine.

English: gross Meaning: Repugnante significa asqueroso o desagradable. Example: La comida era tan repugnante que el perro no pudo comerla. English source: If something is gross, then it is disgusting. The food was so gross that the dog couldn’t eat it without feeling sick.

English: humane Meaning: Humano es bueno y compasivo con las personas. Example: Ayudar a construir casas para pobres es muy humano. English source: If something is humane, then it is good and kind. Helping build homes for poor people is very humane.

English: needy Meaning: Necesitado significa pobre o con carencias económicas. Example: Después de perder su trabajo, se volvió muy necesitado. English source: If someone is needy, they are very poor. After he lost his job, he became very needy.

English: onset Meaning: El inicio de algo desagradable es el comienzo de ese algo. Example: Al inicio de la batalla, el enemigo no estaba preparado para un ataque tan grande. English source: The onset of something unpleasant is the beginning of it. At the onset of the battle, the enemy wasn’t prepared for such a large attack.

English: pledge Meaning: Prometer significa hacer una promesa de hacer algo. Example: Su madre prometió encontrar el gatito perdido de ella. English source: To pledge means to make a promise to do something. Her mother pledged that she would find her daughter’s lost kitten.

English: prohibit Meaning: Prohibir algo significa no permitirlo. Example: Prohibió a los alumnos hablar hasta terminar su trabajo. English source: To prohibit something means to not allow it. She prohibited the students from speaking until their work was done.

English: render Meaning: Render significa hacer que algo se convierta en otra cosa. Example: Su informe se volvió irrelevante al publicarse nueva información. English source: To render something means to make it become something else. His report was rendered unimportant by the release of new information.

English: smallpox Meaning: La viruela es una enfermedad que causa granitos pequeños y fiebres altas. Example: Cuando vio los granitos, pensó que su hijo podría tener viruela. English source: Smallpox is a disease that causes tiny bumps on the skin and high fevers. When she saw the tiny bumps, she thought her son might have smallpox.

English: transform Meaning: Transformar algo significa cambiarlo de forma importante. Example: El sistema educativo se transformó por completo. English source: To transform something is to change it in a very significant way. The education system has been completely transformed.

English: transmit Meaning: Transmitir algo significa pasar de una persona o lugar a otro. Example: La torre de radio transmite una señal a todas las radios en un radio de veinte kilómetros. English source: To transmit something means to pass it from one person or place to another. The radio tower transmits a signal to all the radios in a 20-kilometer radius.

English: vow Meaning: Jurar significa hacer una promesa de hacer algo. Example: Antes de trabajar, todos los senadores juran no aceptar sobornos. English source: To vow means to make a promise to do something. Before they are allowed to work, all senators must vow to never accept bribes.

English: widespread Meaning: Algo generalizado se extiende ampliamente en el mundo. Example: Existe una creencia generalizada de que los resfriados los causa el frío. English source: Something that is widespread is spread widely across the world. It is a widespread belief that colds are caused by cold weather.

English: adhere Meaning: Adherirse significa actuar de acuerdo con una norma o acuerdo. Example: Si los nuevos empleados quieren triunfar, deben adherirse a las reglas del jefe. English source: To adhere means to act in the way that a rule or agreement says is right. If the new employees wish to succeed, they must adhere to the boss’s rules.

English: administer Meaning: Administrar significa hacerse responsable de organizar algo. Example: La asistente del profesor administrará la prueba. English source: To administer means to take responsibility for organizing something. The teacher’s assistant will administer the test.

English: compassionate Meaning: Compasivo significa sentir piedad y simpatía por otros. Example: La enfermera compasiva intentó que el hombre enfermo se sintiera cómodo. English source: When people are compassionate, they feel pity and sympathy for others. The compassionate nurse tried to make the sick man feel comfortable.

English: contaminate Meaning: Contaminar algo significa poner químicos sucios o dañinos en ello. Example: El lago se contaminó cuando polución entró al agua. English source: To contaminate something means to put dirty or harmful chemicals into it. The lake was contaminated when pollutants entered the water.

English: deficiency Meaning: Deficiencia es falta de algo, especialmente de lo necesario. Example: Tu merienda tenía una deficiencia de nutrientes reales. English source: A deficiency is a lack of something, especially something that is needed. Your snack has a deficiency of any real nutrients.

English: emphasis Meaning: El énfasis es atención especial a algo. Example: El gobierno puso un fuerte énfasis en la reforma educativa. English source: When you put an emphasis on prevention, you give special attention to prevention. The government placed a strong emphasis on educational reform.

English: epidemic Meaning: Una epidemia es un brote de enfermedad que se extiende rápidamente. Example: Fue difícil detener la epidemia de gripe. English source: An epidemic is an outbreak of a disease that spreads quickly. It was difficult to stop the flu epidemic.

English: hazard Meaning: Un peligro es algo que puede ser dañino para la salud o seguridad. Example: Fumar cigarrillos conlleva muchos peligros para la salud. English source: A hazard is something that could be dangerous to a person’s health or safety. Smoking cigarettes poses many health hazards.

English: imperative Meaning: Algo imperativo es extremadamente importante y debe hacerse. Example: Era imperativo que él encontrara un empleo. English source: When something is imperative, it is extremely important and must be done. It was imperative for him to find a job.

English: intestines Meaning: Los intestinos son tubos por donde pasa la comida tras el estómago. Example: Todo lo que comes pasa por los intestinos. English source: Intestines are tubes through which food passes after it leaves the stomach. Whatever you eat goes into your intestines.

English: manifest Meaning: Manifestar significa hacer visible u obvio. Example: La alegría de las fiestas se manifestó en sonrisas brillantes de los niños. English source: To manifest means to make something visible or obvious. The joy of the holiday season manifested as bright smiles on the faces of the children.

English: overcrowded Meaning: Un lugar saturado tiene demasiada gente o cosas. Example: El vestíbulo estaba saturado de personas. English source: When a place is overcrowded, it has too many people or things in it. The lobby was overcrowded with people.

English: practitioner Meaning: Un practicante es un médico. Example: Hizo cita con el médico para tratar su tos. English source: A practitioner is a doctor. She made an appointment with the practitioner to treat her cough.

English: provision Meaning: La provisión es el acto de dar algo a quienes lo necesitan. Example: Ese departamento es responsable de la provisión de suministros de emergencia. English source: The provision of something is the act of giving it to people in need or want. That department is responsible for the provision of emergency supplies.

English: replenish Meaning: Reponer algo significa hacerlo lleno o completo otra vez. Example: Plantamos casi cien semillas para reponer el jardín después del incendio. English source: To replenish something means to make it full or complete again. We planted nearly one hundred seeds to replenish the garden after the fire.

English: reverse Meaning: Revertir o ir en reversa significa ir hacia atrás. Example: Revertimos hacia atrás de la plaza y luego manejamos. English source: When a car reverses, it goes backwards. We reversed out of the parking place and then drove away.

English: sterile Meaning: Estéril significa completamente limpio y libre de gérmenes. Example: La habitación del hospital parecía muy estéril. English source: When something is sterile, it is completely clean and free from germs. The hospital room looked quite sterile.

English: upgrade Meaning: Mejorar algo significa hacerlo más eficiente o mejor. Example: Actualizó su coche por uno más elegante. English source: To upgrade something means to improve it or make it more efficient. He upgraded to a real fancy car.

English: viable Meaning: Viable significa capaz de hacer lo que se propone. Example: Su método para resolver el problema de matemáticas parecía viable. English source: When something is viable, it is capable of doing what it is intended to do. Her method of solving the math problem seemed viable.

English: voluntary Meaning: Voluntario significa hecho por elección y no obligatorio. Example: Mucha gente asistió a la clase de seguridad marítima voluntaria. English source: When something is voluntary, it is done by choice but is not required. Many people attended the voluntary boat safety class.

English: airway Meaning: La vía aérea es el pasaje por el que entra el aire a los pulmones. Example: Como estaba enfermo, la mucosidad se quedaba atrapada en su vía aérea. English source: An airway is the passage by which air reaches a person’s lungs. Since he was sick, mucus would occasionally get stuck in his airway.

English: Almighty Meaning: El Todopoderoso es un nombre para Dios en una religión. Example: Antes de comer, agradecieron al Todopoderoso por su comida. English source: The Almighty is a name for a god in a religion. Before eating, they thanked the Almighty for their food.

English: advent Meaning: Advenimiento es la llegada o comienzo de un evento importante. Example: Durante el advenimiento de la radio, pocos programas tocaban música. English source: An advent is the arrival or beginning of an important person, thing, or event. During the advent of radio, very few programs actually played music.

English: cycle Meaning: Un ciclo es una serie de eventos que vuelven del final al principio. Example: Quedaron atrapados en un ciclo de pobreza, falta de educación y desempleo. English source: A cycle is a series of events that go in a circle from the end back to the beginning again. They were caught in a cycle of poverty, lack of education, and unemployment.

English: definitive Meaning: Definitivo significa lo más oficial o concluyente. Example: Esta biblioteca tiene la colección definitiva de libros sobre el antiguo Egipto. English source: If something is definitive, then it is the most official. This library has the definitive collection of books on ancient Egypt.

English: equate Meaning: Equiparar una cosa con otra es compararlas y considerarlas muy parecidas. Example: Ella equiparó la apariencia desordenada del hombre con falta de responsabilidad. English source: To equate one thing with another is to compare them and consider them very similar. She equated the man’s messy appearance with a lack of responsibility.

English: found Meaning: Basarse en una idea o principio significa apoyarse en esa idea. Example: Esto se basa en la creencia de que todos los seres humanos son iguales. English source: To found something on an idea or principal is to base it on that idea. This is founded on the belief that all people are created equal.

English: ideology Meaning: Una ideología es un sistema de creencias. Example: Dentro de la ideología de los maestros había fe en la participación de los padres. English source: An ideology is a system of belief. Within the teachers’ ideology, there was a belief in the value of parent participation.

English: inhale Meaning: Inhalar significa tomar aire u olor hacia los pulmones. Example: El campista inhaló el aire fresco de la montaña y se relajó. English source: To inhale means to take air or a smell into the lungs. The camper inhaled the cool and fresh mountain air and felt relaxed.

English: invoke Meaning: Invocar significa mencionar o llamar en apoyo de algo. Example: Antes de la batalla, el soldado invocó el nombre de su dios para pedir protección. English source: To invoke something is to mention it to support an argument or ask for help. Before going into battle, the soldier invoked the name of his god for protection.

English: lunar Meaning: Relacionado con la luna. Example: Un eclipse lunar oscurece la superficie de la luna. English source: If something is lunar, then it is related to the moon. During a lunar eclipse, Earth’s shadow darkens the moon’s surface.

English: novelty Meaning: Una novedad es algo nuevo, original o extraño. Example: El helado era una novedad para él, porque raramente tenía alguno. English source: A novelty is something that is new, original, or strange. Ice cream was a novelty for him since he rarely had any.

English: outmoded Meaning: Anticuado significa que ya no está de moda o no se usa. Example: Los televisores en blanco y negro son anticuados. English source: If something is outmoded, then it is no longer in fashion or use. Black and white television sets are outmoded.

English: personalize Meaning: Personalizar algo es adaptarlo a las necesidades de una persona. Example: Ella personalizó los ejercicios de la mujer para darle un mejor entrenamiento. English source: To personalize something means to design it to meet a person’s unique needs. He personalized the woman’s exercises to give her a better workout.

English: psychiatric Meaning: Psiquiátrico se relaciona con las enfermedades mentales o su tratamiento. Example: El médico dijo que el paciente podía tener un problema psiquiátrico. English source: If something is psychiatric, then it is related to mental illness or its treatment. The doctor said the patient might have a psychiatric problem.

English: psychiatry Meaning: La psiquiatría es el estudio y tratamiento de las enfermedades mentales. Example: Estudiar psiquiatría me enseñó mucho sobre la salud mental. English source: Psychiatry is the study and treatment of mental illness. Studying psychiatry has taught me a lot about mental illness.

English: reflex Meaning: Un reflejo es una respuesta automática del cuerpo. Example: Al golpearle la rodilla con un martillo, tuvo un reflejo inmediato. English source: A reflex is an unconscious action in which a body part responds to an event. There was a reflex when the doctor hit his knee with a rubber hammer.

English: seizure Meaning: Una convulsión es una pérdida súbita de control del cuerpo con temblores. Example: Las luces intensas y parpadeantes pueden causar convulsiones en niños. English source: A seizure is a sudden condition in which the body loses control and shakes. Bright flashing lights can cause seizures in children.

English: session Meaning: Una sesión es una reunión periódica para tratar y resolver un problema. Example: Cada tres meses, los gerentes se reunían en sesión para hablar de ventas. English source: A session is a meeting at a regular time in order to discuss and solve an issue. Every three months, the managers met in a session to discuss regional sales.

English: utensil Meaning: Un utensilio es una herramienta o recipiente de uso común. Example: Un tenedor no era el utensilio adecuado para comer sopa. English source: A utensil is a common tool or container. It seemed that a fork was the wrong utensil for trying to eat the soup.

English: allocate Meaning: Asignar algo significa reservarlo para un fin o persona. Example: El gobierno asignó 100 millones de dólares a la ayuda por el desastre. English source: To allocate something means to put it aside for a certain purpose or person. The government allocated $100 million to aid the disaster relief effort.

English: appetizing Meaning: Algo apetitoso se ve y huele muy bien. Example: El plato de galletas apetitoso desapareció en media hora. English source: When food is appetizing, it looks and smells very good. The appetizing plate of cookies was gone in half an hour.

English: assign Meaning: Asignar trabajo es dar tareas a personas específicas. Example: Me asignaron el trabajo de asegurar suficiente agua para todos. English source: When you assign work, you give that work to particular people. I was assigned the job of making sure everyone had plenty to drink.

English: cavity Meaning: Una cavidad es un agujero o espacio en algo. Example: Había una pequeña cavidad en la pared de la cueva donde vivía un animal. English source: A cavity is a hole or space in something. There was a small cavity in the wall of the cave, where an animal lived.

column1: en el sentido de las agujas del reloj
column2: English: clockwise Meaning: Moverse en sentido de las agujas del reloj significa girar como una aguja de reloj. Example: Gira el tornillo en sentido de las agujas del reloj para apretarlo. English source: If something moves clockwise, it moves in a circle in the same direction as a clock. Turn the screw clockwise to tighten it.

English: concentric Meaning: Dos círculos concéntricos tienen el mismo centro. Example: El blanco era una serie de círculos concéntricos. English source: When circles or rings are concentric, they have the same center. The target was a series of concentric circles.

English: courtesy Meaning: La cortesía es buena educación y trato amable. Example: Jenna siempre muestra mucha cortesía cuando llega gente a su casa. English source: Courtesy is the excellence of manners or social conduct. Jenna always behaves with great courtesy when people visit her home.

English: crisp Meaning: Algo crujiente tiene superficie dura de forma agradable. Example: Mi merienda favorita es una bolsa de papas crujientes y deliciosas. English source: When food is crisp, it is hard or has a hard surface in a way that is pleasant. My favorite snack is a bag of crisp, delicious potato chips.

English: discord Meaning: La discordia es desacuerdo o disputa. Example: Hubo mucha discordia entre los expertos en el programa de televisión. English source: Discord is disagreement or fighting. There was much discord between the experts on the talk show.

English: generate Meaning: Generar algo significa hacer que algo aparezca o empiece. Example: El alcalde prometió generar nuevos empleos y programas para ayudar a los pobres. English source: To generate something means to cause it to develop or begin. The mayor promised to generate new jobs and programs to help the poor.

English: item Meaning: Un ítem es una pieza única y separada. Example: Encontraron algunos ítems de ropa en la escena del crimen. English source: An item is a single separate piece. There were some items of clothing found at the crime scene.

English: interchange Meaning: El intercambio es una discusión de ideas entre personas. Example: Hubo un intercambio de ideas entre los grupos. English source: An interchange of ideas between people is a discussion of each person’s idea. There was an interchange of ideas between the groups.

English: multicultural Meaning: Lo multicultural se relaciona con muchas culturas. Example: Todo el mundo fue bienvenido al evento multicultural. English source: When something is multicultural, it relates to many different cultures. Everyone was welcome to attend the multicultural celebration.

English: omission Meaning: La omisión es algo que se dejó fuera o no se hizo. Example: Mike se molestó por la omisión de su nombre durante la ceremonia. English source: An omission is something that has been left out or not done. Mike was upset because of the omission of his name during the ceremony.

English: oversee Meaning: Supervisar algo es asegurarse de que se haga bien. Example: Su trabajo era supervisar el progreso del proyecto de construcción. English source: To oversee something means to make sure that it is being done properly. His job was to oversee the progress of the construction project.

English: pierce Meaning: Perforar significa hacer un agujero con un objeto punzante. Example: La flecha perforó el blanco justo en el centro. English source: To pierce something means to make a hole in it using a sharp object. The arrow pierced the target in the very center.

English: select Meaning: Seleccionar significa elegir con cuidado. Example: Tuvieron que seleccionar libros de texto para cada clase. English source: When you select something, you carefully choose it. They had to select textbooks for each class.

English: structure Meaning: La estructura es la forma y organización de las partes de algo. Example: Existen grandes diferencias en la estructura familiar entre culturas. English source: The structure involves the shape and organization of the parts of a building or group. There are big differences in family structure in different cultures.
English: visual Meaning: Visual se refiere a la vista. Example: Las imágenes visuales eran muy atractivas. English source: Visual relates to seeing. The visual displays were very attractive.

English: wavy Meaning: Algo ondulado no es recto y tiene curvas. Example: El niño dibujó líneas onduladas por toda la hoja. English source: When something is wavy, it is not straight but has a series of curves. The child drew wavy lines all over the piece of paper.

English: conversion Meaning: La conversión es el cambio de un estado o forma a otro. Example: El barrio discutió la conversión del aparcamiento en parque de skate. English source: Conversion is the act of changing something into a different state or form. The city discussed the conversion of the parking lot into a skateboard park.

English: cram Meaning: Amontonar cosas significa ponerlas en un lugar que apenas las contiene. Example: Metió todas sus camisas en el cajón superior. English source: To cram things means to put them into a place that can barely contain them. He crammed all of his shirts into the top drawer of the dresser.

English: defer Meaning: Aplazar significa dejar una acción para más tarde. Example: La niña estaba muy cansada y decidió aplazar su baño hasta la mañana. English source: To defer means to arrange for an action to happen at a later time. The girl was very sleepy, so she chose to defer her bath until morning.

English: export Meaning: Exportar productos es venderlos en otros países. Example: Estados Unidos exporta muchos cereales y granos. English source: To export products means to sell them to other countries. The United States exports many cereals and grains.

English: fume Meaning: Los vapores son humos y gases dañinos producidos por fuego o químicos. Example: El motor emitió vapores negros desagradables al aire. English source: Fumes are unhealthy smoke and gases that are made by fires or chemicals. The engine put unpleasant, black fumes into the air.

English: habitual Meaning: Habitual es una conducta que alguien suele hacer. Example: El hombre era un mentiroso habitual e incapaz de ser honesto. English source: When something is habitual, it is a behavior that a person usually does or has. The man was a habitual liar who was incapable of being honest with anyone.

English: justify Meaning: Justificar algo es mostrar o probar que es necesario. Example: El gobierno trató de justificar su decisión de llevar al país a la guerra. English source: To justify something means to show or prove that it is necessary. The government tried to justify its decision to bring the country into a war.

English: notwithstanding Meaning: Usamos a pesar de para indicar que algo ocurre aunque otra cosa ya se haya hecho. Example: A pesar de tus objeciones, decidimos avanzar con el proyecto. English source: We use notwithstanding when we want to show that, although something has been done, it is not enough. A similar term is “in spite of”. Notwithstanding your objections, we have decided to move forward with the project.

English: output Meaning: La producción es la cantidad que una persona o cosa genera. Example: El jefe contrató más trabajadores para aumentar la producción de la fábrica. English source: Output is the amount of something that a person or thing produces. The boss hired more workers to increase the factory’s output of products.

English: overpopulation Meaning: La sobrepoblación es la situación de tener demasiada gente en un área. Example: La organización está preocupada por la sobrepoblación mundial. English source: Overpopulation is the state of having too many people in an area. The organization is concerned with the overpopulation of the world.

English: patent Meaning: Una patente es el derecho exclusivo para fabricar o vender un producto nuevo. Example: Rápidamente registró una patente para su brillante invención. English source: A patent is a right to be the only person allowed to make or sell a new product. He quickly established a patent for his brilliant invention.

English: penalize Meaning: Penalizar a alguien significa castigarlo. Example: El equipo fue penalizado por romper las reglas. English source: To penalize someone means to punish him or her. The team was penalized when they broke the rules.

English: petroleum Meaning: El petróleo es un recurso natural líquido del que se hacen muchos combustibles. Example: El petróleo de esa fábrica se usa para producir gasolina. English source: Petroleum is a liquid natural resource from which many fuels are made. The petroleum at that factory is used to make gasoline.

English: region Meaning: Una región es una gran zona de tierra con rasgos comunes. Example: Esta es la región cerealera del país. English source: A region is a large area of land usually based on some common feature. This is the wheat-growing region of the country.

English: scrap Meaning: Un scrap es una pequeña cantidad de algo. Example: A Chris le gustaba usar muchos recortes de papel para pensar ideas. English source: A scrap of something is a small amount of it. Chris liked to use many scraps of paper when thinking up ideas.

English: sector Meaning: Un sector es una parte de la economía de un país dedicada a una industria. Example: Aprendimos sobre algunas fábricas del sector manufacturero. English source: A sector is a part of a country’s economy in a specific type of industry. We learned about just a few of the factories within the manufacturing sector.

English: subscribe Meaning: Suscribirse a algo es estar de acuerdo con ello. Example: Ella se suscribió a la idea de mantener la educación musical en las escuelas. English source: To subscribe to something is to agree with it. She subscribed to the view that musical education should be kept in schools.

English: subsist Meaning: Subsistir es tener comida, agua y dinero para seguir vivo. Example: Algunas personas se ven obligadas a subsistir con solo unos pocos dólares al mes. English source: To subsist means to have the food, water, and money needed to stay alive. Some people are forced to subsist on only a few dollars a month.

English: suspend Meaning: Suspender algo significa detener o posponerlo por un tiempo. Example: La compañía suspendió la producción hasta garantizar que la fábrica fuera segura. English source: To suspend something means to delay or stop it from happening for a while. The oil company suspended production until it was sure the factory was safe.

English: synthesis Meaning: Una síntesis es la combinación de ideas o estilos diferentes. Example: La música de la banda fue una síntesis de muchos géneros. English source: A synthesis is a combination of different ideas or styles. The band’s music was a synthesis of many different musical genres.

English: acrobat Meaning: Un acróbata entretiene haciendo proezas físicas impresionantes. Example: En el circo había acróbatas que hacían saltos complicados. English source: An acrobat is a person who entertains people by doing amazing physical things. There were acrobats at the circus that did impressive and complicated jumps.

English: advocacy Meaning: La abogacía es el acto de apoyar o recomendar algo. Example: La fuerte abogacía de Janine hizo que más personas quisieran asistir. English source: Advocacy is the act of supporting or recommending something. Janine’s strong advocacy for the event made people want to attend.

English: communal Meaning: Comunal involucra a un grupo de personas. Example: Theo y su hijo recogían basura en el parque comunal los fines de semana. English source: If something is communal, it involves a group of people. On the weekends, Theo and his son picked up trash in the communal park.

English: fluid Meaning: Algo fluido se mueve con suavidad y gracia. Example: Boris era un bailarín famoso porque su movimiento era muy fluido. English source: If something is fluid, it is smooth and moves gracefully. Boris was a famous ballet dancer because people admired his fluid movements.

English: harmonize Meaning: Armonizar significa hacer que cosas distintas funcionen bien juntas. Example: Los sabores dulce y ácido armonizaron muy bien entre sí. English source: To harmonize means to make different things go well together. The sweet and sour flavors of the dish harmonized well and tasted great.

English: industrious Meaning: Una persona aplicada o industriosa trabaja con constancia. Example: Dennis era muy aplicado, por eso nunca tuvo problemas para encontrar trabajo. English source: If someone is industrious, they work hard. Dennis was very industrious, so he never had problems finding a job.

English: inventive Meaning: Una persona inventiva es buena creando cosas nuevas. Example: La estudiante inventiva construyó un robot para ayudarla con las tareas. English source: When someone is inventive, they are good at creating new things. The inventive student built a robot to help her with her chores.

English: Mandarin Meaning: El mandarín es uno de los dos idiomas principales chinos. Example: Aunque sus padres hablaban mandarín, él solo podía hablar inglés. English source: Mandarin is one of the two main Chinese languages. Although John’s parents both spoke Mandarin, he could only speak English.

English: metropolitan Meaning: Lo metropolitano se relaciona con una gran ciudad. Example: Después de años en una granja, Rufu se mudó a un área metropolitana. English source: If something is metropolitan, it relates to a large city. After years of living on a farm, Rufu was finally moving to a metropolitan area.

English: mimic Meaning: Imitar algo es copiar su sonido, movimiento o aspecto. Example: El cazador imitó el llamado de un pato y ambos respondieron. English source: To mimic something means to copy the way it sounds, moves, looks, etc. The hunter mimicked a duck’s call and shot the two ducks that called back.

English: misguided Meaning: Algo equivocado o mal orientado se basa en mal juicio. Example: Molly se hirió al intentar atrapar la serpiente de forma equivocada. English source: When something is misguided, it is based on bad judgment or wrong beliefs. The snake bit Molly during her misguided attempt to catch it.

English: rehearse Meaning: Ensayar significa practicar y prepararse para una actuación. Example: La banda de Vick ensayó toda la semana antes de su primer show. English source: To rehearse means to practice and prepare for a performance in front of people. Vick’s band rehearsed all week before their first show.

English: resourceful Meaning: Una persona ingeniosa sabe usar bien sus recursos. Example: Como era tan ingenioso, podía fabricar la mayoría de lo que necesitaba. English source: A resourceful person is clever at using what resources they have. Because he was very resourceful, he could make most of the things he needed rather than buying them.

English: scorn Meaning: Despreciar a alguien es actuar sin respeto hacia esa persona. Example: La comunidad mostró desprecio por el criminal. English source: To scorn someone means to behave without respect toward them. The criminal was scorned by everyone in the community.

English: sensory Meaning: Lo sensorial se relaciona con los sentidos. Example: Iris y Eric preferían la emoción sensorial de ver películas en el cine. English source: If something is sensory, it is related to the senses. Iris and Eric preferred the sensory thrill of watching movies in the theater.

English: statute Meaning: Un estatuto es una ley oficial escrita. Example: El nuevo estatuto hizo ilegal pasear perros en el parque. English source: A statute is a law that is official and has been written down. The new statute made it illegal to walk dogs in the park.

English: technical Meaning: Técnico se refiere a la pericia o dominio de una técnica. Example: Su habilidad técnica era perfecta. English source: Technical skill requires good control of technique. Her technical skill was perfect.

English: veteran Meaning: Un veterano es alguien con mucha experiencia. Example: Hank era el veterano del equipo y había corrido más carreras que nadie. English source: A veteran is someone who has a lot of experience doing something. Hank was the team veteran and had completed more races than anyone else.

English: villain Meaning: Un villano es una persona mala que rompe la ley o daña a otros. Example: El villano huyó con la mitad de las joyas de mi familia. English source: A villain is an evil person who breaks the law or hurts others. The villain made of with half of my family’s valuables.

English: vine Meaning: La vid es una planta de tallos largos y retorcidos que trepa. Example: Las ramas de los árboles estaban cubiertas de vides. English source: A vine is a plant that has long, twisting stems and climbs upward. The branches of the trees were covered with vines.
English: aroma Meaning: El aroma es un olor o fragancia. Example: Me encanta el aroma del café por la mañana. English source: An aroma is a scent or smell. I love the aroma of coffee in the morning.

English: beverage Meaning: Una bebida es una infusión o líquido para tomar. Example: El camarero trajo primero nuestras bebidas y luego la comida. English source: A beverage is a drink. The waiter brought our beverages first. Then he brought our food.

English: cluster Meaning: Un racimo es un grupo pequeño y denso de elementos. Example: Sostenía un gran racimo de uvas en su mano. English source: A cluster of things is a small group of them placed close together. She held a large cluster of grapes in her hand.

English: combine Meaning: Combinar es unir cosas para formar una sola unidad. Example: Mina combinó mantequilla de cacahuete y mermelada para hacer un sándwich. English source: To combine is to join together to make a single thing or group. Mina combined peanut butter and jelly to make a sandwich.

English: condensed Meaning: Un líquido condensado se vuelve más denso y espeso. Example: Una forma de espesar y endulzar un postre es usar leche condensada. English source: When a liquid is condensed, it is made thicker. One way to make a dessert thick and sweet is to use condensed milk.

English: contemporary Meaning: Contemporáneo se relaciona con el tiempo presente. Example: Los científicos contemporáneos han aprendido mucho sobre el ADN. English source: When something is contemporary, it is related to the present time. Contemporary scientists have learned quite a bit about DNA.

English: cultivate Meaning: Cultivar plantas es cuidarlas para que crezcan. Example: La empresa de investigación está cultivando nuevas variedades de arroz. English source: To cultivate plants is to care for them and help them grow. A research company is cultivating new kinds of rice to aid poor countries.

English: divine Meaning: Divino se relaciona con los dioses. Example: Las leyendas dicen que la música fue un regalo divino de los dioses. English source: When something is divine, it is related to gods. Legends say that music was given to humans as a divine gift from the gods.

English: humid Meaning: Cuando es húmedo hay mucha agua en el aire. Example: Dentro de una sauna está muy húmedo. English source: When it is humid, there is a lot of water in the air. It is very humid inside a sauna.

English: odor Meaning: El olor es un perfume o hedor muy distintivo. Example: Notó un fuerte olor a gas natural y supo que había una fuga. English source: An odor is a very distinct smell. He knew there was a leak when he noticed the strong odor of natural gas.

English: palate Meaning: El paladar es la parte superior de la boca. Example: Puedes tocar tu paladar con la lengua. English source: The palate is the top part of the mouth. You can touch your palate with your tongue.

English: paradise Meaning: El paraíso es un lugar o estado de felicidad y perfección. Example: Mi vacaciones en Hawái fueron como estar en el paraíso. English source: Paradise is the place or condition of happiness where things are perfect. My vacation in Hawaii was like being in paradise.

English: plantation Meaning: Una plantación es una gran granja de cultivos específicos. Example: En el siglo XIX había muchas plantaciones de algodón en el sur de EE. UU. English source: A plantation is a big farm that only grows certain kinds of crops. In the 1800s, there were many cotton plantations in the southern US.

English: rapid Meaning: Algo rápido cambia o se mueve con mucha velocidad. Example: Su madre se sorprendió por el rápido crecimiento de su hijo. English source: When something is rapid, it moves or changes very quickly. His mother was surprised by her son’s rapid growth.

English: rate Meaning: La tasa es la velocidad con que ocurre algo. Example: La hierba suele crecer a una tasa muy lenta. English source: A rate is the speed at which something happens. Grass tends to grow at a very slow rate.

English: soothing Meaning: Algo calmante ayuda a que uno se relaje. Example: La música calmante ayudó al bebé a dormirse. English source: When something is soothing, it makes you calm or relaxed. The soothing music helped the baby fall asleep.

English: subtle Meaning: Algo sutil no se nota fácilmente. Example: El hombre guapo tiene una sonrisa sutil. English source: When something is subtle, it is not easy to see or notice. The handsome man has a subtle smile.

English: texture Meaning: La textura es el aspecto y tacto de la superficie de algo. Example: La textura de una roca sumergida en agua suele ser muy lisa. English source: The texture of something is the way its surface looks and feels. The texture of a rock found in the water is typically very smooth.

English: toxic Meaning: Algo tóxico es venenoso y peligroso. Example: Revisa la etiqueta para ver si el producto es tóxico. English source: When something is toxic, it is poisonous and very dangerous. Please check the label to see if the product is toxic.

English: vary Meaning: Variar significa ser distinto en cantidad o tamaño. Example: Las alturas de las personas de mi clase varían bastante. English source: To vary means to be different from another thing in size or amount. The heights of the people in my class vary by a large amount.

English: admiral Meaning: Un almirante es quien dirige una gran fuerza naval. Example: Ganaron la batalla marítima por el gran liderazgo del almirante. English source: An admiral is someone who controls many military ships. They won the sea battle because of the admiral’s great leadership.

English: arc Meaning: Un arco es una forma curva. Example: Un arco iris es un arco de bandas de color en el cielo. English source: An arc is a curved shape. A rainbow is an arc of colored bands across the sky.

English: character Meaning: El carácter es la personalidad de alguien. Example: El carácter de mi hermana es divertido y extrovertido. English source: Your character is your personality. My sister’s character is fun and very outgoing.

English: conscience Meaning: La conciencia es la sensación interna de lo correcto o incorrecto. Example: Reciclo todo lo posible, así que mi conciencia está tranquila. English source: Your conscience is your inner sense of what is right and wrong. I recycle everything I can, so my conscience is clear!

English: escape Meaning: Escapar de un lugar es lograr salir de él. Example: Intentó escapar del edificio. English source: If you escape from a place, you succeed in getting away from it. She tried to escape from the building.

English: fiery Meaning: Algo ardiente arde con intensidad. Example: El fuego ardiente quemó durante toda la noche. English source: If something is fiery, it is burning strongly. The fiery blaze burned all night long.

English: flesh Meaning: La carne es el músculo y la grasa del cuerpo. Example: La piel de la cebra cubre su cuerpo junto con la carne subyacente. English source: Flesh is the muscle and fat on your body. The zebra’s flesh is covered by black and white skin.

English: grapefruit Meaning: El pomelo es una fruta similar a una naranja, pero más grande y menos dulce. Example: ¿Quieres un pomelo con el desayuno? English source: A grapefruit is a fruit similar to an orange, but bigger and not as sweet. Would you like a grapefruit with your breakfast?

English: hay Meaning: El heno es hierba seca usada para alimentar animales. Example: Necesito comprar más heno para que el caballo coma. English source: Hay is dry grass used to feed animals and can be used for different purposes. I need to buy some more hay for the horse to eat.

English: horrified Meaning: Estar horrorizado significa estar muy impactado y alterado. Example: Me horrorizó leer sobre la anciana atacada. English source: If you are horrified, you are very shocked and feel upset. I was horrified when I read about the old lady who was attacked.

English: kerosene Meaning: El queroseno es un tipo de aceite usado en lámparas y estufas. Example: Muchas personas en países pobres cocinan con estufas de queroseno. English source: Kerosene is a type of oil used in some lamps and stoves. Many people in poor countries cook on kerosene stoves.

English: loop Meaning: Un bucle es una línea formada en forma de círculo. Example: Hizo un bucle con la cuerda y lo colocó sobre el poste. English source: A loop is a line made into the shape of a circle. He made a loop with the rope and placed it over the post.

English: middle Meaning: El medio es el punto central, con igual número de cosas a ambos lados. Example: Desperté de golpe en la mitad de la noche. English source: The middle is nearest the center and with an equal number of things on each side. I suddenly woke up in the middle of the night.

English: paddle Meaning: Un remo es una pieza de madera o plástico para mover una embarcación. Example: Pon el remo en el agua y tira fuerte para avanzar el bote. English source: A paddle is a piece of wood or plastic that moves a boat across water. Put your paddle in the water and pull hard to make the boat move.

English: sour Meaning: El agrio es algo con sabor ácido y fuerte. Example: No me gustan los limones porque son demasiado agrios. English source: When something is sour, it has a sharp and unpleasant taste. I don’t like lemons because I think they are too sour.

English: stake Meaning: Una estaca es un trozo pequeño de metal o madera que se clava en tierra. Example: Marcamos nuestra propiedad colocando estacas en el suelo. English source: A stake is a small, sharp piece of wood or metal that is put into the ground. We marked our property by placing stakes into the ground.

English: steward Meaning: Un/a steward o azafata sirve comida en aviones y barcos. Example: El steward está trayendo té. English source: A steward is a person like a waiter who serves food on planes and ships. The steward is bringing some tea.
