English: string Meaning: Una cuerda es una tira delgada de material flexible. Example: Encontré una gran bola de cuerda. English source: String is a thin piece of fabric or rope. I found a large ball of string.

English: thorn Meaning: Una espina es una parte punzante de una planta. Example: Ten cuidado con las espinas cuando recojas rosas. English source: A thorn is a sharp part of a plant. Be careful of the thorns when you pick up the roses!

English: wreck Meaning: Dañar o arruinar algo es arruinarlo. Example: Los adolescentes destrozaron la casa sin motivo. English source: To wreck something means to destroy or ruin it. The teenagers wrecked the house for no reason at all.

English: admonish Meaning: Amonestar a alguien es reprenderlo por su conducta. Example: El maestro amonestó a Mark porque mascaba chicle en clase. English source: To admonish someone is to tell them you disapprove of their behavior. The teacher admonished Mark because he was chewing gum in class.

English: audible Meaning: Algo audible puede oírse. Example: El sonido de los tambores se oía desde varios kilómetros. English source: If something is audible, then it is able to be heard. The sound of the drums was audible from miles away.

English: awesome Meaning: Algo impresionante es asombroso o impactante. Example: El enorme avión militar era una vista impresionante. English source: If things or people are awesome, they are impressive or frightening. The huge military plane was an awesome sight.

English: beware Meaning: Tener cuidado de alguien es prevenir un peligro. Example: Debes cuidarte de conducir rápido en carreteras mojadas. English source: To beware means to be careful of something or someone that is dangerous. You should beware of driving fast on wet roads.

English: brag Meaning: Presumir es hablar con orgullo de las propias habilidades o logros. Example: Él presumió de sus músculos ante toda la clase. English source: To brag means to talk of one’s abilities or achievements in a proud way. He had strong muscles and bragged about them to the entire class.

English: conscious Meaning: Ser consciente de algo significa darse cuenta. Example: La nueva estudiante era consciente de que todos la estaban mirando. English source: If someone is conscious of something, then they are aware of it. The new student was conscious of the other students staring at her.

English: disagree Meaning: Disentir significa tener una opinión diferente. Example: Los abogados disentían sobre la mejor forma de resolver el caso. English source: To disagree with someone means to have a different opinion from them. The lawyers disagreed about the best way to settle the case.

English: echo Meaning: Un eco es la repetición de un sonido al rebotar. Example: El niño gritó en el cañón y su voz hizo eco en la pared. English source: To echo means that a sound repeats itself because it bounced off an object. The child yelled over the canyon, and the sound echoed off the wall.

English: eventual Meaning: Algo eventual sucede al final de una cadena de hechos. Example: El entrenamiento y la planificación llevaron al equipo a una victoria final. English source: If something is eventual, it will happen at the end of a series of events. The constant training and planning led the team to an eventual victory.

English: hint Meaning: Una sugerencia es una pista de que algo es probable o verdadero. Example: Le di una sugerencia a mi hermana sobre el examen. English source: A hint is information that suggests something will happen or is true. I quietly passed on a hint to my sister about the test.

English: idiot Meaning: Un idiota es una persona poco inteligente o que hace algo tonto. Example: Como se perdió en el bosque, el hombre se sintió un idiota. English source: An idiot is a person who is not smart or who has done something silly. Because he got lost in the forest, the man felt like an idiot.

English: immense Meaning: Algo inmenso es de un tamaño muy grande. Example: Se necesitó una cantidad inmensa de dinero para comprar ese barco. English source: If something is immense, it is very large. An immense amount of money was needed to buy such a large boat.

English: indirect Meaning: Indirecto significa no ser el camino más directo. Example: Eligió la ruta más indirecta hasta la costa. English source: If something is indirect, then it is not the easiest or straightest way. He chose to take the most indirect route to the coast.

English: option Meaning: Una opción es elegir entre dos o más cosas. Example: A los niños les dieron la opción de elegir entre tres casas. English source: An option is a choice between two or more things. The children were given the option of three houses to pick from.

English: pastime Meaning: Un pasatiempo es una actividad recreativa frecuente. Example: En Estados Unidos, el béisbol se considera un pasatiempo nacional. English source: A pastime is an activity that you do often for fun. In the US, baseball is considered a national pastime.

English: perfect Meaning: Perfecto significa sin errores. Example: Sacó todas las respuestas bien, así que su puntuación fue perfecta. English source: If something is perfect, then it is without any mistakes. She got all the questions right, so her score was perfect.

English: pinpoint Meaning: Señalar con precisión significa ubicar algo exactamente. Example: El navegador de mi coche puede señalar mi ubicación exacta. English source: To pinpoint something means to locate it exactly. The navigation system in my car is able to pinpoint my exact location.

English: switch Meaning: Cambiar significa pasar de una cosa a otra. Example: La madre cambió el canal de las noticias a su programa favorito. English source: To switch means to change something to something else. Mom switched the TV station from the news to her favorite show.

English: thorough Meaning: Exhaustivo significa completo y cuidadosamente hecho. Example: Tina hizo un trabajo exhaustivo limpiando las manchas de la alfombra. English source: If something is thorough, it is complete or done carefully. Tina did a thorough job of cleaning the stains out of the carpet.

English: torment Meaning: Atormentar a alguien es hacerle sufrir a propósito. Example: Ella atormentaba a su hermano pequeño quitándole su juguete favorito. English source: To torment someone means to cause them to suffer on purpose. She tormented her little brother by taking his favorite toy.

English: abrupt Meaning: Repentino significa súbito e inesperado. Example: Cuando la bailarina cayó hacia atrás, el ballet se detuvo bruscamente. English source: If something is abrupt, it is sudden or unexpected. When the dancer fell down on her back, the ballet came to an abrupt stop.

English: agony Meaning: La agonía es dolor o sufrimiento intenso. Example: El niño gritó de agonía cuando el perro pequeño le mordió. English source: Agony is severe pain or suffering. The boy yelled in agony when the puppy bit him.

English: assassin Meaning: Un asesino es quien mata a una persona importante. Example: Un asesino mató a Martin Luther King el 4 de abril de 1968. English source: An assassin is someone who murders an important person. An assassin killed Martin Luther King on April 4, 1968.

English: beard Meaning: La barba es el vello del mentón y las mejillas de un hombre. Example: El granjero tenía una barba larga, blanca como la nieve. English source: A beard is hair that grows on a man’s chin and cheeks. The farmer had a long beard, as white as snow.

English: beast Meaning: Una bestia es un animal grande y peligroso. Example: Tanzania alberga muchas bestias famosas como leones y leopardos. English source: A beast is a large and dangerous animal. Tanzania is home to many famous beasts, such as lions, leopards, and hyenas.

English: chapel Meaning: La capilla es un lugar para rezar y adorar a Dios. Example: Nos casamos en una pequeña capilla en Las Vegas. English source: A chapel is a building where people go to pray and worship God. We were married in a small wedding chapel in Las Vegas.

English: commentator Meaning: Un comentarista da opiniones o describe algo, a menudo por TV o radio. Example: Según muchos comentaristas, este invierno fue de los más fríos del último siglo. English source: A commentator is a person who gives opinions or describes something, often on TV or the radio. According to many commentators, this winter has been one of the coldest in the last century.

English: con Meaning: Engañar a alguien es hacerle una trampa para que haga algo o entregue dinero. Example: Fue injusto que el adivino me engañara y me quitara 500 dólares. English source: To con someone is to trick that person into doing something or giving up money. It was unfair of the fortune teller to con me out of 500 dollars.

English: consensus Meaning: El consenso es un acuerdo general entre un grupo. Example: El consenso entre los niños fue que los fantasmas existen. English source: A consensus is a general agreement among a group of people. The consensus among the children was that ghosts exist.

English: conspiracy Meaning: Una conspiración es un plan secreto de varias personas para hacer daño o algo ilegal. Example: El empresario pensó que había una conspiración entre sus colegas para despedirlo. English source: A conspiracy is a secret plan that two or more people make together to do something harmful or illegal. The businessman thought there was a conspiracy among his coworkers to get him fired.

English: coup Meaning: Un golpe de Estado es la rebelión para derrocar al gobierno. Example: Al final del siglo XVIII, Napoleón dio un golpe para tomar el poder en Francia. English source: A coup is an uprising in which people try to overthrow the government. At the end of the 18th century, Napoleon Bonaparte staged a coup to overthrow a group that had control of France.

English: cynical Meaning: Una persona cínica duda de las buenas intenciones de otros. Example: El hombre se volvió cínico tras ser engañado muchas veces. English source: To be cynical is to be unwilling to believe that people have good intentions. The man became cynical after being lied to many times.

English: dome Meaning: Una cúpula es una cubierta curva de un edificio. Example: Observé la cúpula para admirar su belleza. English source: A dome is a curved roof of a building. I looked up at the dome to admire its beauty.

English: exclaim Meaning: Exclamar es decir algo de manera súbita y enérgica. Example: El cantante interrumpió el aplauso para exclamar su agradecimiento. English source: To exclaim something is to say it loudly, suddenly, and excitedly. The singer interrupted the applause to exclaim his thanks after his performance.

English: forum Meaning: Un foro es un espacio público para debates y reuniones. Example: La científica compartió su investigación en un foro especial de la ciudad. English source: A forum is an open public place in which meetings are held. The scientist shared her research at a special forum in the city.

English: glamour Meaning: El glamour es una cualidad ligada a belleza, lujo y atractivo. Example: La joven mostró su glamour durante la sesión de fotos. English source: Glamour is a quality relating to riches, wealth, and beauty. The young woman showed of her glamour during the photo shoot.

English: harass Meaning: Hostigar a alguien es molestarlo o atacarlo repetidamente. Example: La niña pequeña molestaba con frecuencia a su hermano menor. English source: To harass someone is to bother or attack them repeatedly. The young girl would often harass her baby brother.

English: illuminate Meaning: Iluminar algo es darle luz o hacerlo más claro. Example: Para iluminar el escenario, el equipo encendió el foco. English source: If you illuminate something, you shine light on or brighten it. In order to illuminate the stage, the crew turned on the spotlight.

English: inflame Meaning: Inflamar algo es provocar o intensificarlo. Example: El aumento de impuestos inflama la frustración del público. English source: To inflame something is to provoke or intensify it. The tax increase will infame the public’s frustration with the government.

English: melody Meaning: La melodía es una secuencia de notas que forma la parte principal de una canción. Example: Tuve la melodía de la canción pegada en la cabeza todo el día. English source: A melody is a series of musical notes that form the main part of a song. I had the melody of the song stuck in my head all day.

English: awhile Meaning: Hacer algo un rato significa hacerlo durante un corto tiempo. Example: Espera aquí un rato y te traeré té. English source: If you do something awhile, you do it for a short time. Wait here awhile, and I’ll bring some tea.

English: cyberspace Meaning: El ciberespacio es el espacio virtual de internet. Example: No recibí tu correo; seguramente se perdió en el ciberespacio. English source: Cyberspace is the imaginary place on the Internet where activities occur. I didn’t receive your email. It probably got lost in cyberspace.

English: edit Meaning: Editar significa corregir un texto para que esté listo para publicarse. Example: Pidió a su hermano que editara su ensayo antes de entregarlo. English source: To edit means to correct a piece of writing so that it is suitable to be published. She asked her brother to edit her paper before she submitted it to her teacher.

English: essay Meaning: Un ensayo es un texto breve sobre un tema. Example: Ella tuvo que escribir un ensayo de dos páginas para su clase de inglés. English source: An essay is a short piece of writing on a certain subject. She had to write a two-page essay for her English class.

English: evaluate Meaning: Evaluar algo significa analizarlo para decidir algo. Example: Jo y Ken evaluaron el plan y acordaron que funcionaba. English source: To evaluate something means to study it, so a decision can be made. Jo and Ken evaluated the plan and agreed that it would work.

English: faint Meaning: Desmayarse significa perder el conocimiento y caer. Example: Carol se desmayó porque llevaba más de un día sin comer. English source: To faint means to go unconscious and fall down. Carol fainted because she hadn’t eaten in over a day.

English: global Meaning: Global significa que ocurre en todo el mundo. Example: La contaminación es un problema global. English source: If something is global, it happens all around the world. Pollution is a global problem.

English: gymnasium Meaning: Un gimnasio es un edificio con equipos para hacer ejercicio. Example: Cuando voy al gimnasio, uso la cinta por veinte minutos. English source: A gymnasium is a building with equipment that you can use to get exercise. When I go to the gymnasium, I use the treadmill for twenty minutes.

English: highlight Meaning: Destacar algo significa resaltarlo para que se vea. Example: Subrayé las palabras más difíciles de mi lista de vocabulario. English source: To highlight something means to mark it with a color so that it is easy to see. I read my vocabulary list and highlighted the most difficult words.

English: ignorant Meaning: Ignorante es quien no sabe mucho sobre un tema. Example: Sé algo ignorante de sus teorías, ¿puedes explicármelas? English source: If someone is ignorant about something, they have no knowledge about it. I’m a bit ignorant about his theories. Can you explain them to me?

English: index Meaning: Un índice es una lista de palabras en un libro con su ubicación. Example: Si buscas en el índice, encontrarás el número de página correcto. English source: An index is a list of words at the end of a book that gives information. If you look in the index, you’ll find the right page number.

English: lecture Meaning: Una conferencia es un discurso largo y educativo. Example: Su conferencia sobre hambre mundial fue muy informativa. English source: A lecture is a long, educational speech. His lecture on world hunger was very informative.

English: moral Meaning: La moraleja o mensaje moral es lo que enseña una historia. Example: Al final del cuento, la madre explicó la moral a sus hijos. English source: A moral is a message at the end of a story that teaches you something. At the end of the story, the mother explained the moral to her children.

English: operate Meaning: Operar significa funcionar o trabajar. Example: Lo siento, pero hoy no operan los trenes. English source: To operate means to work or function. I’m sorry, but the trains are not operating today.

English: private Meaning: Privado significa que pertenece o se usa solo por una persona o grupo. Example: No mires mi diario, es privado. English source: If something is private, it is only used by one person or group. Don’t look at my diary! It’s private!

English: recent Meaning: Reciente significa que ocurrió hace poco. Example: No sabía qué había causado su comportamiento reciente. English source: When something is recent, it happened a short time ago. I did not know what had caused his recent behavior.

English: resolution Meaning: Una resolución es una decisión o propósito personal. Example: En Año Nuevo hice una lista de resoluciones para tener un mejor año. English source: A resolution is a personal decision. At New Year, I made a list of resolutions to help me have a better year.

English: semester Meaning: Un semestre es una parte del año escolar. Example: Jack está en su segundo semestre de universidad. English source: A semester is a portion of a school year. Jack is in his second semester of college.

English: typewritten Meaning: Mecanografiado significa escrito con máquina de escribir o computadora. Example: Este proyecto importante debe estar mecanografiado. English source: If something is typewritten, it is written on a computer or typewriter. This is an important, formal project and must be typewritten.

English: weird Meaning: Raro significa muy extraño. Example: El papá de mi mejor amigo es un poco raro. English source: When something is weird, it is very strange. My best friend’s dad is a bit weird.

English: accustom Meaning: Acostumbrarse a algo significa habituarse. Example: Me cuesta acostumbrarme a los husos horarios nuevos cuando viajo. English source: To accustom oneself to something is to get used to it. I find it difficult to accustom myself to new time zones when I travel around the world.

English: alpha Meaning: El alfa es el miembro más dominante o de mayor rango del grupo. Example: El león más grande era el macho alfa de la manada. English source: The alpha member of a group is the most dominant or has the highest rank. The largest lion was the alpha male of the pack.

English: arouse Meaning: Provocar significa despertar interés o atención. Example: Las palabras del político buscaban provocar la rabia de los manifestantes. English source: To arouse means to awaken interest or attention in someone. The politician’s words were meant to arouse the protestors’ anger.

English: articulate Meaning: Una persona articulada expresa sus ideas con claridad. Example: A Alfred le encantaba hablar porque era muy articulado. English source: If someone is articulate, he or she has the ability to express ideas clearly and effectively. Alfred’s friends loved talking to him because he was so articulate and intelligent.

English: buzz Meaning: Hacer ruido o alboroto por algo es mostrar entusiasmo. Example: Se siente mucho revuelo desde el amanecer en Seúl. English source: To buzz means to show excitement about something. Seoul buzzes from dawn till dusk.

English: clash Meaning: Chocar significa pelear o discutir. Example: Las hermanas a menudo chocan por la forma correcta de hacer las cosas. English source: To clash means to fight or argue over something. The sisters often clash over the right way to do things.

English: classification Meaning: Clasificar significa agrupar cosas por categorías. Example: Según la clasificación científica, el ornitorrinco es un mamífero que pone huevos. English source: Classification means putting things into categories or groups that have things in common. According to scientific classification, a duck-billed platypus is an egg-laying mammal.

English: cling Meaning: Aferrarse a algo es sujetarlo con fuerza. Example: Una perezosa madre se aferra fuertemente a su cría en los árboles. English source: To cling to something means to hold onto it tightly. A mother sloth will cling tightly to her baby in the treetops.

English: compliance Meaning: Cumplimiento es seguir una regla o hacer lo que corresponde. Example: El niño malcriado nunca muestra cumplimiento con las reglas de su madre. English source: Compliance is the act of following a rule or doing what you are supposed to do. The bratty child never shows compliance with her mother’s rules.

English: comprehend Meaning: Comprender algo es entenderlo. Example: El jugador no pudo comprender por qué perdió el partido. English source: To comprehend something means to understand it. The player could not comprehend why he lost the game.

English: congregate Meaning: Congregarse significa reunirse en un mismo lugar. Example: Ver un grupo de aves congregarse en el cielo es una vista increíble. English source: To congregate means to gather in one place. Seeing a group of birds congregate in the sky is an awesome sight.

English: custody Meaning: La custodia es el derecho de cuidar a alguien o algo. Example: Los prisioneros quedaron bajo la custodia de los guardias. English source: Custody is the right to take care of someone or something. The prisoners were put in the custody of the jailers.

English: disperse Meaning: Dispersar significa esparcirse en todas direcciones. Example: Vi cómo la gente se dispersaba para evitar al toro. English source: To disperse means to scatter everywhere. I watched the people disperse in all directions to avoid the charging bull.

English: embody Meaning: Encarnar significa representar o simbolizar algo. Example: Se decía que Teresa de Calcuta encarnaba la bondad y la amabilidad. English source: To embody means to symbolize or represent something. Mother Teresa was said to embody goodness and kindness.

English: empirical Meaning: Empírico significa basado en pruebas científicas. Example: Los científicos siempre deben buscar evidencia empírica en su trabajo. English source: Empirical means involving scientific proof and evidence. Scientists must always find empirical evidence in their work.

English: exclusion Meaning: La exclusión es dejar a alguien fuera de un grupo. Example: La gente se reunió para protestar la exclusión de inmigrantes del país. English source: Exclusion is the act of keeping someone out of a group. People gathered together to protest the exclusion of immigrants from our country.

English: flock Meaning: Reunirse en grupo es juntarse en un mismo lugar. Example: En primavera, bandadas de aves se reunían en el río. English source: To flock means to gather in one place. Groups of birds will flock to the river in the spring.

English: graze Meaning: Pastar es comer plantas, como hacen las ovejas. Example: Las ovejas y cabras suelen pastar en la hierba fuera del pueblo. English source: When animals graze, they feed on plants. The sheep and goats like to graze on the grass outside the village.

English: intelligent Meaning: Una persona inteligente es muy hábil intelectualmente. Example: El estudiante inteligente se graduó con las mejores notas de la clase. English source: If someone is intelligent, they are very smart. The intelligent student graduated from high school with the highest marks in his class.

English: jungle Meaning: La selva es un bosque tropical lluvioso con árboles y plantas muy juntos. Example: Muchas aves, reptiles y elefantes viven en una selva. English source: A jungle is a type of forest in a warm, rainy tropical area, where trees and plants grow very close together. Many kinds of animals, including birds, reptiles, and even elephants live in a jungle.

English: account Meaning: Una cuenta bancaria es un contrato para guardar dinero. Example: Después de pagar el coche nuevo, mi cuenta bancaria estaba casi vacía. English source: An account with a bank is an arrangement to keep one’s money there. After I paid for the new car, my bank account was nearly empty.

English: architect Meaning: El arquitecto diseña edificios. Example: Los planos de la nueva casa fueron dibujados por un arquitecto famoso. English source: An architect is a person who designs buildings. The plans for building the new home were drawn by a famous architect.

English: conceal Meaning: Ocultar algo significa esconderlo. Example: Deberías ocultar tu dinero para que nadie te lo robe. English source: To conceal something means to hide it. You should conceal your money so no one can take it from you.

English: crime Meaning: Cometer un crimen es hacer algo grave castigable por ley. Example: La policía llegó rápido al lugar del crimen. English source: If someone commits a crime, he or she does something bad that can be punished by law. Police quickly arrived at the scene of the crime.

English: deed Meaning: Un documento de propiedad puede llamarse escritura. Example: Cuando compró el coche, recibió una escritura para demostrar que era suyo. English source: A deed is a certificate that proves that someone owns something. When she bought the car, she was given a deed to show the car was hers.

English: gratitude Meaning: La gratitud es un sentimiento de agradecimiento. Example: Los niños mostraron mucha gratitud por su visita, tía Tess. English source: Gratitude is a feeling of being thankful. The kids showed Aunt Tess much gratitude for visiting them.

English: habitat Meaning: El hábitat es el hogar natural de animales o plantas. Example: Las ranas suelen vivir en hábitats húmedos, cerca de lagos o ríos. English source: A habitat is the natural home of animals or plants. Frogs are often found in a wet habitat, such as near a lake, river, or pond.

English: intervene Meaning: Intervenir significa ayudar a frenar un problema entre personas o grupos. Example: Los alumnos discutieron hasta que la maestra intervino. English source: To intervene means to help stop a problem between two people or groups. The students argued until the teacher intervened.

English: landmark Meaning: Un hito es una referencia que ayuda a ubicar o recordar un lugar. Example: El árbol alto se usaba como hito para encontrar el camino al hostal. English source: A landmark is an object that helps people find or remember a location. The tall tree was used as a landmark for people to find the road to the inn.

English: legal Meaning: Algo legal está permitido por la ley. Example: No era legal que condujera hasta cumplir 18 años. English source: If something is legal, it is related to the law or allowed by the law. It was not legal for him to drive until he was 18 years old.

English: memorable Meaning: Algo memorable se recuerda por una razón especial. Example: La fiesta fue memorable y la gente seguía comentándolo después de años. English source: If something is memorable, then it is remembered for a special reason. The party was memorable; people were still talking about it years later.

English: oblige Meaning: Obligar significa exigir algo. Example: Si quería jugar, tenía que limpiar mi cuarto una vez por semana. English source: To oblige someone means to require them to do something. If I wanted to have playtime, I was obliged to clean my room once a week.

English: offense Meaning: Una ofensa es una accion que rompe la ley y merece castigo. Example: Lo encerraron en la carcel por dos días por la ofensa. English source: An offense is an action that breaks the law and requires punishment. He was put in jail for two days for the offense.

English: proclaim Meaning: Proclamar algo es anunciarlo en publico. Example: El general proclamó que la guerra estaba ganada. English source: To proclaim something means to say it in public. The army general proclaimed that the war was won.

English: rally Meaning: Una marcha es una reunion para apoyar algo. Example: La escuela hizo una marcha en el gimnasio para apoyar al equipo de baloncesto. English source: A rally is a large public meeting in order to support something. The school had a rally in the gym to support the basketball team.

English: resolve Meaning: Resolver significa encontrar una solucion. Example: Ella resolvio el problema con sus hijos dándoles un juguete a cada uno. English source: To resolve something means to find a solution. She resolved the problem with her children by giving them both a toy.

English: resource Meaning: Un recurso es dinero o material utilizable. Example: El hombre pobre no tenía recursos para alimentarse. English source: Resources are a person’s or country’s money and materials that they can use. The poor man didn’t have the resources to feed himself.

English: sentence Meaning: La sentencia es el castigo por romper la ley. Example: La sentencia por robar un auto fue mucho peor que por robar dulces. English source: A sentence is punishment given to someone who didn’t follow the law. The sentence for stealing a car is much worse than for stealing candy.

English: volunteer Meaning: Ser voluntario es ayudar sin recibir pago. Example: Mucha gente se ofrecia como voluntaria para ayudar a los adultos a aprender a leer. English source: To volunteer means to offer to do something for free. Many people volunteered to help the adults learn to read.

English: witness Meaning: Un testigo es quien ve o oye un crimen o accidente. Example: La mujer fue la unica testigo de aquel horrible crimen. English source: A witness is someone who sees or hears a crime or accident happen. The woman was the only witness of the horrible crime.

English: access Meaning: El acceso es el derecho de entrar o usar algo. Example: El gerente era la unica persona con acceso a la contraseña. English source: Access is the right to enter or use something. The manager was the only person with access to the password.
English: conduct Meaning: La conducta es la manera de actuar. Example: La castigaron por su mala conducta. English source: Conduct is the way that someone acts. She was punished for her bad conduct.

English: constant Meaning: Algo constante sucede con frecuencia o siempre. Example: El televisor en casa está en uso constante. English source: When an event or action is constant, it happens a lot or all of the time. The television at home is in constant use.

English: crack Meaning: Una grieta es una hendidura estrecha. Example: La vieja ventana estaba cubierta de grietas. English source: A crack is a narrow space between the parts of something broken. The old window was covered with cracks.

English: device Meaning: Un dispositivo es un objeto o máquina. Example: Un termómetro es un dispositivo. English source: A device is an object or a machine. A thermometer is a device that tells temperature.

English: enclose Meaning: Encerrar significa meter algo dentro de un limite. Example: Las vacas en el campo estaban encerradas por una cerca. English source: To enclose something is to contain it. The cows in the field were enclosed by a fence.

English: grip Meaning: Agarrar significa sujetar fuertemente. Example: Asustada, agarro con fuerza la mano de su hermana. English source: To grip something is to hold it very tightly. I was scared, so I gripped my older sister’s hand.

English: halt Meaning: Detener significa parar. Example: El criminal se detuvo cuando vio llegar a la policia. English source: To halt is to stop moving. The criminal halted when he saw the police coming.

English: impending Meaning: Inminente significa que está por ocurrir pronto. Example: La estudiante estaba nerviosa por su examen inminente. English source: If something is impending, it is going to happen soon. The student was nervous about her impending test.

English: influence Meaning: Influir significa causar un efecto en alguien. Example: Mi amigo influyó en mi decisión de estudiar en la universidad. English source: To influence someone or something is to have an effect on them. My friend influenced my decision to attend Terrance University.

English: law Meaning: Una ley es una regla hecha por el gobierno. Example: En clase aprendieron sobre diferentes leyes. English source: A law is a rule made by the legislative body. The students learned about different laws during social studies class.

English: mode Meaning: El modo es una configuracion o manera de funcionamiento. Example: Melissa puso el TV en modo silencioso. English source: A mode is a setting or condition on a machine. Melissa turned the TV to quiet mode while she talked on the phone.

English: perspire Meaning: Sudar significa expulsar sudor. Example: Sudo mucho en los entrenamientos. English source: To perspire means to sweat. I usually perspire a lot when I am at athletics practice.

English: replace Meaning: Reemplazar significa poner algo en lugar de otra cosa. Example: Reemplacé la llanta de mi carro porque estaba desinflada. English source: To replace something is to put it in the place of something else. I replaced the tire on my car because it was flat.

English: snap Meaning: Romper con golpe es romper algo brusco. Example: Tomé el palillo y lo rompi. English source: To snap something means to break it suddenly, which can cause a loud noise. I took the drumstick and snapped it with my hands.

English: sly Meaning: Una persona astuta es taimada o lista. Example: El zorro astuto robo los huevos del nido. English source: If a person or animal is sly, they are sneaky or good at tricking people. The sly fox stole the eggs from the nest.

English: tend Meaning: Soler significa hacerlo con frecuencia. Example: Mi madre suele comprarme un regalo perfecto cada Navidad. English source: To tend to do something is to be likely to do it or to do it often. My mom tends to buy me the perfect gift each Christmas.

English: valid Meaning: Algo válido es correcto o está bien fundamentado. Example: La opinión del experto fue más válida que la de otros. English source: When something is valid, it is correct or based on good reasoning. The expert’s opinion on the subject was more valid than others.

English: version Meaning: Una versión es un relato o forma que difiere un poco del original. Example: Ella leyó la versión británica del cuento chino. English source: A version is an account of something that differs slightly from the original. She read the students British version of the Chinese fairy tale.

English: whatsoever Meaning: No significa nada la presencia de esa cosa. Example: El chico no tenía idea en absoluto de cómo terminar la historia. English source: You use whatsoever after a noun to emphasize that there is nothing of that thing. The boy had no idea whatsoever how to finish the story.

English: alongside Meaning: Al lado de significa junto a algo. Example: Trabajamos al lado uno del otro en la oficina. English source: If something is alongside another thing, then it is next to it. We work alongside each other in the office.

English: appetite Meaning: El apetito es hambre o deseo de comer. Example: Tom tiene mucho apetito. English source: Your appetite is your hunger for food. Tom has a big appetite. He eats all the time.
English: assist Meaning: Ayudar significa asistir o prestar apoyo. Example: Andrew me ayudo con mi tarea. English source: To assist someone is to help them. Andrew assisted me with my homework.
English: breeze Meaning: La brisa es un viento suave. Example: La brisa hizo caer las hojas del árbol. English source: A breeze is a soft wind. The breeze caused the leaves to fall off the tree.

English: defy Meaning: Desafiar significa negarse a obedecer. Example: Los estudiantes se metieron en problemas por desafiar las reglas. English source: To defy someone is to work against them or refuse to do what they say. The students got into trouble for defying their teacher’s rules.

English: display Meaning: Mostrar significa exponer o poner a la vista. Example: El museo mostró muchas pinturas maravillosas. English source: To display something is to show it, especially by putting it in a certain place. The museum displayed many wonderful paintings.

English: efficient Meaning: Algo eficiente consigue resultados sin perder energia. Example: Mi coche es muy eficiente. English source: If something or someone is efficient, they do not waste energy. My car is very efficient. I rarely have to buy gas.

English: feeble Meaning: Debil significa pequeño o con poca fuerza. Example: El niño era demasiado debil para llevar ese objeto. English source: If someone is feeble, they are small or weak. The boy was too feeble to carry the object very far.

English: forgive Meaning: Perdonar es dejar de estar enojado con alguien. Example: Sandra perdono a Peter después de que pidio perdon. English source: To forgive someone is to stop being angry with them. Sandra forgave Peter after he said he was sorry.

English: lively Meaning: Vivaz significa lleno de energia. Example: Jennifer es muy vivaz. English source: If someone is lively, they have a lot of energy. Jennifer is very lively: she’s always running and playing.

English: majestic Meaning: Majestuoso significa grande e impresionante. Example: Vivian tuvo una casa majestuosa. English source: If something is majestic, it is large and impressive. The rich people lived in a big, majestic house.

English: nor Meaning: Ni une dos ideas negativas. Example: No como manzanas ni naranjas. English source: You use nor to connect two negative ideas. I eat neither apples nor oranges. I don’t like either one.

English: outraged Meaning: Indignado significa sentirse muy enojado y ofendido. Example: Mi padre se indignó cuando vio que habían chocado su coche. English source: If someone is outraged, they are very angry. My father was outraged when he saw that I had crashed his car.

English: pessimistic Meaning: Pesimista significa esperar que pase lo peor. Example: John es pesimista y siempre piensa que pasa algo malo. English source: If someone is pessimistic, they believe that the worst will happen. John is pessimistic. He always thinks something bad will happen.

English: relationship Meaning: Una relación es la forma de trato entre personas. Example: La maestra estaba orgullosa de su buena relación con los estudiantes. English source: The relationship between two or more people is the way in which they behave toward each other. The teacher was proud of her good relationship with the students.

English: slap Meaning: Abofetear es golpear con la mano abierta. Example: Helen abofeteo a Eunice en la cara. English source: To slap someone means to hit them with the palm of the hand. Out of anger, Helen slapped Eunice on the face.

English: smash Meaning: Derribar o romper en pedazos. Example: Jacob rompio la ventana con una roca. English source: To smash something is to break it into many small pieces. Jacob smashed the window with a rock.

English: successful Meaning: Exitoso significa lograr lo que se quería. Example: Mi padre es un hombre de negocios exitoso. English source: Someone who is successful achieves what they intended to achieve. My father is a successful businessman.

English: wage Meaning: El salario es dinero por el trabajo. Example: Las ganancias que recibo son muy grandes. English source: A wage is the money that a person gets for doing a job. The wages I receive from my job are really great!

English: whereas Meaning: Mientras que conecta dos ideas contrastantes. Example: Mi hermana ama peliculas de terror, mientras que yo prefiero comedias. English source: You use whereas to show how two things are different. My sister loves horror movies, whereas I prefer comedies.

English: animate Meaning: Animar significa dar vida o energia. Example: Las rocas y maquinas no son cosas animadas. English source: When something is animate, it has life. Rocks and machines are not animate things.

English: classify Meaning: Clasificar significa separar por tipo. Example: El biólogo clasifico la planta como especie nueva. English source: To classify things is to put them into groups based on their type. The biologist classified the plant as a completely new species.

English: concede Meaning: Conceder significa aceptar o admitir. Example: El estudiante concedió que había hecho trampa. English source: To concede is to admit against your wish that something is true. The student conceded that he had cheated on the test.

English: concept Meaning: Un concepto es una idea. Example: Aprendi conceptos sobre moleculas. English source: A concept is an idea about something. I learned some concepts about molecules before working in the science lab.

English: construct Meaning: Construir significa fabricar o levantar. Example: Los hombres usaron madera y metal para construir una casa. English source: To construct something means to make or build it. The men used wood and metal to construct a house.

English: decade Meaning: Una decada es un período de diez años. Example: Ella celebro sus tres decadas de trabajo. English source: A decade is a period of ten years. She celebrated her three decades of work with the company.

English: diagram Meaning: Un diagrama es un dibujo explicativo. Example: Siguiendo el diagrama pude armar el escritorio. English source: A diagram is a simple drawing that explains what something is or how it works. By following the diagram, I was able to put the desk together.

English: ferry Meaning: Un ferry es un barco que cruza personas y coches por el agua. Example: El ferry cruzó el lago. English source: A ferry is a boat that carries passengers over short distances. The ferry took the people across the lake.
English: handy Meaning: Útil significa práctico. Example: Un borrador es útil. English source: If something is handy, it is useful. An eraser is handy if you make a lot of mistakes.

English: isolate Meaning: Aislar significa separar de un grupo. Example: La maestra aislo a la niña antes de hablar con ella. English source: To isolate is to separate one person or thing from a group. The teacher isolated the bad child from the class before talking with her.

English: longing Meaning: Anhelo o deseo intenso. Example: Al saltar desayuno, tuvo un fuerte deseo de comida. English source: A longing is a strong feeling of wanting. Since he skipped breakfast, he had a longing for food all morning.

English: numerous Meaning: Numeroso significa muy grande en cantidad. Example: Había numerosos hoyos en el camino. English source: If something is numerous, there are many of those things. It was hard to drive fast since there were numerous holes in the road.

English: particle Meaning: Una partícula es un pedazo muy pequeño. Example: Había una capa de partículas de polvo. English source: A particle is a very small piece of something. The bottles of wine were covered in a layer of dust particles.

English: plea Meaning: Una peticion/petición es un pedido emocional. Example: El hombre hambriento hizo una peticion de comida. English source: A plea is a request that is urgent or emotional. The poor, hungry man made a plea for food.

English: refrain Meaning: Abstenerse es evitar hacerlo. Example: La doctora pidio que se abstuviera de comida rápida. English source: To refrain from something is to avoid doing it. The doctor asked Mary to refrain from eating fast food as part of her diet.

English: review Meaning: Una revision es una inspeccion formal. Example: El gobierno ordeno una revision de la economia. English source: A review of something is a formal inspection of it by people in authority. The government ordered a careful review of the economic situation.

English: sophisticated Meaning: Sophisticado significa refinado o con experiencia. Example: Jake es una persona muy sofisticada. English source: If someone is sophisticated, they know many things about the world. Jake is one of the most sophisticated people I’ve ever met.

English: surrender Meaning: Rendirse significa entregar o darse por vencido. Example: El ladrón se rindo y entrego el dinero. English source: To surrender something is to give it up. The thief surrendered the money to the police when he was caught.

English: upright Meaning: Erguido significa de pie y derecho. Example: Las mearcas no caminan como humanos, pero pueden ponerse erguidas. English source: If something is upright, it is standing up straight. Meerkats can’t walk like humans, but they can stand upright.

English: worthwhile Meaning: Vale la pena es provechoso o importante. Example: Estudiar ingles fue totalmente valioso. English source: If something is worthwhile, it is important or useful. On his visit to Canada, he realized studying English was worthwhile.

English: alliance Meaning: Una alianza es un grupo que trabaja junto. Example: Los ejecutivos formaron una alianza. English source: An alliance is a group of people who work together. The junior executives formed an alliance with each other.

English: applause Meaning: El aplauso es el ruido que hace la gente al aplaudir para mostrar aprobación. Example: Al final de su discurso, todos estallaron en fuertes aplausos. English source: Applause is the noise made when people clap their hands to show approval. At the end of his speech, everyone burst into loud applause.
English: armed Meaning: Armar significa portar un arma. Example: El ladrón estaba armado con una pistola. English source: If you are armed, you are carrying a weapon. The robber was armed with a gun.

English: authoritative Meaning: Autoritativo significa de autoridad o fiable. Example: Este libro es una fuente autoritaria. English source: If something is authoritative, it uses the best information available. This book is an authoritative source on ancient Egypt’s Queen Nefertiti.

English: bravery Meaning: La valentía es un comportamiento valiente. Example: Los libros elogiaron la valentía del general. English source: Bravery is brave behavior. The books commended the general’s bravery.

English: ceremony Meaning: Una ceremonia es un evento formal. Example: La ceremonia de matrimonio fue en junio. English source: A ceremony is an event that happens on special occasions. Tom and Amy’s marriage ceremony is in June.

English: culture Meaning: La cultura es el arte y las costumbres de un pueblo. Example: La cultura mexicana es reconocida. English source: Culture is the music, art, and writings of a certain place or group of people. Ancient Mexican culture is renowned for its architecture.

English: defense Meaning: La defensa es protección. Example: La fuerza aérea lucha en defensa de su país. English source: A defense is something that is done to protect another thing. The air force works in defense of its country.

English: detail Meaning: Un detalle es una pieza de informacion. Example: Jane conto todos los detalles de su viaje. English source: A detail is a small piece of information. Jane told Ben all the details of her trip to China.

English: diverse Meaning: Diverso significa variado. Example: La ciudad tiene una poblacion diversa. English source: When a group of things is diverse, it is made up of a wide variety of things. Big cities have diverse populations with people of different races and ages.

English: enchant Meaning: Encantar significa agradar mucho. Example: La mujer encanto a todos. English source: To enchant someone is to make them feel very interested or happy. The beautiful woman enchanted everybody in the room.

English: equip Meaning: Equipar significa dar lo necesario. Example: Steve estaba equipado para el trabajo. English source: To equip someone is to give them the things needed to do something. Steve was equipped with the tools needed to do the job.

English: exception Meaning: Una excepción es lo que no sigue una regla. Example: Todos pensaron que era difícil, pero Tim fue una excepción. English source: An exception is someone or something not conforming to a rule. Most students thought the test was hard, but Tim was the exception.

English: genre Meaning: Un genero es un tipo de arte o musica. Example: Ella es experta en el genero comedia. English source: A genre is a type of literature, art, or music characterized by its style. She is considered a master in the comedy genre.

English: impact Meaning: Impacto es el efecto. Example: Mi abuela tuvo un gran impacto en mi vida. English source: An impact is the effect someone or something has. My grandmother had a great impact on my life.

English: lure Meaning: Atraer es atraer con algun truco. Example: El cartel de "Oferta" atrae a las personas. English source: To lure someone is to convince them to do something by using a trick. The store lures people in with big signs that say “Sale!”

English: obstacle Meaning: Un obstaculo es algo que impide. Example: La roca gigante fue un gran obstaculo. English source: An obstacle is an object or a problem that stops you from doing something. Climbing over the giant rock was the biggest obstacle for the hikers.

English: shelter Meaning: Un refugio es un lugar seguro. Example: La rana se refugio durante la tormenta. English source: A shelter is a place to go that is safe from danger or bad weather. The frog took shelter from the storm in a nearby hold.

English: supply Meaning: Suministrar significa dar a alguien lo que necesita. Example: El calefactor suministró agua caliente a la casa. English source: To supply something means to give people what they need or want. The water heater supplied the house with warm water.

English: vain Meaning: Vanidoso significa preocuparce por la apariencia. Example: Rebecca es muy vanidosa. English source: If people are vain, they are only concerned with how they look. Rebecca is so vain that she looks at herself in every mirror.

English: alternative Meaning: Alternativa significa otra opcion. Example: Eligio una alternativa. English source: An alternative is something that you can choose instead of your first choice. Her first plan to make extra money seemed weak, so she chose an alternative.

English: avenue Meaning: Avenida es una via ancha urbana. Example: Baja por está avenida y gira a la izquierda. English source: An avenue is a road, often a large one with buildings on each side. Drive down this avenue and then turn left to get to the park.

English: belly Meaning: El vientre es la zona del abdomen. Example: Su vientre estaba lleno porque había comido demasiado. English source: The belly is the stomach of a person or animal. His belly was full because he had eaten a lot of food.

English: bid Meaning: Una puja es oferta o apuesta para algo. Example: Hizo una puja para ser presidente de la universidad. English source: A bid to do something is an attempt to do it. He made a bid to become the university’s next president.

English: blow Meaning: Soplar significa mover aire. Example: El viento soplaba muy fuerte. English source: To blow means to move air or move something through the air, as in the wind. The wind is blowing very hard today. We should stay inside.

English: conflict Meaning: Conflicto es pelea entre grupos. Example: Las dos naciones tuvieron un conflicto. English source: A conflict is a fight between different people or groups. The two nations had a conflict over which one could use the water in the river.

English: continent Meaning: Un continente es una gran región de tierra. Example: Asia es el continente más grande. English source: A continent is one of the seven large areas of land on the Earth. Asia is the largest continent.

English: current Meaning: Una corriente es flujo continuo de agua o aire. Example: Las corrientes marinas desviaron el barco. English source: A current is a steady and constant flow of air or water in a river or ocean. The ocean currents took the ship far off into the sea.

English: disrespect Meaning: La falta de respeto es rudeza o comportamiento que muestra poco respeto. Example: Mostró falta de respeto al discutir con su jefe durante una reunión. English source: Disrespect is rudeness or behavior that shows a lack of respect. He showed disrespect by arguing with his boss during a meeting.

English: enthusiasm Meaning: El entusiasmo es una alegría o interés muy fuerte por algo. Example: El público mostró entusiasmo por el equipo de fútbol animándolo con fuerza. English source: Enthusiasm is a very strong good feeling about something. The crowd showed their enthusiasm for the soccer team by cheering loudly.

English: harsh Meaning: Duro significa severo o desagradable. Example: El desierto es un ambiente muy duro. English source: When something is harsh, it is very unpleasant. The desert can be a very harsh environment.

English: lean Meaning: Inclinarse es inclinar el cuerpo. Example: La mujer se inclino contra el mostrador. English source: To lean is to bend in a particular direction. The woman leaned against the counter because she was tired.

English: meantime Meaning: Mientras tanto significa durante ese tiempo. Example: Tom puso la mesa; mientras tanto, yo prepare la comida. English source: The meantime is the time between two events. Ted began setting the table. In the meantime, I began preparing the food.

English: mischief Meaning: La travesura es conducta de hacer bromas. Example: Ben hizo travesuras al pintar la cara de alguien. English source: Mischief is behavior that is meant to trick or cause trouble for people. Ben was up to mischief when he persuaded Ken to paint his face.

English: muscle Meaning: Un musculo es tejido que mueve el cuerpo. Example: Ella fue al gimnasio para fortalecer sus musculos. English source: Muscle is a mass of tissue attached to bone that helps you move. She went to the gym in order to make her muscles stronger.

English: rescue Meaning: Rescatar significa salvar a alguien de peligro. Example: El bombero rescató al hombre del edificio en llamas. English source: To rescue someone means to remove them from danger. The firefighter rescued the man from the burning building.

English: succession Meaning: Sucesion es serie ordenada. Example: Repitio las letras del alfabeto en sucesion. English source: A succession is a number of things that follow one after the other. The student said the letters of the alphabet in succession.

English: terrain Meaning: El terreno es la superficie de la tierra con su relieve. Example: El terreno era rocoso y lleno de colinas. English source: The terrain is the land and all of its physical features or parts. The terrain below was rocky and full of hills.

English: timid Meaning: Tímido significa miedoso, vergonzoso o nervioso. Example: La niña tímida se escondió detrás de su madre cuando vio a un desconocido. English source: If someone is timid, they are afraid, shy, or nervous. The timid child hides behind her mother whenever she sees a stranger.

English: violence Meaning: La violencia es una acción de fuerza destinada a herir o matar. Example: El niño golpeó a su hermano en un acto de violencia. English source: Violence is forceful action that is meant to injure or kill people. The boy hit his brother in an act of violence.

English: affect Meaning: Afectar es causar influencia. Example: La mala actitud de un alumno afecto a los otros. English source: To affect someone or something is to have an influence over them. The student’s poor attitude affected the other students in the class.

English: autograph Meaning: Un autografo es una firma escrita. Example: Todo el mundo quería el autografo de la estrella. English source: An autograph is the written name of a famous person. Everybody wanted the movie star’s autograph.

English: bead Meaning: Una gota es una pequeña pieza de liquido. Example: Se formaron gotas de agua en el vidrio. English source: A bead is a drop of liquid. Beads of water collected on the outside of the glass.

English: brew Meaning: Preparar café o té significa verter agua caliente sobre él. Example: Por favor, prepara una cafetera de café fresco. English source: To brew coffee or tea means to pour hot water over it. Please brew a fresh pot of coffee.

English: charm Meaning: Encanto es atraccion o gracia. Example: Gail encanto a todos con historias. English source: To charm someone is to please them with your personality. Gail charmed everyone with her humorous stories.

English: destiny Meaning: El destino es lo que está escrito en la vida. Example: Era su destino ser un gran cantante. English source: A destiny is all the things that happen or will happen to a person in their life. It was his destiny to become a great singer.

English: equipment Meaning: El equipo son las herramientas para un fin. Example: La fábrica produce mucho equipo. English source: Equipment consists of the things which are used for a specific purpose. The factory produces a wide range of high-tech equipment.

English: horn Meaning: La bocina es un dispositivo que hace un ruido fuerte. Example: El niño tocó la bocina mientras pasaba en bicicleta frente a la casa. English source: A horn is a device that makes a loud noise. The boy honked his horn as he rode his bicycle past the house.

English: irritable Meaning: Una persona irritable se molesta con facilidad. Example: Se volvió irritable cuando tenía hambre. English source: When someone is irritable, they become annoyed or angry very easily. She is irritable when she doesn’t get enough sleep.

English: lag Meaning: Quedarse atrás significa ir más lento. Example: La chica en patines quedó atrás. English source: To lag behind is to move slowly behind other moving objects. The girl on rollerblades lagged behind the little girl on the bicycle.

English: nightmare Meaning: Una pesadilla es un sueño terrible y angustiante. Example: La niña no quería dormir porque había tenido una pesadilla. English source: A nightmare is a bad or scary dream. The girl was scared to go back to sleep because she had had a nightmare.

English: nutritious Meaning: Nutritivo mantiene la salud. Example: Las mangostas son frutas nutritivas. English source: When something is nutritious, it helps the body stay healthy. Mangoes are one of the most nutritious fruits in the world.

English: protein Meaning: La proteina es sustancia de crecimiento. Example: El pescado y la carne son buenas fuentes de proteina. English source: Protein is a substance that is necessary for the body to grow and be strong. Fish and beef are good sources of protein.

English: signature Meaning: Firma es el nombre escrito. Example: Puse mi firma al final de la carta. English source: A signature is your name, when you write it in your own way. I put my signature at the end of the letter.

English: stuff Meaning: Cosas son objetos o material. Example: Dimos muchas cosas a la caridad. English source: Stuff is a word used to refer to things without mentioning the things by name. We gave a lot of stuff to the charity.

English: subconscious Meaning: Subconsciente es sin pensar conscientemente. Example: Respirar es una accion del subconsciente. English source: When something is subconscious, it is done without thinking about it. Breathing is one of the subconscious things that the body does.

English: van Meaning: Una furgoneta es un vehículo de carga. Example: La empresa usa vans grandes para entrega. English source: A van is a vehicle that is used for carrying things. It is smaller than a truck. The delivery company uses large vans to deliver packages.

English: warn Meaning: Advertir significa avisar de peligro. Example: El salvavidas advirtio no acercarse al mar. English source: To warn someone is to make them know of possible danger in the future. The lifeguard warned people to stay away from the rough ocean.

English: workout Meaning: Entrenamiento es rutina de ejercicio. Example: Ella no hace su entrenamiento los fines de semana. English source: A workout is an exercise routine that helps improve health. She doesn’t do her workout on the weekends.
English: zoom Meaning: Acelerar es moverse rapido. Example: Los autos aceleraron por la carretera. English source: To zoom is to move quickly. The cars zoomed along the road.

English: brick Meaning: Un ladrillo es bloque de arcilla. Example: Había varios ladrillos en el suelo. English source: A brick is a block of hard clay that is used for building things, such as walls. There were several bricks scattered on the ground.

English: crumble Meaning: Desmoronarse significa romperse o caerse en trozos pequeños. Example: Las paredes de la casa vieja se desmoronaron en una pila de roca y madera. English source: To crumble means to break or fall apart into small pieces. The old house’s walls crumbled into a pile of rock and wood.

English: dough Meaning: Masa es mezcla de harina para cocinar. Example: Hice galletas con esa masa. English source: Dough is a mixture of flour and water that becomes bread when baked. I made heart-shaped cookies from the dough.

English: express Meaning: Expresar es mostrar una idea o sentimiento. Example: La enfermera expreso simpatia por el paciente. English source: To express a feeling or idea means to show others how one thinks or feels. The nurse expressed her sympathy for the sick patient.

English: fist Meaning: Un puño es el puño cerrado de la mano. Example: El maton hizo un puño. English source: A fist is a hand with fingers bent in toward the palm. The bully made a fist and threatened to hit the small boy.

English: flexible Meaning: Flexible significa que se dobla. Example: La rama podia doblarse en círculo. English source: If something is flexible, then it can bend easily without breaking. The tree branch was so flexible it could be bent into a circle and not break.

English: flush Meaning: Enrojecer es que la cara se pone roja. Example: después de la carrera su cara estaba enrojecida. English source: To flush means the face becomes red due to heat, illness, or emotion. After the long race, the runner’s face was flushed.
English: injure Meaning: Herir es dañar el cuerpo. Example: El choque hirio a dos personas. English source: To injure someone means to damage a part of their body. The car crash injured two people.

English: lump Meaning: Un bulto es una masa pequeña y sólida. Example: El artista hizo un bulto de barro. English source: A lump is a small piece of something that is solid. The artist took a lump of clay and turned it into a beautiful pot.

English: mixture Meaning: Una mezcla combina cosas. Example: Construyeron paredes con mezcla de agua y tierra. English source: A mixture is something that is made by mixing other things together. The walls were built using a mixture of water, rock, and dirt.

English: reconcile Meaning: Reconciliar significa volver a la amistad. Example: Tras discutir, los dos amigos se reconciliaron. English source: To reconcile means to return to a friendly relationship. After arguing, the two friends were reconciled with each other.

English: ruin Meaning: Arruinar significa causar daño. Example: La lluvia arruinó nuestro paseo. English source: To ruin something means to harm or damage it greatly. Our walk in the park was ruined by the sudden rain.

English: shatter Meaning: Destruir significa romper en pedazos. Example: El golpe destrozo la ventana por completo. English source: To shatter something means to break it suddenly into many tiny pieces. When the ball hit the window, the glass shattered.

English: shutter Meaning: Una persiana cubre la ventana. Example: Mi hermano cerró las persianas. English source: Shutters are wooden or metal covers in front of a window. Mr. Smith closed the shutters every night to make his bedroom dark.

English: sift Meaning: Tamizar significa pasar con cedazo. Example: El panadero tamizo la harina. English source: To sift something means to remove all the large pieces. The baker sifted the flour into a large bowl.

English: slight Meaning: Ligero significa pequeño o menor. Example: Solo hubo un ligero cambio en su altura. English source: If something is slight, then it is small or minor. There was only a slight change in the little boy’s height.

English: sparkle Meaning: Brillar es destellar. Example: Las estrellas brillaban anoche. English source: To sparkle means to shine brightly with quick fashes of light. The stars sparkled in the winter night’s sky.

English: sprinkle Meaning: Espolvorear es esparcir algo sobre otra cosa. Example: Espolvoreó la pasta con sal y pimienta negra. English source: To sprinkle means to scatter something all over something else. He sprinkled the pasta with salt and black pepper.

English: stale Meaning: Un alimento duro o pasado no está fresco y no sabe bien. Example: Las galletas estuvieron tanto tiempo en la mesa que se pusieron duras. English source: If food is stale, then it is not fresh but dry, hard, and not good to eat. The cookies sat on the table so long that they became stale.

English: utter Meaning: Pronunciar es decir una palabra o sonido. Example: El niño perdido tenía tanto miedo que apenas podía pronunciar una palabra. English source: To utter a word or a sound means to say it. The lost boy was so scared that he could barely utter a single word.

English: although Meaning: Aunque significa contraste entre dos ideas. Example: Aunque llego tarde, todos la recibieron. English source: You use although to say that one thing is contrasted by another. Although she was late, her friends gave her a warm welcome.

English: apply Meaning: Aplicar significa poner sobre. Example: Ella se aplica maquillaje antes de salir. English source: To apply something means to put it on. She always applies makeup to her face before going outside.

English: await Meaning: Esperar significa aguardar. Example: Los jugadores esperaron la decisión del árbitro. English source: To await something means to wait for it. The players awaited the referee’s decision.

English: beloved Meaning: Querido significa muy amado o muy especial. Example: El niño durmió la siesta junto a su querido gato. English source: When something is beloved, it is very special and you like it very much. The boy took a nap next to his beloved cat.

English: climate Meaning: El clima es el tiempo habitual. Example: El clima del desierto es muy caluroso. English source: A climate is the usual weather in a place. The climate in the desert is very hot.

English: complain Meaning: Quejarse es expresar descontento. Example: Los trabajadores se quejaron de ser injustamente tratados. English source: When you complain, you say that you are unhappy about something. The workers complained that they were being treated unfairly.

English: confuse Meaning: Confundir significa hacer que alguien no entienda. Example: El cartel confunde al viajero. English source: To confuse someone means to make them feel like they are unsure. The sign confused the traveler because it pointed in two directions.

English: due Meaning: Debido significa que algo está previsto en cierto tiempo. Example: Los papeles estaban vencidos el 19. English source: When something is due, it is expected to happen or be done at that time. The papers were due on the 19th.

English: establish Meaning: Establecer significa crear o fundar. Example: Quiere establecer un club para ayudar al planeta. English source: To establish something means to create it. He wanted to establish a club for people to help the Earth.
English: furnace Meaning: La caldera produce calor. Example: El técnico reparó la caldera. English source: A furnace is a place where heat is made. Mr. Jones came to fix the furnace.

English: leash Meaning: Una correa sirve para llevar un animal. Example: Los perros llevan correa. English source: A leash is a rope or chain that is used to lead an animal. Dogs must wear a leash to keep them from running away.

English: mature Meaning: Madurar significa crecer hasta convertirse en adulto. Example: Cuando maduraron, llegaron a ser tan altos como sus padres. English source: To mature means to grow up to become an adult. When they matured, they became as tall as their parents.

English: measure Meaning: Medir es encontrar cantidad o efecto. Example: Los científicos midieron la cantidad de químicos. English source: To measure something means to find out the quality, value, or effect of it. The scientists carefully measured the amount of chemicals in the tubes.

English: midst Meaning: Mitad o centro de algo. Example: Ella estaba en el medio de la limpieza cuando sonó el telefono. English source: The midst of something is the middle of it. She was in the midst of cleaning when the telephone rang.

English: misery Meaning: La miseria o el sufrimiento extremo es un gran dolor. Example: Hubo mucho sufrimiento después de que Sam perdió a su perro. English source: Misery is extreme suffering. There was a lot of misery after Sam lost his dog.
English: powerless Meaning: Sin poder o autoridad. Example: Temo que mi padre ahora no tenga poder. English source: Powerless means without power or authority. I fear my father is powerless now.

English: prior Meaning: Anterior significa que ocurrió antes. Example: Ron tuvo que esperar porque llegó antes de la hora programada de la reunión. English source: When something happened prior to something else, it happened earlier. Ron had to wait since he arrived prior to the scheduled meeting time.

English: research Meaning: La investigación es un estudio cuidadoso para descubrir cosas nuevas. Example: Los científicos hicieron mucha investigación sobre el tipo de sangre. English source: Research is close and careful study to discover new things. Scientists did a lot of research on the subject of blood type.

English: spaceship Meaning: Nave espacial es un vehiculo para el espacio. Example: Mucha gente quiere viajar en nave espacial. English source: A spaceship is a craft designed for spaceflight. Many people want to travel into space by spaceship.

English: variety Meaning: Variedad es muchas diferencias. Example: Hay mucha variedad de flores. English source: A variety of something is a group of many different kinds of it. There are a variety of flowers at the shop.

English: altogether Meaning: Completamente. Example: La empresa dejo de usar azucar por completo. English source: If something happens altogether, it happens completely. The company stopped using sugar altogether in its food.

English: bind Meaning: Vincular significa unir a otros. Example: Los victimas quedaron unidas por la necesidad de ayudar. English source: To bind people is to make them feel united together. The victims of the flood were bound by their need to help each other.

English: bruise Meaning: Un moretón es una marca oscura en la piel por un golpe. Example: Ella se hizo un moretón en la rodilla al caer. English source: A bruise is a dark mark caused by being hit by something. She got a bruise on her knee from falling down.

English: custom Meaning: Costumbre es forma de actuar tradicional. Example: Es costumbre bailar en bodas. English source: A custom is a way of doing things that has been the same for a long time. It is a custom that the bride and groom have the first dance.

English: disobedient Meaning: Desobediente es quien no sigue reglas. Example: Los niños desobedientes no escuchaban a la madre. English source: When someone is disobedient, they do not follow the rules or instructions. The disobedient children didn’t listen to their mother and had an accident.

English: foresee Meaning: Prever es adelantar un suceso. Example: El profesor no pudo prever problemas. English source: To foresee something is to know about it before it happens. The teacher didn’t foresee any problems with his large class.

English: glimpse Meaning: Vislumbrar es ver de rapido. Example: Ella vislumbro el paisaje al aterrizar. English source: To glimpse something is to see it for a short time. She glimpsed outside the window as the plane was about to land.

English: hoop Meaning: Un aro es un anillo. Example: Intentaron meter la pelota en el aro. English source: A hoop is a ring that is made of plastic, metal, or wood. The boys tried to toss the ball through the basketball hoop.

English: misfortune Meaning: Mala suerte es un infortunio. Example: Su familia lo ayudó en la desgracia. English source: Misfortune is bad luck or an unlucky event. His family helped him when he encountered misfortune.

English: negative Meaning: Negativo es no favorable o desfavorable. Example: No le gusta hablar en terminos negativos. English source: When something is negative, it is unpleasant or sad. She doesn’t like to say negative things about her friends.

English: per Meaning: Se usa por para indicar cantidad por unidad. Example: Cuesta ocho dolares por persona. English source: Per is used to mean “each” when giving a price, size, or amount. It costs eight dollars per person to watch the baseball game.

English: plead Meaning: Suplicar es pedir con insistencia. Example: El chico suplico que lo dejaran ir. English source: To plead is to ask for something you want very badly. He pleaded for his parents to let him go to the soccer game.
English: rip Meaning: Desgarrar es romper con fuerza. Example: Ella desgarró el papel en dos. English source: To rip something means to pull it apart. She ripped the paper in half by accident.

English: sake Meaning: Hacer algo por el bien de alguien significa para ayudarle o protegerle. Example: Los padres trabajaron mucho por el bien de sus hijos. English source: The sake of something is the reason for doing it. The parents worked hard for their children’s sake.

English: scrape Meaning: Raspar es frotar fuerte. Example: Raspo la pintura del coche. English source: To scrape something is to rub it very hard with something sharp. I accidentally scraped the paint of the side of the car.

English: source Meaning: Fuente es el origen de algo. Example: El río era la fuente de agua. English source: A source of something is the place that it comes from. The river was the source of drinking water for the village.

English: stern Meaning: Severo es duro y serio. Example: La maestra severa no permitio hablar. English source: When somebody is stern, they are very serious. The stern teacher didn’t allow the students to speak during class.

English: stitch Meaning: Coser es unir piezas con aguja y hilo. Example: Mi abuela cosio las piezas. English source: To stitch is to use a needle and thread to join pieces of cloth together. My grandmother stitched the pieces together to make a big blanket.

English: thump Meaning: Un golpeteo es sonido fuerte de impacto. Example: Oyieron un golpe cuando la bola tocó la pista. English source: A thump is the sound of a heavy object hitting something. They heard the thump when the bowling ball hit the floor.

English: vehement Meaning: Vehemente significa intenso y enojado. Example: Gina fue muy vehemente al recibir la noticia. English source: When somebody is vehement, they are angry and emotional. Gina was vehement when she found out that Liz was bad in school.

English: ailing Meaning: Enfermo significa no sentirse bien de salud. Example: La salud de Antonio estaba mal y le dolía la cabeza. English source: If something is ailing, it is sickly or not doing well. Antonio’s ailing health caused his head to hurt.

English: alike Meaning: Parecido significa parecido. Example: Los hermanos se parecen mucho. English source: If two people or things are alike, they are similar to each other. The brothers looked so much alike that it was impossible to tell one from the other.

English: appall Meaning: Horrorizar significa causar una gran reacción de temor o disgusto. Example: Minerva se horrorizó al leer el correo de su enemigo. English source: To appall means to disgust someone. Minerva was appalled when she read the email from her enemy.
English: bathe Meaning: Bañarse es lavarse con agua. Example: La sirena se baño en el oceano. English source: To bathe means to wash oneself with water. The mermaid bathed herself in the ocean.

English: bounds Meaning: Limite es frontera del juego. Example: Si la pelota cae fuera de las lineas, está fuera de limites. English source: Bounds is the area in a game in which plays are legal. If your ball lands outside the lines, it’s out of bounds.

English: critique Meaning: Critica es opinión evaluativa. Example: Mi trabajo es criticar comida en restaurantes. English source: To critique means express an opinion about the good and the bad parts of something. My job is to critique the food at various restaurants.

English: demography Meaning: Demografia estudia poblaciones. Example: La demografia muestra crecimiento rapido. English source: Demography is the study of people and populations. If you study demography, you’ll see huge population growth in some areas of the world.

English: diagnosis Meaning: Un diagnóstico es la decisión médica sobre la causa de una enfermedad. Example: El diagnóstico del veterinario fue que nuestro perro tenía una pata rota. English source: A diagnosis is a doctor’s decision about the cause of an illness. The vet’s diagnosis was that our dog had a broken leg.

English: dip Meaning: Un decaimiento o caida temporal. Example: La economia tuvo una decaida en los años 30. English source: A dip is a decline or a worsening in condition. The economy experienced a dip in the 1930s, leading many workers to lose their jobs.

English: distress Meaning: La angustia es una sensación de tristeza y ansiedad. Example: Nuestra casa fue destruida y estuvimos en una gran angustia. English source: Distress is a feeling of sadness and anxiousness. We were in great distress when our home was destroyed during the last hurricane.

English: fever Meaning: La fiebre es cuando la temperatura corporal es más alta de lo normal. Example: Tuvo que faltar a la escuela porque estaba enfermo de fiebre. English source: A fever is when a body’s temperature is higher than normal. He had to miss school because he was sick with a fever.

English: grim Meaning: Algo sombrío es preocupante, serio y puede dar miedo. Example: El chico hizo un descubrimiento sombrío cuando se dio cuenta de que había borrado su tarea. English source: Something that is grim is worrying, serious, and scary. The boy made the grim discovery that he had accidentally deleted his homework.

English: gut Meaning: El intestino es la parte del cuerpo donde se procesa la comida después del estómago. Example: Miles de bacterias viven en tus intestinos y ayudan a digerir la comida. English source: Someone’s gut is their intestines, where food is processed after leaving the stomach. Thousands of bacteria live in your gut and help you digest food.

English: helmet Meaning: Un casco es un tipo de protección dura para la cabeza. Example: Al explorar cuevas subterráneas, es importante usar siempre un casco. English source: A helmet is a type of hard hat that protects your head. When exploring underground caves, it is important to always wear a helmet.

English: herb Meaning: Una hierba es una planta usada para cocinar o para medicina. Example: No pude decidir qué hierba quería comprar en el mercado. English source: An herb is a plant used for cooking or medicine. I couldn’t decide which herb I wanted to buy at the market.

English: militant Meaning: Si alguien es militante, está enojado, agresivo y dispuesto a pelear. Example: La mujer dio un discurso militante en la legislatura. English source: If someone is militant, they are angry and aggressive, and willing to fight easily. The woman delivered an angry, militant speech on the floor of the legislature.

English: miracle Meaning: Un milagro es una bendición inesperada que parece casi imposible. Example: Fue un milagro que Rosalita ganara más de sesenta millones de dólares. English source: A miracle is an unexpected blessing which seems almost impossible, like a gift from heaven. A miracle happened when Rosalita won over 60 million dollars in the lottery.
