English: mourn Meaning: Llorar significa mostrar o sentir gran tristeza al perder a alguien. Example: Toda la familia lloró a su abuelo en la muerte. English source: To mourn means to show or feel great sadness when you lose someone. The entire family mourned their grandfather’s death together.

English: nonsense Meaning: La tontería son palabras o ideas absurdas. Example: El bebé decía tonterías por el teléfono. English source: Nonsense are words or ideas that are silly or foolish. The baby was talking nonsense into the phone.

English: physician Meaning: Un médico es una persona que trata a los pacientes. Example: El médico fue un hombre amable y trató de ayudar a todos. English source: A physician is a doctor. The physician was a friendly man who did his best with all of his patients.

English: accent Meaning: Un acento es una forma de hablar que muestra de dónde viene una persona. Example: El acento del nuevo profesor era claramente alemán. English source: An accent is a certain way of speaking that shows where a person is from. The new teacher’s accent was clearly a German one.

English: barber Meaning: Un barbero es una persona cuyo oficio es cortar el cabello masculino. Example: Mi pelo estaba muy largo y mejor iré a la peluquería del barbero. English source: A barber is a person whose job is to cut men’s hair. My hair is getting much too long. I’d better go to the barber’s shop.

English: basement Meaning: Un sótano es una habitación construida bajo tierra. Example: Convirtieron su sótano en una sala de juegos. English source: A basement of a house or building is a room that is built underground. They turned their basement into a game room.

English: blank Meaning: Algo en blanco no tiene nada escrito o dibujado. Example: Recibió una hoja en blanco para dibujar. English source: When something is blank, it does not have anything on it. She got a blank piece of paper to draw on.

English: blink Meaning: Parpadear significa cerrar y abrir los ojos rápidamente. Example: Parpadeé varias veces para que mis ojos se acostumbraran a la luz brillante. English source: To blink means to shut the eyes and quickly open them again. I blinked many times so that my eyes could adjust to the bright light.

English: choir Meaning: Un coro es un grupo de personas que canta junto. Example: Él tenía práctica de coro cada día. English source: A choir is a group of people who sing together. He had choir practice every day after school.
English: comic Meaning: Algo cómico es gracioso. Example: El actor cómico era famoso por sus chistes. English source: When something is comic, it is funny. The comic actor was famous for his jokes.

English: complicate Meaning: Complicar algo es hacerlo más difícil de lo necesario. Example: El mal tiempo complicó terminar el trabajo pronto. English source: To complicate something means to make it harder than necessary. The bad weather complicated finishing the job quickly.

English: decline Meaning: Rechazar una oferta o invitación significa decir que no. Example: Ella rechazó su oferta de pagarle la cena. English source: To decline an offer or invitation means to say no to it. She declined his offer to pay for her dinner.

English: errand Meaning: Un recado es un viaje para hacer una tarea concreta. Example: No pudo entrenarse porque tenía varios recados por hacer. English source: An errand is a trip taken to do a specific activity. He couldn’t go to practice because he had several errands to do.

English: glove Meaning: Un guante es una prenda que cubre dedos y manos. Example: Cuando hace frío, siempre uso un par de guantes. English source: A glove is a piece of clothing that covers your fingers and hand. When it gets cold, I always put on a pair of gloves.

English: hermit Meaning: Un ermitaño vive solo y no pasa tiempo con otros. Example: El ermitaño vivía una vida simple en una pequeña cueva del bosque. English source: A hermit is one who lives alone and does not spend time with others. The hermit lived a simple life in a small cave in the forest.

English: justly Meaning: Si algo se hace justamente, se hace con justicia. Example: Fue justamente la decisión darle el premio. English source: If something is done justly, then it is fair. We justly decided to give the prize to him.

English: leather Meaning: El cuero es un material de piel animal usado para ropa. Example: Se compró una chaqueta nueva de cuero. English source: Leather is a material made from animal skin that is used to make clothing. He got a new leather jacket for his birthday.

English: ponder Meaning: Reflexionar significa pensar cuidadosamente en algo. Example: Ella se sentó en el parque y reflexionó sobre su problema. English source: To ponder something is to think about it carefully. She sat in the park and pondered her problem.

English: reserve Meaning: Reservar algo es apartarlo para una persona o tiempo. Example: Reservó una mesa en un restaurante lleno. English source: To reserve something means to keep it for a certain person or time. He reserved a table at the busy restaurant.

English: script Meaning: Un guion es el texto de una película o una obra. Example: Leyó el guion de la obra tres veces. English source: A script is the words of a film or play. He read the script of the play three times.

English: search Meaning: Buscar es mirar con cuidado para encontrar algo o alguien. Example: Busqué en el periódico un nuevo trabajo. English source: To search for something or someone means to look for them carefully. I searched the newspaper for a new job.

English: slam Meaning: Cerrar algo de golpe significa presionar y dejarlo rápidamente. Example: Cerró el libro con fuerza cuando terminó de leerlo. English source: To slam is to close something hard. She slammed the book shut after she finished reading it.

English: staircase Meaning: Una escalera es una estructura de escalones dentro de un edificio. Example: La escalera lleva directamente a la cocina. English source: A staircase is a set of stairs found inside a building. The staircase leads directly into the kitchen.

English: afflicted Meaning: Alguien afectado es quien sufre física o mentalmente. Example: Él estaba afectado por dolor en su brazo derecho. English source: Afflicted means to suffer physically or mentally. He was afflicted by pain in his right arm.

English: aisle Meaning: Un pasillo es un espacio para caminar entre dos filas de asientos o sillas. Example: Pidieron vaciar el pasillo porque el avión iba a aterrizar. English source: An aisle is a space between two things that people use to walk. They were told to clear the aisle because the plane was about to land.

English: atmosphere Meaning: La atmósfera es el aire alrededor de la Tierra donde se forma el clima. Example: Temen que sustancias nocivas dañen la atmósfera. English source: The atmosphere is the air around the Earth where weather conditions form. Scientists worry that harmful substances are hurting the atmosphere.

English: author Meaning: Un autor es la persona que escribió una obra. Example: El autor estaba muy concentrado en su próxima novela. English source: An author is a person who wrote a certain piece of writing. The author was hard at work on his next novel.

English: breakdown Meaning: Una avería es una falla que impide que algo funcione. Example: El coche de ella tuvo una avería y no sabía cómo repararlo. English source: A breakdown is a failure to work correctly. Her car had a breakdown, and she wasn’t sure how to fix it.

English: cargo Meaning: La carga es lo que se transporta en un barco o avión. Example: La carga del barco se mojó cuando comenzó a llover. English source: Cargo is the items carried by a ship or an airplane. The cargo of the ship got wet when it started raining.

English: chapter Meaning: Un capítulo es una parte de un libro con número o título. Example: El primer capítulo de un libro suele presentar al personaje principal. English source: A chapter is a part of a book that usually has a number or a title. The first chapter of a book usually introduces the main character of a story.

English: connect Meaning: Conectar dos cosas significa unirlas. Example: Conecté el ratón a mi portátil. English source: To connect two things means to join them together. I connected the mouse to my laptop computer.

English: etc. Meaning: Etc. es la abreviatura de “etcétera”. Example: Trajo dulces a la fiesta: galletas, muffins, pastel, etc. English source: Etc. is short for “etcetera.” It is used to refer to other unspecified objects. She was going to bring treats to the party: cookies, muffins, cake, etc.

English: flip Meaning: Pulsar significa presionar un interruptor para encender o apagar. Example: Para encender las luces, solo hay que pulsar este interruptor. English source: To flip means to press a switch quickly to turn it on or off. To turn on the lights, just flip this switch.

English: idle Meaning: Si alguien está ocioso, no está haciendo nada. Example: Leía un libro para no quedarse ocioso. English source: If you are idle, you are not doing anything. She read a book to keep from being idle.

English: notify Meaning: Notificar a alguien es informarle de algo. Example: El profesor notificó a la clase de un cambio de tarea. English source: To notify someone of something is to tell them about it. The teacher notified us about a change to our assignment.

English: pea Meaning: Un guisante es una verdura pequeña, redonda y verde. Example: Sus alimentos favoritos eran los guisantes. English source: Peas are a vegetable that is small, round, and green. His favorite food was peas.
English: raisin Meaning: Una pasa es una uva seca. Example: Las pasas son uno de mis bocadillos favoritos. English source: A raisin is a dried grape. Raisins are one of my favorite snacks.

English: retain Meaning: Retener algo es mantenerlo o guardarlo. Example: Al mediodía, el día todavía había retenido la frescura de la mañana. English source: To retain something is to keep it. Even by the afternoon, the day had retained the morning’s freshness.

English: state Meaning: Declarar algo es decirlo de forma clara y firme. Example: El presidente declaró su opinión sobre la salud mundial. English source: To state something means to say it in a definite way. The president stated his opinion about the world’s health concerns.

English: tray Meaning: Una bandeja es un plato ancho para llevar comida. Example: El camarero trajo la comida en una bandeja. English source: A tray is a fat plate used to hold food. The waiter brought our food on a tray.

English: unfortunate Meaning: Algo desafortunado es malo o trae mala suerte. Example: Fue desafortunado que el equipo de Dave perdiera. English source: If something is unfortunate, it is bad or unlucky. It was unfortunate that Dave’s team lost, but he still had fun.

English: vivid Meaning: Algo vívido es brillante y lleno de color. Example: Las figuras en la pintura eran muy vívidas. English source: When something is vivid, it is bright and colorful. The figures in the painting were vivid.

English: vomit Meaning: Vomitar es hacer que el alimento salga del estómago. Example: Es común vomitar durante el embarazo. English source: To vomit means to have food come up from one’s stomach. It is common for women to vomit when they are pregnant.

English: ambition Meaning: La ambición es el deseo de triunfar y ser el mejor en algo. Example: Su gran ambición lo llevó a intentar escalar la montaña solo. English source: Ambition is the desire to succeed and to become the best at something. His great ambition led him to try to climb the mountain alone.

English: ambulance Meaning: Una ambulancia es un vehículo que lleva personas en emergencias médicas. Example: La ambulancia aceleró por la calle para llegar al accidente. English source: An ambulance is a vehicle that transports people in a medical emergency. The ambulance sped through the street to get to the accident.

English: ankle Meaning: El tobillo une la pierna con el pie. Example: El hombre se torció el tobillo al correr. English source: An ankle connects your leg to your foot. The man hurt his ankle while jogging in the park.

English: cabin Meaning: Una cabaña es una casa pequeña de madera en bosque o camping. Example: El hombre llegó a la cabaña de montaña tras un día largo. English source: A cabin is a small wooden house in a forest or camping area. The man reached the mountain cabin after a long day of hiking along the river.

English: calendar Meaning: Un calendario muestra los días, semanas y meses de un año. Example: Marco usó un calendario en línea para organizar su horario. English source: A calendar is a chart that shows the days, weeks, and months of a year. Marco used an online calendar to keep track of his schedule.

English: calorie Meaning: La caloría es una unidad de energía de los alimentos. Example: Mi hermana sigue una dieta baja en calorías. English source: A calorie is a unit of heat used to measure how much energy a food will produce. My sister is on a low-calorie diet for fitness training.

English: cave Meaning: Una cueva es un hueco o espacio subterráneo en una montaña. Example: En una cueva subterránea encontraron un lago de color azul. English source: A cave is an open space or hole underground or inside a mountain or cliff. A crystal blue lake could be found in the underground cave.

English: constantly Meaning: Constantemente significa de manera continua. Example: Revisaba su reloj constantemente para saber si iba tarde. English source: Constantly means doing something on a continuous basis. He was constantly checking his watch to see if he was late.

English: contingent Meaning: Un contingente es un grupo que forma parte de uno más grande. Example: La estrella de cine se enfrentó a un contingente de fotógrafos. English source: A contingent is a set of people that are part of a larger group. The movie star stood in front of an entire contingent of photographers.

English: deadline Meaning: Una fecha límite es el plazo para terminar algo. Example: Marius tenía una fecha límite muy corta para su informe. English source: A deadline is the time by which you need to have something completed. Marius had a short deadline in which to finish his report.

English: exert Meaning: Esforzarse es usar energía o fuerza para hacer algo. Example: Te esfuerzas mucho cuando levantas pesas. English source: To exert means to use strength or ability to do something. You exert a lot of energy when you lift weights.

English: flank Meaning: Flanquear significa ir a un lado de alguien. Example: La alcaldesa entró a la sala flanqueada por sus asesores. English source: To flank is to be positioned at the side of something or someone. The mayor entered the room flanked by her advisers.

English: fond Meaning: Ser afectuoso significa querer y cuidar con cariño. Example: La madre vaca estaba muy afectuosa con su ternero. English source: To be fond of something means to cherish or like it. The mother cow was very fond of her lovely little calf.

English: forbid Meaning: Prohibir significa ordenar que no se haga algo. Example: Su madre quería prohibirle usar crayones en la pared. English source: To forbid means to order someone not to do something. After Robert used his crayons on the wall, his mother wanted to forbid him from using them at all!

English: haul Meaning: Transportar algo es llevarlo de un lugar a otro. Example: El personal dijo que transportaría nuestras maletas. English source: To haul something means to carry it from place to place. The porter said he’d haul our suitcases up to our hotel room.

English: impair Meaning: Perjudicar algo significa hacerlo peor. Example: Comer demasiado puede perjudicar tu salud. English source: To impair something means to make it weaker or worse. Regularly eating too much can impair your health.

English: impatient Meaning: Ser impaciente es ponerse nervioso o enojado si algo tarda. Example: El profesor impaciente no pudo controlar a sus estudiantes. English source: To be impatient means to get angry or anxious when something takes too much time. The impatient teacher could not control the students in her classroom.

English: mid Meaning: Mid significa en el centro o mitad de algo. Example: Cassandra se durmió a la mitad de la película. English source: Mid means in the middle or center of something. Cassandra fell asleep mid-movie. Notes: Uso ambiguo: en está entrada aparece como prefijo/adverbio en el contexto de mid-movie.

English: nutrition Meaning: La nutrición es la ingesta de alimentos saludables para estar sano. Example: La madre se aseguró de que su bebé tuviera buena nutrición. English source: Nutrition is the process of eating the right kind of food in order to stay healthy. The mother always made sure that her baby had good nutrition.

English: optimist Meaning: Un optimista tiene mucha esperanza y ve siempre el lado positivo. Example: Joe era un optimista, así que creyó que conseguiría el trabajo. English source: An optimist is someone who has a lot of hope and always sees the bright side of things. Joe was an optimist, so he believed he would get the job that he wanted.

English: background Meaning: El trasfondo es la educación, familia y experiencia de alguien. Example: El nuevo profesor tenía un trasfondo en ciencias y matemáticas. English source: A background is a person’s education, family, and experience. The new teacher had a background in science and math.

English: bait Meaning: Un cebo es algo que se usa para atrapar a alguien o algo. Example: El mejor cebo para pescar era un gusano grande. English source: Bait is something used to trick a person or thing to do something. The best bait for catching fish is a big, fat worm.

English: chronicle Meaning: Crónica significa registrar un evento. Example: El periódico local cronicó eventos diarios y mundiales. English source: To chronicle an event means to record it. The daily newspaper chronicles local and world events.

English: copper Meaning: El cobre es un metal rojo-marrón usado en cables y tuberías. Example: Los antiguos cazadores fundían cobre para hacer cuchillos y lanzas. English source: Copper is a red-brown metal often used in electric wire and pipes. Ancient hunters melted copper to make knives and spears.

English: disease Meaning: Una enfermedad es un padecimiento que causa problemas físicos. Example: Tenía una enfermedad que le hizo perder audición. English source: A disease is an illness that causes specific problems. He had a disease that caused him to lose his hearing.

English: folklore Meaning: El folclore es el conjunto de creencias e historias de una cultura. Example: El folclore de la India tiene poemas largos sobre guerreros. English source: Folklore is the collection of beliefs and stories of a culture. India’s folklore has stories about great warriors written in long poems.

English: infect Meaning: Infectar a alguien significa darle una enfermedad. Example: El resfriado común infecta a cientos de millones cada año. English source: To infect someone means to give them an illness. The common cold infects hundreds of millions of people each year.

English: itch Meaning: La picazón es la sensación incómoda de querer rascarse. Example: La tela áspera de su camisa hizo que su cuello picara. English source: To itch means to have an unpleasant feeling that you want to scratch. The rough fabric in his shirt made his neck itch.

English: literature Meaning: La literatura son libros, obras de teatro y poesía. Example: La literatura norteamericana temprana va de 1500 a 1800. English source: Literature is books, plays, and poetry. Early American literature covers the poetry and stories from 1500 to 1800.

English: millennium Meaning: Un milenio son 1000 años. Example: Se cree que Stonehenge se construyó hace unos cinco milenios. English source: A millennium is 1000 years. Stonehenge is believed to have been built about five millennia ago.

English: myth Meaning: Un mito es una historia tradicional que explica creencias e historia. Example: En Grecia, había un mito sobre una mujer con cabellos de serpiente. English source: A myth is a traditional story that explains a culture’s history and beliefs. In Greece, there was a myth about a woman who had snakes for hair.

English: promote Meaning: Promover a alguien significa subirlo a un puesto más alto. Example: Después de dos años, ella fue promovida a gerente. English source: To promote someone means to raise them to a higher position or rank. After two years at the company, she was promoted to manager.

English: relate Meaning: Relacionar algo significa conectarlo con otro algo. Example: El plan de la empresa se relacionaba con sus ganancias. English source: To relate to something means to have a connection with it. A company’s plan usually relates to how much profit it can make.

English: religion Meaning: La religión es la creencia en un dios o dioses. Example: Su religión enseñaba que se debe perdonar a los enemigos. English source: A religion is a belief in a god or gods. Their religion taught that people should forgive their enemies.

English: sum Meaning: La suma es una cantidad total de dinero. Example: Calculó las cifras para ver la suma de sus cuentas. English source: A sum is a specific amount of money. He calculated the numbers to see what the sum of his bills would be.

English: teller Meaning: Un cajero es una persona que atiende a clientes en un banco. Example: El cajero del banco ayudó a Kelly a abrir una cuenta. English source: A teller is a person who works with a bank’s customers. The teller at the bank helped Kelly put money into a savings account.

English: trustworthy Meaning: Confiable significa honesto y en quien se puede confiar. Example: Mary es una de las personas más confiables que conozco. English source: If someone is trustworthy, they are honest and truthful. Mary is one of the most trustworthy people I’ve ever met.

English: update Meaning: Actualizar algo es hacerlo más moderno. Example: Tenemos que actualizar los programas de los ordenadores. English source: To update something means to make it more modern. We need to update the programs on our computers.

English: vein Meaning: Una vena es un conducto de sangre en el cuerpo que llega al corazón. Example: Las venas azules de mi mano están justo bajo la piel. English source: A vein is a tube in the body that carries blood toward the heart. The blue veins in my hand are just under my skin.

English: venom Meaning: El veneno es una sustancia tóxica de animales o plantas. Example: El veneno de una serpiente puede causar enfermedades. English source: Venom is a poisonous substance that comes from animals or plants. A snake’s venom can be used to cure the illnesses it creates.

English: charity Meaning: La caridad es ayudar a quienes lo necesitan, por lo general con dinero. Example: Gracias a la caridad de sus amigos, pudo pagar el alquiler. English source: Charity is an act of giving help, usually money, to those who need it. Thanks to his friends’ charity, he had enough money to pay the rent.

English: commerce Meaning: El comercio es la actividad de comprar y vender. Example: El nuevo centro comercial aumentó el comercio del barrio. English source: Commerce is the activity of buying and selling things. The new shopping mall increased the commerce in that section of town.

English: condemn Meaning: Condenar a alguien es darle un castigo. Example: El juez condenó al criminal a cinco años de prisión. English source: To condemn someone means to give them a specific punishment. The judge condemned the criminal to five years in prison.

English: cozy Meaning: Algo acogedor es cómodo, cálido y relajante. Example: La manta gruesa volvió la cama muy acogedora. English source: If something is cozy, then it is comfortable, warm, and relaxing. The thick blanket made the bed very cozy.

English: deplete Meaning: Agotar algo significa usarlo casi por completo. Example: Conducir tanto estaba agotando el combustible de su coche. English source: To deplete an amount of something means to use all of it up. All the driving he was doing was depleting his car’s fuel supply.

English: economy Meaning: La economía es el sistema de dinero y negocios de una región. Example: La fábrica benefició a la economía al dar trabajos en la zona. English source: An economy is the money and businesses of a country or region. The factory was good for the economy because it brought jobs to the area.

English: empire Meaning: Un imperio es un gran grupo de países gobernados por un emperador. Example: El emperador construyó carreteras para viajar mejor por su imperio. English source: An empire is a large group of countries ruled by an emperor or empress. The emperor built roads to make travel easier throughout the empire.

English: goods Meaning: Los bienes son cosas que se pueden comprar o vender. Example: Zapatos, sombreros y bolsos eran los bienes que quería comprar. English source: Goods are anything that can be bought or sold. Shoes, hats, dresses, and purses were the goods she wanted to buy.

English: heed Meaning: Obedecer o atender una norma es cumplirla. Example: Debes obedecer el cartel y no conducir tan rápido. English source: To heed something means to obey or follow it. You should heed the advice on the sign and not drive so fast.

English: hitchhike Meaning: Hacer autostop significa viajar pidiendo aventones en coches. Example: No tenía coche, así que viajó con autostop varios kilómetros. English source: To hitchhike means to travel by asking for rides from passing vehicles. She didn’t have a car, so she hitchhiked several miles to her brother’s home.

English: mock Meaning: Burlarse de alguien significa reírse cruelmente de él. Example: Las chicas burlaron a Nancy por ser nueva. English source: To mock someone means to tease them in a cruel way. The girls mocked Nancy because she was a new student.

English: neutral Meaning: Neutral significa no apoyar a ninguna de las partes en conflicto. Example: La amiga de la pareja se mantuvo neutral mientras discutían. English source: If someone is neutral, then they do not help either of the two fighting sides. The girl’s friend remained neutral while the couple was arguing.

English: persecute Meaning: Perseguir a alguien significa tratarlo injustamente o violentamente. Example: Dan se sentía perseguido porque era más pequeño que los demás. English source: To persecute means to treat someone badly. Dan felt persecuted because he was smaller than the other boys at school.

English: pity Meaning: La piedad o compasión es la tristeza amable hacia quien sufre. Example: Sintió mucha piedad por el niño perdido y lo ayudó a encontrar a sus padres. English source: Pity is the feeling of sadness and kindness for those who are suffering. Because she had pity for the lost boy, she helped him find his parents.

English: reduce Meaning: Reducir significa hacer más pequeño o menos. Example: Cuando la tienda redujo precios, más personas quisieron comprar. English source: To reduce something means to make it smaller in size or fewer in number. When the store reduced its prices, people wanted to shop there.

English: scribe Meaning: Un escriba era una persona que copiaba textos escritos. Example: En el Egipto antiguo, los escribas registraban eventos importantes. English source: A scribe was a person whose job was to copy written works. In ancient Egypt, scribes recorded important events.

English: temper Meaning: El temperamento es el carácter o estado de ánimo de alguien. Example: Ella tiene un temperamento fuerte; los errores pequeños la enfadan. English source: A temper is someone’s mood or a chance that they might get angry. She has a temper. Even the slightest mistakes make her angry.

English: throne Meaning: Un trono es el asiento del gobernante. Example: Nadie, salvo el rey y la reina, se sentó en el trono. English source: A throne is the special chair in which a ruler sits. Nobody except the king and queen sat in the thrones in the great hall.

English: unity Meaning: La unidad es trabajar juntos hacia un objetivo común. Example: El proyecto se terminó pronto gracias a la unidad del equipo. English source: Unity is the state of people working together for a certain purpose. The project was finished early thanks to the unity of the workers.

English: victor Meaning: Un vencedor es quien gana una competencia. Example: Al final del juego, los azules fueron los vencedores. English source: A victor is a group or person that wins in a contest. At the end of the game, the blue team were the victors.

English: accurate Meaning: Algo preciso es totalmente correcto. Example: La información del periódico no era muy precisa. English source: If something is accurate, it is completely correct. The story in the newspaper wasn’t very accurate.

English: analyze Meaning: Analizar algo significa estudiarlo con detalle. Example: El científico analizará la muestra de sangre. English source: To analyze something is to study it. The scientist will analyze the blood sample.

English: asteroid Meaning: Un asteroide es una gran roca del espacio. Example: En 1908, un gran asteroide impactó Siberia. English source: An asteroid is a giant rock from outer space. In 1908, a giant asteroid hit Siberia.

English: controversy Meaning: Una controversia es un desacuerdo que afecta a muchos. Example: Ha habido mucha controversia sobre la decisión del juez. English source: A controversy is a dispute about something that affects many people. There has been a lot of controversy over the judge’s decision.

English: evolve Meaning: Evolucionar significa cambiar con el tiempo. Example: Mucha gente piensa que los humanos evolucionaron desde otros animales. English source: To evolve is to change over time. Many people think that humans evolved from animals.

English: factor Meaning: Un factor es algo que influye en cómo sucede algo. Example: Fumar es el principal factor que causa cáncer de pulmón. English source: A factor is something that has an effect on the way another thing happens. Smoking is the main factor that causes lung cancer.

English: genetic Meaning: Genético se refiere a los genes del cuerpo. Example: El color de ojos es genético. English source: If something is genetic, it is related to the genes in one’s body. The color of one’s eyes is genetic.

English: genome Meaning: El genoma es el conjunto de genes de un organismo vivo. Example: Entender el genoma humano puede ayudar a curar enfermedades. English source: A genome is the collection of all the genes in a living thing. Understanding the human genome may help cure many diseases.

English: identical Meaning: Idéntico significa exactamente igual. Example: James y John son gemelos idénticos. English source: To be identical is to be the same as someone or something else. James and John are identical twins.

English: intellectual Meaning: Un intelectual es una persona muy culta o pensante. Example: Siempre hemos visto a mi tío Max como el intelectual de la familia. English source: An intellectual is a very smart person. We’ve always considered my Uncle Max to be the intellectual of the family.

English: majority Meaning: La mayoría significa más de la mitad de un grupo. Example: Una mayoría votó por Tom Smith en la elección. English source: A majority of something is more than half of the people or things in that group. A majority of the people voted for Tom Smith in the election.

English: mammal Meaning: Un mamífero es un animal con pelo y que no nace de huevo. Example: Aunque viven en el agua, las ballenas son mamíferos. English source: A mammal is an animal that usually has hair and is not born from an egg. Even though they live in water, whales are actually mammals.

English: multiply Meaning: Multiplicar significa aumentar en número. Example: En el año pasado, la gente del trabajo se multiplicó un diez por ciento. English source: To multiply is to increase in number. In the past year, the number of people at work has multiplied by ten percent.

English: offspring Meaning: La descendencia son los hijos de una persona o animal. Example: La descendencia del perro tenía el mismo color de pelo. English source: Offspring are the children of a person or the babies of an animal. The dog’s offspring had the same color of fur as she did.

English: pesticide Meaning: Un pesticida es una sustancia para eliminar insectos. Example: El agricultor roció sus cultivos con un pesticida. English source: A pesticide is a substance used to kill insects. The farmer sprayed his crops with a pesticide to keep bugs away.

English: regulate Meaning: Regular significa controlar cómo algo sucede. Example: El banco regula cuánto dinero puede pedir préstamo la gente. English source: To regulate something is to control how it happens. The bank regulates how much money people can borrow.

English: reinforce Meaning: Reforzar algo es hacerlo más fuerte. Example: Peter reforzó su opinión con datos de un libro. English source: To reinforce something is to make it stronger. Peter reinforced his opinion with information from a book.

English: stricken Meaning: Afligido significa gravemente afectado por enfermedad o dolor. Example: El piloto aterrizó el avión afligido con dificultad. English source: If someone or something is stricken by a disease or problem, they are badly affected by it. The pilot landed the stricken airplane with difficulty.

English: vast Meaning: Vasto significa muy grande o extenso. Example: El millonario compró una cantidad vasta de tierra. English source: If something is vast, it is very large. The wealthy man bought a vast amount of land in the countryside.

English: vegetarian Meaning: Un vegetariano no come carnes. Example: Me hice vegetariano porque no me gusta el sabor de la carne. English source: A vegetarian is someone who does not eat any meat products. I became a vegetarian because I don’t like the taste of meat.
English: bowl Meaning: Un cuenco es un plato hondo y redondo. Example: Puse la fruta en el cuenco. English source: A bowl is a dish with a round deep shape. I put the fruit in the fruit bowl.

English: cooking Meaning: Cocinar es preparar la comida para comer. Example: Me encanta cocinar, sobre todo comida italiana. English source: Cooking food involves making it ready to eat. I really enjoy cooking, especially Italian food.

English: dense Meaning: Denso significa concentrado, con muchas cosas juntas. Example: Me perdí fácilmente en el bosque denso. English source: If something is dense, it has a lot of things close together. I easily became lost in the dense forest.

English: dignity Meaning: La dignidad es ser digno de respeto y mantener la calma. Example: Cuando cerró su empresa, lo aceptó con mucha dignidad. English source: Dignity is the ability to be calm and worthy of respect. When his company went out of business, he faced it with dignity.

English: dominate Meaning: Dominar a alguien significa tener control sobre él. Example: El hombre más ruidoso dominó la conversación. English source: To dominate someone or something is to control them. The loud man dominated the conversation.

English: earthen Meaning: Algo de barro está hecho con arcilla. Example: El techo de la casa estaba hecho con tejas de barro. English source: If something is earthen, it is made of clay. The house’s roof was made of earthen tiles.

English: hostile Meaning: Hostil significa enojado y poco amistoso. Example: Estábamos contentos de mudarnos lejos de nuestro vecino hostil. English source: If someone is hostile, they are angry and unfriendly. We were happy to move away from our hostile neighbor.

English: incorrect Meaning: Incorrecto significa no correcto. Example: Tu respuesta es incorrecta; corrígela. English source: If something is incorrect, it is wrong. Your answer is incorrect. You need to correct it.

English: intake Meaning: La ingesta es la cantidad de alimento que entra al cuerpo. Example: El doctor dijo que aumentara mi ingesta de frutas y verduras. English source: Your intake of food is the amount of food you take into your body. The doctor said I needed to increase my intake of fruits and vegetables.

English: likewise Meaning: Asimismo significa de la misma manera. Example: Si Joe no va a la escuela para ir a nadar, yo quiero hacer asimismo. English source: If someone does something likewise, they do the same thing as someone else. If Joe is not going to school so he can go swimming, I want to do likewise.

English: machine Meaning: Una máquina es un artefacto con piezas que hace trabajo por nosotros. Example: La máquina se estropeó. English source: A machine is made by people and does work for us. The machine was broken.

English: medication Meaning: Un medicamento es fármaco para tratar una enfermedad. Example: El médico me recetó un medicamento para mi dolencia. English source: Medication is medicine or drugs given to people who are sick. The doctor gave me medication to treat my illness.

English: obscure Meaning: Oscuro significa poco conocido o poco claro. Example: El hombre viejo viaja por el mundo buscando obras poco conocidas. English source: If something is obscure, it is not well known. The old man travels the world in search of obscure books.

English: oppress Meaning: Oprimir a alguien significa dominarlo de forma cruel e injusta. Example: La libertad de expresión había sido oprimida en su país. English source: To oppress someone means to rule over them in a cruel and unfair way. Free speech had been oppressed in his country.

English: peel Meaning: Pelar frutas y verduras es quitarles la piel. Example: Peleó la manzana antes de comerla. English source: To peel fruits and vegetables is to remove their skin. He peeled the apple before eating it.

English: prescription Meaning: Una receta médica es el permiso del médico para conseguir un medicamento. Example: El médico me dio una receta para mis medicinas. English source: A prescription is permission from a doctor to get medicine. The doctor gave me a prescription for my medication.

English: progress Meaning: Progreso significa mejorar en algo. Example: Hay señales claras de progreso. English source: When you make progress, you get better at what you are doing. There are clear signs of progress.
English: sandy Meaning: Arenoso significa cubierto de arena. Example: Me encanta caminar por una playa arenosa. English source: Sandy means covered with sand. I love walking on a sandy beach.

English: shortage Meaning: Escasez significa falta o insuficiencia de algo. Example: Durante la estación seca, hubo escasez de agua. English source: Shortage comes from short and means not having enough. During the dry season, there was a shortage of water.

English: skillful Meaning: Ser hábil es ser muy bueno en algo. Example: Trabajó con mucha habilidad y confianza. English source: If someone is skillful at something, they are very good at doing it. The carpenter is very skillful at building houses.

English: aircraft Meaning: Una aeronave es un vehículo que vuela, como avión o helicóptero. Example: En el museo del aeropuerto hay muchas aeronaves antiguas. English source: An aircraft is a vehicle that flies in the sky, such as an airplane or helicopter. At the museum in the airport, you can see a lot of old aircraft.

English: celebrity Meaning: Una celebridad es una persona famosa. Example: La fiesta fue especial cuando llegaron las celebridades. English source: A celebrity is someone who is famous. It was the highlight of the evening when the celebrities arrived.

English: concrete Meaning: Concreto es una mezcla dura usada para construir. Example: El hombre cubrió el suelo con concreto. English source: Concrete is a substance made from stones. The man covered the ground with concrete.

English: decisive Meaning: Decisivo significa tomar decisiones con rapidez. Example: Nuestro jefe es muy decisivo, así que organizamos el proyecto enseguida. English source: If someone is decisive, they make decisions quickly. Our boss is very decisive, so it did not take long to organize the project.

English: esteemed Meaning: Estimado significa muy respetado por los demás. Example: Un científico estimado vino a la universidad a hablar de sus hallazgos. English source: If someone is esteemed, many people like or respect them. An esteemed scientist is coming to the university to talk about his discoveries.

English: ethical Meaning: Ético significa moralmente correcto. Example: Muchos piensan que es ético ayudar a quienes necesitan apoyo. English source: If something is ethical, it is the right thing to do. Many people believe that it is ethical to help others in need.

English: extinct Meaning: Extinto significa que ya no existe. Example: Los dinosaurios eran comunes y ahora están extintos. English source: If plants or animals are extinct, there are none left. There used to be dinosaurs all over the world, but now they are extinct.

English: hardy Meaning: Resistente significa fuerte y capaz de soportar dificultades. Example: El granjero es un hombre resistente y no le importa trabajar fuera. English source: If a person or plant is hardy, it is strong and can live through difficult conditions. The farmer is a hardy man and doesn’t mind working outside.

English: institute Meaning: Un instituto es una organización dedicada a la enseñanza o investigación. Example: Voy a una conferencia en el Instituto Histórico sobre Roma antigua. English source: An institute is an organization that is interested in research or teaching. I am going to a lecture about Ancient Rome at the Historical Institute.

English: jealousy Meaning: Los celos son el deseo de tener lo que otra persona posee. Example: Sintió celos al ver a su amiga con un coche nuevo. English source: Jealousy is a feeling of wanting something that somebody else has. She felt a lot of jealousy when she saw her friend with a new car.

English: migrate Meaning: Migrar significa mudarse de un lugar a otro. Example: Muchos pájaros migran a lugares más cálidos en invierno. English source: To migrate means to move from one place to another. Many birds migrate to warmer countries in the winter.

English: nurture Meaning: Criar algo es cuidarlo mientras crece y se desarrolla. Example: Robert crió sus plantas, y por eso crecieron tan bien. English source: To nurture something means to care for it as it grows or develops. Robert nurtured his plants, and that is why they grow so well.

English: overhead Meaning: Sobre algo significa encima de ti. Example: Nos sentamos en la colina y un avión voló sobre nuestras cabezas. English source: If something is overhead, it is located above you. As we sat on the top of the hill, a plane flew overhead.

English: principle Meaning: Un principio es una creencia sobre cómo actuar. Example: Mantener los principios exige escuchar, mirar y hablar con cuidado. English source: A principle is a belief about the correct way to behave. To maintain principles, it’s vital to watch, listen, and speak carefully.

English: rural Meaning: Rural significa relacionado con el campo. Example: Quiero vivir en una casa pequeña en una zona rural. English source: If a place is rural, it is in the countryside instead of the city. I want to live in a small house in a rural area.

English: secluded Meaning: Aislado significa lejos de otros sitios. Example: Había un banco aislado en el parque. English source: If a place is secluded, it is far away from any other place. There was a secluded bench in the park.

English: species Meaning: Una especie es un tipo de planta o animal. Example: Hay 21 especies de mariposa en este bosque. English source: A species is a type of plant or animal. There are 21 different species of butterfly in this forest.

English: swamp Meaning: Un pantano es un lugar de tierra muy húmedo. Example: Muchos animales viven en el pantano. English source: A swamp is a very wet area of land. There are lots of wild animals living in the swamp.

English: traverse Meaning: Atravesar significa pasar por o viajar a través de un lugar. Example: El explorador atravesó el desierto sobre un camello. English source: To traverse means to move or travel through an area. The explorer traversed the desert alone on a camel.

English: zoology Meaning: La zoología es la ciencia que estudia animales. Example: Helen quiere estudiar zoología porque siempre le gustaron los animales. English source: Zoology is a subject in which people study animals. Helen wants to study zoology because she has always liked animals.

English: accordingly Meaning: Actuar en consecuencia significa actuar de manera apropiada. Example: Hizo un buen trabajo y el jefe debería pagarle en consecuencia. English source: If someone acts accordingly, they act in a way that is suitable. He feels like he did a good job and his boss should pay him accordingly.

English: anchor Meaning: Una ancla es un peso de metal o piedra que mantiene un barco en su sitio. Example: Al llegar al puerto, la tripulación arrojó el ancla. English source: An anchor is a heavy object dropped from a boat to make it stay in one place. When the ship reached its destination, the crew dropped the anchor.
English: cause Meaning: Causar algo significa hacerlo suceder. Example: El cansancio causó el accidente. English source: When you cause something, you make it happen. Tiredness caused the accident.

English: context Meaning: El contexto es el entorno de una situación o evento. Example: Estudiaron el contexto de la batalla antes de la presentación. English source: Context is the situations that form the background of an event. They studied the context of the battle before giving their presentation.

English: designate Meaning: Designar significa nombrar o señalar para un rol. Example: El faro famoso fue designado como monumento histórico. English source: To designate someone or something means to give them a particular description. The famous lighthouse was designated as a historical monument.

English: distort Meaning: Distorsionar algo es cambiarlo, torciéndolo o alterando la verdad. Example: El abogado distorsionó los hechos para que quedara libre. English source: To distort something means to lie about it, or pull or twist out of shape. The man’s lawyer distorted the facts so that he would be set free.

English: dock Meaning: Un muelle es el lugar donde atracan y cargan los barcos. Example: El gran barco entró en el muelle y descargaron la carga. English source: A dock is an enclosed area where ships go to be loaded, unloaded, and repaired. The huge ship pulled into the dock, and the crew unloaded the cargo.

English: energy Meaning: La energía es la fuerza o capacidad para hacer muchas cosas. Example: Si no tienes energía, come mejor. English source: If you have a lot of energy, you have plenty of strength and can do lots of things. If you lack energy, try eating better food.

English: frequent Meaning: Frecuente significa que sucede muchas veces. Example: Mientras papá estaba enfermo, el médico hizo visitas frecuentes. English source: If something is frequent, then it happens or is done often. While Dad was sick, the doctor made frequent visits to his house.

English: gears Meaning: Los engranajes son las partes de una máquina que controlan la velocidad. Example: Mi hermano tiene un coche con cuatro engranajes. English source: The gears are the part of a motor that controls the speed. My brother has a car with four gears.

English: genuine Meaning: Genuino significa verdadero o auténtico. Example: Tras comprobar que el cuadro era genuino, se vendió por un millón. English source: When something is genuine, it is true or real. After the painting was determined to be genuine, it sold for a million dollars.

English: grease Meaning: La grasa es una sustancia aceitosa usada en piezas móviles o en cocina. Example: Al terminar el coche, tenía grasa en las manos. English source: Grease is an oily substance put on moving parts so they work smoothly, or oil or fat in cooking. When I was done working on the car, I had grease all over my hands.

English: knowledge Meaning: El conocimiento es lo que sabes. Example: Le cuesta aplicar su conocimiento en la práctica. English source: Knowledge is what you know. He has trouble putting his knowledge into practice.

English: omit Meaning: Omitir algo significa dejarlo fuera o no hacerlo. Example: omití información importante: él no viene. English source: When you omit something, you leave it out or do not do it. I omitted some important information: he is not coming.

English: offset Meaning: Compensar es usar algo para contrarrestar otra cosa. Example: El aumento de salarios se compensa con precios más altos. English source: To offset means to use one thing to cancel out the effect of another thing. Increased wages are offset by higher prices for goods.

English: overlap Meaning: Superponer algo es cubrir una parte con otra. Example: El regalo de arriba se superpone al de abajo. English source: To overlap something means to cover a piece of it. The gift on top overlaps the other gift on the bottom.

English: secondhand Meaning: De segunda mano significa que lo usó otra persona. Example: Sus vaqueras de segunda mano estaban un poco gastadas. English source: When something is secondhand, it has been owned by someone else. Her secondhand jeans were a bit faded in the front.

English: skill Meaning: La habilidad es la destreza para hacer bien un trabajo. Example: Trabajó con gran habilidad y seguridad. English source: When you have skill at doing a job, you are good at doing it. She worked with great skill and confidence.

English: slot Meaning: Una ranura es una hendidura para meter monedas o piezas. Example: Para usar la máquina, mete las monedas en la ranura. English source: A slot is a narrow opening in a machine or container. To operate the machine, put your coins into the slot.

English: tactic Meaning: Una táctica es un plan ordenado para lograr algo. Example: Sam pensó en una buena táctica para atraer más clientes. English source: A tactic is a careful plan to achieve something. Sam thought of a good tactic to attract more business.

English: beneficial Meaning: Algo beneficioso es bueno para la salud o para la vida. Example: Beber leche todos los días es beneficioso para los huesos. English source: If something is beneficial, it is good for you. Drinking milk every day is beneficial for your bones.

English: birthplace Meaning: El lugar de nacimiento es donde una persona nace. Example: China es el lugar de nacimiento de los palillos. English source: A birthplace is a place where a person is born or where something started. China is the birthplace of chopsticks.

English: capacity Meaning: La capacidad es la cantidad que un espacio puede contener. Example: El estacionamiento llegó a su máxima capacidad. English source: The capacity of something is the amount of things that can be put in it. The parking lot has reached its full capacity.

English: comparative Meaning: Comparativo significa que se compara con otra cosa. Example: El dinero de John es comparativo al de la mayoría de adultos. English source: If something is comparative, it is being judged based on something else. The money that John has is comparative to that of most other adults.

English: comprehensive Meaning: Completo significa que incluye muchos detalles. Example: El profesor nos dio una revisión completa para el examen. English source: If something is comprehensive, it has all the details about something else. The teacher gave us a comprehensive review for the exam.

English: conserve Meaning: Conservar algo es protegerlo de perderse o deteriorarse. Example: El grupo trabajó para conservar la belleza de los parques nacionales. English source: To conserve something is to protect it from being ruined or used completely. The group worked to conserve the beauty of Europe’s national parks.

English: crucial Meaning: Crucial significa extremadamente importante. Example: El aire limpio es crucial para la vida. English source: If something is crucial, it is extremely important to another thing. Clean air is crucial to the survival of humans, plants, and animals.

English: cumulative Meaning: Cumulativo significa que se suma poco a poco. Example: La nieve cumulativa en la zona llega a cincuenta centímetros al año. English source: Cumulative describes an increase by adding one after another. The cumulative snowfall in the area is fifty centimeters per year.

English: deposit Meaning: Depositar algo es colocarlo en un lugar, como una cuenta o caja. Example: Deposité el dinero en mi cuenta bancaria. English source: To deposit something is to put it into a place or another thing. I deposited the money into my bank account.

English: distribute Meaning: Distribuir significa dar o repartir algo entre varias personas. Example: La maestra distribuyo crayones y rotulos a sus estudiantes. English source: To distribute something is to give it to a number of people. The teacher distributed crayons and markers to her students.

English: equator Meaning: El ecuador es una linea imaginaria que divide la Tierra entre norte y sur. Example: El ecuador atraviesa la parte norte de America del Sur. English source: The equator is an imaginary line that splits the Earth into north and south. The equator crosses the northern part of South America.

English: exotic Meaning: Exotico describe algo inusual porque viene de un lugar lejano. Example: Rebecca probó muchas comidas exóticas en su viaje a Africa. English source: Exotic describes something unusual because it is from far away. Rebecca tried many exotic foods on her trip to Africa.

English: federal Meaning: Algo federal está relacionado con el gobierno de un país. Example: A veces las leyes federales son diferentes de las estatales. English source: If something is federal, it relates to the government of a country. Sometimes federal laws are different from state laws.

English: formation Meaning: La formacion es la manera en que algo se forma. Example: La formacion del hielo ocurre cuando el agua se congela. English source: A formation is the way that something is made. The formation of ice happens when water freezes.

English: frequency Meaning: La frecuencia es el numero de veces que algo sucede. Example: La frecuencia de tormentas de lluvia es muy alta en primavera. English source: The frequency of something is the number of times that it happens. The frequency of rainstorms is very high, especially during the spring.

English: objective Meaning: Un objetivo es una meta o plan. Example: Mi objetivo está semana es terminar mi tarea todos los días a las 7:30 de la noche. English source: An objective is a goal or plan that someone has. My objective this week is to finish my homework by 7:30 every night.

English: oxygen Meaning: El oxígeno es un gas que los seres vivos necesitan para respirar. Example: En el campo suele haber más oxígeno en el aire que en la ciudad. English source: Oxygen is a gas that all living things need to breathe. She thinks there is more oxygen in the air in the country than in the city.

English: rainforest Meaning: La selva tropical es un bosque muy lluvioso. Example: La selva tropical es hogar de muchos animales. English source: A rainforest is a forest that is in a place where it rains very often. The rainforest is home to many animals.

English: strategy Meaning: Una estrategia es un plan para lograr algo. Example: El equipo invento una estrategia para ganar el juego. English source: A strategy is a plan for how to do something. The team came up with a strategy to win the game.

English: wooded Meaning: Un área arbolada está cubierta de árboles. Example: Jim y Ben decidieron hacer senderismo en la zona arbolada junto al río. English source: If an area is wooded, it is covered with trees. Jim and Ben decided to go hiking in the wooded area by the river.

English: avail Meaning: El provecho o la ayuda que algo proporciona. Example: Su estudio fue de poco provecho porque no aprobo el examen. English source: Avail is help or benefit. His studying was to no avail because he failed the test.

English: define Meaning: Definir es expresar con claridad que cosa es algo. Example: Las personas definen el exito de muchas maneras distintas. English source: To define means to clearly state, show, or explain what something is. People define success in many different ways.

English: dread Meaning: Tener temor o miedo de que algo pueda pasar. Example: Temo la posibilidad de que no entre a la universidad. English source: To dread is to be afraid of something that could, or is going to, happen. I dread the possibility that I will not get into college.

English: expand Meaning: Expandir significa hacerse más grande. Example: Un globo se expande cuando soplas aire dentro. English source: To expand is to become bigger in size. A balloon will expand as you blow air into it.

English: fundamental Meaning: Algo fundamental es una parte básica e importante. Example: Las reglas fundamentales del baloncesto son fáciles. English source: If something is fundamental, it is a basic part of something. The fundamental rules of basketball are easy.

English: horrifying Meaning: Algo horripilante es aterrador y muy desagradable. Example: Hubo un accidente de auto horripilante hoy. English source: If something is horrifying, it is frightening and very unpleasant. There was a horrifying car accident today.

English: incredulous Meaning: Es incredulo quien no cree que algo sea verdad. Example: Ella estaba incredula de que los monos pudieran conducir un auto. English source: If someone is incredulous about something, they do not believe that it is true. She was incredulous that monkeys could ever drive a car.

English: linger Meaning: Perdurar significa durar mucho tiempo. Example: El olor a galletas recién hechas perduro en la panaderia. English source: To linger is to last for a long time. The smell of fresh cookies lingered in the bakery.

English: organism Meaning: Un organismo es un ser vivo, especialmente uno pequeño. Example: Estudiamos el organismo bajo el microscopio. English source: An organism is a living thing, especially a very small one. We studied the organism under the microscope.

English: paraphrase Meaning: Parafrasear es decir lo mismo con menos palabras. Example: Alumnos tuvieron que parafrasear la historia que acababan de oir. English source: To paraphrase is to make someone else’s writing or speech shorter. The students were asked to paraphrase the story they had just heard.

English: plague Meaning: Una peste es una enfermedad grave que se propaga rapidamente. Example: Una peste en Europa mato a millones de personas. English source: A plague is a serious disease that quickly spreads to many people. A plague in Europe killed millions of people.

English: presently Meaning: Actualmente significa en este momento. Example: Actualmente nuestras ganancias son buenas, pero el proximo año podemos hacerlo mejor. English source: If something happens presently, it is happening right now. Presently, our profits are good, but by next year we can do even better. Notes: ambiguo entre "actualmente" y "proximamente" en otros contextos

English: random Meaning: Cosas aleatorias suceden sin patrón ni razón aparente. Example: Los niños pequeños hacen preguntas aleatorias con frecuencia. English source: If something is random, it happens without any pattern or reason. Young children often ask random questions.

English: riot Meaning: Un disturbio es una multitud que responde con violencia y desorden. Example: después de la derrota electoral estallo un disturbio. English source: A riot is a crowd that reacts to bad news by violently breaking laws. A riot broke out after the candidate lost the election.

English: scribble Meaning: Garabatear es escribir rapido sin cuidar la letra. Example: yo garabatee un dibujo rapido de nuestro plan y se lo di. English source: To scribble is to write something quickly without caring about how it looks. I scribbled a rough diagram of our plan and gave it to him.

English: shrine Meaning: Un santuario es un edificio religioso de devocion. Example: Oró durante una hora en el santuario. English source: A shrine is a religious building built to honor a person, event, or god. He prayed at the shrine for an hour.

English: solitude Meaning: La soledad es estar completamente solo. Example: John vive una vida de soledad porque no se lleva bien con la gente. English source: Solitude is the state of being totally alone. John lives a life of solitude because he doesn’t get along well with people.

English: stark Meaning: Algo extremo/severo es muy marcado. Example: Hay un contraste extremo entre sus puntajes. English source: If something is stark, then it is severe or clear in appearance or outline. There is a stark contrast between their test scores.

English: summon Meaning: Convocar significa llamar a alguien para que venga. Example: Convocamos al doctor apenas notamos que estaba enferma. English source: To summon a person is to ask them to come to you. We summoned the doctor as soon as we noticed she was sick.

English: worsen Meaning: Empeorar es volverse peor. Example: El clima empeoro de repente y tuvimos que quedarnos adentro. English source: To worsen is to get worse. The weather suddenly worsened, and we had to stay inside.

English: automobile Meaning: Un automóvil es un coche. Example: Los primeros automóviles eran muy diferentes a los de hoy. English source: An automobile is a car. The first automobiles were very different from the ones that exist today.

English: candidate Meaning: Un candidato compite por ganar algo, como un empleo. Example: Alice es la mejor candidata para el puesto. English source: A candidate is a person who is competing to win something such as a job. Alice is the best candidate for the job.

English: confidential Meaning: Confidencial significa que debe mantenerse en secreto. Example: La informacion de la reunion es confidencial. English source: If something is confidential, it must be kept secret. The information from the meeting is confidential.

English: corporate Meaning: Cosas corporativas pertenecen a una gran empresa. Example: A Tom le gusta trabajar en el mundo corporativo. English source: If something is corporate, it is related to a large business. Tom enjoys working in the corporate world.

English: enhance Meaning: Mejorar significa hacer algo más bueno. Example: La camisa azul de Amy mejora mucho el color de sus ojos. English source: To enhance something is to make it better. Amy’s blue shirt really enhances the color of her eyes.

English: era Meaning: Una era es un período histórico con características propias. Example: En la era medieval, los caballeros usaban armadura. English source: An era is a period of time that has something special about it. During the medieval era, knights wore protective armor.

English: guideline Meaning: Una guia es una regla o norma para actuar. Example: Antes de iniciar el proyecto, el profesor dio algunas directrices. English source: A guideline is a rule about how to do something. Before they began the project, the teacher gave them some guidelines.

English: incorporate Meaning: Incorporar es agregar una cosa a otra. Example: Decidi incorporar un nuevo ingrediente en mi receta de pastel. English source: To incorporate is to add something to another thing. I decided to incorporate a new ingredient into my cake recipe.

English: interact Meaning: Interactuar es comunicarte o actuar con otra persona. Example: Los niños comenzaron a interactuar cuando los adultos se fueron. English source: To interact is to talk to or do something with another person. The kids began to interact when the adults left the room.

English: interval Meaning: El intervalo es el tiempo entre dos momentos. Example: Tony descanso en intervalos cortos mientras trabajaba en el patio. English source: An interval is the time between two things happening. Tony rested for brief intervals while he worked in the yard.

English: mobile Meaning: Móvil significa que puede trasladarse o estar disponible. Example: Los celulares móviles son prácticos porque se pueden usar en cualquier lugar. English source: If something is mobile, it can be moved easily. Mobile phones are convenient because you can use them anywhere.

English: modify Meaning: Modificar es cambiar algo levemente. Example: Modifique mi atuendo al agregarle un cinturón. English source: To modify something is to change it a little bit. I modified my outfit by adding a belt to it.

English: parallel Meaning: Paralelo significa que corre al mismo nivel o distancia. Example: En la carretera hay dos lineas paralelas amarillas en ambos sentidos. English source: If two things are parallel, they are the same distance away from each other (along their entire length). There are two yellow parallel lines dividing both sides of traffic.

English: phenomenon Meaning: Un fenomeno es algo observable que ocurre. Example: Pensé que las luces eran un fenomeno raro, pero eran simples estrellas fugaces. English source: A phenomenon is something that can be seen as it is happening. I thought the lights were a strange phenomenon, but they were just shooting stars.

English: pollute Meaning: Contaminar es ensuciar aire, agua o tierra. Example: La fábrica descuidada contaminó el río con químicos. English source: To pollute means to make air, water, or land dirty, unclean, or foul. The careless factory polluted the river with chemicals.

English: ridicule Meaning: Ridiculizar es burlarse de forma cruel. Example: Los otros alumnos ridiculizaron el acento extranjero de Peter. English source: To ridicule is to make fun of something in a mean way. The other students ridicule Peter’s foreign accent.

English: solar Meaning: Solar se refiere al sol. Example: Usar energia solar es bueno para el medio ambiente. English source: If something is solar, it is related to the sun. Using solar energy is good for the environment.

English: territory Meaning: Territorio es una zona de tierra que pertenece a un país. Example: Gibraltar es un territorio del Reino Unido. English source: A territory is a piece of land that belongs to a country but isn’t a state. Gibraltar is a territory of Great Britain.

English: tournament Meaning: Un torneo es una competencia con muchos participantes. Example: Mi padre jugará en un torneo de golf mañana. English source: A tournament is a competition, usually with many people participating. My dad is playing in a golf tournament tomorrow.

English: transportation Meaning: El transporte es cualquier medio para llevar personas o cosas. Example: Como no tengo auto, mi transporte normal es el tren. English source: Transportation is any type of vehicle that can carry people or things. I don’t have a car, so my normal transportation is the train.

English: bill Meaning: Una factura o cuenta es dinero que se debe pagar. Example: Tengo tantas facturas que no se pagar todas. English source: A bill is a statement of money owed for goods or for a service. I have so many bills that I do not know how to pay them all.

English: boundary Meaning: La frontera es la linea que separa dos zonas. Example: La cerca muestra la frontera entre nuestro patio y el tuyo. English source: A boundary is the line where one area of land stops and another begins. This fence shows the boundary between our yard and yours.

English: chaos Meaning: El caos es una situación confusa y desordenada. Example: Su exposición estaba en un caos y no pude entenderlo. English source: Chaos is a situation that is confusing and not ordered. His presentation was in chaos. I couldn’t understand what he meant.

English: consistent Meaning: Consistente significa constante y sin cambios. Example: Sara llega todos los días y es nuestra trabajadora más consistente. English source: If a person is consistent, they always have the same behavior or attitude. Sara comes in every day and is our most consistent worker.

English: cyclone Meaning: Un ciclón es una tormenta muy fuerte con lluvia y vientos circulares. Example: Cientos de hogares se dañaron por el ciclón. English source: A cyclone is a large storm with heavy rain and winds that spin in a circle. Hundreds of homes were damaged by the cyclone.

English: doomed Meaning: Condenado significa destinado al fracaso o destruccion. Example: Mi cita con Jane está condenada desde que gaste todo mi dinero. English source: If someone or something is doomed, they are going to fail or be destroyed. Since I spent all my money, my date with Jane is doomed.

English: heir Meaning: Un heredero recibe bienes o propiedades de alguien fallecido. Example: La princesa era la heredera del trono del rey y la reina. English source: An heir is a person who receives the money or property of someone who dies. The princess was the heir to the king and queen’s throne.

English: martial Meaning: Marcial se relaciona con la guerra o la lucha. Example: El karate es un arte marcial que comenzo hace muchos años en Japon. English source: If something is martial, it is related to fighting or war. Karate is a martial art that began many years ago in Japan.

English: organic Meaning: orgánico indica cultivado sin químicos. Example: Las zanahorias orgánicas son más caras pero son mejores para la salud. English source: If food is organic, it is grown without adding chemicals to it. The organic carrots are more expensive, but they’re better for you.

English: poultry Meaning: Las aves de corral son aves criadas para carne y huevos. Example: Cria aves de corral y vende su carne para ganar dinero extra. English source: Poultry is a bird, such as a chicken, that is used for meat and eggs. He raises poultry and sells their meat for extra money.

English: scramble Meaning: Apresurarse es moverse rapido y con urgencia. Example: Los excursionistas se apresuraron cuesta abajo de la colina. English source: To scramble is to move somewhere quickly and desperately. The hikers scrambled down the side of the hill.

English: sergeant Meaning: Un sargento es un soldado o policia de rango medio. Example: Fue ascendido a sargento después de un año en el ejercito. English source: A sergeant is a soldier or police officer of middle rank. He was promoted to sergeant after a year in the army.

English: sheer Meaning: Absoluto significa completo o total. Example: Quede impresionado por su dedicacion absoluta al trote. English source: If you describe something as sheer, it is complete and total. I was impressed by her sheer dedication to jogging.

English: stance Meaning: La postura es una posición o actitud clara ante un tema. Example: Mi postura es que usar petróleo y gas es malo para el ambiente. English source: A stance is an attitude about an issue that someone states clearly. My stance is that using oil and gas is bad for the environment.

English: telegraph Meaning: El telégrafo es un sistema de mensajes por cable. Example: A comienzos del siglo XX, el telégrafo era la forma más rápida de enviar mensajes. English source: A telegraph is a method of sending electric messages on wires. In the 1900s, the telegraph was the fastest way to send a message.

English: textile Meaning: Lo textil es tela fabricada por tejido o tejido de punto. Example: La tela azul se iba a usar para hacer blusas. English source: Textile is cloth that has been woven or knitted. The blue textile was going to be used to make blouses.

English: tornado Meaning: Un tornado es una tormenta circular muy intensa. Example: Durante un tornado, el lugar más seguro es estar bajo tierra. English source: A tornado is a tube-shaped formation of air that spins very quickly. During a tornado, the safest place to be is underground.

English: typhoon Meaning: Un tifón es una gran tormenta tropical que gira en espiral. Example: Miles de personas se quedaron sin electricidad tras el tifón en Australia. English source: A typhoon is a large tropical storm that moves in circles. Thousands of people lost electricity after a typhoon hit Australia.

English: wail Meaning: Llorar a gritos expresa tristeza intensa. Example: El bebé lloraba a gritos porque tenía hambre. English source: To wail is to show sadness by crying loudly. The baby wailed because it was hungry.

English: wardrobe Meaning: El guardarropa es el conjunto de ropa de una persona. Example: Compro ropa nueva para ampliar su guardarropa. English source: A wardrobe is the collection of all of a person’s clothing. She bought some new clothes to expand her wardrobe.

English: adverse Meaning: Adverso es negativo o perjudicial. Example: Me preocupa que el tornado tenga un efecto adverso en la granja. English source: Something that has an adverse effect can be harmful, dangerous, or unfavorable. I worry that the tornado will have an adverse effect on the farm.

English: alternate Meaning: Alternativo significa una opcion distinta. Example: Ir en autobus o conducir al trabajo son formas alternativas de viajar. English source: An alternate option is a different option. Taking the bus and driving to work are alternate ways to travel.

English: biodegradable Meaning: Biodegradable significa que se descompone naturalmente. Example: Usamos compost compostable para mi huerto. English source: Materials that are biodegradable break down naturally into substances that do not harm the environment. I use biodegradable compost to feed my garden.

English: boxed Meaning: En caja significa dentro de un empaque. Example: Justine trajo un regalo en caja a la fiesta de cumpleanos. English source: When something is boxed, it is inside a package. Justine brought a boxed gift to the birthday party.

English: choke Meaning: Atragantarse es dejar de respirar bien al tragar algo. Example: Malada se atraganto después de tragar un chicle. English source: If you choke on something, it stops you from breathing. The gum Malinda swallowed made her choke.

English: convenient Meaning: Conveniente significa facil, sin esfuerzo. Example: Caminar por el parque es una forma conveniente de hacer ejercicio. English source: When something is convenient, it saves you time or effort. Walking through the park is a convenient way to exercise on the way to work.

English: discard Meaning: Deshacerse de algo es tirarlo. Example: después de reparar la ventana, deseche cualquier vidrio roto. English source: To discard something is to throw it away. After repairing the window, discard any broken glass.

English: dolphin Meaning: El delfin es un mamifero marino grande. Example: Delfines inteligentes aprendieron a comunicarse con humanos. English source: A dolphin is a large sea mammal that breathes air. Intelligent dolphins have learned to communicate with humans.

English: ecologically Meaning: Ecologicamente significa de forma cuidadosa con el medio ambiente. Example: Plantamos el jardin siguiendo practicas ecologicamente correctas. English source: Ecologically means that something is done in a way that concerns living organisms and the environment. We planted our garden according to ecologically correct practices.

English: fatal Meaning: Fatal significa mortal o que causa la muerte. Example: Ser herido por el atacante fue fatal para la victima. English source: Something that is fatal results in someone’s death. Being shot by the attacker proved fatal to the victim.

English: incidence Meaning: La incidencia es el numero de veces que ocurre algo. Example: Debemos aumentar la incidencia del exito en la escuela. English source: The number of times something happens is the incidence of the event. We need to increase the incidence of success in school.

English: municipal Meaning: Municipal se refiere al ayuntamiento o gobierno local. Example: El estacionamiento municipal del centro cabe cien autos. English source: Municipal means that something belongs to a city or local government. The municipal parking lot downtown can fit one hundred cars.

English: overuse Meaning: El sobreuso es usar algo demasiadas veces. Example: El sobreuso de la bicicleta estatica rompió los engranajes. English source: Overuse occurs when something is utilized too many times. Rochelle’s overuse of the exercise bike caused the gears to break.

English: pond Meaning: Pozo/estanque es un cuerpo pequeño de agua dulce. Example: Aprendi a nadar en el estanque detras del centro recreativo. English source: A pond is a freshwater body that is smaller than a lake. I learned to swim at the pond behind the recreation center.

English: recycle Meaning: Reciclar es reutilizar materiales para crear algo nuevo. Example: Reciclamos nuestros periodicos para hacer cajas de empaque. English source: When you recycle an object, you use its parts to make something else. We recycle our newspapers so that they can be made into packing boxes.

English: reusable Meaning: Reutilizable significa que puede usarse muchas veces. Example: Saburo guarda frascos vacios porque sirven reutilizables para guardar herramientas. English source: An object that is reusable can be utilized over and over again. Saburo keeps his empty jelly jars because they are reusable for storing sewing supplies.

English: stuffed Meaning: apretado o lleno. Example: Los periodicos estaban todos metidos y aplastados en el cajon. English source: When something is stuffed, it is pushed into a small space. The newspapers were all stuffed into the drawer.

English: tragic Meaning: Tragico describe algo triste o doloroso. Example: Toda la comunidad asistio al homenaje por las victimas del incendio tragico. English source: A tragic event causes sadness because it might involve death or suffering. The entire community attended the memorial service for the victims of the tragic fire.

English: utilize Meaning: Utilizar es usar algo para un fin especifico. Example: El equipo puede utilizar el equipo de laboratorio para completar el experimento. English source: To utilize something is to use it for a specific purpose. The team can utilize the lab equipment to complete the experiment.

English: whale Meaning: La ballena es un gran mamifero marino. Example: Nos sorprendio ver una ballena asomarse junto a nuestro bote. English source: A whale is a very large mammal that lives in the ocean. We were surprised when a whale surfaced next to our boat.

English: amateur Meaning: Un aficionado practica por gusto y sin pago. Example: El aficionado tomo fotos tan bien como el profesional pagado. English source: An amateur is a person who does something for fun and isn’t paid for it. The amateur took pictures just as well as the person who worked for money.

English: ambiguous Meaning: Ambiguo significa no completamente claro. Example: No está claro si un recién nacido parece más chico o niña. English source: If something is ambiguous, it is not entirely clear. It’s ambiguous as to whether a newborn baby looks like a girl or a boy.

English: anonymous Meaning: Anónimo significa que nadie conoce la identidad. Example: Un donante anonimo dono mil dolares al museo. English source: If someone is anonymous, no one knows who he or she is. An anonymous donor gave a thousand dollars to the museum.

English: attain Meaning: Alcanzar es lograr o conseguir algo. Example: Si quieres alcanzar un cuerpo sano, debes ejercitarte cada dia. English source: To attain something is to succeed at something or to get something you want. If you want to attain a healthy body, you must exercise every day.

English: autonomy Meaning: La autonomia es independencia o libertad. Example: En el siglo XIX, el pueblo de la India lucho por autonomia de Gran Bretaña. English source: Autonomy is another word for freedom or independence. In the 1800s, the people of India fought for autonomy from Britain.

English: concession Meaning: Concesion es una cedencia o derecho otorgado. Example: China cedio Hong Kong a Gran Bretaña como concesion después de la guerra.
