English source: A concession is something that one person gives up to another. China gave Hong Kong to Britain as a concession after the war.

English: decay Meaning: La decadencia es el deterioro lento y natural. Example: La decadencia del edificio viejo era evidente. English source: Decay is the result of something slowly being broken down or destroyed naturally. The decay in the old building was obvious.

English: dwell Meaning: Habitar significa vivir en un lugar. Example: Antes de ser escritor de exito, Mark Twain habitaba en la ciudad de Hannibal, Missouri. English source: To dwell somewhere means to live there. Before he was a successful writer, Mark Twain dwelled in the city of Hannibal, Missouri.

English: enlighten Meaning: Iluminar/enseñar es ayudar a comprender. Example: Filosofo griegos quisieron iluminar al pueblo de Atenas con sus ideas. English source: To enlighten someone is to teach them about something. Greek philosophers wanted to enlighten the people of Athens with their ideas.

English: enrich Meaning: Enriquecer significa hacer más rico a alguien o algo. Example: Los impuestos sobre ingresos pueden usarse para enriquecer al gobierno. English source: To enrich means to make someone rich or increase their wealth. Taxes on people’s income can be used to enrich the government.

English: flourish Meaning: Florecer significa prosperar o tener exito. Example: El imperio romano florecio en Europa hace dos mil años. English source: To flourish means to do very well and be in an excellent condition. The Roman Empire flourished in Europe two thousand years ago.

English: geometry Meaning: La geometría estudia las formas y sus medidas. Example: Para calcular el área de un círculo, debes estudiar geometría. English source: Geometry is the study of shapes and how to measure them. If you want to be able to calculate the area of a circle, you must study geometry.

English: gleam Meaning: Brillar significa resplandecer o reflejar luz. Example: Las olas del oceano brillaban cada noche al atardecer. English source: To gleam means to sparkle and shine. The waves of the ocean would gleam every night at sunset.

English: greed Meaning: La codicia es querer más de lo necesario. Example: La historia de Midas es la historia de la codicia. English source: Greed is wanting to have more of something than you need or should have. The story of King Midas is a story of greed.

English: harmony Meaning: La armonia es paz y equilibrio entre personas o cosas. Example: Las Naciones Unidas busca traer paz y armonia al mundo. English source: Harmony is a feeling that everything is peaceful, balanced, and in agreement. The United Nations is struggling to bring peace and harmony to the world.

English: indigenous Meaning: Indigena indica originario o nativo de un lugar. Example: El pueblo pueblo era una tribu indigena de Arizona que vivia en viviendas de adobe. English source: Indigenous means that something or someone exists naturally in an environment or area. The Pueblo people were an indigenous tribe in Arizona who lived in adobe homes.

English: jurisdiction Meaning: La jurisdiccion es la autoridad legal para juzgar y aplicar leyes. Example: No teniamos jurisdiccion para llevar al criminal a juicio. English source: Jurisdiction means the power or right to make judgments about the law and how it is upheld. We did not have jurisdiction to bring the criminal to trial.

English: parade Meaning: Un desfile es una muestra o marcha de personas o cosas seguidas. Example: Este desfile de elefantes forma parte de una exhibicion al aire libre. English source: A parade is a series of things or people that come or are shown one after another. This parade of elephants is part of an open-air exhibit to honor these majestic animals.

English: statue Meaning: Una estatua es una obra de arte tridimensional. Example: La Venus de Milo es una estatua griega antigua famosa. English source: A statue is a three-dimensional work of art, usually made of clay, marble, or metal. The Venus de Milo is a famous ancient Greek statue.

English: virgin Meaning: Una virgen nunca ha tenido relaciones sexuales. Example: La diosa virgen de la luna era conocida como Diana. English source: A virgin is someone who has never had sex. The virgin goddess of the moon was known as Diana.

English: abnormal Meaning: Anormal significa fuera de lo normal. Example: Esta mañana me sentía anormal, como si estuviera enfermo. English source: If something is abnormal, it is different from normal or average. I felt abnormal this morning, like I was sick.

English: absent Meaning: Una persona ausente no está presente en el lugar esperado. Example: Estuve ausente de la escuela ayer porque viajé con mi padre. English source: If someone or something is absent, they are missing or not in the place they are expected to be. I was absent from school yesterday because I went on a trip with my father.

English: adjacent Meaning: Adyacente significa que está al lado de algo. Example: Mi departamento está adyacente a un parque y una plaza. English source: When something is adjacent, it is next to or adjoining something else. My apartment is adjacent to a lovely park and playground.

English: aluminum Meaning: El aluminio es un metal ligero de color plata. Example: Use la hoja de aluminio para envolver la comida. English source: Aluminum is a chemical element that is a light silver-coloured metal. I used the aluminum foil to wrap the food.

English: applicable Meaning: Aplicable significa que sirve o corresponde a una situación. Example: Descubrí que mi antigua contraseña ya no era aplicable al sitio web. English source: If something is applicable to a person or thing, it is relevant to them. I discovered that my old password was no longer applicable to the website.

English: artificial Meaning: Artificial significa hecho por el hombre, no natural. Example: El árbol navideño artificial estaba hecho de plástico. English source: If something is artificial, it was not made naturally but mimics something natural. The artificial Christmas tree was made of plastic.

English: bicycle Meaning: Una bicicleta es un vehiculo de dos ruedas con pedales. Example: Baje por el camino de la montaña en mi bicicleta. English source: A bicycle is a two-wheeled vehicle powered by pedaling. I rode my bicycle down the mountain road.

English: broker Meaning: Un corredor o mediador negocia acuerdos. Example: El abogado negociara nuestro acuerdo. English source: To broker is to arrange or negotiate the details of something for others. The lawyer will broker our agreement.

English: bureaucracy Meaning: La burocracia es la administracion formal y extensa de una organizacion. Example: Los miembros de la burocracia recibieron demasiadas peticiones. English source: A bureaucracy is a group of people who work together to help manage a large business or run a country. The members of the bureaucracy were flooded by too many petitions.

English: configure Meaning: Configurar es preparar o ajustar un sistema. Example: El ingeniero me ayudo a configurar mi computadora nueva. English source: To configure something means to set it up and arrange it. The engineer helped to configure my new computer.

English: consolidate Meaning: Consolidar es unir cosas en una sola. Example: Cuando nos mudamos juntos, tuvimos que consolidar nuestras pertenencias. English source: To consolidate means to join or bring together into one thing. When we moved in together, we had to consolidate our belongings.

English: convenience Meaning: La conveniencia facilita algo y ahorra esfuerzo. Example: Me encanta la conveniencia de tener una piscina en mi patio trasero. English source: If something is done for your convenience, it allows you to do something easily or without any trouble. I love the convenience of having a swimming pool in my back yard.

English: deduct Meaning: Deducir es restar una cantidad. Example: Tuve que deducir mis gastos de mi libreta de cheques. English source: To deduct means to subtract something. I had to deduct my expenses from my checkbook.

English: deem Meaning: Considerar es juzgar o creer algo. Example: Considere que el helado era muy delicioso. English source: To deem means to consider something. I deemed the ice cream to be very delicious.

English: entrepreneur Meaning: Un emprendedor inicia un negocio propio. Example: El emprendedor tuvo exito con su nuevo negocio. English source: An entrepreneur is someone who starts a new business or organization in order to make money. The entrepreneur made a success out of his new business.

English: evenly Meaning: De manera uniforme significa repartido de forma igual. Example: Esparce el azucar de forma uniforme sobre las galletas. English source: If something is evenly spread or spaced, it is divided equally into amounts, numbers, or values. Sprinkle the sugar evenly all over the cookies.

English: fiscal Meaning: La palabra fiscal se refiere al dinero o las finanzas, especialmente de un gobierno o una empresa. Example: ¿La empresa mostró crecimiento fiscal este año? English source: When something is fiscal, it is related to money or finances, especially that of a government or business. Did the company show fiscal growth this year?

English: franchise Meaning: Una franquicia es el derecho a vender productos de otra empresa. Example: Hay una franquicia de comida rápida cerca de mi casa. English source: A franchise is the right to sell another company’s products or services in a particular area. The fast food restaurant has a franchise near my home.

English: ideological Meaning: Ideologico significa basado en ideas o creencias. Example: Los ciudadanos ingleses tenian diferencias ideologicas sobre su gobierno. English source: If something is ideological, it is based on a system of beliefs or ideals, especially those that relate to a government or economy. The citizens of England had ideological differenes about its government.

English: robot Meaning: Un robot es una máquina que hace trabajo automático. Example: compré un robot que puede limpiar el piso solo. English source: A robot is a machine that can do the work of a person and operates automatically or is controlled by a computer. I bought a robot that can clean the floor on its own.

English: abbey Meaning: Una abbadia es una comunidad donde viven monjes o monjas. Example: Cuando el monje regreso al monasterio, fue directo a su cuarto. English source: An abbey is a house, or group of houses, where monks or nuns live. When the monk returned to the abbey, he went immediately to his bedroom.

English: abundant Meaning: Abundante significa disponible en grandes cantidades. Example: Había tantas tartas, galletas y dulces que el niño estaba muy feliz. English source: If something is abundant, then it is available in large quantities. Cakes, cookies, and candy were so abundant that the child was very happy.

English: adjoin Meaning: Colindante significa junto a otra zona o unido. Example: Escucha las conversaciones de su hermano porque su habitacion está colindante a la suya. English source: To adjoin something means to be next to or attached to something else. She can listen to her brother’s conversations because her room adjoins his.

English: ample Meaning: o abundante significa que alcanza o sobra. Example: Había una cantidad suficiente de avena para alimentar los caballos. English source: If something is ample, then it is enough or more than enough. There was an ample supply of oats to feed the horses.

English: arid Meaning: Arido significa seco y con poca lluvia. Example: En el desierto arido no crecen muchas plantas. English source: If a place is arid, then it is hot and dry and gets very little or no rain. Not many plants grow in the arid desert.

English: cathedral Meaning: Una catedral es una iglesia grande e importante. Example: La catedral grande está llena de gente los domingos por la mañana. English source: A cathedral is an important, and often large and beautifully-built, church. The large cathedral is full of people on Sunday mornings.

English: crisis Meaning: Una crisis es un momento difícil y decisivo. Example: La crisis terminó y las cosas volvieron a la normalidad. English source: A crisis is a difficult time when things are going to either get worse or better. The crisis was over and things returned to normal.

English: deprive Meaning: Privar significa quitar a alguien algo. Example: Como la niña se porto mal, se la privó de su postre después de cenar. English source: To deprive someone of something means to not let them have it. Because the child was bad, she was deprived of her dessert after dinner.

English: drought Meaning: Una sequía es una falta prolongada de lluvia. Example: Después de tres meses de sequía, la vegetación y los árboles empezaron a morir. English source: A drought is a long period of time in which little or no rain falls. After three months of drought, the vegetation and trees started dying.

English: eligible Meaning: Elegible significa que cumple las condiciones para participar o recibir algo. Example: Solo quienes compraron entradas eran elegibles para ganar un premio. English source: If someone is eligible, then they are permitted to do or have something. Only people who bought tickets were eligible to win a prize.

English: fast Meaning: Hacer ayuno es pasar tiempo sin comer ni beber. Example: En su religion, ayunan durante cinco días y luego hacen una gran fiesta. English source: To fast means to go without food or drink for a period of time. In her religion, they fast for five days and then have a big feast.

English: grumble Meaning: Quejarse es expresar descontento. Example: Se quejo por tener que trabajar tarde el viernes. English source: To grumble means to complain. He grumbled about having to work late on Friday.

English: inland Meaning: Ir tierra adentro significa alejarse de la costa hacia el interior. Example: El río se desviaba hacia el interior cerca del campamento. English source: If someone goes inland, they travel into the center of a country or land. The river curved inland near the campground.

English: moisture Meaning: La humedad es agua en forma de vapor o gotitas. Example: Si respires sobre una ventana, la humedad de tu aliento se recoge en el vidrio. English source: Moisture is small drops of water in the air or on a surface. If you breathe on a window, moisture from your breath collects on the glass.

English: nonetheless Meaning: Aun así significa que algo ocurre pese a otra cosa. Example: Intentó mantener al perro fuera del lodo, pero aun así se ensució. English source: If something happens nonetheless, then it occurs despite some other thing. She tried to keep the dog out of the mud, but it got dirty nonetheless.

English: oath Meaning: Un juramento es una promesa formal y solemne. Example: Los jueces deben hacer un juramento de ser justos con todos en la corte. English source: An oath is a formal, often public, promise. Judges must take an oath to be fair to everyone in court.

English: prairie Meaning: Una pradera es una gran área de pasto llano. Example: La pradera era perfecta para una granja. English source: A prairie is a large flat area of grassland. The prairie was perfect for a farm because there were hills and trees.

English: rugged Meaning: Terreno accidentado es difícil de transitar. Example: El coche no pudo seguir mucho en los caminos accidentados. English source: If an area of land is rugged, then it is rocky and difficult to travel through. Their car couldn’t make it far along the rugged roads.

English: scarce Meaning: Escaso significa poca cantidad disponible. Example: Cuando la gasolina era escasa, fuimos en bicicleta a la escuela. English source: If something is scarce, then there is a very small amount of it. When gasoline was scarce, we rode our bike to school instead of driving.

English: speculate Meaning: Especular es conjeturar sin certeza. Example: Mi hermana miro al cielo y especulo que lloveria mañana. English source: To speculate means to guess about something. My sister looked at the sky and speculated that it would rain tomorrow.

English: aquatic Meaning: Acuatico significa que vive en el agua. Example: El delfin es un mamifero acuatico. English source: If a plant or animal is aquatic, it lives or grows in water. The dolphin is an aquatic mammal.

English: biosphere Meaning: La biosfera es la zona de la Tierra donde existen seres vivos. Example: Las aves, árboles y lombrices viven en la biosfera. English source: The biosphere is the Earth’s surface and atmosphere where there are living things. Birds, trees, and worms all thrive in the biosphere.

English: bizarre Meaning: Extrano significa raro o inusual. Example: Mis sueños extraños no tienen sentido cuando estoy despierto. English source: When something is bizarre, it is very strange. My bizarre dreams make no sense to me when I am awake.

English: Celsius Meaning: El Celsius es una escala para medir la temperatura. Example: El agua se congela a cero grados Celsius. English source: Celsius is a scale for measuring temperature. Water freezes at zero degrees Celsius.

English: coarse Meaning: Grueso o áspero indica textura rugosa. Example: El suéter áspero me hizo picar la piel. English source: If something is coarse, that means it has a rough texture. The coarse sweater made my skin itch.

English: companion Meaning: Un companero es alguien con quien pasas mucho tiempo. Example: Siempre voy a la escuela con mi companero Frank. English source: A companion is a person that someone spends a lot of time with. I always walk to school with my companion Frank.

English: digest Meaning: Digerir es descomponer los alimentos en el cuerpo. Example: Dale tiempo al cuerpo para digerir la comida antes de nadar. English source: To digest means to swallow food and pass it through the body. Allow some time for food to be digested before going swimming.

English: duration Meaning: La duracion es el tiempo que dura un evento. Example: Las niñas vieron television durante toda la duracion de la tarde. English source: The duration of an event is the time during which it happens. The girls watched television for the duration of the evening.

English: ecology Meaning: La ecologia estudia el medio ambiente y los seres vivos. Example: Estudiamos ecologia para aprender a mejorar la Tierra. English source: Ecology is the study of the environment and living things. We study ecology to learn how to help improve the Earth.

English: feat Meaning: Una hazaña es un logro difícil e impresionante. Example: Terminar el maratón fue una hazaña difícil. English source: A feat is an impressive or difficult achievement or action. The elephant’s standing up on one leg was a feat.

English: infinite Meaning: Algo infinito no tiene fin. Example: Muchos científicos creen que el universo es infinito. English source: If something is infinite, it has no limit or end. Many scientists believe that the universe is infinite.

English: nucleus Meaning: El núcleo es la parte central de un átomo o célula. Example: El núcleo está compuesto por muchas partículas pequeñas. English source: The nucleus is the central part of an atom or cell. The nucleus is made up of many tiny particles.

English: parasite Meaning: Un parásito es un organismo pequeño que vive de otro. Example: El perro enfermo estaba lleno de parásitos. English source: A parasite is a tiny animal or plant that attaches to another animal to get food. The sick dog was covered in parasites.

English: prominent Meaning: Prominente significa importante y conocido. Example: La reina Victoria fue una persona prominente en la historia. English source: When something is prominent, it is important and well known. Queen Victoria was a prominent person in history.

English: repetitive Meaning: Repetitivo es algo que se repite y aburre. Example: Trabajar cada dia en una linea de ensamblaje es un empleo repetitivo. English source: When something is repetitive, it is repeated many times and becomes boring. Working on an assembly line making cars every day is a repetitive job.

English: reproductive Meaning: Reproductivo se refiere a la capacidad de dar vida nueva. Example: El sistema reproductivo de una planta es simple. English source: If something is reproductive, it is a living thing which can produce young. The reproductive system of a plant is simple.

English: temperate Meaning: Templado significa no extremo en temperatura. Example: En Peru, el clima es templado y rara vez muy caliente o frio. English source: When a place is temperate, it never gets too hot or cold. In Peru, the weather is temperate and rarely gets too hot or cold.

English: tolerance Meaning: La tolerancia es aceptar diferencias o soportar dolor. Example: Los boxeadores tienen alta tolerancia al dolor. English source: Tolerance is the ability to accept something unfavorable or to allow the freedom of choice for others. Boxers have a high tolerance for pain.

English: undergo Meaning: Significa someterse a una acción o tratamiento. Example: El paciente con cancer se somete a tratamientos dos veces por semana. English source: To undergo an action means to have it happen to you. The cancer patient undergoes treatments twice a week.

English: vulnerable Meaning: Vulnerable significa estar expuesto y en riesgo. Example: Se sintio muy vulnerable cuando se quedó atrapado en el desierto. English source: When someone is vulnerable, they are weak and without protection. He felt very vulnerable when he was stranded in the desert.

English: archaic Meaning: Arcaico significa viejo y fuera de uso. Example: Para competir, debemos actualizar nuestro equipo arcaico. English source: If something is archaic, it is very old or outdated. To be competitive, we must update our archaic equipment.

English: brass Meaning: El laton es un metal para instrumentos y adornos. Example: El laton se usa para fabricar instrumentos como las trompetas. English source: Brass is a metal that is used to make musical instruments and ornaments. Brass is used to make musical instruments like trumpets.

English: capitalism Meaning: El capitalismo es una economia de propiedad privada y lucro. Example: La mayoria de las economias actuales se basan en el capitalismo. English source: Capitalism is an economic system where private companies make goods for profit. Most economies in the world today are based on capitalism.

English: component Meaning: Componente es una parte de un conjunto o máquina. Example: Las computadoras tienen muchos componentes, por eso son difíciles de armar. English source: A component is a part of a larger machine. Computers have many different components, so they are complicated to build.

English: dependence Meaning: La dependencia es necesidad de apoyo en otra persona o cosa. Example: Los niños pequeños tienen dependencia de sus padres. English source: Dependence is a situation in which somebody relies on something else. Young children have a dependence on their parents.

English: diminish Meaning: Disminuir es hacer menor la cantidad o intensidad. Example: Mis ahorros disminuyeron a medida que empeoro la economia. English source: To diminish means to reduce or get smaller. As the economy got worse, my savings diminished.

English: drawback Meaning: Una desventaja es un aspecto negativo. Example: El gran problema de tener auto es que cuesta caro mantenerlo. English source: A drawback is a disadvantage. The drawback of having a car is that it is very expensive to maintain.

English: impose Meaning: Imponer es forzar algo sobre otros. Example: Impone su opinión a su esposa todas las mañanas pidiéndole desayuno. English source: To impose means to interrupt or force your ideas on other people. He imposes on his wife every morning by expecting her to make his breakfast.

English: industry Meaning: La industria es actividad productiva de bienes o servicios. Example: La industria turistica va bien en todo el mundo. English source: Industry is a kind of business that produces services or things for sale. The tourist industry is doing well all around the world.

English: managerial Meaning: Lo gerencial está relacionado con la gerencia. Example: Nancy tiene un cargo gerencial en el banco. English source: Managerial describes something related to a manager or management. Nancy has a managerial position at the bank.

English: medieval Meaning: Medieval se refiere a la edad media. Example: Visitamos un castillo construido en tiempos medievales. English source: If something is medieval, it comes from the period between 650 and 1500 CE. We visited a castle that was built during medieval times.

English: obsolete Meaning: Obsoleto es algo en desuso. Example: Desde que los computadores se abaratarn, las maquinas de escribir quedaron obsoletas. English source: If something is obsolete, it is not used anymore because something better exists. Since computers became inexpensive, typewriters have become obsolete.

English: oriented Meaning: Una persona orientada está dirigida hacia algo. Example: Vive un estilo orientado al dinero. English source: When you are oriented towards something, you are faced in that direction. He is living a money-oriented lifestyle.

English: peninsula Meaning: Una península es una extensión de tierra rodeada por agua en tres lados. Example: Florida es un ejemplo de península. English source: A peninsula is a large piece of land that is surrounded by the sea on three sides. The state of Florida is an example of a peninsula.

English: prestige Meaning: El prestigio es respeto y reputacion. Example: La joven actriz gano mucho prestigio al ganar un premio. English source: If a person has prestige, people admire or respect them. The young actress gained much prestige after she won an award.

English: proportion Meaning: La proporción muestra la relación entre parte y todo. Example: Solo una pequeña proporción de la gente de este pueblo trabaja aquí. English source: A proportion is an amount that shows the link between the parts and the whole. Only a small proportion of the people in this town actually work here.

English: radical Meaning: Radical significa profundo o extremo en cambios. Example: El presidente planea cambios radicales a la ley. English source: If something is radical, it is very new or different. The president is planning to make some radical changes to the law.

English: refute Meaning: Refutar es demostrar que algo es falso. Example: El gerente del banco ha refutado que hubiera engañado clientes. English source: To refute something means to prove that it is false or incorrect. The bank manager has refuted the claims that he lied to his customers.

English: spectacular Meaning: Espectacular significa muy llamativo o impresionante. Example: Hubo un show espectacular de fuegos artificiales en el parque en Año Nuevo. English source: If something is spectacular, it looks or sounds very impressive. There was a spectacular fireworks display in the park at New Year.

English: weave Meaning: Tejer es formar tela entre hilos cruzados. Example: Vimos a una mujer tejer una manta en nuestro viaje. English source: To weave means to make cloth using horizontal and vertical threads. We saw a woman weave a blanket on our vacation to South America.

English: accountant Meaning: Un contador se encarga de las cuentas financieras. Example: El contador nos ayudo a llevar control de gastos. English source: An accountant is a person whose job is to keep financial accounts for a business. The accountant helped us keep track of our spending.

English: capitalist Meaning: Un capitalista invierte en negocios con fines de lucro. Example: El capitalista invirtio en una fábrica que transformaba trigo en cereal. English source: A capitalist is a business person who invests in trade and industry for profit. The capitalist invested in a factory that made wheat into cereal.

English: contempt Meaning: Desprecio es falta total de respeto. Example: El juez sentía desprecio por el criminal. English source: Contempt is the feeling of having no respect for something. The judge had contempt for the wicked criminal.

English: crop Meaning: La cosecha es lo que produce la tierra. Example: Este año tuvimos buena cosecha de cebollas. English source: A crop is something produced by the land. I had a good crop of onions this year.

English: dedicate Meaning: A una persona dedicada le pone empeño a una causa. Example: La monja se dedicó a ayudar a los necesitados. English source: To dedicate oneself to something means to put a lot of time and effort into it. The nun dedicated herself to helping people in need.

English: ditch Meaning: Una zanja es un corte estrecho en el suelo. Example: El coche se deslizo y cayo en la zanja. English source: A ditch is a narrow hole cut into the ground by a road or a field. When the car slid off of the road, it fell into the ditch.

English: enterprise Meaning: Una empresa es una organizacion comercial. Example: Mi padre tiene una agencia de publicidad. English source: An enterprise is a company or business. My father owns an advertising enterprise.

English: finance Meaning: Financiar es aportar dinero para algo. Example: El gobierno financio los experimentos del cientifico con nuevas armas. English source: To finance someone or something means to provide money for them. The government financed the scientist’s experiments with new weapons.

English: indifferent Meaning: Indiferente significa no interesarse por algo. Example: Lisa es indiferente a la escuela y no le importan sus notas finales. English source: When someone is indifferent toward something, they have a lack of interest in it. Lisa is indifferent toward school. She doesn’t care what her final grades are.

English: irrigate Meaning: Regar significa suministrar agua a la tierra para que puedan crecer los cultivos. Example: En climas secos, es importante regar los campos de cultivos. English source: To irrigate means to supply water to land so that crops can grow. In dry climates, it is important to irrigate fields of crops.

English: maximize Meaning: Maximizar significa hacer que algo sea lo más grande posible en cantidad, tamaño o importancia. Example: Debes hacer ejercicio regularmente para maximizar un estilo de vida saludable. English source: To maximize something is to make it as great as possible in amount, size, or importance. You should exercise regularly to maximize a healthy lifestyle.

English: monetary Meaning: Monetario se refiere al dinero. Example: Una política monetaria fuerte es importante para que un país sea exitoso. English source: When something is monetary, it relates to money. A strong monetary policy is important for a country to be successful.

English: precaution Meaning: Una precaución es una acción para evitar que ocurra algo malo. Example: Como precaución, ponte un abrigo grueso antes de salir con frío. English source: A precaution is an action that is meant to stop something bad from happening. As a precaution, you should put on a heavy coat before going out in cold weather.

English: preliminary Meaning: Preliminar describe algo que ocurre antes de un evento más importante. Example: Los corredores deben rendir bien en las rondas preliminares para clasificar a la final. English source: Preliminary describes something that happens before a more important event. The runners must do well in the preliminary races to qualify for the final race.

English: saturate Meaning: Saturar algo significa empaparlo completamente con un líquido. Example: La esponja quedó saturada de agua jabonosa y chorreaba por el suelo. English source: To saturate something means to completely soak it with a liquid. The sponge was saturated with soapy water and dripped all over the floor.

English: simplicity Meaning: La simplicidad es que algo sea fácil de hacer o de entender. Example: Encontramos la casa gracias a la simplicidad de las indicaciones. English source: The simplicity of something is the fact that it is easy to do or understand. We were able to find the house thanks to the simplicity of the directions.

English: sow Meaning: Sembrar significa plantar semillas en el suelo. Example: Él siempre siembra las semillas de su jardín en primavera. English source: To sow seeds means to plant them in the ground. He always sows his garden seeds in the springtime.

English: spade Meaning: Una pala es una herramienta para cavar. Example: La jardinera usó su pala para hacer un hoyo para una planta nueva. English source: A spade is a tool used for digging. The gardener used her spade to make a hole for the new plant.

English: tomato Meaning: El tomate es una fruta redonda y roja, pero suele comerse como verdura. Example: Me encantan los sándwiches de tomate. English source: A tomato is a round red fruit, but usually eaten as a vegetable. It’s often used in salads or pasta sauces. I like tomato sandwiches.

English: upcoming Meaning: Próximo significa que algo ocurrirá en un futuro cercano. Example: Los niños estaban preocupados por su examen próximo. English source: When something is upcoming, that means it will happen in the near future. The kids were worried about their upcoming exam.

English: anthropology Meaning: La antropología es el estudio de las personas, la sociedad y la cultura. Example: En antropología aprendí sobre herramientas simples usadas en culturas antiguas. English source: Anthropology is the study of people, society, and culture. In anthropology class, I learned about simple tools that ancient cultures used.

English: applaud Meaning: Aplaudir significa aplaudir para mostrar aprobación. Example: Todo el mundo aplaudió el esfuerzo de Manny. English source: To applaud means to clap in order to show approval. Everyone cheered and applauded Manny’s efforts.

English: appoint Meaning: Nombrar a alguien para un trabajo significa darle ese trabajo. Example: Dos estudiantes fueron nombrados para ayudar a los científicos en su investigación. English source: To appoint someone to a job means to give the job to them. Two students were appointed to help the scientists with their research.

English: compatible Meaning: Cuando algo es compatible, funciona bien o convive con otra cosa. Example: Jan y Fred son muy distintos; nunca serán compatibles. English source: When things are compatible, they work well or exist together successfully. Jan and Fred are too different. They will never be compatible.

English: competence Meaning: La competencia es la capacidad de hacer algo bien o eficazmente. Example: El trabajo fue fácil porque el grupo tenía suficiente competencia para hacerlo bien. English source: Competence is the ability to do something well or effectively. The job was easy because the group had enough competence to do it well.

English: confer Meaning: Conferir con alguien significa discutir algo para tomar una decisión. Example: Tengo que consultar con mi esposa antes de comprar un coche nuevo. English source: To confer with someone means to discuss something with them to make a decision. I will have to confer with my wife before I can purchase a new car.

English: consecutive Meaning: Consecutivo significa que algo sucede uno después de otro sin interrupción. Example: El rey reinó durante diez años consecutivos. English source: When things are consecutive, they happen one after another without interruption. The king ruled for ten consecutive years.

English: crude Meaning: Tosco significa poco preciso o sin detalles, aunque útil. Example: Ella dibujó corazones toscos en el suelo para mostrar cuánto lo amaba. English source: When something is crude, it is not exact or detailed but can still be useful. She drew crude hearts on the ground to show how much she loved him.

English: cube Meaning: Un cubo es un sólido con seis caras cuadradas del mismo tamaño. Example: Por favor tráeme algunos cubos de hielo para mi refresco. English source: A cube is a solid object with six square surfaces that are all the same size. Please get me some ice cubes to put in my soda.

English: feedback Meaning: La retroalimentación son comentarios sobre cómo hace algo una persona. Example: Le pedí retroalimentación sobre mi trabajo a mi jefe. English source: Feedback is comments to a person about how they are doing something. I asked my boss for feedback on my work.

English: ignorance Meaning: La ignorancia es la falta de conocimiento sobre algo. Example: Cuando suspenció el examen, su ignorancia de matemáticas fue evidente. English source: Ignorance of something is lack of knowledge about it. When he failed the test, his ignorance of math was obvious.

English: masculine Meaning: Masculino es una cualidad o cosa relacionada con los hombres. Example: El fútbol americano suele considerarse un deporte masculino. English source: When something is masculine, it is a quality or thing related to men. American football is usually considered a masculine sport.

English: monument Meaning: Un monumento es una estructura construida para recordar a una persona o suceso. Example: Se construyó un gran monumento para honrar a los valientes soldados. English source: A monument is a structure that is built to remind people of a person or event. A large monument was built to honor the brave soldiers.

English: muscular Meaning: Musculoso significa muy fuerte o en buena forma física. Example: Él se ejercitaba para que su cuerpo se volviera más musculoso. English source: When someone is muscular, they are very fit and strong. He exercised regularly so that his body could become muscular.

English: posture Meaning: La postura es la manera en que alguien se para o se sienta. Example: Tu espalda se sentirá mejor si mejoras tu postura. English source: A person’s posture is the manner in which they stand or sit. Your back will feel better if you improve your posture.

English: situate Meaning: Situar algo significa colocarlo en un lugar concreto. Example: El camino estaba situado entre el bosque y el lago. English source: To situate something means to place or build it in a certain place. The road was situated between the forest and the lake.

English: supervise Meaning: Supervisar significa asegurarse de que algo se haga correctamente. Example: Allen supervisó a los trabajadores de la construcción para que todos fueran seguros. English source: To supervise something means to make sure that it is done correctly. Allen supervised the construction workers to ensure everyone’s safety.

English: symmetry Meaning: La simetría es tener dos mitades exactamente iguales. Example: La artista usó una simetría perfecta al pintar la mariposa. English source: Symmetry is the state of having two halves that are exactly the same. The artist made sure to use perfect symmetry when painting the butterfly.

English: tattoo Meaning: Un tatuaje es un dibujo dibujado permanentemente en la piel con agujas. Example: El surfista tenía tatuajes en ambos brazos. English source: A tattoo is a design that is drawn permanently on the skin with needles. The surfer had tattoos on both his arms.

English: undergraduate Meaning: Un estudiante de pregrado estudia en la universidad para obtener una licenciatura. Example: Ella estaba emocionada de terminar la secundaria e inscribirse como estudiante de pregrado en otoño. English source: An undergraduate is a student at a college who is studying for a bachelor’s degree. She was excited to finish high school and enroll as an undergraduate in the fall.

English: cater Meaning: Atender significa proveer lo que alguien necesita o desea. Example: Bill estaba muy enfermo para levantarse y su enfermera lo atendía en todo lo que necesitaba. English source: To cater to someone means to provide them with all the things they need or want. Bill was too sick to get out of bed, so his nurse catered to his needs.

English: considerate Meaning: Considerado significa atento a las necesidades de los demás. Example: El chico considerado le dio un regalo a su novia para animarla. English source: When someone is considerate, they pay attention to the needs of others. The considerate boy gave his girlfriend a present to cheer her up when she was sad.

English: consumption Meaning: El consumo de comida o bebida es el acto de comer o beberla. Example: Esas manzanas estaban demasiado podridas para su consumo. English source: The consumption of food or drink is the act of eating or drinking it. These apples are too rotten for consumption.

English: criteria Meaning: Los criterios son los factores con los que alguien juzga o decide algo. Example: Antes de obtener el trabajo, ella tuvo que cumplir todos los criterios necesarios. English source: Criteria are factors on which a person judges or decides something. Before she got the job, she had to meet all the necessary criteria.

English: crust Meaning: La corteza es la parte dura externa de un pan. Example: El niño nunca se comía la corteza de su pizza. English source: Crust is the tough outer part of a loaf of bread. The little boy never ate the crust of his pizza.

English: entitle Meaning: Otorgar alguien significa darle el derecho de tener o hacer algo. Example: Su boleto dorado le otorgaba sentarse en la primera fila del concierto. English source: To entitle someone means to give them the right to have or do something. His golden ticket entitled him to sit in the front row at the concert.

English: escort Meaning: Escoltar significa acompañar a alguien de manera segura a un lugar. Example: Sus guardaespaldas la escoltaron al cine. English source: To escort people means to safely accompany them to a place. Her bodyguards escorted her to the movie theater.

English: external Meaning: Externo se relaciona con una parte exterior. Example: Hace calor en casa, pero la temperatura externa está helada. English source: When something is external, it is connected to an outer part. It is warm inside my house, but the external temperature is freezing.

English: facility Meaning: Una instalación es un edificio para un propósito específico. Example: Hay muchas instalaciones educativas en ciudades grandes. English source: A facility is a building that exists for a particular purpose. There are many educational facilities in big cities.

English: faculty Meaning: Las facultades son habilidades mentales o físicas. Example: Las facultades mentales del niño impresionaron a todos sus profesores. English source: A faculty is a mental or physical ability. The boy’s mental faculties impressed all of his teachers.

English: heap Meaning: Un montón es una gran pila de cosas. Example: Después de demoler el edificio, quedó un montón de ladrillos. English source: A heap of things is a large pile of them. After the building was torn down, all that was left was a heap of bricks.

English: hemisphere Meaning: Un hemisferio es la mitad de la Tierra. Example: En el hemisferio norte el tiempo suele ser más cálido en julio y agosto. English source: A hemisphere is one half of the Earth. In the northern hemisphere, the weather is usually warmest in July and August.

English: hound Meaning: Un sabueso es un tipo de perro usado para cazar. Example: Los hombres llevaron a sus sabuesos al viaje de caza. English source: A hound is a type of dog that is often used for racing or hunting. The men took their hounds with them when they went on the hunting trip.

English: impersonal Meaning: Impersonal es algo poco amigable que no hace sentir importante a la gente. Example: El chico se sintió asustado en la gran escuela impersonal. English source: If something is impersonal, it is not friendly and makes people feel unimportant. The boy felt scared on his first day at the big, impersonal high school.

English: lick Meaning: Lamer algo significa pasar la lengua por él. Example: Él lamió su helado antes de que se derritiera. English source: When you lick something, you pass your tongue over it. He licked his ice cream before it melted.

English: ornament Meaning: Un adorno es un objeto decorativo. Example: La mujer guardó unos adornos coloridos en las estanterías. English source: An ornament is an attractive object that people display in their homes. The woman kept some colorful ornaments on the shelves.

English: pedestrian Meaning: Un peatón es una persona que camina por la calle. Example: Los conductores deben tener cuidado cuando hay peatones alrededor. English source: A pedestrian is a person who is walking on a street. Drivers should be careful when pedestrians are walking around.

English: sanctuary Meaning: Un santuario es un lugar seguro para personas en peligro. Example: La iglesia fue un santuario para personas sin hogar en invierno. English source: A sanctuary is a place where people in danger can go to be safe. The church was made into a sanctuary for homeless people in the winter.

English: spectator Meaning: Un espectador es alguien que mira un espectáculo o evento. Example: Había miles de espectadores en el gran juego. English source: A spectator is someone who watches something, for example, a sports event. There were thousands of spectators at the big game.
English: yell Meaning: Gritar significa llamar o hablar muy fuerte. Example: Alguien gritó su nombre. English source: When you yell at someone, you shout at them. Someone yelled out his name.

English: accessory Meaning: Un accesorio es algo añadido para que algo se vea mejor. Example: La tienda vendía accesorios como bolsos, gafas de sol y maquillaje. English source: An accessory is a thing that is added to another thing to make it look better. The store sold colorful accessories like bags, sunglasses, and makeup.

English: acquisition Meaning: Una adquisición es algo que una persona compra o consigue. Example: Marty estaba feliz con su adquisición: una bicicleta muy rápida. English source: An acquisition is something that a person buys or gets in some way. Marty was happy with his new acquisition: a very fast bicycle.

English: cardboard Meaning: El cartón es un material de papel rígido. Example: Empaquetamos nuestras cosas en cajas de cartón y nos mudamos. English source: Cardboard is a material made out of stiff paper. It is often used to make boxes. We packed our things into cardboard boxes and moved to our new home.

English: dilemma Meaning: Un dilema es una situación difícil en la que hay que elegir. Example: Elegir entre la bebida más rica o la más saludable fue todo un dilema. English source: A dilemma is a difficult situation in which a choice has to be made. Choosing either the tastier or healthier drink proved to be quite a dilemma.

English: elaborate Meaning: Elaborado significa lleno de muchos detalles. Example: Ella dio una explicación muy elaborada de su proyecto. English source: When something is elaborate, it contains a lot of details. She gave the teacher an elaborate explanation of her project.

English: exact Meaning: Exacto significa correcto en cada detalle. Example: Conozco la ubicación exacta del restaurante que mencionaste. English source: Exact means correct in every detail. I know the exact location of the restaurant you mentioned before.

English: facilitate Meaning: Facilitar significa hacer algo más fácil. Example: Para facilitar la reunión, Melissa usó un programa simple. English source: To facilitate something is to make it easier. To facilitate the meeting, Melissa used a simple computer program.

English: fleet Meaning: Una flota es un grupo de barcos. Example: La flota de barcos estuvo unos días en el muelle. English source: A fleet is a group of ships. The fleet of ships spent a few days at the dock.

English: grid Meaning: Una cuadrícula es un patrón de cuadrados con letras y números para ubicar lugares en mapas. Example: Encontramos nuestra ciudad usando la cuadrícula. English source: A grid is a pattern of squares with numbers and letters to find places on a map. We located our town using the grid.

English: import Meaning: Importar significa traer un producto de otro país. Example: Los alimentos importados suelen ser más caros. English source: To import means to bring in a product from another country. Foods that have been imported are usually more expensive.

English: infer Meaning: Inferir algo significa deducir que es cierto por otra información. Example: Por la posición del sol, ella dedujo que era mediodía. English source: To infer something is to decide it is true based on other information one has. By the position of the sun in the sky, she inferred that it was noon.

English: inflate Meaning: Inflar significa llenarlo con aire. Example: Le ayudé a inflar los globos. English source: To inflate something means to fill it up with air. I helped him inflate the balloons.

English: innate Meaning: Algo innato es con lo que se nace y no se aprende. Example: Él tenía el deseo innato de agradar a sus profesores. English source: When something is innate, it is something that one is born with and was not learned. He had the innate desire to please his teachers.

English: marble Meaning: El mármol es una roca lisa y fría cuando se talla. Example: La casa grande tenía suelos de mármol. English source: Marble is a type of rock that feels cold and is smooth when cut. The large house had floors made of marble.

English: mast Meaning: Un mástil es un poste largo de un barco que sostiene las velas. Example: El mástil sostenía ambas velas en su lugar. English source: A mast is a long pole on a ship that holds the sail. The mast held both sails of the ship upright.

English: nausea Meaning: La náusea es el malestar del estómago. Example: El médico dijo que el medicamento quitaría su náusea. English source: Nausea is the feeling of being sick to your stomach. The doctor said the medicine would help get rid of her nausea.

English: naval Meaning: Naval se refiere a la armada militar. Example: El país envió sus fuerzas navales para proteger la zona. English source: When something is naval, it relates to a country’s navy or military ships. The country sent all of its naval forces to protect them.

English: pouch Meaning: Una bolsita es una pequeña bolsa flexible. Example: Guardo mi dinero en una bolsita pequeña. English source: A pouch is a small, flexible bag that is usually made of soft material. I keep my money in a small pouch.

English: saturated Meaning: Algo saturado está completamente mojado. Example: El pelo de Leigh se saturó de agua en la tormenta. English source: If something is saturated, it is completely wet. Leigh’s hair became saturated in the rainstorm.

English: update Meaning: Una actualización es la acción de poner algo más moderno o actual. Example: Mi teléfono está descargando una actualización de software. English source: An update is an act of making something more modern or current. My phone is downloading a software update.

English: attorney Meaning: Un abogado es quien asesora en temas de ley. Example: El abogado apareció frente al juez en mi lugar. English source: An attorney is one who gives others advice about the law. The attorney appeared in front of the judge for me.

English: chronic Meaning: Crónico significa que algo ocurre repetidamente durante mucho tiempo. Example: Él tenía dolor crónico en el pecho y necesitó ver al médico. English source: When something is chronic, it happens over and over again for a long time. He had chronic pain in his chest and needed to see a doctor.

English: discipline Meaning: La disciplina es entrenamiento para seguir reglas. Example: Una de las tareas de la maestra es enseñar disciplina a sus alumnos. English source: Discipline is training that helps people follow the rules. One of the teacher’s jobs is to teach her students discipline.

English: donor Meaning: Un donante es alguien que da algo a una organización. Example: Él estaba orgulloso de ser donante de sangre. English source: A donor is somebody who gives something to an organization. He was proud to be a blood donor.

English: fellow Meaning: Un compañero es alguien que comparte una profesión o cualidad. Example: Mis compañeros de pacientes del hospital también se quejaron de la comida. English source: A fellow is someone who shares a job or quality with someone else. All of my fellow patients at the hospital have also complained about the food.

English: gossip Meaning: El chisme son rumores o noticias discutidas, a veces falsas. Example: Las amigas intercambiaron chismes sobre personas de su escuela. English source: Gossip is information that might be untrue but is still discussed anyway. The friends exchanged gossip about the people they knew in school.

English: graduate Meaning: Graduarse es terminar y aprobar una escuela. Example: Al final de la primavera, mis amigos y yo nos graduaremos de secundaria. English source: To graduate from a school means to complete and pass all courses of study there. At the end of the spring, my friends and I will graduate from high school.

English: graffiti Meaning: El grafiti son palabras o dibujos en lugares públicos. Example: La pared estaba cubierta de grafiti colorido. English source: Graffiti is words or drawings in public places. The wall was covered with colorful graffiti.

English: guardian Meaning: Un guardián es alguien que protege algo o a alguien. Example: Los bibliotecarios son guardianes de los libros. English source: A guardian is someone who protects somebody or something. The librarians are the guardians of the books.

English: implicate Meaning: Implicar a alguien es mostrar que esa persona hizo algo malo. Example: El hombre fue implicado en el robo de la tienda. English source: To implicate someone is to show that they have done a crime or something bad. The man was implicated in the theft at the store.

English: kin Meaning: Los parientes de una persona son su familia cercana. Example: Sus parientes eran todos agricultores. English source: Kin is a person’s family and relatives. His kin were all farmers.

English: referee Meaning: Un árbitro asegura que se cumplan las reglas en los deportes. Example: Al futbolista no le gustó la decisión del árbitro. English source: A referee is a person who makes sure that the rules are followed in sports. The soccer player didn’t agree with the referee.

English: sever Meaning: Cortar algo por completo significa separar totalmente. Example: Cortó por completo la cuerda con las tijeras. English source: To sever something is to cut through it completely. He severed the string using scissors.

English: shaft Meaning: El mango es la empuñadura de una herramienta o arma. Example: Sostuvo el mango de la pala en su mano. English source: A shaft is a handle of a tool or weapon. The golf club had a long wooden shaft that he held in his hands.

English: stab Meaning: Apuñalar significa herir con la punta de un objeto cortante. Example: Ella apuñaló el tenedor en la papa y se lo dio a su hija. English source: To stab means to cut with the end of a sharp object like a knife. He stabbed the fork into the potato and passed it to his daughter.

English: stimulus Meaning: Un estímulo es algo que provoca crecimiento o actividad. Example: Tener mucho dinero puede ser un estímulo para comprar más cosas. English source: A stimulus is something that causes growth or activity. Having a lot of money is a stimulus for people to buy more things.

English: suspicion Meaning: Sospecha es una sensación de que algo es posible o verdadero en un crimen. Example: La policía tenía sospechas de que el conductor había robado el bolso. English source: A suspicion is a feeling that something is possible or true in a crime. The police had a suspicion that the driver had stolen the purse.

English: terminate Meaning: Terminar algo significa detenerlo o darle fin. Example: El viaje terminó cuando se rompió el coche. English source: To terminate something means to stop or end it. The trip was terminated after the car broke down.

English: theme Meaning: El tema es la idea principal de un libro, película o pintura. Example: Los estudiantes discutieron el tema del libro en clase. English source: A theme is the main subject of a book, movie, or painting. The students discussed the book’s theme in class.

English: tuition Meaning: La matrícula es la cantidad de dinero que se paga para ir a una escuela. Example: Las matrículas universitarias han subido 50 por ciento en cinco años. English source: Tuition is the amount of money paid to go to a school. University tuitions have increased by 50 percent in the last five years.

English: aggressive Meaning: Alguien agresivo tiende a pelear o discutir seguido. Example: Nadie quería jugar con él porque siempre era muy agresivo. English source: If someone is aggressive, then they constantly want to fight or argue. Nobody liked to play games with him because he was always too aggressive.

English: amnesty Meaning: La amnistía es un perdón dado a personas implicadas en una guerra. Example: Le negaron la amnistía por su participación en la guerra. English source: Amnesty is a pardon given to prisoners of war. She was denied amnesty for her involvement in the war.

English: arena Meaning: Una arena es un edificio donde se ven deportes o conciertos. Example: La nueva arena estaba lista para albergar el campeonato. English source: An arena is a building where people can watch sports and concerts. The new arena was all set to hold the championship match.

English: auditorium Meaning: Un auditorio es un gran edificio usado para eventos públicos. Example: La gente se reunió en el auditorio de la escuela para ver la obra. English source: An auditorium is a large building used for public events. People have gathered at the school auditorium to watch the play.

English: captive Meaning: Un cautivo es una persona prisionera. Example: Los guardias le dijeron al cautivo que no había forma de escapar. English source: A captive is a prisoner. The guards told the captive that there was no way he could escape the prison.

English: combat Meaning: El combate es una lucha entre dos personas o grupos. Example: Los dos guerreros estaban en combate. English source: Combat is fighting between two people or groups. The two warriors were locked in combat.

English: commonplace Meaning: Común significa ordinario o normal. Example: No hay nada común en la forma de vestir de Morris. English source: If something is commonplace, then it is ordinary. There is nothing commonplace about the way Morris dresses.

English: compound Meaning: Un recinto es un área cerrada como prisión o fábrica. Example: Los trabajadores esperaban fuera del recinto para que se abriera la fábrica. English source: A compound is an enclosed area such as a prison or factory. The workers waited outside the compound for the gates of the factory to open.

English: corps Meaning: Un cuerpo es una unidad de un cuerpo militar. Example: El ejército tenía un cuerpo de arqueros separados. English source: A corps is a division of a military force. The army had a corps of archers who trained apart from the regular soldiers.

English: distract Meaning: Distraer a alguien significa evitar que se concentre en algo. Example: La llamada distrajo tanto a Juan que se olvidó de la tarea. English source: To distract someone means to stop them from concentrating on something. The phone call distracted him so much that he forgot all about his homework.

English: dumb Meaning: Si alguien es mudo, no puede hablar. Example: Ella guardó el secreto. Se quedó callada como si fuera muda. English source: If someone is dumb, they are unable to speak. She did not share the secret. She remained as silent as if she were dumb.

English: foe Meaning: Un enemigo o rival es alguien que se opone. Example: Era difícil creer que alguien pudiera ser su enemigo. English source: A foe is an enemy or opponent. It was hard to believe that anyone could be his foe.

English: hack Meaning: Hender significa cortar algo en pedazos irregulares. Example: Mi tío usó el hacha para hender el árbol en varios troncos. English source: To hack something means to cut it into uneven pieces. My uncle used the ax to hack the tree into many logs.

English: meditate Meaning: Meditar significa reflexionar en silencio o concentrarse profundamente. Example: Le gustaba meditar durante varias horas cada día. English source: To meditate means to focus or think deeply in silence. She liked to meditate for several hours each day.

English: nick Meaning: Cortar algo levemente con un objeto afilado es nickearlo. Example: Mientras cortaba las zanahorias, el cocinero se cortó un poco con el cuchillo. English source: To nick something or someone means to cut them slightly with a sharp object. While cutting the carrots, the cook nicked his finger with the edge of his knife.

English: provoke Meaning: Provocar a alguien es molestarlo a propósito para causar violencia. Example: El chico mayor provocó a Paul llamándolo con apodos crueles. English source: To provoke someone means to annoy them on purpose to cause violence. The older boy provoked Paul by calling him mean names.

English: realm Meaning: Un ámbito o esfera es un área de actividad o interés. Example: Él no era muy activo en el ámbito empresarial. English source: A realm is any area of activity or interest. He was not very active in the realm of business.

English: reign Meaning: El reinado es el período en que manda un gobernante. Example: El reinado del emperador duró solo dos años. English source: A reign is the period of time in which a ruler rules. The emperor’s reign lasted for only two years.

English: rust Meaning: El óxido es una capa rojiza en hierro causada por agua y aire. Example: La vieja puerta de metal no se movía por la herrumbre en las bisagras. English source: Rust is a red and brown coating on iron objects caused by water and air. The old metal gate would not swing because the hinges were covered in rust.

English: sacred Meaning: Sagrado significa venerado y respetado. Example: Hay una religión en India que considera sagradas a las vacas. English source: If something is sacred, then it is worshipped and respected. One religion in India will not harm cows because it believes that they are sacred.

English: aesthetic Meaning: Estético se refiere al gusto por la belleza. Example: Los vestidos destacaban por su diseño estético. English source: If something is aesthetic, then it is concerned with a love of beauty. The dresses were noteworthy for their aesthetic design.

English: arrogant Meaning: Arrogante significa creer que uno vale más que los demás. Example: Es muy arrogante; aunque no sea jefe, le dice a todos qué hacer. English source: If someone is arrogant, they think that they are more important than others. He is very arrogant. Even though he’s not the boss, he tells everyone what to do.

English: bias Meaning: Sesgo es la tendencia de una persona a preferir una cosa más que otra. Example: Las madres tenían un sesgo natural por la foto de su propio hijo. English source: A bias is a person’s likelihood to like one thing more than another thing. The mothers had a natural bias for their own child’s picture.

English: canyon Meaning: Un cañón es un valle estrecho con paredes empinadas. Example: El cañón era tan profundo que el suelo estaba en sombra. English source: A canyon is a narrow valley with steep walls through which a river often flows. The canyon was so deep that the ground inside was covered in shadow.

English: creek Meaning: Un arroyo es un pequeño río o corriente. Example: Solo vivían peces pequeños en las aguas bajas del arroyo. English source: A creek is a stream or small river. Only small fish lived in the shallow waters of the creek.

English: drill Meaning: Un taladro es una herramienta con una punta giratoria para hacer agujeros. Example: El carpintero usó el taladro para hacer varios agujeros en la madera. English source: A drill is a tool with a point that spins in order to make a hole. The carpenter used the drill to make several holes in the wood.

English: executive Meaning: Un ejecutivo es el alto directivo de una empresa. Example: Después de veinte años, finalmente se convirtió en ejecutivo. English source: An executive is the top manager of a business. After twenty years at the company, he finally became the executive.

English: fatigue Meaning: Fatiga es cansancio extremo. Example: Después de tres días sin dormir, sentía mucha fatiga. English source: Fatigue is a feeling of extreme tiredness. After three days with little sleep, she was feeling a lot of fatigue.

English: incline Meaning: Una pendiente es una subida pronunciada, especialmente en una colina. Example: Esta montaña tiene una de las pendientes más empinadas del mundo. English source: An incline is a sharp rise in something, especially a hill or mountain. This mountain has one of the steepest inclines in the world.

English: nasty Meaning: Algo desagradable no es ni bonito ni agradable. Example: La manzana podrida dejó un sabor desagradable en su boca. English source: If something is nasty, then it is not nice or pleasant. The rotten apple left a nasty taste inside her mouth.

English: perceive Meaning: Percibir algo significa ser consciente de ello. Example: Hablaba tan fuerte que no percibió que la música se había detenido. English source: To perceive something means to be aware of it. He was talking loudly, so he did not perceive that the music had stopped.

English: primate Meaning: Un primate es un mamífero como monos, simios y humanos. Example: Los primates usan sus manos para tareas como columpiarse de las ramas. English source: A primate is a type of mammal that includes monkeys, apes, and humans. Primates use their hands for such tasks as swinging from branches.

English: primitive Meaning: Primitivo significa simple, básico y poco desarrollado. Example: Las computadoras de los años 80 eran primitivas comparadas con las actuales. English source: If something is primitive, then it is simple, basic, and not very developed. The computers of the 1980s are primitive compared to those of today.

English: stereotype Meaning: Un estereotipo es una idea general e incorrecta sobre una persona o cosa. Example: Hay un estereotipo de que los cerdos son sucios, pero no siempre es así. English source: A stereotype is a general but often incorrect idea about a person or thing. There’s a stereotype that pigs are dirty animals. But they are rather clean.

English: sticky Meaning: Pegajoso significa cubierto de algo a lo que se pega. Example: Pon la parte pegajosa de la cinta contra el papel para que se adhiera a la pared. English source: If something is sticky, then it is covered with a substance that things stick to. Place the sticky part of the tape against the paper, so it will cling to the wall.

English: termite Meaning: Una termita es un insecto que vive en grupos y come madera. Example: La madera que hallamos estaba llena de termitas. English source: A termite is an insect that lives in groups and feeds on wood. The wood we found was full of termites.

English: thereby Meaning: Por ello significa que algo ocurre como resultado de algo más. Example: No metió un gol, por ello terminó su oportunidad de romper el récord. English source: If we say that thereby something happens, we mean it is a result of something else. He didn’t score a goal, thereby ending his chance at setting a record.

English: trail Meaning: Un sendero es un camino para caminar por una zona natural. Example: Un sendero estrecho atravesaba el campo y subía por las colinas. English source: A trail is a path for travelling by foot through a wild area. A narrow trail cut through the field and over the hills.

English: twig Meaning: Una rama es una ramita corta y delgada de un árbol o arbusto. Example: Encendieron el fuego con un puñado de ramas secas. English source: A twig is a short and thin branch from a tree or bush. They started the fire with a handful of dry twigs.

English: welfare Meaning: El bienestar es la salud y felicidad de una persona o grupo. Example: Tener agua limpia es necesaria para el bienestar de la gente. English source: Welfare is the health and happiness of a person or group. Having plenty of clean water is necessary for the welfare of people.

English: behalf Meaning: Hacer algo en nombre de alguien es hacerlo por esa persona a través de otro. Example: El hablante original estaba enfermo y su hijo habló en su nombre. English source: If something is done on one’s behalf, it is done for that person by another. The original speaker was sick, so his son gave the speech on his behalf.

English: flap Meaning: Aletear o agitar significa mover rápidamente de arriba abajo o de lado a lado. Example: El pajarito agitación sus alas y se posó en las flores. English source: To flap means to move quickly up and down or from side to side. The tiny bird flapped its wings and ate from the flowers.

English: glacier Meaning: Un glaciar es una gran masa de hielo que se mueve muy lentamente. Example: El Polo Norte está cubierto por enormes glaciares. English source: A glacier is a large piece of ice that moves very slowly. The North Pole is covered by a huge glacier.

English: globe Meaning: El globo terráqueo se refiere a la Tierra. Example: El agua cubre la mayor parte del globo terráqueo. English source: The globe refers to the Earth. Water covers most of the globe.

English: horizontal Meaning: Algo horizontal es plano y paralelo al suelo. Example: La bandera rusa tiene tres franjas horizontales de blanco, azul y rojo. English source: When something is horizontal, it is fat and level with the ground. The Russian fag has three horizontal stripes of white, blue, and red.

English: hum Meaning: Zumbar significa hacer un ruido bajo y continuo. Example: El hombre tarareó su canción favorita. English source: To hum means to make a low, continuous noise. The man hummed his favorite song.

English: inventory Meaning: Un inventario es un registro de lo que se tiene. Example: Gwen revisaba el inventario para asegurar que tuviéramos lo necesario. English source: An inventory is a supply of something. Gwen was checking the inventory to make sure we had what we needed.

English: inward Meaning: Interno significa no expresado ni mostrado a los demás. Example: Tenía un sentimiento interno de culpa cuando le mintió a su madre. English source: If a thought or feeling is inward, it is not expressed or shown to others. She had an inward feeling of guilt when she lied to her mother.

English: loaf Meaning: Una hogaza es un pan redondo y grande. Example: ¿Puedes comprar una hogaza de pan para los sándwiches? English source: A loaf of bread is bread shaped and baked in one piece. Could you please buy a loaf of bread for sandwiches?

English: oracle Meaning: Un oráculo es una persona que habla con dioses y aconseja sobre el futuro. Example: El rey consultó al oráculo para preguntar si convenía ir a la guerra. English source: An oracle is a person who speaks with gods and gives advice about the future. The king went to the oracle to ask if going to war was a good idea.

English: orbit Meaning: Orbitar algo significa moverse alrededor suyo en trayectoria curva. Example: La Luna orbita la Tierra. English source: To orbit something means to move around it in a continuous, curving path. The Moon orbits the Earth.

English: overview Meaning: Una visión general es una descripción general de una situación. Example: Mi hermano me dio una visión general de las partes importantes del libro. English source: An overview is a general description of a situation. My brother gave me an overview of the important parts of the book.

English: preview Meaning: Un avance es una vista previa de algo antes de que esté disponible. Example: La banda nos tocó un avance de su nueva canción. English source: A preview is an opportunity to see something before it is available to the public. The band played us a preview of their new song.

English: previous Meaning: Anterior significa que ocurrió antes, en el tiempo o en el orden. Example: Volvió a la página anterior para releer el párrafo. English source: If something is previous, then it happened earlier in time or order. He turned back to the previous page to read the paragraph again.

English: provide Meaning: Proporcionar significa suministrar algo. Example: Cada estudiante recibió una prueba y tres lápices bien afilados. English source: To provide something means to supply it. Each student was provided with a test and three sharp pencils.

English: recur Meaning: Repetirse significa suceder más de una vez. Example: Los robos parecen repetirse una y otra vez en nuestro barrio. English source: To recur means to happen more than once. Burglaries seem to recur over and over in our neighborhood.

English: relevant Meaning: Algo relevante es importante para una persona o situación. Example: El libro de hace 30 años aún es muy relevante para nuestra sociedad. English source: When something is relevant, it is important to a certain person or situation. The 30-year-old book about politics is still relevant to our society today.

English: rite Meaning: Un rito es una ceremonia tradicional de un grupo. Example: Se usan máscaras durante el rito cuando nace un bebé. English source: A rite is a traditional ceremony carried out by a particular group or society. Special masks are worn during the rite when a new baby is born.

English: stall Meaning: Detener o retrasar algo para continuarlo después es frenar. Example: Si empujas el coche, no se frenará. English source: To stall means to stop a process and continue it at a later time. If you give the car a push, it won’t stall.

English: supernatural Meaning: Sobrenatural es algo que no existe según las leyes naturales. Example: El dragón tenía poderes sobrenaturales, como volar y escupir fuego. English source: If something is supernatural, it is not real or explainable by laws of nature. The dragon had supernatural powers, such as flying and breathing fire.

English: aquarium Meaning: Un acuario es un lugar donde se mantienen peces y animales acuáticos. Example: Fuimos al acuario y vimos un tiburón asombroso. English source: An aquarium is a place where fish and underwater animals are kept. We took a trip to the aquarium and saw a scary shark.

English: arbitrary Meaning: Arbitrario significa sin un sistema, por eso parece aleatorio. Example: La clase tenía reglas arbitrarias que me confundían. English source: If something is arbitrary, it is not based on any plan or system, so it seems random. The classroom had many arbitrary rules that confused me.

English: autobiography Meaning: Una autobiografía es la historia real de una vida escrita por esa persona. Example: Leí una autobiografía de mi artista favorito. English source: An autobiography is a true story of a person’s life written by that person. I read an autobiography about my favorite entertainer.

English: convention Meaning: Una convención son normas o costumbres sociales comunes. Example: En Estados Unidos, una convención popular es saludar con la mano al conocerse. English source: A convention is behavior that is considered to be common or polite. In the US, a popular convention is to shake hands when you meet someone.

English: gracious Meaning: Una persona cortés es amable y servicial con quien lo necesita. Example: El operador fue tan cortés que me ayudó a encontrar el número. English source: If someone is gracious, then they are kind and helpful to those who need it. The operator was gracious enough to help me find the number.

English: improve Meaning: Mejorar algo significa hacerlo mejor. Example: Estudió mucho para mejorar sus calificaciones de examen respecto al año anterior. English source: To improve something means to make it better. He studied hard to improve his test scores from the previous year.

English: insulate Meaning: Aislar significa proteger de calor, frío o ruido. Example: La gente puede ahorrar energía aislando sus casas. English source: To insulate something means to protect it from heat, cold, or noise. People can conserve energy by insulating their houses.

English: intrigue Meaning: Intrigar significa causar interés en alguien o algo. Example: Su pasado misterioso intrigó a su nuevo amigo. English source: To intrigue means to cause an interest in something or someone. Her mysterious past intrigued her new friend.

English: longevity Meaning: La longevidad es la capacidad de vivir mucho tiempo. Example: Las tortugas marinas tienen una longevidad asombrosa. English source: Longevity is the ability to live for a long time. Sea turtles have an amazing longevity.

English: misplace Meaning: Extraviar algo significa perderlo. Example: Extravié mi billetera y no la encontré hasta una semana después. English source: To misplace something means to lose it. I misplaced my wallet, and I didn’t find it until a week later.

English: naughty Meaning: Naughty significa comportarse mal o no obedecer. Example: El chico tuvo que ir a su cuarto porque era travieso. English source: When children are naughty, they behave badly or do not do what they are told. The boy had to go to his room because he was being naughty.

English: norm Meaning: Una norma es una forma de comportamiento considerada normal en una sociedad. Example: Usar abrigo grueso todo el verano no es una norma. English source: A norm is a way of behaving that is considered normal in a particular society. Wearing a heavy coat all summer is not considered a norm.

English: orangutan Meaning: Un orangután es un gran simio de pelo rojo-marrón y brazos largos. Example: Los orangutanes usan sus largos brazos para columpiarse de los árboles. English source: An orangutan is a large ape with red and brown hair and long arms. Orangutans use their long arms to swing from trees.

English: overload Meaning: Sobrecargar algo significa meter más de lo que puede sostener. Example: Si sobrecargas el camión, podría accidentarse. English source: To overload something means to put more things into it than it is meant to hold. If you overload the truck, it might crash.

English: philanthropy Meaning: La filantropía es ayudar a los demás sin esperar nada a cambio. Example: El empresario rico es conocido por sus actos de filantropía. English source: Philanthropy is the act of helping others without wanting anything in return. The wealthy business owner is well known for his acts of philanthropy.

English: probe Meaning: Sondear algo significa investigar preguntando para descubrir hechos. Example: El banco sondeó su historial financiero para saber si calificaba para un préstamo. English source: To probe into something means to ask questions to discover facts about it. The bank probed into his financial history to see if he qualified for a loan.

English: recipient Meaning: Un receptor es la persona que recibe algo. Example: Fui receptor de cuatro llamadas telefónicas hoy. English source: A recipient of something is the person who receives it. I was the recipient of four phone calls today.

English: reptile Meaning: Un reptil es un animal de sangre fría con escamas y huevos. Example: Las lagartijas son mi tipo favorito de reptiles. English source: A reptile is a cold-blooded animal that lays eggs and has skin covered with scales. Lizards are my favorite type of reptile.

English: thrive Meaning: Prosperar significa hacerlo bien y mantenerse exitoso, sano o fuerte. Example: Aunque es mayor, él sigue prosperando. English source: To thrive means to do well and be successful, healthy, or strong. He may be an old man, but he continues to thrive.

English: ultimate Meaning: Definitivo es el resultado o meta final de una secuencia larga. Example: Con esfuerzo en la escuela, alcanzaré mi meta definitiva: ser médico. English source: When something is ultimate, it is the final result or aim of a long series of events. By trying hard in school, I will reach my ultimate goal of becoming a doctor.
