English source: If something is analogous to another thing, then it is like it in certain ways. The relationship with his teacher was analogous to that of a son and mother.

English: binoculars Meaning: Los binoculares son un dispositivo para ver cosas lejanas. Example: Solo pudo ver el barco en el horizonte cuando usó sus binoculares. English source: Binoculars are a device used for seeing things that are far away. He could see the ship on the horizon only if he used his binoculars.

English: bulk Meaning: La masa es el tamaño de algo. Example: El elefante grande movía su enorme masa con patas tan fuertes como troncos de árbol. English source: The bulk of something is its size. The large elephant moved its bulk with legs as strong as tree trunks.

English: comprise Meaning: Si algo consta de algo más, significa que se compone o está formado por ello. Example: Nuestro equipo de fútbol escolar está compuesto en su mayoría por alumnos de último curso. English source: If something comprises something else, it consists of or is made up of it. Our school’s football team is mostly comprised with seniors.

English: depict Meaning: Representar algo significa mostrarlo o retratarlo, a menudo con arte. Example: La cara de la estatua retrataba la determinación y el coraje del general. English source: To depict something means to show or portray it, often using art. The statue’s face depicted the general’s determination and courage.

English: dual Meaning: Dual significa que está formado por dos partes. Example: La habitación tenía una función dual: era sala de estar y de noche dormitorio. English source: If something is dual, then it is made up of two parts. The room had a dual function. It was a living room, but at night it was a bedroom.

English: Fahrenheit Meaning: Fahrenheit es una escala de temperatura donde el agua congela a 32° y hierve a 212°. Example: Cuando la temperatura bajó a 32 grados Fahrenheit, empezó a nevar. English source: Fahrenheit is a temperature scale where water freezes at 32° and boils at 212°. When the temperature dropped to 32° Fahrenheit, it started snowing.

English: fulfill Meaning: Cumplir algo significa lograrlo o terminarlo. Example: El profesor no cumplió su promesa de no faltar a ninguna clase. English source: To fulfill something means to achieve or finish it. The professor did not fulfill his promise not to miss a single class.

English: grove Meaning: Una arboleda es un pequeño grupo de árboles. Example: Todos los árboles de está arboleda son manzanos. English source: A grove is a small group of trees. All the trees in this grove are apple trees.

English: ore Meaning: La mena es la materia prima de roca o material del que se extrae un metal valioso. Example: La fábrica fundió la mena y la usó para hacer productos de hierro. English source: Ore is the raw form of rock or material from which a valuable metal is taken. The factory melted the ore and used it to make iron products.

English: outback Meaning: El outback es la región interior de Australia donde vive muy poca gente. Example: Muchos granjeros australianos usan el outback para criar ganado. English source: The outback is the wild inland region of Australia where very few people live. Many Australian farmers use the outback to raise cattle. Notes: Ambigüedad: también se usa “interior australiano”.

English: outweigh Meaning: Prevalecer significa ser más importante o tener más peso que otra necesidad. Example: Encontrar un lugar cálido para dormir fue más importante que encontrar algo para comer. English source: To outweigh something means to exceed it in value, amount, or importance. Finding a warm place to sleep outweighed the need to find something to eat.

English: paradox Meaning: Una paradoja es una afirmación o hecho verdadero que parece ilógico. Example: La paradoja de su trabajo era que cuanto menos trabajaba, más terminaba. English source: A paradox is a true statement or real event that seems illogical. The paradox of her work was that the less she worked, the more she got done.

English: pier Meaning: Un muelle es una estructura que se extiende hacia una masa de agua. Example: Si quieres pescar peces más grandes, ve al final del muelle. English source: A pier is a structure that extends into a body of water. If you want to catch bigger fish, then go to the far end of the pier.

English: shortcut Meaning: Un atajo es una ruta más corta que la ruta principal. Example: Llegamos temprano a casa porque tomamos un atajo por el bosque. English source: A shortcut is a route that is shorter than the main route. We got to the house early because we took a shortcut through the forest.

English: tariff Meaning: Un arancel es un impuesto o tarifa sobre ciertas importaciones o exportaciones. Example: Nuestro arancel sobre la lana importada encarece la lana extranjera. English source: A tariff is a tax or fee paid on certain imports or exports. Our tariff on imported wool makes foreign wool more expensive.

English: thermometer Meaning: El termómetro es un aparato que mide la temperatura. Example: El termómetro de la ventana indicaba que hoy hacía un día muy caluroso. English source: A thermometer is a device that measures temperature. The thermometer outside the window indicated that it was a hot day today.

English: tilt Meaning: Inclinar algo significa ponerlo en una posición inclinada. Example: Ella inclinó su vaso y casi derramó algo de vino. English source: To tilt something means to tip it into a sloping position. She tilted her glass and almost spilled some of the wine inside.

English: vice versa Meaning: “Viceversa” significa invertir el orden de las dos ideas principales. Example: Los estudiantes aprenden de sus profesores, y viceversa. English source: If a statement is vice versa, then its two main ideas are switched with one another. Students learn from their teachers, and vice versa.

English: whereabouts Meaning: El paradero de alguien o algo es el lugar donde está. Example: La policía buscó al perro perdido, pero su paradero seguía siendo desconocido. English source: The whereabouts of someone or something is the place where they are. The police looked for the lost dog, but its whereabouts were still unknown.
